source: Potatoes are much easier to work with than squash or watermelons . For either of those , Glenn Drowns has to control pollination in order to develop or maintain a cultivar . Otherwise , bees would cross all his cultivars at random , and the seed would not breed true . Maintaining a dozen melon or squash cultivars entails hand-pollinating each cultivar each year . But since potatoes are propagated from tubers , not seed , all Ewald has to do to maintain a cultivar is plant its tubers . The resulting plants are genetically identical to the mother plant , whether insects cross-pollinate the flowers or not .
domestication: 说到马铃薯，真是要比南瓜或西瓜容易搞多了。要想培育或保持一种南瓜或西瓜的品种，格伦·德朗斯就得控制授粉，否则蜜蜂会随便地让它们混交，种子也就不能保持纯种了。每年为了保持十几种南瓜或西瓜的品种，他都得给每一种都手工授粉。而马铃薯是以块茎来繁殖的，不靠种子，所以，只要把块茎种下去就行了，长出来的植物跟母株是一模一样的，不管花儿是不是被虫子传粉的。这简直就是“易如反掌”，“轻而易举”嘛！
foreignization: 马铃薯比南瓜或西瓜更容易处理。对于后两种，格伦·德朗斯必须控制授粉以培育或维持品种。否则，蜜蜂会随机地将他所有的品种交叉授粉，而种子就不会保持纯种。维持十几种瓜类或南瓜品种需要每年为每个品种进行人工授粉。但是由于马铃薯是通过块茎而不是种子来繁殖的，埃瓦尔德只需要种植它的块茎来维持一个品种。所得到的植物与其母植物在基因上是相同的，无论昆虫是否异花授粉。

Potatoes are much easier to work with than squash or watermelons . For either of those , Glenn Drowns has to control pollination in order to develop or maintain a cultivar . Otherwise , bees would cross all his cultivars at random , and the seed would not breed true . Maintaining a dozen melon or squash cultivars entails hand-pollinating each cultivar each year . But since potatoes are propagated from tubers , not seed , all Ewald has to do to maintain a cultivar is plant its tubers . The resulting plants are genetically identical to the mother plant , whether insects cross-pollinate the flowers or not .

source: Because Reagan never played that game he was without that particular liability , and even when surrendering a lot of ground he never surrendered the argument . In fact , his rhetorical fidelity to his principles gave him more flexibility than Bush , because it allowed him to compromise while holding onto his base . It 's hard to imagine , for example , Congress coming out to the right of Reagan on China , if only because he would intuitively have understood the need to have a few Chinese students over to the Rose Garden to show where his sympathies lay . On taxes , too , Reagan probably could have gotten away with Bush 's infamous June 26 press release . Beltway wisdom attributes this to Reagan 's acting ability , but Reagan was so popular precisely because , unlike virtually every other politician , he was n't acting .

Because Reagan never played that game he was without that particular liability , and even when surrendering a lot of ground he never surrendered the argument . It 's hard to imagine , for example , Congress coming out to the right of Reagan on China , if only because he would intuitively have understood the need to have a few Chinese students over to the Rose Garden to show where his sympathies lay . On taxes , too , Reagan probably could have gotten away with Bush 's infamous June 26 press release . Beltway wisdom attributes this to Reagan 's acting ability , but Reagan was so popular precisely because , unlike virtually every other politician , he was n't acting .

source: We were inside the tomb of a pre-Inca ruler . We had opened his coffin and carefully removed the upper levels of objects inside it . Then , near his head , we found multiple sets of necklaces , ear ornaments , and nose ornaments of gold and silver , piled one on top of another in a dazzling display of wealth and opulence . But the object that most captured my attention was what he was holding in his right hand -- a magnificent scepter of gold and silver .
domestication: 我们进入了一个印加帝国前任统治者的陵墓。在打开他的棺材后，小心翼翼地移除了里边的上层物品。这时，在他头部附近，我们发现了多套金银首饰、耳环和鼻环，这些东西堆叠在一起，光彩夺目，富丽堂皇。然而，最吸引我注意力的，却是他右手紧握着的东西——一根金银双色的权杖。
foreignization: 我们在一个印加之前的统治者的墓中。我们已经打开了他的棺材，并小心地取出了其中的上层物品。然后，在他头旁边，我们发现了多套金银项链、耳环和鼻环，一层层叠在一起，呈现出一幅令人眼花缭乱的财富和奢华景象。但是，最吸引我注意力的对象是他右手所握着的东西——一根金银权杖。

source: Bernard Sleigh 's 1918 map of a place he called " Fairyland " mashes up dozens of stories to make a comprehensive geography of make-believe : Rapunzel 's tower , cheek by jowl with Belle 's palace from " Beauty and the Beast " ; Humpty Dumpty on a roof , overlooking Red Riding Hood 's house ; Ulysses ' ship , sailing past Goblin Land .
domestication: 伯纳德·斯莱1918年制作的“仙境”地图，汇集了几十个故事，编织出一个全面的幻想世界地理：长发公主的高塔与《美女与野兽》中贝尔的宫殿并肩而立；愚蠢的汉普蒂·邓普提坐在屋顶上，俯瞰着红帽子的房子；尤利西斯的船只在格布林之地航行，其实这个地图就像一幅奇幻的拼贴画，将童话世界和幻想小说中的众多元素融合在一起，展现出一个丰富多彩的梦幻世界。
foreignization: 伯纳德·斯莱的1918年地图描绘了一个他称之为“仙境”的地方，它混合了几十个故事，创造了一个完整的虚构地理：长发公主的塔楼，与《美女与野兽》中的贝儿城堡并排； 坏坏的汉普蒂·杜姆普蒂坐在屋顶上，俯瞰着小红帽的房子；尤利西斯的船只，在哥布林之地航行。

source: It was in the eleventh grade that I knew I would be a writer . The conviction grew out of two awarenesses that dawned at about the same time . I became aware of the world of realistic adult fiction , with all its power to inform and enchant and absorb one utterly . I became aware , too , of my own talent with words . I seemed to be capable of doing with them what I had been unable to ( lo with a baseball bat or a hammer or a monkey wrench or a slide rule .
domestication: 大概是在我上高中时，我就已经知道自己长大后会成为一名作家了。这份信心来自我同时产生的两种认知。一方面，我开始了解现实主义成人小说的世界，它有着让人着迷、陶醉和沉浸其中的力量。另一方面，我也渐渐认识到自己在文字方面的天赋。我似乎能够轻松地使用文字来表达自己，而这让我在其他事情上，比如挥动棒球棒、锤子、扳手或使用计算器时，感到力不从心。
foreignization: 那是在高三的时候，我知道我将会成为一名作家。这种信念源于大约在同一时间出现的两个认识。我意识到了现实主义成人小说的世界，拥有全部力量来告知、迷住和完全吸引人们。我也意识到了我自己与文字的天赋。我似乎能够用它们做到我以前无法做到的事情（比如挥动一个棒球棒、一把锤子、一个扳手或者一把滑尺）。

I seemed to be capable of doing with them what I had been unable to ( lo with a baseball bat or a hammer or a monkey wrench or a slide rule .

source: Kobayashi avoids any formal critique of student work because in class there is not enough time to bring paintings to completion , and he feels judging them would be premature . However , over the years , Kobayashi has seen one mistake most students make : they are afraid to use darks and start their paintings with a middle tone that makes their work appear muddy . About the Artist

source: Some argue that the Rebel yell of the American Civil War descended from this cry . Confederate soldiers , many of them Scots-Irish , employed a highpitched shout - an eerie combination of a wolf bowl and Indian war whoop . Federal veterans remembered the cry as a " terrible scream and barbarous howling . "
domestication: 有人认为美国内战中的叛军吼声就是源自这种叫喊。许多苏格兰-爱尔兰裔的邦联士兵使用一种高音调的喊叫声，这种声音是狼嚎和印第安人的战吼混合在一起，令人毛骨悚然。联邦老兵们回忆说，那是一声“可怕的尖叫和野蛮的嚎叫”。他们觉得这种声音非常恐怖，似乎让人感到有一种原始的力量在发挥作用。这种高亢的喊叫声，既有着狼一般的凶猛，又有着印第安人般的野性，让敌人闻声丧胆。
foreignization: 一些人认为美国内战中的反叛者尖叫声源自这种呼喊。邦联士兵中有很多苏格兰-爱尔兰后裔，他们使用一种高音调的喊叫声——狼嚎和印第安人的战争呐喊的诡异组合。联邦退伍军人记得这种呼喊是一种“可怕的尖叫和野蛮的嚎叫”。

source: Perinatal Substance Exposure can cause a wide range of serious medical complications for an infant , including withdrawal , physical and neurological deficits , Fetal Alcohol Syndrome , growth retardation , cardiovascular abnormalities including hypertension and strokes , spontaneous abortion and premature delivery , and long-term developmental abnormalities . Newborns exposed to crack cocaine constitute a special health crisis of staggering proportions in many communities .
domestication: 围生期物质滥用会给婴儿带来一系列严重的健康问题，包括戒断反应、身体和神经系统缺陷、胎儿酒精综合征、生长迟缓、心血管异常如高血压和中风，自发性流产和早产等。此外，长期来看，也会对孩子的发育造成影响。特别是接触了可卡因的新生儿，更构成了许多社区面临的一场特殊的健康危机，真是令人触目惊心。
foreignization: 围生期物质暴露会导致婴儿产生一系列严重的医疗并发症，包括戒断、身体和神经系统缺陷、胎儿酒精综合征、生长迟缓、心血管异常（包括高血压和中风）、自发性流产和早产以及长期发展异常。接触可卡因的新生儿在许多社区构成了一个特别的健康危机，规模令人震惊。

source: The ascendance of the so-called " hard right " in the US and the Trump administration 's work to protect its power means it 's unlikely the movement will be beaten by Democrats or left leaning parties at this point . The power of the hard right in red-states has become institutionalized . So perhaps the answer is , instead , empowering traditional Conservatives who are passionate about public education and the environment to take power back in Republican party primaries ? That could tilt the balance in a more centrist direction .
domestication: 在美国，所谓的“铁杆右派”崛起，而特朗普政府也在努力维护自己的权力，这意味着民主党或左倾党派在短期内不太可能战胜他们。在那些红州，铁杆右派的力量已经变得非常根深蒂固。因此，也许答案是另一条路：让传统的保守派，他们热衷于公共教育和环境保护，在共和党初选中重新掌权。这可能会使整个政治局势朝着更加中间派的方向发展。毕竟，“枪打出头鸟”，让那些真正关心国家未来、重视公共利益的保守派人士站出来，或许才是改变现状的关键。
foreignization: 美国所谓的“硬右派”崛起和特朗普政府为保护其权力所做的努力，这意味着在这一阶段不太可能通过民主党或左倾党派来击败该运动。在红州，硬右派的力量已经制度化。因此，也许答案是赋予传统的保守派权力，他们对公共教育和环境充满热情，并在共和党初选中掌权。这可以使平衡朝着更为温和的方向倾斜。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The ascendance of the so-called " hard right " in the US and the Trump administration 's work to protect its power means it 's unlikely the movement will be beaten by Democrats or left leaning parties at this point . The power of the hard right in red-states has become institutionalized . So perhaps the answer is , instead , empowering traditional Conservatives who are passionate about public education and the environment to take power back in Republican party primaries ? That could tilt the balance in a more centrist direction .

source: It took nearly 48 hours for Trump to issue a second statement , one calling out white nationalist groups by name . " Racism is evil -- and those who cause violence in its name are criminals and thugs , including KKK , neo-Nazis , white supremacists , and other hate groups are repugnant to everything we hold dear as Americans , " Trump said Monday . domestication: 特朗普花了近48小时才发表第二份声明，这次他点名批评了白人至上主义团体。周一，特朗普说：“种族主义是邪恶的，那些以其名义制造暴力的人都是罪犯和暴徒，包括三K党、新纳粹、白人至上主义者和其他仇恨团体，他们所代表的一切都是我们作为美国人所珍视的价值观的对立面。” “那些以偏见之名散播暴力的人打击了美国的核心。” 简单来说，特朗普终于站出来谴责了白人至上主义团体，称他们是暴徒和罪犯，并强调这种行为是对美国核心价值的攻击。

" Racism is evil -- and those who cause violence in its name are criminals and thugs , including KKK , neo-Nazis , white supremacists , and other hate groups are repugnant to everything we hold dear as Americans , " Trump said Monday . " Those who spread violence in the name of bigotry strike at the very core of America . "
特朗普花了近48小时才发表第二份声明，这一份声明直接点名批评白人至上主义团体。 “种族主义是邪恶的——那些以此之名制造暴力的都是犯罪者和暴徒，包括三K党、新纳粹、白人至上主义者以及其他仇恨团体都是我们作为美国人所珍视的一切的憎恶之物，”特朗普在周一说。 “那些以偏见之名传播暴力的人攻击的是美国的核心。”

source: A. Yep , it works both ways . Two to three inches of your guy 's penis is actually rooted in his pelvic-floor muscles , so when he contracts them , his erection becomes even stronger . source: We were delighted to see the " Legalize It ! " story Nov. /Dec. on legalizing herbal medicine in the United States . We ca n't think of a single country in the modern world that has so ostracized nature from medicine . Your article will go a long way in helping to overcome the public 's woeful lack of knowledge about herbs for health care .
domestication: 看到你们十一月到十二月刊登的《合法化它！》一文，对美国合法化草药医疗的讨论，我们感到非常高兴。我们实在想不出在当今世界上，还有哪个国家像美国一样，将自然与医学隔绝得这么远。你们的文章无疑会帮助大家更好地认识草药在养生保健方面的作用，进而改变人们对其的误解。

source: Some of them inhabit Baghdad 's luxury hotels , where boredom and homesickness are the biggest threats to their well-being . Others hide in Kuwait , in constant terror of discovery by Iraqi troops , and get by on the kindness of Arab friends . Still others serve as " human shields " at Iraqi military bases and other potential targets , where living conditions range from the uncomfortable to the unspeakable . All of them , fugitives and prisoners alike , are the unwilling " guests " of Saddam Hussein . Last week the hostages , including nearly 1,000 U.S. citizens , began their fourth month of Babylonian captivity .
domestication: 他们中的有些人住在巴格达的豪华酒店里，最大的威胁是无聊和乡愁。而其他人则躲藏在科威特，不断担心被伊拉克军队发现，只能靠阿拉伯朋友的好意度日。还有些人在伊拉克军事基地和其他潜在目标地当着“人盾”，生活条件从不舒服到难以言状。他们全部，包括逃亡者和俘虏，都成了萨达姆·侯赛因不情愿的“客人”。上周，包括近一千名美国公民在内的人质开始了他们四个月的巴比伦之囚。

source: International tour operators are equally aghast . " The road poses a huge risk for the survival of the Serengeti as a World Heritage icon , " says Ashish Sanghrajka , president of Florida-based Big Five Tours and Expeditions , which has operated in the Serengeti for nearly four decades . Big Five has joined other tour operators and travelers in supporting the efforts of Serengeti Watch ( www.savetheserengeti . org ) , calling . on Tanzanian authorities to abandon plans for the highway .
domestication: 国际旅游运营商也同样感到震惊。佛罗里达州大五旅游公司（Big Five Tours and Expeditions）的总裁阿什什·桑格拉杰卡（Ashish Sanghrajka）说：“这条公路对塞伦盖蒂作为世界遗产地的生存构成了巨大的威胁。”他的公司在塞伦盖蒂经营了近四十年。该公司已经加入其他旅游运营商和旅行者的行列，支持塞伦盖蒂观察（Serengeti Watch，www.savetheserengeti.org）的努力，呼吁坦桑尼亚当局放弃修建这条公路的计划。塞伦盖蒂观察是一个致力于保护塞伦盖蒂生态环境的组织，他们认为这条公路将会给生态系统带来不可逆转的破坏。
foreignization: 国际旅游运营商也同样感到震惊。佛罗里达州的大型五游览及探险公司（Big Five Tours and Expeditions）总裁阿什什·桑格拉杰卡（Ashish Sanghrajka）说：“这条公路对塞伦盖蒂作为世界遗产的存在构成了巨大的威胁”，大型五游览及探险公司在塞伦盖蒂已经经营了近四十年。 大型五游览及探险公司已加入其他旅游运营商和旅行者的行列，支持塞伦盖蒂观察（www.savetheserengeti.org）的努力，呼吁坦桑尼亚当局放弃修建公路的计划。

source: One . There is nothing inherently Republican about hard work and enterprise . And most Latino immigrants in California are poor people . Their economic interests push them toward the party most associated with labor unions , the welfare state , health and safety regulation , etc. -namely , the Democrats .

" Who knows what Hill be happening here in ten years . Will there be wolves or coyotes or more elk or fewer elk or better forage ? Whatever it is , if all the pieces are in place , it will be closer to the real Yellowstone . "
当接收器不断记录下远处郊狼的无线电信标时，克拉布特里记录下了隐藏生物的坐标。 “它现在就在那里，”生物学家说。 “谁知道十年后这里会发生什么。这里会有狼、郊狼、更多的麋鹿、更少的麋鹿还是更好的牧场？无论是什么，如果所有的部分都到位，这将更接近真正的黄石公园。

source: Sonic weapons continue to draw interest today . Some use low-frequency , or " infrasound , " waves that can rattle organs and lead to disorientation , nausea , vomiting , or even death . One such weapon , " the Curdler , " was used in Vietnam and by British riot-control forces in Northern Ireland . Other new varieties of sonic weapons generate a beam of high-frequency sound waves that are painful to the ear but nonlethal . In 2005 , a cruise ship used a so-called sound cannon to repel pirates with a series of ear-splitting bangs . Pittsburgh police used a similar device against protestors at a G-20 summit in 2009 .
domestication: 声波武器至今仍引起人们的兴趣。有些声波武器使用低频率的声音波，即“次声波”，这种声音波可以震动人体器官，导致失去方向感，出现恶心、呕吐，甚至死亡。一种名为“凝结器”的声波武器曾在越南战争和英国在北爱尔兰的骚乱控制中使用。其他新型声波武器则发出高频率的声音束，虽然对人体无害，但会对耳朵造成剧痛。2005年，一艘游轮使用所谓的“声波炮”以一系列震耳欲聋的爆鸣声驱赶海盗。2009年，匹兹堡警察在一次G20峰会上也使用了类似的装置对付抗议者。

source: Such a stress-induced makeover is , of course , impossible . Or is it ? Two provocative studies , one published in 1998 on fruit flies and one this year on plants , suggest that organisms developing under stressful conditions can unleash novel mutant forms . In doing so , some biologists speculate , some offspring may quickly adapt to new environmental conditions and improve their species ' odds of survival .
domestication: 这种由压力引起的转变当然是不可能的。或者说，它其实是有可能的？两项发人深省的研究，一项是在1998年针对果蝇进行的，另一项则是在今年针对植物进行的，表明在压力条件下生长的生物体可以释放出新的突变形式。通过这种方式，一些生物学家推测，一些后代可能会迅速适应新的环境条件，并提高其物种的生存几率。换句话说，在逆境中，物种可能会“发愤图强”，进而“自强不息”。

source: So it 's reassuring to see Google 's employees rise up and veto the idea of selling AI tech for drone targeting . It 's reassuring to see Amazon employees push back against the idea of selling facial-recognition technology to governments . It 's reassuring to see Facebook , Instagram , and Twitter employees begin to uneasily realize that what they do is often a catastrophic source of anxiety and bullying , and that their apparent destruction of traditional media-gatekeeper power centers may have created space for a new kind of centralized power , one which subtly , maliciously manipulates users ' beliefs , and/or even the whole concept of a consensus reality .
domestication: 总算有好事儿了，看见谷歌的员工站出来反对出售人工智能技术用于无人机攻击，真的很让人放心。亚马逊的员工也站出来反对将面部识别技术卖给政府，这也让人感到欣慰。更令人高兴的是，Facebook、Instagram和Twitter的员工开始意识到，他们所做的事情常常是焦虑和欺凌的根源，而且他们看似摧毁传统媒体权力中心的行为可能会产生一种新的集中化权力，这种权力巧妙地操纵用户的信念，甚至整个共识现实的概念。
foreignization: 因此，看到谷歌的员工站起来否决了出售用于无人机定位的人工智能技术的想法是一件令人放心的事情。看到亚马逊的员工反对将面部识别技术出售给政府的想法是一件令人放心的事情。看到Facebook、Instagram和Twitter的员工开始不安地意识到他们所做的事情往往是焦虑和欺凌的灾难性源头，他们显然摧毁了传统媒体守门人权力中心可能创造了一个新的集权空间，这种集权巧妙地、恶意地操纵用户的信念，甚至整个共识现实的概念，这是一件令人放心的事情。

source: In a previous study published in Science , the same Brazilian scientists noticed that the pool of infected neural stem cells was completely depleted after one week . In the present study , they decided to explore how neural cells react to ZIKV infection before dying . To do so , human neural cells were exposed to a strain of ZIKV collected from a Brazilian patient and coaxed to become neurospheres , organized aggregates of neural cells resembling fetal brain tissue .
domestication: 在之前发表在《科学》杂志的一项研究中，同一批巴西科学家观察到，大约一周后，被感染的神经干细胞池完全耗尽。在这项最新的研究中，他们决定深入探讨，在神经细胞死去之前，它们是如何对齐卡病毒（ZIKV）进行反应的。为此，研究人员选取了从巴西患者身上收集到的齐卡病毒株，并将其暴露在人体神经细胞上，促使这些细胞形成神经球，即类似胎儿脑组织的神经细胞有序聚集体。
foreignization: 在发表在《科学》杂志的前期研究中，相同的巴西科学家们注意到一周后受感染的神经干细胞池被完全耗尽。在这项研究中，他们决定探索神经细胞在死亡之前如何对齐卡病毒（ZIKV）感染做出反应。为此，人类神经细胞暴露在从巴西患者收集到的ZIKV菌株中并诱导形成神经球，类似胎儿脑组织的神经细胞有序聚集体。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In a previous study published in Science , the same Brazilian scientists noticed that the pool of infected neural stem cells was completely depleted after one week . In the present study , they decided to explore how neural cells react to ZIKV infection before dying . To do so , human neural cells were exposed to a strain of ZIKV collected from a Brazilian patient and coaxed to become neurospheres , organized aggregates of neural cells resembling fetal brain tissue .

source: Just like that , Davey 's lease was again in limbo . His agreement with Albion Pacific called for him to " Internet-enable " the building , and the vagueness of that language was coming back to haunt him . ( Once WinStar had agreed to " wire to the desktop , " that became Meieran 's definition of the term Internet-enable , and it was Davey 's responsibility to sort out the technical details . )
domestication: 就这样，大卫的租约又陷入了不确定的状态。他与Albion Pacific的协议规定他要让大楼“接入互联网”，而这种模糊的语言现在又回来困扰他了。一旦WinStar同意“将网络连接到桌面”，梅里恩就把这当作“接入互联网”的定义，而大卫则负责解决技术细节。结果，大卫被拖到了技术细节的泥潭中，事情变得非常棘手。
foreignization: 就这样，Davey的租约再次处于不确定状态。他与Albion Pacific的协议要求他让这栋建筑“连接互联网”，而这种语言的模糊性又开始困扰他。（一旦WinStar同意“将电缆铺设到桌面”，那么这就是Meieran对术语Internet-enable的定义，而Davey负责处理相关的技术细节。）

messages_domestication.content:

Just like that , Davey 's lease was again in limbo . His agreement with Albion Pacific called for him to " Internet-enable " the building , and the vagueness of that language was coming back to haunt him . ( Once WinStar had agreed to " wire to the desktop , " that became Meieran 's definition of the term Internet-enable , and it was Davey 's responsibility to sort out the technical details . )
就这样，大卫的租约又陷入了不确定的状态。他与Albion Pacific的协议规定他要让大楼“接入互联网”，而这种模糊的语言现在又回来困扰他了。一旦WinStar同意“将网络连接到桌面”，梅里恩就把这当作“接入互联网”的定义，而大卫则负责解决技术细节。结果，大卫被拖到了技术细节的泥潭中，事情变得非常棘手。

source: Carried away with this success , I go on to demonstrate some eclipse-viewing techniques . source: Beware the temptation to give false information to auditors . Remember , they have been trained to detect false receipts and most are experienced enough to recognize false answers . " IRS agents are sympathetic to logical reasons for deduction , " says tax attorney Robert Anderson . " But I do n't know of any agent who tolerates lying . "

source: In many respects , Trump 's victory over Hillary Clinton merely raised to the presidential level the currents of race , education , income , and density that have shaped the House competition in recent years . Trump 's victory largely ran through the same smaller places that congressional Republicans earlier captured in the march to their House majority -- while Clinton performed best in the major metropolitan areas that likely represent the Democrats ' best chance of overturning that majority in 2018 or beyond .
domestication: 这次大选从某些方面来说，不过是把过去几年美国众议院竞选中一直存在的种族、教育水平、收入和人口密度等因素，提升到了总统选举层面。特朗普获胜的地区，基本上都是那些在共和党人之前夺取众议院多数席位时就已站到他们一边的小城市和乡镇。与此同时，希拉里则是在那些大都会区表现最佳，而正是这些地方，也许才是民主党人在2018年甚至更晚一些时候扭转乾坤、夺回众议院多数的最大希望所在。
foreignization: 在很多方面，特朗普对希拉里·克林顿的胜利只是将种族、教育、收入和密度等当前抬升到了总统层面，这些是近年来塑造众议院竞争的因素。特朗普的胜利在很大程度上经历了国会共和党人早些时候在他们的众议院多数中所经过的同样的较小的地方——同时，克林顿在可能代表民主党人在2018年或以后推翻多数党的最大都会区表现最好。

source: " Our study is the first to compare these three drugs as maintenance therapy in the long term , " said Lorenza Maria Argolini , Rheumatology Consultant of the Lupus Clinic , ASST Pini CTO , Milan , Italy . " Of interest are the results achieved in the CYA group where , despite worse clinical conditions at the beginning of maintenance therapy , we observed a rapid achievement of remission in the great majority of patients . "
domestication: “我们这个研究是第一个长期比较这三种药物作为维持治疗的疗效，”米兰ASST皮尼CTO风湿病诊所的风湿病专家洛伦扎·玛丽亚·阿戈利尼说。“有趣的是，在CYA组，我们虽然一开始就面临更差的临床条件，但还是在大部分患者中观察到了快速达到缓解的效果。”

source: For black hair , he uses indigo or black for the underpainting and for the highlights violet , brown , or blue . Silver highlights , he warns , can make the hair look gray . " The tendency with red hair , " he cautions , " is to make it the color of Ronald McDonald 's . Keep it subdued and focus on the red highlights . And for for auburn hair , an underpainting in green and violet helps to keep the color down . " At times , Webb will lightly stroke the dominant color over an area and then add touches of the same color in other sections to unify the painting .
domestication: 他给人的建议是：画黑发时，用靛蓝或黑色作底色，然后用紫色、棕色或蓝色来上色。还提醒大家，银色高光可能会让头发看起来变灰了。“红发的诀窍是不能让它太鲜艳，要不然就会像麦当劳叔叔一样俗气。应该把颜色调暗些，只突出红色的部分亮色。”对于深棕色头发，他则建议在底色上加点绿色和紫色，这样可以控制整体颜色的明亮度。在某些情况下，韦伯会轻轻地将主色涂抹在某个区域，然后在其他区域添加同样的颜色，以此来使整个画面更加统一。
foreignization: 对于黑发，他使用靛蓝色或黑色作为底漆，并且在高光部分使用紫色、棕色或蓝色。银色高光，他警告说，可以使头发看起来灰色。“红发的趋势”，他提醒说，“是让它变成罗纳德·麦当劳的颜色。保持它的克制，专注于红色的高光。”而对于栗色的头发，在绿色和紫色上进行底漆有助于降低颜色的饱和度。有时，韦伯会轻轻地将主导色涂抹在一个区域，然后在其他部分添加同样的颜色以统一整幅画。

And for for auburn hair , an underpainting in green and violet helps to keep the color down . " At times , Webb will lightly stroke the dominant color over an area and then add touches of the same color in other sections to unify the painting .

source: " I 've been with the network for nine years and feel completely at home working in another language among people who have come from all parts of Latin America to do what they know best -- TV journalism , " says Miss Durham . " I work with the Hispanic network as a matter of choice . I feel its news service is the professional equal of any of its English-language counterparts . We 're more inclined to be go-getters and in some ways we 're better informed . And we 're first on the scene of events . " She can say this with assurance because she previously worked six years for the highly regarded Public Broadcasting System , and she has taught communications at Hartford University ' in Connecticut .

To make filling : In the bowl of an electric mixer fitted with paddle attachment , beat together cream cheese and remaining butter on medium speed until light yellow and fluffy , about 3 minutes . Add orange zest and 1 cup confectioners ' sugar , and mix for 1 minute . Scrape down sides of bowl as needed . Reduce mixer speed to low ; add remaining confectioners ' sugar and mix for 2 minutes . ( If filling is too stiff , lighten with a few drops of orange juice . )

source: It would be foolish to conjure up Columbus as a dashing , brilliant seaman or even as a bold and enlightened explorer . He certainly was a great sailor , and his successful crossing of the Ocean Sea was an unparalleled feat of navigation . Yet very little comes through from the scant information we have on Columbus the man , or from his own writings , to suggest that he was the swashbuckling , decisive , and gallant Renaissance figure often portrayed in schoolbooks .
domestication: 别犯傻了，别以为哥伦布是个帅气的水手，或者是一个勇敢开明的探险家。他确实是一位了不起的航海家，他跨越大西洋的壮举是航海史上无人能及的奇迹。然而，从我们有限的信息和他的著作中，可以看出他并不是学校教材中常描绘的那种挥剑弄枪、果断豪放的文艺复兴式人物。
foreignization: 将哥伦布想象成一个英俊、杰出的水手，或者是一个大胆而开明的探险家，将会是愚蠢的。他绝对是一位伟大的航海家，他跨越大洋的成功之旅是一项无与伦比的航海壮举。然而，从我们所掌握的关于哥伦布这个人的有限信息中，或从他的著作中，几乎没有什么可以表明他是学校教科书中经常描述的那种挥剑的、果断的和高尚的文艺复兴式人物。

source: With the spectacular collapse of so many dot-coms over the last couple of years , it 's easy to forget that the history of American invention is a huge collection of failed ideas , some brilliant and unlucky , many febrile and plain idiotic . Passenger space travel may happen some day . Towing icebergs to drought-stricken areas probably wo n't . Aspirations , along with bad ideas , never die . Trial -- and lots of error -- is embedded in entrepreneurship . The impulse to change the world for the better can as easily result in a breakthrough as a humiliating , and expensive , defeat . Flying Cars
domestication: 近年来，众多网络公司的轰然崩溃，让人很容易忘记美国发明史上其实充满了失败的点子，其中一些虽然聪明却运气不好，而更多的则是胡思乱想，纯粹是无稽之谈。可能有一天，民航太空旅行会实现，但将冰山拖到干旱地区去，这种想法大概率不会实现。人的抱负和愚蠢的想法永远不会消亡，试验和错误在创业的过程中随处可见。想要改变世界的冲动，可能会带来突破性的成功，也可能导致令人羞愧且昂贵的失败，比如飞行汽车。
foreignization: 过去几年里，众多互联网公司的壮观崩溃，让人容易忘记美国发明史是一部由大量失败构成的宏大史诗，其中一些想法非常出色但很不幸，而更多的想法是病态的、愚蠢至极的。 乘客太空旅行可能有一天会实现。 将冰山拖到干旱地区，这种可能性不大。 人们的志向和糟糕的想法将永远不会消亡。 尝试——还有很多错误——深深植根于创业之中。 改善世界的冲动，可能会像带来突破一样，导致令人沮丧和昂贵的失败。 飞行汽车

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

With the spectacular collapse of so many dot-coms over the last couple of years , it 's easy to forget that the history of American invention is a huge collection of failed ideas , some brilliant and unlucky , many febrile and plain idiotic . Passenger space travel may happen some day . Towing icebergs to drought-stricken areas probably wo n't . Aspirations , along with bad ideas , never die . Trial -- and lots of error -- is embedded in entrepreneurship . The impulse to change the world for the better can as easily result in a breakthrough as a humiliating , and expensive , defeat . Flying Cars
近年来，众多网络公司的轰然崩溃，让人很容易忘记美国发明史上其实充满了失败的点子，其中一些虽然聪明却运气不好，而更多的则是胡思乱想，纯粹是无稽之谈。可能有一天，民航太空旅行会实现，但将冰山拖到干旱地区去，这种想法大概率不会实现。人的抱负和愚蠢的想法永远不会消亡，试验和错误在创业的过程中随处可见。想要改变世界的冲动，可能会带来突破性的成功，也可能导致令人羞愧且昂贵的失败，比如飞行汽车。

source: Bartolome de Las Casas , an eminent Spanish bishop , used the accounts of his father and uncle , who had sailed with Columbus , to frame his luminous Apologia . He devoted himself to the denunciation of the plundering and devastation of the new territories with the " loss of so many thousands of souls . " Appalled by Spanish cruelties , Las Casas passionately insisted that the peoples of the New World " are our brothers , redeemed by Christ 's most precious blood , no less than the wisest and most learned men in the whole world . " Through books , sermons , and direct representation to the crown , he pleaded the cause of the oppressed Indians for more than half a century . WHY DID COLUMBUS GO BACK A THIRD TIME ?
domestication: 巴托洛梅·德·拉斯·卡萨斯是一位著名的西班牙主教，他利用父亲和叔叔与哥伦布同行的记载，撰写了辉煌的《辩护书》。他致力于揭露新领土被掠夺和破坏的事实，以及随之而来的“成千上万的人失去生命”。拉斯·卡萨斯被西班牙人的残酷行为吓坏了，他热情地坚持认为：“新世界的人们是我们的兄弟，他们和全世界最聪明、最博学的男人一样，都被基督宝贵的血所救赎。”通过书籍、讲道和直接向皇室陈情，他为受压迫的印第安人辩护了五十多年。哥伦布为什么还要第三次回去？
foreignization: 巴托洛梅·德·拉斯·卡萨斯，一位杰出的西班牙主教，利用他父亲和叔叔与哥伦布一起航行的记载，编写了他的光辉四射的《辩护书》。他致力于揭露新领土被掠夺和破坏的行为，以及“失去这么多千万条生命”。拉斯·卡萨斯被西班牙的残酷行为所震惊，他热情地坚持认为，新大陆的人民“是我们的兄弟，他们通过基督最珍贵的血液得到了救赎，与世界上最睿智和最博学的男人一样”。通过书籍、讲道和直接向王室陈述，拉斯·卡萨斯为受压迫的印第安人辩护超过半个世纪。哥伦布为什么会第三次回归？

" Appalled by Spanish cruelties , Las Casas passionately insisted that the peoples of the New World " are our brothers , redeemed by Christ 's most precious blood , no less than the wisest and most learned men in the whole world . " Through books , sermons , and direct representation to the crown , he pleaded the cause of the oppressed Indians for more than half a century . WHY DID COLUMBUS GO BACK A THIRD TIME ?

巴托洛梅·德·拉斯·卡萨斯，一位杰出的西班牙主教，利用他父亲和叔叔与哥伦布一起航行的记载，编写了他的光辉四射的《辩护书》。他致力于揭露新领土被掠夺和破坏的行为，以及“失去这么多千万条生命”。拉斯·卡萨斯被西班牙的残酷行为所震惊，他热情地坚持认为，新大陆的人民“是我们的兄弟，他们通过基督最珍贵的血液得到了救赎，与世界上最睿智和最博学的男人一样”。通过书籍、讲道和直接向王室陈述，拉斯·卡萨斯为受压迫的印第安人辩护超过半个世纪。哥伦布为什么会第三次回归？

source: * Have a plan for when things go wrong . Sometimes , items will be lost or damaged , despite everyone 's best intentions . Teens need to learn to take responsibility for their actions , says Moffat , and how to make amends . A sincere apology is the first step , but Moffat says the teen can also pay for the item or offer to make restitution by doing extra chores . And when your child does take responsibility , be sure to acknowledge it .
domestication: 有备无患，做好万全的准备是为了应对意外情况。当事情出错时，比如东西丢失或损坏，即使大家都很小心，也难免会出现意外情况，这时候家长要教育孩子们学会为自己的行为负责。专家莫法特说，第一步就是真诚地道歉，之后还可以让孩子通过付款或者做额外的家务来赔偿损失。如果你的孩子能主动承担责任，那么作为父母你一定要肯定和鼓励他们。

source: In fact , hard work has been a key factor behind the rise of Alice in Chains . The group emerged in 1990 with its debut album , Facelift ; that LP 's single Man in the Box ' garnered both Grammy and MTV award nominations last year . Before recording Dirt , the foursome kept busy by quietly releasing a mellow , guest-laden EP titled Sap and making an appearance in Cameron Crowe 's recent Seattle-based film , Singles . That movie 's soundtrack considerably boosted the group 's profile when the crunchy dirge Would ? ' caught on . ( The single is also included on Dirt . )
domestication: 事实上，辛勤的付出是爱丽丝囚徒乐队走向成功的重要因素。该乐队在1990年凭借首张专辑《Facelift》出道，其中的单曲《Man in the Box》在去年获得了格莱美奖和MTV音乐录影带大奖的提名。在录制《Dirt》之前，乐队四人组还默默地发行了一张客串众多嘉宾的柔和迷幻EP《Sap》，并且出现在卡梅隆·克罗的最近一部基于西雅图的电影《单身男女》中。这部电影的配乐让乐队的知名度大幅提升，当其中的单曲《Would?》成为热门歌曲时。（这首单曲也被收录在《Dirt》专辑中。）可以说，这些努力都是乐队一步步走向成功的关键。

source: At the same time , Hudson took a mop to headquarters . He brought in experienced fast-food executives , like Frank B. Young , a Wendy 's alumnus , to run the company-owned restaurants division , and Michael Shumsky , a Taco Bell veteran , to oversee operations . Andrew Ritger , a onetime Hardee 's executive , slashed costs throughout the system -- from more efficient shipping to trimming the number of Sonic 's five hamburger patty sizes down to two : regular and kid-size . By 2001 , operating expenses were down to 73% of the average franchisee 's sales .
domestication: 同时，哈德森也对公司总部进行了一番整顿。他引进了一批经验丰富的快餐行业高管，例如从温迪汉堡跳槽过来的弗兰克·B·杨，来负责经营公司直营店；又如墨西哥玉米卷连锁店的资深经理迈克尔·舒姆斯基，来监督运营。前哈迪斯快餐公司高管安德鲁·里特格则在全系统范围内大幅削减开支，从提高运输效率到将索尼克五种汉堡大小缩减至两种：普通和儿童大小。不久，到了2001年，公司的运营支出已经降低到了加盟店平均销售额的73%。
foreignization: 同时，哈德森还对公司总部进行了清理。他引进了一些快餐业的高层管理人员，如温迪汉堡的前任员工弗兰克·B·杨（Frank B. Young）来负责公司拥有的餐厅部门，还有塔可钟的资深人士迈克尔·舒姆斯基（Michael Shumsky）来监督运营。哈迪斯的前任高管安德鲁·里特格（Andrew Ritger）在整个系统中大幅削减成本，从提高运输效率到将索尼克的五种汉堡肉饼尺寸缩减至两种：正常大小和儿童大小。到2001年，运营费用已经降低到平均加盟店销售额的73%。

Andrew Ritger , a onetime Hardee 's executive , slashed costs throughout the system -- from more efficient shipping to trimming the number of Sonic 's five hamburger patty sizes down to two : regular and kid-size . By 2001 , operating expenses were down to 73% of the average franchisee 's sales .

source: Just ask Jeremy Davey . He founded Pabulum in March 1997 , convinced that the brave new world of the Web was going to be the next big thing in marketing and advertising . Initially , the business was a one-man show : Davey would work with customers on developing promotional Web sites with his Pentium 133 notebook and then farm out the graphics-intensive components of the design , such as photo manipulation and streaming video , to subcontractors that had the equipment to do the job . It did n't take him long to realize , however , that the field of on-line marketing was crowded with entrepreneurs . If Davey wanted Pabulum to grow , he was going to have to be something more than just another digital-ad guy with bright ideas and a trusty laptop .
domestication: 你可以问问杰里米·戴维。他在1997年3月创立了Pabulum公司，当时他坚信互联网将会成为营销和广告的下一个大热潮。最初，这家公司只有一位员工，就是他自己。他用笔记本电脑与客户合作开发促销网站，然后将设计中图形化的部分，如照片编辑和视频流媒体，外包给有设备的承包商。然而，他很快意识到，网络营销领域已经是竞争激烈了。如果戴维想让Pabulum发展壮大，他就不能只是又一个拥有鲜明想法和可靠笔记本电脑的数字广告专家，他需要成为更多的东西。

Initially , the business was a one-man show : Davey would work with customers on developing promotional Web sites with his Pentium 133 notebook and then farm out the graphics-intensive components of the design , such as photo manipulation and streaming video , to subcontractors that had the equipment to do the job . It did n't take him long to realize , however , that the field of on-line marketing was crowded with entrepreneurs . If Davey wanted Pabulum to grow , he was going to have to be something more than just another digital-ad guy with bright ideas and a trusty laptop .

你可以问Jeremy Davey。他在1997年3月创立了Pabulum，并且相信新的互联网世界将会成为市场营销和广告的下一个热点。最初，这个公司是一个人的表演：Davey将与客户合作，使用他的奔腾133笔记本电脑开发促销网站，然后将设计中的图形密集型组件，如照片处理和流媒体视频，外包给有设备完成工作的分包商。但是，他很快意识到，网络营销领域里挤满了企业家。如果Davey希望Pabulum发展，他不得不成为不仅仅是另一个拥有明亮想法和可靠笔记本电脑的数字广告人。

source: A newly proposed solution , ironically enough , might make use of a very old technology : paper itself . Not to preserve all the digital documents we are creating in hard copy , but rather to preserve the specifications for a decoding mechanism-a kind of " universal computer " defined by a few hundred lines of software code-that will allow the documents to be deciphered in the future . Archived on paper and across the Inter-net , the mechanism would be guaranteed to survive for centuries . Proponents of such an approach say it will make it possible to preserve everything-a complete record of humanity . Maybe then history can finally stop repeating itself .
domestication: 说来有趣，有人提出了一个新方法，其实质上是利用一种非常古老的技术——纸张。不是用它来保存我们创造的所有数字文档的硬拷贝，而是保存一种解码机制的规范，这种机制是一种由几百行软件代码定义的“通用计算机”，它将使文档能够在未来被解读。这种机制既可以存档在纸上，也可以存在于互联网中，从而保证它能流传几个世纪。支持这种方法的人说，它可以让我们保留一切——人类的全部历史记录。也许到了那时，历史终于不再重复自己了。
foreignization: 一个新近被提出的解决方案，颇具讽刺意味，可能会利用一种非常古老的技术：纸张本身，不是为了保存我们用硬拷贝创建的所有数字文件，而是为了保存解码机制的规格——一种由几百行软件代码定义的“通用计算机”——它将允许在未来破解这些文件。在互联网上和纸张上存档，这种机制将能够保证几个世纪的保存。这种方法的支持者说，它将使保存一切成为可能——对人类的完整记录。也许历史终于可以停止重演。

source: " We are very proud of the results achieved by our coverage , " says Blaya . " The success of the telecasts of the World Cup matches was foreseen commercially six months in advance . By that time we had already sold all the advertising slots available . Univision is happy it was able to bring the best in world soccer to our audience . We are happy too to know that , thanks to our satellite hook-up and cable systems , we now reach 89 percent of the Hispanic households in the United States . "

source: Indeed , the Chicago venture-capital firm of Golder , Thoma , Cressey , Rauner Inc . ( GTCR ) is engaged in the consolidation of same 25 industries , including golf courses , rock quarries , temp agencies , funeral homes , security guards , and even coin-operated laundries in apartment buildings . " When you combine companies , you get true synergies and savings . By bringing together products and services , you also build market power . And also , of course , you can leverage good people and good systems through companies that are acquired , " explains Bryan Cressey , a GTCR principal .
domestication: 确实，芝加哥的风险投资公司戈德曼，托马，克雷西，劳纳公司（GTCR）正在进行同样的25个行业整合，包括高尔夫球场，石场，临时代理机构，殡仪馆，保安和甚至公寓楼的投币式洗衣店。“当你合并公司时，你会获得真正的协同效应和节省。通过整合产品和服务，你也能建立市场力量。当然，你还可以通过收购的公司利用优秀的人才和优秀的系统，”GTCR的负责人布莱恩·克雷西解释说。这家公司的投资方式是先找出那些有增长潜力的行业，然后在这些行业中寻找最好的公司，并将它们整合到一起，从而形成更强大的企业。这种方式可以帮助公司实现规模经济，减少成本，提高竞争力。
foreignization: 的确，芝加哥风险投资公司戈德曼、托马、克雷西、罗纳公司（GTCR）正在从事同一行业的整合工作，这25个行业包括高尔夫球场、岩石采石场、临时代理机构、殡仪馆、保安和甚至公寓楼里的投币式洗衣店。 “当你合并公司时，你会获得真正的协同效应和节省。通过整合产品和服务，你也建立了市场力量。当然，你也可以通过被收购的公司利用好的人才和良好的体系，” GTCR的负责人Bryan Cressey解释说。

source: That said , Perry is clearly more in tune with the mood of the GOP base , as evidenced when the audience burst into spontaneous applause in response to Brian Williams 's bringing up Texas 's first-in-the-nation rank when it comes to capital punishment . And more than once , Perry 's mannerisms and manner struck me as eerily Bush-like .

source: A. To nail the flirty flush that was all over runways , pick a formula based on your skin tone , says Mai Quynh , a makeup artist for Mark . If you 're fair , opt for a less concentrated powder blush . " Also , apply it with a big , fluffy brush -- small , stiff ones deposit more pigment , " says Quynh . Medium or dark complected ? Creams provide a more dramatic glow .
domestication: 要让脸颊呈现出跑道上那种俏皮的红晕，你得根据自己的肤色来选择粉底膏，Mark的化妆师Mai Quynh这么说。如果你是偏白的皮肤，就选一种颜色不太浓的散粉胭脂。而且，还是用大而蓬松的刷子来涂比较好，小的硬刷子会沾更多的颜色。要是皮肤颜色属于中等或较黑的呢？那就用奶油类的产品，它们能给你带来更夺目的光彩。
foreignization: A. 要掌握在T台上无处不在的调情红晕，根据你的肤色选择一个配方，Mark的化妆师Mai Quynh说。如果你皮肤比较白皙，选择一种浓度较低的粉状腮红。“另外，用一大支松软的刷子涂抹 -- 小型、僵硬的刷子会沉积更多的色素”，Quynh说。皮肤颜色中等或较暗？乳霜可以提供更夺目的光泽。

source: Raised in Beirut , Lebanon , to be cosmopolitan in the spirit of that city , he went to Hamburg , Germany , where he was radicalized , and then wound up at the controls of Flight 93 , the one that was supposed to hit the U.S. Capitol . It did not because the passengers learned what had already happened at the World Trade Center and the Pentagon , figured out what was in store for them and their country , and chose to act
domestication: 这哥们儿出生在黎巴嫩的贝鲁特，成长在一个兼容并蓄的环境中，后来到了德国的汉堡，在那里他被激进化了，最后竟然成了93号航班的驾驶员，原本计划是撞向美国国会大厦的。但由于乘客们已经得知世贸中心和五角大楼遭遇袭击的消息，料到自己和国家将面临的危险，于是选择挺身而出，阻止了这场灾难。
foreignization: 在黎巴嫩首都贝鲁特长大，受到了这座城市的世界主义精神的熏陶，他来到德国汉堡，在那里他变得激进，最终他控制了93号航班的飞机，这架飞机原本应该撞击美国国会大厦。但是，由于乘客们已经得知世贸中心和五角大楼发生的事件，明白了将要发生在他们和他们国家身上的事情，并选择采取行动，所以这架飞机并没有撞击国会大厦。

source: PHOTO ( BLACK &; WHITE ) : When in 1507 the cartographer Martin Waldsemuller set about making this map of the discoveries of Columbus and his followers , he portrayed most of them as one continuous strip of land -- and christened it America in honor of Amerigo Vespucci , whose portrait he included . Columbus could n't complain ; he had died a year earlier .
domestication: 照片（黑白）：1507年，制图师马丁·瓦尔德泽米勒制作了这张哥伦布和他的追随者的发现地图时，将大部分地区描绘成一片连续的陆地——并以阿梅里戈·维斯普奇的名字命名为“美洲”，同时也将他的肖像画在了地图上。这时候哥伦布已经没有资格抱怨了，因为他早在一年前就去世了。

PHOTO ( BLACK &; WHITE ) : When in 1507 the cartographer Martin Waldsemuller set about making this map of the discoveries of Columbus and his followers , he portrayed most of them as one continuous strip of land -- and christened it America in honor of Amerigo Vespucci , whose portrait he included . Columbus could n't complain ; he had died a year earlier .

source: Of course , Pat was much more than just a vocal search engine -- but so are plenty of internet of things devices we encounter in homes today . From smart refrigerators that can let you know their contents and when products are about to expire , to smart lighting that can make it easier to navigate a room or change the ambiance , today we have the option to make every room of the home just as futuristic .

source: No more messy washing of roller trays with Peel-A-Tray ( $7.50 ; peelatray.com ) , which has four removable liners that are easily balled up and thrown out . The liners also make it a cinch to drain unused paint back into the can or wrap up a roller mid-project to avoid having to clean it between coats . When your final liner is gone , you can use the tray one last time before disposing of it or washing and reusing it .
domestication: 现在有了Peel-A-Tray（售价7.50美元，可在peelatray.com购买），你再也不用麻烦地清洗滚筒托盘了。这款产品有四个可以拆卸的内衬，使用后轻松就能揉皱并丢弃。这些内衬还让你轻松地将未使用的油漆倒回罐子里，或在项目中途将滚筒包起来，这样就不需要在涂层之间清洁滚筒了。当你的最后一个内衬用完后，你仍然可以再使用一次托盘，然后再丢弃或清洗并重复使用。这样，不仅节省了时间，还减少了很多麻烦，真是方便得不能再方便了！

source: Raymond Chandler ( 1888-1959 ) . Chandler has long been the intellectual 's darling , a mystery writer for people who do n't like mysteries . On the one hand , he talked of taking murder out of the English drawing room and putting it in the streets where it belonged . At the same time , his characters spent a surprising amount of time in the homes and haunts of the California rich , a West Coast equivalent of the country house on the moors . His achievement , it seems to me , is less that he brought the traditional mystery into the alleys and gutters than that he put a novelist 's spin on the pulp tradition of Dime Detective and Black Mask .
domestication: 雷蒙德·钱德勒（1888-1959）一直是知识分子心中的宠儿，他的作品让不喜欢推理小说的人也爱上了推理。钱德勒说他想把谋杀案从英国贵族的客厅里移到它原本属于的街道上。但实际上，他笔下的角色却经常出现在加州富人的豪宅和聚会场所，这就像西海岸版的荒原上的乡间别墅一样。看来钱德勒的成就，并不在于他把传统的推理小说搬到了巷子和下水道，而是在他为《一角硬币侦探》和《黑面具》等低俗杂志的传统增添了小说家的独特风格。
foreignization: 雷蒙德·钱德勒（1888-1959）。钱德勒长期以来一直是知识分子的宠儿，是为不喜欢悬疑的人所写的悬疑作家。一方面，他谈到要将谋杀案从英国的客厅里移出并将其放在它应该在的街头。同时，他的角色们却在加利福尼亚富人的家中和聚集地里度过了惊人的多的时间，这就像荒野中的乡村住宅的西海岸等价物。看起来他的成就是，他没有将传统的悬疑故事带入小巷和阴沟中，而是给《一角硬币侦探》和《黑面具》等通俗小说的传统添加了小说家的色彩。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Raymond Chandler ( 1888-1959 ) . Chandler has long been the intellectual 's darling , a mystery writer for people who do n't like mysteries . On the one hand , he talked of taking murder out of the English drawing room and putting it in the streets where it belonged . At the same time , his characters spent a surprising amount of time in the homes and haunts of the California rich , a West Coast equivalent of the country house on the moors . His achievement , it seems to me , is less that he brought the traditional mystery into the alleys and gutters than that he put a novelist 's spin on the pulp tradition of Dime Detective and Black Mask .

source: For a guy who knew nothing about ambulances four years ago , Paul Verrochi has come a long way . Since launching American Medical Response ( AMR ) , in August 1992 , he has built the country 's largest ambulance company , now with $550 million in annualized revenues , some 10,000 employees , and operations in 26 states . And fueled by a $100-million credit line and $90 million from a stock offering last spring , expansion is going full tilt .
domestication: 四年前，保罗·维罗奇对救护车一无所知。但转眼之间，他已经取得了长足的进步。自1992年8月创立美国医疗应急服务公司（AMR）以来，他已将其打造成了全国最大的救护车公司，年收入高达5.5亿美元，在26个州开展业务，拥有约1万名员工。得益于1亿美元的信用额度和去年春天的9000万美元股票发行，公司的扩张如火如荼，势头正猛。
foreignization: 对于一个四年前对救护车一无所知的家伙，Paul Verrochi已经走了很长一段路。自从1992年8月成立American Medical Response（AMR）以来，他建立了该国最大的救护车公司，目前年收入5.5亿美元，拥有大约1万名员工，在26个州开展业务。并且，由于获得了一条1亿美元的信用额度和去年春天股票发行的9000万美元，扩张正在全力进行。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

For a guy who knew nothing about ambulances four years ago , Paul Verrochi has come a long way . Since launching American Medical Response ( AMR ) , in August 1992 , he has built the country 's largest ambulance company , now with $550 million in annualized revenues , some 10,000 employees , and operations in 26 states . And fueled by a $100-million credit line and $90 million from a stock offering last spring , expansion is going full tilt .

source: Shortly before his termination , Politico reported that Miller asked Cissna " to launch more experimentally and legally questionable policies , " but Cissna declined " to overstep legal boundaries . " His effective efforts to curb immigration and penalize immigrants could not spare him from the purge .
domestication: 就在他被炒魷鱼之前，Politico报道说，米勒要求齐斯纳“推出更多具有实验性且存在法律疑问的政策”，但是齐斯纳拒绝“越过法律界限”。尽管他竭尽全力限制移民和惩罚移民，但最终还是没能躲过这次清洗，还是被一并拉下了马。

source: The ASFA was largely crafted by the Republican-controlled House Ways and Means Committee and championed by its lead sponsor , Rep. Dave Camp ( R-Mich . ) . DeLay , who as whip was in charge of vote-counting and arm-twisting for the Republican agenda , was not a member of the committee . ( DeLay was one of 31 co-sponsors of the bill in the House . )
domestication: 美国退休储蓄账户法案基本上是由共和党控制的众议院筹款委员会起草的，该法案的主要发起人是该委员会的领先发起人戴维·坎普（Dave Camp，来自密歇根州的共和党人）。作为党鞭的迪莱负责清点选票和为共和党议程施压，但他并不是委员会的成员。（迪莱也是众议院这项法案的31位共同发起人之一。）可以这么说，这项法案是戴维·坎普一手操办的，而迪莱虽然身为党鞭，却没有参与委员会的工作。但即便如此，迪莱也在这项法案的启动中扮演了重要角色。
foreignization: 美国退休储蓄账户法案主要是由共和党控制的众议院筹款委员会起草的并得到其首席发起人、来自密歇根州的代表戴维·坎普（Dave Camp）的推动。作为党鞭，迪莱负责清点票数和强迫支持共和党议程，但他不是该委员会成员。（迪莱是众议院这项法案的31位共同发起人之一。）

source: One morning not long ago , Consumer Reports senior editor Tod Marks logged onto the Internet and did a simple search using the phrase " prescription drugs for sale . " In seconds , the names of 150 sources appeared onscreen , nearly one-third of them accompanied by troubling boasts , such as , " No prescription ? No doctor ? No problem . "
domestication: 前几天，一位叫Tod Marks的消费者报告资深编辑在网上做了一个简单的搜索，使用的关键词是“处方药出售”。眨眼之间，屏幕上出现了150个来源，其中几乎有三分之一伴随着令人担忧的广告用语，比如“没有处方？没有医生？没有问题。”这就像开了一个不需要处方、不需要医生的药店，让人觉得很不靠谱。

source: The result was that by the late 20th century they discovered that much of the business-related work that makes fortunes for American lawyers-taxes , for instance-had slipped out of their hands into those of the giant accounting firms . This was bad enough . But then people began wondering in public just what justification there was for the conveyancing monopoly at all . Surely accounting firms , real estate agents and banks could do the work just as well , and perhaps more efficiently and more cheaply .
domestication: 结果到了20世纪末，他们发现大部分能让美国律师赚钱的业务，比如税务工作，都落入了大型会计事务所的手中。这还不算什么，人们开始公开质疑为何要让律师行业垄断房地产交易业务。难道会计事务所、房地产代理和银行不能做得一样好，甚至更高效、更便宜吗？这让律师行业的人很是哭笑不得。
foreignization: 结果到了 20 世纪后期，他们发现为美国律师带来财富的许多与商业相关的工作，例如税收，已经从他们手中滑落到那些大型会计公司的手中。这已经很糟糕了。但是接着，人们开始公开质疑对传统代理权的理由到底是什么。肯定会计公司、房地产经纪人和银行可以做同样的工作，也许更有效率、更便宜。

source: That what-if became Davey 's ticket to technological plenty . WinStar agreed to place a dish on the roof of 701 Sutter Street at no cost , contingent on the company 's obtaining roof rights to 995 Market Street . As for Meieran , he needed little convincing : outfitting the larger building with high-speed wireless telecommunications fell right in line with his own development plans . " I envisioned building a futuristic multimedia community there , " he says .

source: Laura Macdonald , a political science professor at Carleton University in Ottawa , said despite the rhetorical pressure from Trump , the negotiations still appeared to be proceeding remarkably normally . But the limits of Trump 's leverage were also becoming clear with the president still needing to get any agreement through a Congress that has concerns about any pact that does not include Canada .
domestication: 渥太华卡尔顿大学的政治学教授劳拉·麦克唐纳说，尽管特朗普施加了很多口头上的压力，但谈判仍然出奇地正常地进行着。但同时，特朗普的影响力也开始显现出局限性，因为他仍然需要通过国会批准任何协议，而国会对于任何不包括加拿大的协议都有顾虑。也就是说，特朗普还需要国会点头才行。
foreignization: 卡尔顿大学（Carleton University）在渥太华（Ottawa）的政治科学教授劳拉·麦克唐纳（Laura Macdonald）说，尽管特朗普（Trump）有很大的辩论压力，但谈判仍然似乎在非常正常地进行。但是，特朗普的杠杆作用也变得很明显，总统仍然需要通过国会（Congress）达成任何协议，而国会对任何不包括加拿大的协议都有顾虑。

But the limits of Trump 's leverage were also becoming clear with the president still needing to get any agreement through a Congress that has concerns about any pact that does not include Canada .

source: Our lifestyle is not for everyone . Each person has to choose his or her priorities . For me , a relatively pure environment is more important that a world of gadgets . But people who do n't understand still shake their heads and say that we live " in the middle of nowhere . "

source: Palmer developed a rivalry and lifelong friendship with Nicklaus and Gary Player , and the trio eventually became known as the Big Three . Among them , they won seven straight Masters titles from 1960 to 1966 , and they hit ceremonial tee shots together at Augusta National to signal the start of the year 's first major . Palmer hit his first ceremonial tee shot at Augusta in 2007 . Nicklaus joined him in 2010 , and Player was added in 2012 .
domestication: 帕尔默与尼克劳斯和加里·普莱尔结下了深厚的友谊，他们三人也被称为高尔夫球界的“三巨头”。他们从1960年到1966年连续七年囊括了大师赛的冠军，在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫俱乐部的比赛开始时，他们会一起击出开球，这也成为了一个传统。2007年，帕尔默在奥古斯塔打出了他首个仪式性的开球。2010年，尼克劳斯加入其中，而普莱尔则是在2012年加入的。这三个朋友之间的友谊和竞争，对高尔夫球运动的发展产生了深远的影响，他们的传奇故事也一直被人们津津乐道。
foreignization: 帕尔默与尼克劳斯和加里·普莱尔发展出一段对手关系，并且两人终身保持友谊，三人最终被称为大三元。他们赢得了七个连续的大师赛冠军，从1960年到1966年，并在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫球俱乐部一起击出了仪式性的发球，以标志一年中第一次主要比赛的开始。帕尔默在2007年在奥古斯塔打出了他的第一个仪式性的发球。尼克劳斯于2010年加入他，普莱尔于2012年加入。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Palmer hit his first ceremonial tee shot at Augusta in 2007 . Nicklaus joined him in 2010 , and Player was added in 2012 .

Among them , they won seven straight Masters titles from 1960 to 1966 , and they hit ceremonial tee shots together at Augusta National to signal the start of the year 's first major . Palmer hit his first ceremonial tee shot at Augusta in 2007 . Nicklaus joined him in 2010 , and Player was added in 2012 .
帕尔默与尼克劳斯和加里·普莱尔发展出一段对手关系，并且两人终身保持友谊，三人最终被称为大三元。他们赢得了七个连续的大师赛冠军，从1960年到1966年，并在奥古斯塔国家高尔夫球俱乐部一起击出了仪式性的发球，以标志一年中第一次主要比赛的开始。帕尔默在2007年在奥古斯塔打出了他的第一个仪式性的发球。尼克劳斯于2010年加入他，普莱尔于2012年加入。

source: Today , we know that frankincense and myrrh possess potent healing powers ; and gold does too . Injectable gold sodium thiomalate is a valued treatment for rheumatoid arthritis . Perhaps these biblical wise men foresaw that the infant they honored would one day be revered by some as a great healer . The herbs , then , as well as the gold , were appropriate and splendid gifts .

source: DULLES , Va . -- An enormous cheer erupted from the circle of lawyers when one of them read out the news from his Twitter feed : The American Civil Liberties Union had been granted a stay by a federal judge in New York that would temporarily halt parts of President Donald Trump 's executive order limiting immigration from seven Muslim-majority countries . He scrolled a bit more . " And it 's national ! " More cheers

source: Congressmen may think they understand the issues and can prescribe the fuel efficiency of new vehicles . I doubt any member of Congress would like to set efficiency standards for power boats , recreational vehicles , commercial aircraft , private aircraft , petrochemicals , and other petroleum uses . Nor are the regulatory agencies anxious-or able-to set such standards for all petroleum uses .
domestication: 国会成员以为他们明白了问题所在，可以为新车规定油耗标准。但是我怀疑国会中是否有人愿意为游艇、娱乐用车、商用飞机、民用飞机、石化产品和其他石油用途制定节能标准。监管机构也不急着为所有石油用途制定这样的标准，而且他们也无能为力。事实上，他们自己也没把握怎么去做。
foreignization: 国会议员可能认为他们了解这些问题，可以规定新车的燃油效率。我怀疑国会的任何成员都希望为动力艇、娱乐车辆、商用飞机、私人飞机、石油化工产品和其他石油用途制定效率标准。监管机构也不愿意——或者没有能力——为所有石油用途制定这样的标准。

Congressmen may think they understand the issues and can prescribe the fuel efficiency of new vehicles . I doubt any member of Congress would like to set efficiency standards for power boats , recreational vehicles , commercial aircraft , private aircraft , petrochemicals , and other petroleum uses . Nor are the regulatory agencies anxious-or able-to set such standards for all petroleum uses .

Congressmen may think they understand the issues and can prescribe the fuel efficiency of new vehicles . Nor are the regulatory agencies anxious-or able-to set such standards for all petroleum uses .
国会议员可能认为他们了解这些问题，可以规定新车的燃油效率。我怀疑国会的任何成员都希望为动力艇、娱乐车辆、商用飞机、私人飞机、石油化工产品和其他石油用途制定效率标准。监管机构也不愿意——或者没有能力——为所有石油用途制定这样的标准。

source: Cressey , who has been financing consolidations since the 1970s ( GTCR has about $400 million invested in such ventures ) , recommends that entrepreneurs first examine the consolidation 's rationale . " If there are real savings and economies , then that probably will continue , " he says . " But if benefits do n't materialize -- and they do n't always -- it will be status quo for a long time . The downside risk for entrepreneurs who hold out against smart consolidations depends on how good they are . If they are very good managers , there 's not a big downside . But if they 're in the middle of the pack , the consolidation wave of lower costs could roll over them . "
domestication: 要了解克雷西的意思，我们得先看看他的背景。他从上世纪70年代开始就一直在做并购融资，公司旗下的项目也投了大约4亿美元。所以，他对并购有一些见解。在他看来，创业者在考虑是否要进行并购时，首先要分析一下并购的理由。如果并购真的能带来节省和效率，那么它很可能会持续下去。但是，如果并购不能带来预期的好处，那么情况就会维持原状很长时间。对于抵制并购的创业者来说，风险取决于他们的管理能力。如果他们非常出色，那么风险不大。但如果他们只是平庸，那么低成本的并购浪潮可能会把他们淹没。
foreignization: Cressey一直在为整合提供资金支持（GTCR在此类创业中投资了大约4亿美元），他建议企业家首先检查整合的理由。他说：“如果真正有节省和经济效益，那么它很可能会继续下去。”“但是如果没有带来好处——而且并不总是如此——那么就会长期维持现状。那些抵制智慧整合的企业家的下行风险取决于他们的能力如何。如果他们是非常好的管理者，那么没有太大的下行风险。但是如果他们处于中等水平，低成本的整合浪潮可能会席卷他们。

source: At the same time , it is also important to know the role you play in reporting a loss . Here are just a few effective ways to help ensure the best response to your claim : Give Immediate Notice . Promptly give notice to your insurance company or agent after a loss to covered property has occurred . Make an Inventory List of the Damaged Personal Property . Include all bills , receipts and related documents that justify the figures in the inventory . Notify the police as soon as possible after a loss by theft . Notify the credit card or fund transfer card company of loss or theft of a credit card or funds transfer card . Make an Attempt to Protect the Damaged Property from Further Damage . If repairs to the property are required , make the reasonable and necessary repairs as well as keep an accurate record of the repair expenses .
domestication:
在处理保险理赔的同时，了解你在其中扮演的角色也非常重要。以下是一些有效的方法，可以帮助确保你获得最好的理赔服务：

首先，及时通知保险公司或代理人，一旦发生财产损失就要报告。这是第一步，也是很关键的一步。

接着，做一个详细的清单，列出所有受损的个人财产，包括所有相关的单据、发票和证明文件，这些都有助于证明损失的金额。

如果是盗窃造成的损失，一定要尽快报警，并通知信用卡或资金转账卡的公司，及时停止相关的交易，以免进一步的经济损失。

此外，为了防止损失进一步扩大，你应该采取措施保护受损的财产。如果需要进行维修，一方面要进行必要的维修，另一方面也要保持对维修费用的一份详细记录，这将有助于你获得理赔。

总之，及时、细致地处理每一步骤，对于获得最佳的理赔结果至关重要。
foreignization: 在同一时间，了解你在报告损失中的角色也非常重要。以下是几种有效的方法来确保对你的索赔有最佳的回应：立即通知。及时地在发生对保险财产的损失后通知你的保险公司或代理人。列出受损的个人财产清单。包括所有账单、收据和相关文件以证明清单中的数字。尽快在盗窃后通知警察。在信用卡或转账卡丢失或被盗后通知信用卡或转账卡公司。尝试保护受损的财产免受进一步的损害。如果需要对财产进行维修，请进行合理且必要的维修，并且保存维修费用的准确记录。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

At the same time , it is also important to know the role you play in reporting a loss . Here are just a few effective ways to help ensure the best response to your claim : Give Immediate Notice . Promptly give notice to your insurance company or agent after a loss to covered property has occurred . Make an Inventory List of the Damaged Personal Property . Include all bills , receipts and related documents that justify the figures in the inventory . Notify the police as soon as possible after a loss by theft . Notify the credit card or fund transfer card company of loss or theft of a credit card or funds transfer card . Make an Attempt to Protect the Damaged Property from Further Damage . If repairs to the property are required , make the reasonable and necessary repairs as well as keep an accurate record of the repair expenses .

source: For Columbia , signing Alice in Chains was a deliberate move to regain the label 's foothold in the hard-rock market . They came to us at a time when we were hungry for music , ' says label president Don Ienner , who has since taken the band - especially guitarist Cantrell , whom he refers to as a future guitar god ' - under his wing . From the beginning , Ienner turned the building of Alice 's career into a crusade : I flipped out the first time I heard their demo tape . '
domestication: 对于哥伦比亚公司来说，签下爱丽丝囚链乐队是一个刻意的举动，目的是重新在硬摇滚市场占据一席之地。在我们渴望音乐的时候，他们来到了我们身边，" 公司总裁唐·伊纳说，他已经收爱丽丝囚链乐队，特别是吉他手坎特雷尔，把他们当作自己的羽翼。他形容坎特雷尔为未来的“吉他神”。从一开始，伊纳就把打造爱丽丝囚链乐队的职业生涯作为一项事业：“我第一次听到他们的试听带时，简直兴奋极了。”
foreignization: 对于哥伦比亚唱片公司来说，签下Alice in Chains是一次刻意的尝试，以此来重新在硬摇滚乐市场中占据一席之地。 当时我们正在寻找音乐，他们就在这时候来到了我们身边，表示label总裁唐·伊纳（Don Ienner），他后来接纳了该乐队——尤其是吉他手坎特雷尔，他将其视为未来的“吉他神”（guitar god）。一开始，伊纳就把打造Alice的事业当作一场运动：我第一次听到他们的样带时就非常兴奋。

source: When Hurricane Andrew slammed into the Florida coast in August 1992 , Brian Pariser 's home was one of more than 135,000 damaged or destroyed . Pariser believed his home was fully covered -- until a contractor told him it would cost $165,874 to rebuild . That was $62,445 more than his insurance policy would pay .
domestication: 1992年8月，飓风安德鲁袭击佛罗里达海岸时，布莱恩·帕里瑟的家在13.5万多栋受损或被毁的房屋中占了一座。他以为自己的房子有足够的保险补偿，但是承包商却告诉他，要重建的话，需要16.58万美元。这个数字比他的保险理赔额整整高出6.24万美元。
foreignization: 飓风安德鲁于1992年8月袭击佛罗里达海岸时，布莱恩·帕里瑟（Brian Pariser）的家是超过135,000栋被损坏或摧毁的房屋之一。 帕里瑟认为他的家是完全受保险覆盖的 -- 直到一个承包商告诉他，重建费用将花费$165,874。 这比他的保险单能支付的金额多了$62,445。

source: In Woody Allen 's Midnight In Paris- which if it is n't playing at a theater near you this very second will be soon and which you should definitely go see- Owen Wilson plays a man obsessed with the past . Traveling around Paris with his fiancee , he laments our current times , believing the best of days were the 1920s , when literary kings mixed with great artists and thinkers . Then , in one of those fanciful inventions Woody Allen specializes in , Wilson suddenly is transported there and finds himself hanging out with Hemingway and DaIi , Gertrude Stein and F. Scott Fitzgerald . It 's heaven for him , until he realizes that everyone during that time wishes he had lived in the Renaissance and everyone from the Renaissance wishes he had lived in Roman times and so on .
domestication: 伍迪·艾伦的电影《午夜巴黎》即将在你附近的影院上映，或者说马上就要上映了，你绝对应该去看看。在这部电影中，欧文·威尔森饰演一个沉迷于过去的人。他和未婚妻一起游览巴黎时，总是感叹现在的时代，并坚信20世纪20年代是最美好的时代，那时候文学巨匠、艺术大师和思想家们聚集一堂。然后，在伍迪·艾伦擅长编造的奇幻情节中，威尔森突然被带到了那个时代，与海明威、达利、格特鲁德·斯坦和F·斯科特·菲茨杰拉德等人一起混在一起，对他来说，这简直是天堂。然而，他很快意识到，每个时代的人都在抱怨自己生错了时代，20世纪20年代的人羡慕文艺复兴时期，文艺复兴时期的人又羡慕罗马时代，如此这般，没完没了。

In Woody Allen 's Midnight In Paris- which if it is n't playing at a theater near you this very second will be soon and which you should definitely go see- Owen Wilson plays a man obsessed with the past . Traveling around Paris with his fiancee , he laments our current times , believing the best of days were the 1920s , when literary kings mixed with great artists and thinkers . Then , in one of those fanciful inventions Woody Allen specializes in , Wilson suddenly is transported there and finds himself hanging out with Hemingway and DaIi , Gertrude Stein and F. Scott Fitzgerald . It 's heaven for him , until he realizes that everyone during that time wishes he had lived in the Renaissance and everyone from the Renaissance wishes he had lived in Roman times and so on .

source: The last time she 'd seen Peter , he 'd seemed huge but fine . She 'd been in the kitchen , bent over the oven , drawing a skewer from a line of lamb kabobs . The air was sweet with onions and bell peppers bubbling in butter . She had n't known he was behind her . Burning her fingers slightly , she had lost her balance and tumbled backward across the kitchen , shoving Peter in her path . The thought of impaling him on the skewer had crossed her mind . Stuck , the air would have slowly hissed out of him .
domestication: 她最后一次见到彼得时，他看起来很壮实，但没什么问题。当时她正弯腰在厨房里，对着烤箱，从一串羊肉串上拉出一根竹签。空气中弥漫着洋葱和甜椒在黄油中炖煮的香味。她没意识到他就在她身后。她的手指被烫到了，她失去了平衡，向后跌倒，沿着厨房地板滑动，挡住了前进的路，差点撞到彼得。如果当时他被竹签刺中，真的会是场大祸。竹签插进去，空气会从他的身体里缓慢地逸出，真是可怕至极。

source: The mass shooting at the Pittsburgh synagogue Saturday comes after more than a dozen suspicious packages containing potentially explosive devices were sent to prominent Democratic figures , like former President Barack Obama , Hillary Clinton , former CIA Director John Brennan , former Attorney General Eric Holders , and others , further fueling conversation about deepening divides and violence in America .
domestication: 匹兹堡犹太教堂星期六发生的大规模枪击事件发生在数十个可疑包裹被送往著名民主党人士之后，其中包括前总统巴拉克·奥巴马，希拉里·克林顿，前中央情报局局长约翰·布伦南，前司法部长埃里克·霍尔德等人。这些包裹中可能包含爆炸装置，这更进一步引发了关于美国日益加深的分歧和暴力问题的讨论。

source: But we wo n't see them this trip , because on this eclipse the moon is a tad too large ; it will overlap the disc of the sun and thus cut off not only Baily 's Beads but a little of the inner corona , and the reasons for that are that the moon happens to be about as close to us ( at 222,380 miles ) as it ever gets , and also simply that it 's July .
domestication: 不过这次旅行我们看不到它们，因为这次日食月亮有点太大了；它会遮盖住太阳盘，并且不仅会遮挡贝利珠，还会遮挡一些太阳日冕内部的部分，原因是月亮碰巧离我们很近（距离我们22.2380万英里），而且正好是七月。我们知道，月亮的轨道不是正圆，而是一个椭圆形，所以有时候离地球近，有时候离地球远。这样一来，同样的月亮，在不同的时间就会显得大小不同。而七月正是月亮离地球最近的时候，这就使得它的影子投射到地球上时，也比平常的大。这也就是说，当月亮的影子投射到地球上时，能够完全遮挡住太阳的光线，形成日全食。

source: " Our study presents an interesting finding in the form of the multicomponent , tumor suppressive FTH1 gene : pseudogene network which can be harnessed for future diagnostic and drug development . The highly expressed microRNAs that link FTH1 and the pseudogenes are attractive biomarkers , as well as therapeutic targets for prostate cancer . source: As with Detroit 's offense , shots are spread around to the open hand . Six different Hawks scored over nine points per game , led by Paul Millsap 's 17.1 . Cleveland ca n't rely on stoppers like LeBron James or Iman Shumpert to zero in on one or two players , as Atlanta will just find the next guy waiting .

source: As a group , amphibians are declining more dramatically than any other class of vertebrate , and the future of some species is in serious doubt . Having already vanished throughout much of the southern Rocky Mountains , the boreal toad is one species with a questionable future . Beginning in the 1970s , the species began disappearing throughout much of Colorado 's high country . Rocky Mountain National Park is now one of only a small number of places where this high-elevation amphibian is still hanging on . But this was n't always the case .
domestication: 两栖动物作为一个群体，其衰落的速度是所有脊椎动物中最快的，某些物种的未来前景堪忧。寒带蟾蜍（boreal toad）就是其中之一，它在南落基山脉的大部分地区已经消失了。从20世纪70年代开始，这种物种开始在科罗拉多州的大部分高海拔地区消失。如今，落基山国家公园是少数几处这种高海拔两栖动物仍然存在的地方之一。但是，情况并非一直如此。
foreignization: 作为一个群体，两栖动物比任何其他脊椎动物类别更剧烈地衰落，并且有些物种的未来存在严重的疑虑。已经在南部落基山脉的大部分地区消失，洞口蟾蜍是其中一种具有可疑未来的物种。从20世纪70年代开始，该物种开始在科罗拉多州的大部分高海拔地区消失。落基山国家公园现在是少数几个这种高海拔两栖动物仍然存活的地方之一。但事实并非总是如此。

source: Nobody knows even what triggers it . Nine of every ten lung-cancer patients can at least blame their own smoking . Breast-cancer patients can blame nothing for sure . All the identifiable risk factors combined still only account for about 25 percent of the cases . In other words , three-quarters of women who suffer the disease have none of the known risks -- for example , family history or diets high in saturated fat . Many experts believe their cancer is launched by poisons in the environment , but there is little research in that area . The gaps in knowledge and the inability to stem breast cancer 's onslaught make it one of humanity 's cruelest diseases .
domestication: 这究竟是怎么回事呢？说实在的，还真没人知道是什么原因引发了它。十个肺癌患者中，有九个至少可以归咎于自己吸烟的习惯，而乳腺癌患者却啥也怨不了，找不出任何可以肯定是导致自己患病的原因。即使把所有已知的危险因素加起来，也只能解释大约25%的病例。换句话说，四分之三的女性患者没有任何已知的风险因素——比如家族病史或者脂肪摄入过高什么的。很多专家认为环境中的有毒物质可能是诱发癌症的元凶，但在这方面的研究还很少。知识上的空白以及对抗乳腺癌无能为力的现状，使得这种疾病成为了人类最残酷的一种疾病之一。
foreignization: 没有人知道是什么引发了它，每十个肺癌患者中就有九个至少可以怪罪自己的吸烟，乳腺癌患者则什么也不能怪罪。所有可识别的风险因素加起来也只占病例的约25％。换句话说，四分之三患病的女性没有已知的风险——例如家族史或饱和脂肪含量高的饮食。许多专家认为他们的癌症是由环境中的毒素引起的，但是在这个领域的研究很少。知识上的空白和无法阻止乳腺癌的袭击，使得它成为人类最残酷的疾病之一。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nobody knows even what triggers it . Nine of every ten lung-cancer patients can at least blame their own smoking . Breast-cancer patients can blame nothing for sure . All the identifiable risk factors combined still only account for about 25 percent of the cases . In other words , three-quarters of women who suffer the disease have none of the known risks -- for example , family history or diets high in saturated fat . Many experts believe their cancer is launched by poisons in the environment , but there is little research in that area . The gaps in knowledge and the inability to stem breast cancer 's onslaught make it one of humanity 's cruelest diseases .

source: Tuesday through Friday nights , the bike messengers congregate at a Washington dive called Asylum for a little-known event , the " Courier Happy Hour . " At 6 p.m. they come skidding in from the streets , Lycra spidermen with names like Beaver , Beetlejuice , and Bam Bam . Concrete cowboys with shaved legs and holstered Motorola radios , scabby knees and earrings , guys who look like some weird cross between Greg LeMond and Sid Vicious . Soon the place is reminiscent of the alien bar in Star Wars , all sorts of interesting-looking beasts and hard-shelled insects hobnobbing in the dim lounge , speaking a strange patois . " Made a major southwest slice , man . Cut a big hole in the traffic in front of this Murphy at Farragut and then I shredded ' em , man , had him eating my dust .... "
domestication: 每个星期二到星期五的晚上，快递员们都会聚集在华盛顿的一家叫做“疯人院”的酒吧，参加一个鲜为人知的活动——“快递员的欢乐时光”。下午六点钟，他们就从街上疾驰而来，穿着莱卡拉的自行车服，看起来就像蜘蛛侠一样，名字也很酷，有比如“河狸”，“鬼马小精灵”和“爆炸小子”。这些城市牛仔们剃了腿，挂着摩托罗拉对讲机，膝盖上有伤疤，戴着耳环，看起来像是职业自行车手和朋克摇滚歌手的奇怪混合体。没多久，酒吧就变得像星球大战里的异形酒吧一样，各种奇形怪状的生物和甲壳类昆虫在昏暗的休息室里社交，使用着奇怪的混合语言。 “我今天完成了一次大规模的西南切片，伙计，在法拉格特街和默菲大街交叉口，我在交通中间开辟出一条大缺口，然后我甩开了他们，伙计，让他跟在我的尘土中吃灰……”
foreignization: 星期二到星期五晚上，骑行速递员聚集在华盛顿的一家名叫阿斯勒姆的酒吧，参加一个鲜为人知的活动——“快递员欢乐时光”。下午六点，他们从街道上滑进来，莱卡拉绸的蜘蛛侠，名字像海狸，死亡鬼面具和班班。水泥牛仔，剃光了腿，带着摩托罗拉收音机枪套，膝盖上有伤疤，戴着耳环，这些家伙看起来像是格雷格·勒蒙德和西德·维瑟斯之间奇怪的混合体。不久，这个地方让人联想到星球大战中的异形酒吧，各种有趣的生物和坚壳昆虫在昏暗的休息室里交往，说着一种奇怪的土话。“我做了一个主要的西南切片，伙计。在法拉格特和默菲路口前面交通中间切开了一个大缺口，然后我撕碎了他们，伙计，让他跟在我的尘埃后面……”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" At 6 p.m. they come skidding in from the streets , Lycra spidermen with names like Beaver , Beetlejuice , and Bam Bam . Concrete cowboys with shaved legs and holstered Motorola radios , scabby knees and earrings , guys who look like some weird cross between Greg LeMond and Sid Vicious . Soon the place is reminiscent of the alien bar in Star Wars , all sorts of interesting-looking beasts and hard-shelled insects hobnobbing in the dim lounge , speaking a strange patois . " Made a major southwest slice , man . Cut a big hole in the traffic in front of this Murphy at Farragut and then I shredded ' em , man , had him eating my dust .... "

source: During my pregnancy , I visited my doctor five times . They assured me everything was fine . So Jay and I carefully prepared ourselves for the birth . I practiced breathing techniques and relaxation , kept up my exercise , and ate a good diet . Even toward the end , a hike of eight miles was nothing unusual .
domestication: 我怀孕期间去看医生五次，他们都告诉我一切正常。于是杰和我开始认真准备迎接宝宝的出生。我练习了呼吸技巧和放松，坚持锻炼，还保持均衡的饮食。即使快到预产期了，我还能轻松地徒步八英里，这种事对我来说已经变得稀松平常了。
foreignization: 在怀孕期间，我去看医生五次，他们向我保证一切都很好。所以杰伊和我认真地为分娩做准备。我练习了呼吸技巧和放松，坚持运动，并吃了均衡的饮食。即使是在后期，八英里的徒步旅行也没什么不寻常。

messages_domestication.content:

During my pregnancy , I visited my doctor five times . They assured me everything was fine . So Jay and I carefully prepared ourselves for the birth . I practiced breathing techniques and relaxation , kept up my exercise , and ate a good diet . Even toward the end , a hike of eight miles was nothing unusual .
我怀孕期间去看医生五次，他们都告诉我一切正常。于是杰和我开始认真准备迎接宝宝的出生。我练习了呼吸技巧和放松，坚持锻炼，还保持均衡的饮食。即使快到预产期了，我还能轻松地徒步八英里，这种事对我来说已经变得稀松平常了。

During my pregnancy , I visited my doctor five times . They assured me everything was fine . So Jay and I carefully prepared ourselves for the birth . I practiced breathing techniques and relaxation , kept up my exercise , and ate a good diet . Even toward the end , a hike of eight miles was nothing unusual .
在怀孕期间，我去看医生五次，他们向我保证一切都很好。所以杰伊和我认真地为分娩做准备。我练习了呼吸技巧和放松，坚持运动，并吃了均衡的饮食。即使是在后期，八英里的徒步旅行也没什么不寻常。

source: After the scammers established contact , they 'd make up a financial emergency , like needing to pay for a flight home . If the target paid up , they 'd repeat the process until it was no longer profitable , eventually ghosting their partner who was often deeply emotionally invested in the relationship . In one case study , a Texas man spent more than $50,000 during a fake relationship with " Laura Cahill , " supposedly an American model living in Paris . That included $10,000 allegedly stolen from his stepfather .
domestication: 这些诈骗犯一旦钓到目标，就会编造一些紧急情况，比如说需要买机票回家什么的。如果目标上当了，他们就会一直重复这一套，直到不再能赚到钱为止。最后，他们就会抛弃自己的“伴侣”，而这些人往往已经深陷其中，投入了大量的情感。在一个案例中，德克萨斯州的一个男人与所谓的美国模特“劳拉·凯莉”（Laura Cahill）建立了虚假的恋爱关系，并且花费了超过5万美元，包括从他的继父那里偷来的1万美元。

source: In the original study , researchers led by Feiisa Wolfe- Simon , a NASA astrobiology research fellow , cultured a microbe now known as GFAJ-I from eastern California 's Mono Lake . The lake has an unusual chemistry rich in carbonates , phosphorus , arsenic and sulfur . Wolfe- Simon and her colleagues starved GFAJ-I of phosphate , a combination of phosphorus and oxygen that 's an essential building block of life , and force-fed the critter arsenate , an almost identical arrangement of arsenic and oxygen .
domestication: 在最初的研究中，一队由NASA天体生物学研究员费伊萨·沃尔夫-西蒙（Feiisa Wolfe-Simon）领导的研究人员，从加利福尼亚东部的莫诺湖中培养了一种微生物，目前被称为GFAJ-1。莫诺湖的化学成分非常独特，富含碳酸盐、磷、砷和硫。沃尔夫-西蒙和她的同事们让GFAJ-1饥饿了，它的食物是磷酸盐，一种由磷和氧组成的生命的基本组成部分，而强行让它吃砷酸盐，这是一种几乎与磷酸盐完全相同的砷和氧的组合。
foreignization: 在最初的研究中，NASA天体生物学研究员Feiisa Wolfe - Simon领导的研究人员从加利福尼亚州东部的Mono湖培养了一种现在被称为GFAJ-1的微生物。该湖富含碳酸盐、磷、砷和硫的特殊化学物质。沃尔夫-西蒙和她的同事限制了GFAJ-1获取磷酸盐，一种由磷和氧组成的生命的基本构建块，并强迫这种微生物摄入砷酸盐，几乎与砷和氧的排列方式相同。

source: Edwin Gray , who headed the Federal Home Loan Bank Board in the mid-1980s , says he was frustrated in trying to sound the alarm by his inability to release pertinent information to the press . The law says that doing so could have cost him his job as well as a year in prison . Gray now contends that the S &L; losses would never have grown so large had the public been given more information about the problem sooner . " That would have gone a long way to helping , " he says .
domestication: 20世纪80年代中期，联邦储贷保险公司董事局局长埃德温·格雷曾试图提醒人们注意贷款风波，但由于受到法律的限制，他无法向媒体披露相关信息。法律规定，这样做不仅会使他丢掉工作，还可能判他入狱一年。如今，格雷认为，如果早些时候让公众更多地了解问题的真相，储贷危机也不会愈演愈烈。他表示，“这本该对解决问题有很大帮助的。”
foreignization: 在 1980 年代中期领导联邦住房贷款银行委员会（Federal Home Loan Bank Board）的埃德温·格雷（Edwin Gray）说，他试图拉响警报，但由于无法向媒体发布相关信息而感到沮丧。法律规定这样做可能会让他失去工作，并且还会面临一年监禁的处罚。格雷现在声称，如果公众早些时候得到更多有关这个问题的信息，储蓄和贷款机构（S＆L）的损失永远不会变得如此巨大。他说：“那将在很大程度上有所帮助，”

Gray now contends that the S &L; losses would never have grown so large had the public been given more information about the problem sooner . " That would have gone a long way to helping , " he says .

source: On Wednesday , Treasurys cemented their longest winning streak since June 28 , a period that coincided with the U.K. 's vote to leave the European Union . That vote , which was widely discounted by investors , rattled stock markets and sparked a rush of assets into safety plays like high-grade sovereign debt , gold and the yen .
domestication: 星期三这天，美国国债走势创下六月二十八号以来的最长连胜记录，而这一时期正巧与英国脱欧公投的时间相吻合。这次公投结果早就被投资者们猜到了八九分，但仍然让股票市场受到了震动，资产也争先恐后地向避险天堂——高级别主权债券、黄金和日元等——转移。
foreignization: 周三，国债延续了自6月28日以来最长的连续上涨，刚好与英国脱欧公投的时间重合。在投资者看来，这次公投结果早已被预料到了，但它依然令股市动荡不安，并引发了一阵资本涌向高级主权债、黄金和日元等避险资产的热潮。

source: Surely , the Federal government could eliminate one of the most serious objections to nuclear power--the lack of long-term storage fur spent fuel . To date , the Feds have not met their commitment to deal with this problem . The cost ( including incentives to the localities hosting the spent fuel ) could be covered by the utilities shipping the material . Currently , nuclear power generates more than 70% of the nation 's non-CO2 emitting electricity .
domestication: 当然，联邦政府完全可以消除对核能的一个最主要的反对意见——处理核废料的长期储存问题。到目前为止，联邦政府尚未兑现其解决这一问题的承诺。处理核废料的费用（包括补贴贮存核废料的当地政府）完全可以由运输核废料的公司来承担。目前，核能发电已经占了全国非二氧化碳排放电力的70%以上。说白了，核能发电是非常环保的，只要能够妥善处理核废料，核能发电就是一个很好的选择。

source: Together , the growth of these business and social-issue lobbies has created a phenomenal , and unprecedented , concentration of power in Washington . In 1994 , for instance , residents of Washington gave more money to national candidates than residents of any other city , even though Washington itself only had a single uncontested congressional race . More PAC money emanated from Washington than from the rest of the country put together .
domestication: 这些商业和社会问题游说团体的壮大，让华盛顿形成了一个前所未有的权力集中地。在1994年，例如，华盛顿居民向全国候选人捐款的金额甚至超过了其他任何城市，尽管华盛顿本身只有一个无悬念的国会竞选。而且，来自华盛顿的政治行动委员会（PAC）资金比整个国家其他地区加起来还要多，这简直是让人啼笑皆非。
foreignization: 这些商业和社会问题游说团体的增长共同创造了一个现象性的且空前的华盛顿权力集中现象。例如，在 1994 年，华盛顿的人们向全国候选人捐款超过其他任何城市，即使华盛顿只有单一的一场没有竞争的国会选举。华盛顿流出的政治行动委员会资金比整个国家的总和还多。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Together , the growth of these business and social-issue lobbies has created a phenomenal , and unprecedented , concentration of power in Washington . In 1994 , for instance , residents of Washington gave more money to national candidates than residents of any other city , even though Washington itself only had a single uncontested congressional race . More PAC money emanated from Washington than from the rest of the country put together .
这些商业和社会问题游说团体的壮大，让华盛顿形成了一个前所未有的权力集中地。在1994年，例如，华盛顿居民向全国候选人捐款的金额甚至超过了其他任何城市，尽管华盛顿本身只有一个无悬念的国会竞选。而且，来自华盛顿的政治行动委员会（PAC）资金比整个国家其他地区加起来还要多，这简直是让人啼笑皆非。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Together , the growth of these business and social-issue lobbies has created a phenomenal , and unprecedented , concentration of power in Washington . In 1994 , for instance , residents of Washington gave more money to national candidates than residents of any other city , even though Washington itself only had a single uncontested congressional race . More PAC money emanated from Washington than from the rest of the country put together .
这些商业和社会问题游说团体的增长共同创造了一个现象性的且空前的华盛顿权力集中现象。例如，在 1994 年，华盛顿的人们向全国候选人捐款超过其他任何城市，即使华盛顿只有单一的一场没有竞争的国会选举。华盛顿流出的政治行动委员会资金比整个国家的总和还多。

source: Duhamel knows the real secret here : Avoid the casino . " People underestimate the importance of setting up their environment to favor self-control , " says Roger Giner-Sorolla , Ph.D. , a psychology professor at the University of Kent at Canterbury , Instead of hitting the casino , set up a tow-stakes basement poker game with your buddies . Ante with high-risk , low-loss dares ( loser has to race in the local triathlon in a pink Speedo ) or household chores ( low man mows the winner 's lawn ) to keep serious cash off the table . JUNK FOODS
domestication: 都哈梅尔清楚这里的真相：避开赌场。肯特大学在坎特伯雷的心理学教授罗杰·吉纳-索罗拉博士说，“人们低估了环境对自我控制的重要性。”与其去赌场，不如和朋友们在家里组织一个低风险的扑克游戏。用高风险、低损失的赌注（输家必须参加当地铁人三项比赛，穿着粉色泳衣）或家务活（输家为赢家割草），让大家都能放松下来，不用担心输钱。

source: Kentucky governor Matt Bevin wants students majoring in electrical engineering to receive state subsidies for their education but does n't want to support those who study subjects such as French literature . Bevin is not alone in trying to nudge higher education toward course work that promotes better future job prospects . Senator Marco Rubio of Florida , a former presidential candidate , put it bluntly last year by calling for more welders and fewer philosophers .
domestication: 肯塔基州州长马特·贝文希望电气工程专业的学生能获得州政府的教育补贴，但他却不想支持学习法语文学等课程的学生。 贝文并不是唯一一个想要引导高等教育朝着提高未来就业前景的课程发展的人。 去年，佛罗里达州参议员马可·鲁比奥（Marco Rubio），一位曾经的总统候选人，说得更直接，他呼吁培养更多的焊工，少一些哲学家。这样做的目的是为了让大学生能够找到好工作，实现自己的价值。这种观点在美国引起了很多争论，有些人认为大学的目的是促进学生的全面发展，而不仅仅是提供就业技能。
foreignization: 肯塔基州州长马特·贝文希望主修电气工程的学生能够获得州政府的教育补贴，但不想支持那些学习法语文学等学科的学生。 贝文在尝试引导高等教育朝着能促进更好未来工作前景的课程设置方面并非孤军奋战。 佛罗里达州参议员、前总统候选人马可·鲁比奥去年直言不讳地呼吁培养更多焊工，减少哲学家。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Senator Marco Rubio of Florida , a former presidential candidate , put it bluntly last year by calling for more welders and fewer philosophers .

source: My most ambitious use of technology is my " LifeSighs " show , a live multimedia tour through my life that we have produced six times now . Before that , in 1988 , I was offered four speaking engagements at U.S. colleges . At first I did n't know what to do . Give me a guitar and a piano and I can play all day . But an hour of talking ?
domestication: 我对科技最有野心的运用，大概就是我的“LifeSighs”演出了。这是一个多媒体的现场秀，讲述我的一生，我们已经制作并上演了六次了。在那之前，1988年，我接到了四个美国大学的演讲邀请。一开始我完全不知道该怎么办。给我一把吉他或是一架钢琴，我可以整天弹下去。但是，光讲话，足足一个小时？

source: First there was the pathetic charge that Obama was born in Kenya and therefore ineligible to be president . The story was heavily stoked by the conservative media , aided by the non-denial denials of GOP leaders , and gave Donald Trump his fifteen minutes of presidentialcontender fame . It was never taken seriously by the mainstream press , but the president ended the story in April of this year by taking the unprecedented step of releasing his birth certificate , a tacit acknowledgment that the desperate effort to smear him had become a political distraction .
domestication: 一开始，有人居然无中生有地散布谣言，说奥巴马出生在肯尼亚，因此没有资格当总统。这件事得到了保守派媒体的热炒，共和党领导人的拐弯抹角更是火上浇油，让特朗普也因此扬名立万了一把。主流媒体从来都不把这件事当回事，但今年四月，奥巴马总统还是忍不住破例公布了自己的出生证明，算是默认了那些人对他的污蔑已经造成了政治上的干扰。
foreignization: 首先，有人可怜地指控奥巴马出生在肯尼亚，因此不符合当总统的资格。这则故事被保守派媒体大肆渲染，同时得到了共和党领袖们的含糊其辞的否认，并给唐纳德·特朗普带来了15分钟的总统竞选者名声。这篇故事从来没有被主流媒体 серьез对待，但今年四月，总统通过采取了一个前所未有的步骤，公布了他的出生证明，这是一个默示的承认，那些绝望地想要抹黑他努力已经变成了一种政治分心。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

First there was the pathetic charge that Obama was born in Kenya and therefore ineligible to be president . The story was heavily stoked by the conservative media , aided by the non-denial denials of GOP leaders , and gave Donald Trump his fifteen minutes of presidentialcontender fame . It was never taken seriously by the mainstream press , but the president ended the story in April of this year by taking the unprecedented step of releasing his birth certificate , a tacit acknowledgment that the desperate effort to smear him had become a political distraction .

The story was heavily stoked by the conservative media , aided by the non-denial denials of GOP leaders , and gave Donald Trump his fifteen minutes of presidentialcontender fame . It was never taken seriously by the mainstream press , but the president ended the story in April of this year by taking the unprecedented step of releasing his birth certificate , a tacit acknowledgment that the desperate effort to smear him had become a political distraction .
首先，有人可怜地指控奥巴马出生在肯尼亚，因此不符合当总统的资格。这则故事被保守派媒体大肆渲染，同时得到了共和党领袖们的含糊其辞的否认，并给唐纳德·特朗普带来了15分钟的总统竞选者名声。这篇故事从来没有被主流媒体 серьез对待，但今年四月，总统通过采取了一个前所未有的步骤，公布了他的出生证明，这是一个默示的承认，那些绝望地想要抹黑他努力已经变成了一种政治分心。

source: Since last fall , the study team has captured 37 adult coyotes from 13 territorial packs , examining and marking them in a systematic 45-minute process . With smelly lures simulating coyote scents , researchers set padded jaw traps with a shock absorber to keep from injuring the coyote . A radio transmitter alerts researchers when the trap is sprung , so they can be on the scene within minutes after an animal is caught
domestication: 自从去年秋天开始，这个研究团队已经捕获了13个领地内的37只成年郊狼，并对它们进行了一系列系统化的检查和标记，整个过程大约需要45分钟。研究人员利用有强烈气味的诱饵模拟郊狼的气味来诱捕郊狼，并设置了带有减震器的夹子，以免伤害到郊狼。一旦郊狼被捕获，收音机发射器就会提醒研究人员，这样他们就可以在几分钟内赶到现场。研究人员会在现场对郊狼进行一系列的检查，然后将它们放回野外。
foreignization: 自去年秋季以来，研究团队已经捕获了来自13个领地群的37只成年郊狼，并在一个系统化的45分钟过程中检查和标记它们。使用散发着郊狼气味的诱饵，研究人员设置了带有减震器的夹子陷阱，以免伤害郊狼。无线电发射器在陷阱被触发时提醒研究人员，因此他们可以在动物被捕获后几分钟内赶到现场

With smelly lures simulating coyote scents , researchers set padded jaw traps with a shock absorber to keep from injuring the coyote . A radio transmitter alerts researchers when the trap is sprung , so they can be on the scene within minutes after an animal is caught

source: With its Bugatti-like styling , precision-machined aluminum receiver , and match-barrel blank wrapped in carbon fiber , the Fusion is the sexiest plinking rifle on Earth . Barrels for the .17 HMR/.22 WMR or .17 Mach 2/.22 LR models swap out in seconds with no tools .

source: 20th Century Fox is reportedly looking to buy Tribune Media , potentially sparking a wave of consolidation in the TV business . The news comes via Bloomberg , which believes that the media giant has entered into secret talks to buy the broadcaster . Tribune Media is a potentially prize asset , owning 39 stations in 31 markets , including affiliates for all of the big five TV networks .
domestication: 20世纪福克斯有意收购 Tribune Media，这可能会在电视行业引发一波整合潮。据彭博社报道，这家媒体巨头已经开始与Tribune Media进行秘密谈判。Tribune Media是一笔宝贵的资产，它在31个市场拥有39个电台，包括所有五大电视网络的附属机构。这笔交易如果成功，20世纪福克斯在电视行业的影响力将进一步扩大。

source: " The contest may not make people who have no initial interest in science suddenly think about it as a career , " Schor says . " But for people who have an interest but who have some doubt in the back of their mind as to whether they are good enough , this program says , ' Go ahead . " ' Adds Nobelist Hoffmann : " I think it encourages kids -- like any competition-to do things well , to do the things they would not have thought themselves capable of doing . I think that was how it was for me . Kids in high school are so keyed in on courses , on performance , on examination - but by focusing on a research project , you turn toward more of the reality of what science is about . "
domestication: “这项比赛可能不会让那些原本对科学毫无兴趣的人突然想要从事科学事业，” Schor 说。“但是对于那些已经对科学感兴趣，但又在心里疑惑自己是否足够优秀的人，这个项目告诉他们：‘继续努力吧！’” 诺贝尔奖获得者霍夫曼补充说：“我觉得这激励着孩子们——就像任何竞赛一样——去做好事情，去尝试他们以前认为自己不可能完成的事情。我觉得这就是我当时的想法。高中生太过关注课程、成绩和考试了，但是通过专注于一个研究项目，你会更加了解科学的真谛。”
foreignization: “这项竞赛可能不会让原本对科学毫无兴趣的人突然将其视为自己的职业，” Schor 说。“但是，对于那些有一定兴趣，但在潜意识里又有些怀疑自己是否足够优秀的人来说，这个项目是在告诉他们，‘继续努力吧。’” 诺贝尔奖获得者霍夫曼补充说：“我认为它鼓励孩子们——就像任何比赛一样——去做到最好，去尝试他们原本不认为自己能做到的事情。我想这就是对我的影响。当时我还是高中生，非常专注于课程、成绩和考试，但通过专注于一个研究项目，你会更关注科学的真实性质。”
