source: Even at its peak , investigative reporting depended on officials with subpoena power . These sources in law enforcement and on Capitol Hill fed various reporters , who had few tools for uncovering wrongdoing on their own . But this system depended on sources who were , if not nonpartisan , at least committed to some version of the truth that stood above blatant political ax grinding . Nowadays everyone has an agenda , which makes the information offered the press more suspect .
domestication: 即使在鼎盛时期，调查报道也依赖于拥有传唤权的官员。这些来自执法部门和国会山的消息来源会向各个记者提供信息，而记者们自己却几乎没有能力揭露不法行为。但是，这个系统依赖于那些如果不是超越党派利益的话，至少致力于某种高于明显政治私利的真相的消息来源。如今，每个人都有自己的议程，这使得媒体收到的信息更加可疑。
foreignization: 即使在鼎盛时期，调查性报道也依赖于具有传唤权的官员。这些执法部门和国会山的消息来源向各种记者提供信息，而这些记者几乎没有自己揭露不法行为的手段。但是，这个系统依赖于一些消息来源，他们如果不是超越党派的，至少也是致力于某种高于明显政治偏见的真相。如今，每个人都有自己的议程，这使得媒体提供的信息更加可疑。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even at its peak , investigative reporting depended on officials with subpoena power . These sources in law enforcement and on Capitol Hill fed various reporters , who had few tools for uncovering wrongdoing on their own . But this system depended on sources who were , if not nonpartisan , at least committed to some version of the truth that stood above blatant political ax grinding . Nowadays everyone has an agenda , which makes the information offered the press more suspect .

source: Applying the weed killer would knock out much of the goat grass invading farmers ' fields . But left untreated , the goat grass survives to accept pollen from the wheat - and in so doing , creates hybrids that incorporate its cousin 's resistance . Although farmers can target the hybrid goat grass with other herbicides , doing so risks killing the wheat as well .
domestication: 用除草剂可以消灭侵占农田的大量野草，但是如果不进行处理，这些野草就会存活下来并接受小麦的花粉，从而产生具有抗药性的杂交后代。虽然农民可以用其他除草剂来对付这些杂交野草，但这样做也有可能会连带伤害小麦。总之，这是一件很难办的事儿。
foreignization: 施用除草剂可以消灭大量入侵农民田地的山羊草。但如果不加以处理，山羊草会存活下来并接受来自小麦的花粉，并在此过程中，创造出包含其表亲抗药性的杂交物。虽然农民可以用其他除草剂针对杂交山羊草，但这样做有可能连同小麦一起杀死。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Applying the weed killer would knock out much of the goat grass invading farmers ' fields . But left untreated , the goat grass survives to accept pollen from the wheat - and in so doing , creates hybrids that incorporate its cousin 's resistance . Although farmers can target the hybrid goat grass with other herbicides , doing so risks killing the wheat as well .

“ 你需要在科技股上大量配置，因为这类股表现出色，远超其他板块，问题在于，你愿意为此支付多少钱”，加利福尼亚州圣塔安娜第一美国信托公司（First American Trust）的首席投资官杰里·布拉克曼（Jerry Braakman）如是说。“当收益伴随着更高的市盈率下滑时，对股票的影响将会更加严重。” 赞助的财经内容 你可能会喜欢的故事 阅读更多 为我们的新闻稿注册

source: Indeed , by failing to accurately state the beliefs and motivations of folks who have cheered the University of Chicago letter , its critics are priming some students to receive it as a willful attack on their identities when , in fact , it is perfectly consistent with an administrator deeply committed to the flourishing of all first-years .
domestication: 看来，芝加哥大学这封信的批评者们并没有准确地描述支持这封信的人们的想法和动机。结果，他们反而让一些学生误以为这封信是故意针对他们的身份认同的攻击，而实际上，这封信其实是出自一位真正希望所有新生都能茁壮成长的管理人员之手。

source: Carrots for the energy industry : That 's the core of George Bush 's advice this summer as legislators in both houses of Congress try to concoct a national energy policy . Leasing the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge for oil and gas development is essential , Bush says ; so is increased production of natural gas and nuclear power . Energy efficiency ? For Bush , it 's a topic hardly worth mentioning .
domestication: 夏天，布什给国会两院议员的建议可以概括为"胡萝卜和大棒"。当时他们正试图制定国家能源政策。布什说，租借北极国家野生动物保护区用于石油和天然气开发是至关重要的。增加天然气和核能的生产也是必要的。但在他看来，能源效率却是无关紧要的话题，几乎不值得一提。
foreignization: 对于能源行业的胡萝卜：这是乔治布什今年夏天给国会两院立法者的一些建议，当时他们试图编造一个国家能源政策。布什说，租借北极国家野生动物保护区用于石油和天然气开发是必要的；天然气和核能的产量也必须增加。能源效率？对于布什来说，这是一个几乎不值得一提的话题。

source: Twitter holds on to you because years ago you held onto it . A curated feed of friends and smart humans made for an interesting and dare I say it fun occasional escape . I gradually added more accounts to my feed like a ravenous dog chomping all as much data as my brain could handle . More friends . More friends . More friends . Everyone is equal . Everyone has something to say and it 's weird AF and I was just filling my feed with their words and occasional cat GIFs .
domestication: 推特之所以能吸引你，是因为很多年前你就已经沉迷其中了。朋友和聪明人分享的精选内容，确实让人觉得很有趣，也是个不错的消遣方式。我就像一只饿狼一样，不停地往我的订阅列表里添加账号，尽可能多地吸收信息。越来越多的朋友，越来越多的朋友……在这里，每个人都是平等的，每个人都有自己的想法，这有点儿奇怪，但我就是忍不住要看他们的发言，有时还会看到一些好笑的猫表情包。
foreignization: Twitter之所以能让你留下，是因为多年前你选择了它。精心策划的朋友和聪明人士的信息源，使得它成为了一个有趣的、我敢说是很有趣的偶尔逃避现实的地方。我逐渐向我的信息源中添加更多账户，像一只饥饿的狗尽可能多地吞噬着我的大脑能处理的所有数据。更多的朋友。更多的朋友。更多的朋友。每个人都是平等的。每个人都有话要说，这真是太奇怪了，我只是用他们的话语和偶尔的猫动图填满了我的信息源。

source: Still , at all levels , a big complaint from potential hires is the process involved in getting a government job . Confusing applications and an often interminable wait before a decision is made are two common turnoffs . " Government methods of recruiting and hiring are often so troublesome that they lose a lot of good people because of the frustration , " says Volcker .
domestication: 尽管如此，在各个层面上，潜在的求职者们都有一个共同的抱怨，那就是办理政府工作的手续实在太麻烦。申请表格复杂，等待结果的时间又长得让人难以忍受，这两点是最常见的槽点。沃尔克尔说：“政府的招聘和录用程序常常如此繁琐，以至于会因为程序过于烦人而失去很多好人才。”这话说得很有道理，政府部门应该改进一下自己的招募流程，否则就会错失很多优秀的人才。
foreignization: 仍然，在所有层面上，潜在雇员的主要抱怨是获得政府工作的相关流程。令人困惑的申请程序以及在做出决定之前经常需要等待很长时间是两个常见的缺点。沃尔克尔说：“政府的招聘和录用方法往往如此麻烦，以至于由于沮丧而失去很多好人。”

source: After a period of neglect Perry Mason seems to be coming back into favor with readers . Try one of the pre-war Masons-The Case of the Sulky Girl is a good one-or any of the A. A. Fair books . The latter are very different , breezily narrated by Donald Lam , and characterized by much better writing than the Masons .
domestication: 看来，佩里·梅森又重新受到读者的青睐了。为什么不试试他写的旧作品呢，比如《乖戾女郎案》，算是很不错的选择。或者，你也可以看看A.A.费尔的书，那些书的写作风格完全不同，通过唐纳德·拉姆的视角，叙述轻松自如，而且写得比梅森的那些书好多了。
foreignization: 在一段时间的被忽视之后，佩里·梅森似乎重新受到读者的青睐。 尝试一下战前梅森作品中的一个——《不悦女孩案》是一个很好的选择——或是任何A.A.费尔的书籍。 后者非常不同，以唐纳德·拉姆的轻松叙述为特点，其写作水平也远远高于梅森系列。

source: The truth is the government not only allows you to take certain deductions , but also encourages you to do so . During this unstable economy , for example , if you 're willing to run a small business from your home , the federal government will actually assist you in funding your business . The government entitles you to deduct a portion of your automobile expenses ... of your office supplies ... of your travel ... even of your home .
domestication: 事实上，政府不仅允许你享受某些税收优惠，而且还鼓励你这么做。在这动荡的经济环境下，比如说，如果你愿意在家经营一个小生意，联邦政府实际上会帮助你资金支持你的生意。政府让你可以扣除汽车费用的一部分、办公用品的一部分、差旅费的一部分，甚至是房子的部分费用。你说，这不是很划算吗？
foreignization: 事实是，政府不仅允许你进行某些扣除，而且还鼓励你这样做。在这种不稳定的经济中，例如，如果你愿意从家里经营一家小企业，联邦政府实际上会帮助你资助你的业务。政府让你有权扣除一部分你的汽车费用……你的办公用品……你的旅行……甚至你的房屋。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The truth is the government not only allows you to take certain deductions , but also encourages you to do so . During this unstable economy , for example , if you 're willing to run a small business from your home , the federal government will actually assist you in funding your business . The government entitles you to deduct a portion of your automobile expenses ... of your office supplies ... of your travel ... even of your home .
事实上，政府不仅允许你享受某些税收优惠，而且还鼓励你这么做。在这动荡的经济环境下，比如说，如果你愿意在家经营一个小生意，联邦政府实际上会帮助你资金支持你的生意。政府让你可以扣除汽车费用的一部分、办公用品的一部分、差旅费的一部分，甚至是房子的部分费用。你说，这不是很划算吗？

The truth is the government not only allows you to take certain deductions , but also encourages you to do so . During this unstable economy , for example , if you 're willing to run a small business from your home , the federal government will actually assist you in funding your business . The government entitles you to deduct a portion of your automobile expenses ... of your office supplies ... of your travel ... even of your home .

source: Most of the time , anyway . As a woman who 's clearly , even radiantly aware of her femininity , Crow seems a bit disingenuous when she claims to be mystified by the particular enthusiasm she inspires in male fans . She 's no more convincing when she critiques her own flawless form -- a physique she claims she maintains without working out . source: And as NASA prepares for Artemis , Wright 's animations assist in planning for safer , more successful missions . There is now enough data where Wright can use his computer program to make animations depicting what specific areas on the moon will look like in 2024 . This allows scientists to find further target zones for upcoming exploration .
domestication: 随着美国宇航局准备发射阿尔忒弥斯号任务，赖特的动画在规划更安全、更成功的任务中发挥了重要作用。现在已经有足够的数据，赖特可以利用他的电脑程序制作出2024年月球表面某些区域将会是什么样的动画。这使得科学家们能够找到未来探索的新目标区域。其实，这种技术就像“装卸货物要先看地图”，有了具体的月球地形动画，科学家们就能更好地策划下一步的探索行动。
foreignization: 随着美国国家航空航天局（NASA）为阿尔忒弥斯号（Artemis）做准备，赖特的动画帮助规划更安全、更成功的任务。目前已有足够的数据，赖特可以使用他的计算机程序制作动画，描绘2024年月球上哪些特定区域将会是什么样子。这使科学家能够找到进一步的目标区域，以便进行即将到来的探索。

source: Stone was pushed out as a Trump campaign official last year , but he continues to head up one of the biggest pro-Trump PACs . Reports suggest that he plays a major role in advising the campaign -- he was apparently part of the reason Trump hired Paul Manafort , who ran the campaign over the summer -- and that he speaks with Trump on the regular . The whole strategy of using Bill Clinton 's infidelities -- along with insinuations about darker , sexualized conspiracy theories -- as a way to distract voters from Trump 's actual sexism is exactly the sort of politics Stone specializes in . And it 's precisely the mentality driving this year 's Republican campaign .
domestication: 去年，斯通被踢出特朗普的竞选团队，但他仍然领导着最大的亲特朗普政治行动委员会之一。有消息称，他在为竞选团队提供建议方面发挥了重要作用——他显然是特朗普聘请保罗·曼纳福特（Paul Manafort）担任夏季竞选经理的原因之一——而且他经常与特朗普交谈。利用比尔·克林顿（Bill Clinton）的不忠行为——以及关于更黑暗、性化阴谋论的暗示——来分散人们对特朗普真正性别歧视的注意力，这正是斯通擅长的政治手法。而这正是今年共和党竞选背后的心态。

source: Those of a more radical stripe will no doubt seek out new causes and new utopias . Environmentalism holds an obvious appeal for those drawn to utopias ; the realization of the radical environmental agenda would entail a degree of totalitarian regimentation that would compare well with what went on in Hoxha 's Albania . But a truly mass movement devoted to radical ecology is not likely to materialize . Environmental controls inevitably collide with the public 's economic well-being , a fact which will always limit the movement 's mass popularity .
domestication: 那些更加激进的人恐怕会去寻找新的理想和乌托邦。环保主义对追求乌托邦的人有着明显的吸引力，因为要实现激进的环保理念，就需要相当程度的极权式控制，这与阿尔巴尼亚在霍查统治时期的情况有得一比。但真正的大规模的激进生态运动不太可能形成，因为环境管制不可避免地会与公众的经济利益发生冲突，这个事实将永远限制该运动的广泛流行。其实，有句话说的好：养兵千日，用在一朝，要是经济生活受影响，谁都会拍案而起，况且人们也不会让激进分子当家做主。
foreignization: 那些更为激进的人无疑会寻求新的事业和新的乌托邦。 环境主义对于那些倾向于乌托邦的人具有明显的吸引力；实现激进的环境议程将需要一定程度的极权主义管制，这将与霍查时代阿尔巴尼亚的情况相提并论。但是，一个真正致力于激进生态学的大众运动不太可能出现。环境控制措施必然会与公众的经济利益发生冲突，这一事实将始终限制该运动的群众基础。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Those of a more radical stripe will no doubt seek out new causes and new utopias . Environmentalism holds an obvious appeal for those drawn to utopias ; the realization of the radical environmental agenda would entail a degree of totalitarian regimentation that would compare well with what went on in Hoxha 's Albania . But a truly mass movement devoted to radical ecology is not likely to materialize . Environmental controls inevitably collide with the public 's economic well-being , a fact which will always limit the movement 's mass popularity .

source: The compassion meditation group was trained to visualize people when they were suffering and practice noticing their own personal reactions in a calm and nonjudgmental way . Focusing on a loved one , on themselves , on a stranger , and on someone with whom they had conflict , they also practiced caring for and wishing to help the other person .
domestication: 有一群人专门练习慈悲禅修，他们通过想象别人在受苦时的样子来修炼自己，在这个过程中，他们也会观察自己的反应，但他们都是以一种非常冷静和不带偏见的方式去面对。他们会逐一关注自己爱的人、自己、陌生人以及与自己有矛盾的人，并在这个过程中，他们也会练习如何去关心和帮助这些人。

source: He also gives clues about his process in the way he answers questions . Asked about a particular mixture of colors that was a favorite in a previous workshop he replies , " Oh , I do n't do that anymore . " When a student wanted to pin him down on the way he establishes shadows or paints hands , he gave answers such as , " It keeps changing , " or " I normally do that , but not today . " Students came to under stand they should stay in the present , trust what they see , and take artistic control of their work .
domestication: 他回答问题的方式也透露了他的创作过程。在被问到之前的一个工作坊中他喜欢的一种色彩组合时，他回答说：“哦，我现在不再那么做了。”当一名学生想让他详细说明他如何画阴影或手部的时候，他给出的答案是：“这一直在变化”，或者“我通常是那样做的，但今天不一样。”学生们逐渐明白，他们应该活在当下，相信自己的眼睛，并掌控自己的艺术创作。这种方式，让学生们学会了放弃固有的模式，去捕捉瞬间的美，和挖掘自己的潜力。

" When a student wanted to pin him down on the way he establishes shadows or paints hands , he gave answers such as , " It keeps changing , " or " I normally do that , but not today . " Students came to under stand they should stay in the present , trust what they see , and take artistic control of their work .
他回答问题的方式也透露了他的创作过程。在被问到之前的一个工作坊中他喜欢的一种色彩组合时，他回答说：“哦，我现在不再那么做了。”当一名学生想让他详细说明他如何画阴影或手部的时候，他给出的答案是：“这一直在变化”，或者“我通常是那样做的，但今天不一样。”学生们逐渐明白，他们应该活在当下，相信自己的眼睛，并掌控自己的艺术创作。这种方式，让学生们学会了放弃固有的模式，去捕捉瞬间的美，和挖掘自己的潜力。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He also gives clues about his process in the way he answers questions . Asked about a particular mixture of colors that was a favorite in a previous workshop he replies , " Oh , I do n't do that anymore . " When a student wanted to pin him down on the way he establishes shadows or paints hands , he gave answers such as , " It keeps changing , " or " I normally do that , but not today . " Students came to under stand they should stay in the present , trust what they see , and take artistic control of their work .
他在回答问题的方式上也给出了关于他的创作过程的线索。当被问及之前一个研讨会中他最喜欢的一种特定颜色混合时，他回答说：“哦，我现在不再那样做了。”当一名学生想让他明确说明他如何建立阴影或绘制手部时，他给出的答案是：“这一直在变化”，或者“我通常那样做，但今天不行。”学生们逐渐明白，他们应该保持在当下，相信他们所看到的，并对自己的作品拥有艺术控制权。

source: Roach , seven-year-old Ethan Roach 's mom , went . She finished sixth in her first Olympics , at age 33 . Not that the boy decked out in a powder-blue TEAM ROACH T-shirt would say it , but his mom , all 117 pounds of her , probably could take your mom .

source: SAN JOSE , Calif. -- After much speculation and fanfare in the press , Apple confirmed today that it will sunset iTunes in the next version of macOS and spin its functionality into three new apps -- Apple Music , Apple Podcasts , and Apple TV . As we noted earlier , this marks the end of an era of sorts on the Mac -- but there were plenty of unanswered questions . What features will Music retain from iTunes ? And what happens to Windows users who are dependent on iTunes ?
domestication: 加州圣何塞——经过媒体上的一番猜测和热闹的讨论，苹果公司终于确认了一个消息：在下一个macOS版本中，iTunes将会被淘汰，其功能将被分拆到三个新的应用程序中——Apple Music、Apple Podcasts和Apple TV。正如我们之前提到的，这标志着Mac电脑上一个时代的结束，但仍然有很多未解答的问题。比如，Music这个新应用将保留哪些iTunes的功能？那些依赖iTunes的Windows用户们又该怎么办呢？这些问题还都没有答案。

source: Nixon : The order is to leave the goddamned thing alone . Now , I 've said this , Dick , a number of times , and you fellows apparently do n't get the message over there . source: Couriers love to hate the police . The antagonism animates them . They scramble to clean up the scene , stash their beer cans in the shrubs , snuff out their joints . Murphy jumps out of his car and , inexplicably , slips on a pair of rubber gloves . He forges into the crowd with an eye toward busting somebody or impounding an unregistered bicycle . The messengers whisk their bikes off the pavement and stand defiantly in the officer 's path .
domestication: 快递员们总是喜欢抱怨警察，他们对警察的厌恶反而让他们更有活力。当警察一到场，他们就赶紧收拾现场，把啤酒罐藏在灌木丛里，熄灭手中的大麻烟。墨菲从警车上跳下来，莫名其妙地戴上了一双橡胶手套。他带着要抓人或没收一辆未注册的自行车的眼神冲向人群。快递员们迅速把自行车搬离人行道，站在警官面前，摆出一副挑衅的姿势。
foreignization: 快递员喜欢憎恨警察。这种对立激励着他们。他们慌忙清理现场，把啤酒罐藏在灌木丛中，熄灭了大麻烟头。墨菲跳出他的车子，并且难以置信地戴上了手套。他冲进人群，打算抓住某个人或者没收一辆未注册的自行车。使者们迅速地把他们的自行车从人行道上移开，挺身而立地站在警官的面前。

The messengers whisk their bikes off the pavement and stand defiantly in the officer 's path .

source: As we 've all discovered , Donald Trump is not really up on his American history . source: Gesture , intuition , and passion are all experiences that I instill in my work . My paintings are large ; scale is extremely important in emphasizing the big , sweeping movements I use . In some ways , the paintings are an abstraction from nature . They are not descriptive , literal , or narrative , nor do they work as a direct translation . They are visual experiences that go beyond words to create a harmony of feelings . Evoking a sense of mystery , the dark colors are rich , orchestrated , and subtle , like the dim ringing of a bell .
domestication: 我在作品中注入了动作、直觉和激情这些元素。我的画都很大，因为尺寸对强调我使用的大幅度挥洒运动非常重要。在某种程度上，我的画是对自然的抽象。它们不是描述性的、字面上的或故事性的，也不是直接翻译。它们是超越语言的视觉体验，用来创造一种感觉的和谐。那些深沉的颜色唤起了一种神秘感，富有层次，细腻如同钟声的轻鸣一般。我的画要表达的，并不是某种具体的东西，而是一种氛围，一种感觉。它就像一阵风，或者一个耳语，让人感到一种莫名的惆怅和不安。这种感觉很难用语言描述，但它却是那么真实，那么直接。
foreignization: 手势、直觉和激情都是我在作品中注入的体验。我的绘画很大；规模在强调我使用的大范围流畅动作方面极为重要。在某些方面，这些画作是从自然中抽象出来的。它们不是描述性的、字面上的或叙事性的，也不作为直接的翻译。它们是超越文字以创造感觉和谐的视觉体验。唤起一种神秘感，深色是丰富的、有节奏的、微妙的，就像钟声的遥远回响一样。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Gesture , intuition , and passion are all experiences that I instill in my work . My paintings are large ; scale is extremely important in emphasizing the big , sweeping movements I use . In some ways , the paintings are an abstraction from nature . They are not descriptive , literal , or narrative , nor do they work as a direct translation . They are visual experiences that go beyond words to create a harmony of feelings . Evoking a sense of mystery , the dark colors are rich , orchestrated , and subtle , like the dim ringing of a bell .

我在作品中注入了动作、直觉和激情这些元素。我的画都很大，因为尺寸对强调我使用的大幅度挥洒运动非常重要。在某种程度上，我的画是对自然的抽象。它们不是描述性的、字面上的或故事性的，也不是直接翻译。它们是超越语言的视觉体验，用来创造一种感觉的和谐。那些深沉的颜色唤起了一种神秘感，富有层次，细腻如同钟声的轻鸣一般。我的画要表达的，并不是某种具体的东西，而是一种氛围，一种感觉。它就像一阵风，或者一个耳语，让人感到一种莫名的惆怅和不安。这种感觉很难用语言描述，但它却是那么真实，那么直接。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Gesture , intuition , and passion are all experiences that I instill in my work . My paintings are large ; scale is extremely important in emphasizing the big , sweeping movements I use . In some ways , the paintings are an abstraction from nature . They are not descriptive , literal , or narrative , nor do they work as a direct translation . They are visual experiences that go beyond words to create a harmony of feelings . Evoking a sense of mystery , the dark colors are rich , orchestrated , and subtle , like the dim ringing of a bell .
手势、直觉和激情都是我在作品中注入的体验。我的绘画很大；规模在强调我使用的大范围流畅动作方面极为重要。在某些方面，这些画作是从自然中抽象出来的。它们不是描述性的、字面上的或叙事性的，也不作为直接的翻译。它们是超越文字以创造感觉和谐的视觉体验。唤起一种神秘感，深色是丰富的、有节奏的、微妙的，就像钟声的遥远回响一样。

source: Indeed , the total number of bankruptcies was 252,733 compared with 230,723 for the same period last year . " Over the last two to three years , we have seen a tremendous number of our small business clients seek relief in bankruptcy protection , " says Chester N. Watson , a certified public accountant and partner in the New York accounting firm , Mitchell/Titus &; Co .

source: The tradition of depicting the artist 's workplace has ancient beginnings . Examples can be found in Egyptian tomb art , Greek vase paintings , medieval manuscripts , and bas-relief . However , the modem conception of the studio as subject -- a genre that reveals elements of the physical interior of the studio while suggesting the psychological interior of the artist -- traces its roots to the Italian Renaissance , when the studio as we know it came into existence .
domestication: 艺术家工作室的描绘传统可以追溯到古代，有很多例子可以在埃及的墓葬艺术、希腊的陶器画、 сред世纪的手稿和浮雕中找到。但是，对工作室这一主题的现代观念，却要从意大利文艺复兴时期开始讲起，那时候我们今天所理解的工作室才真正成型。当时，这一题材不仅展现了工作室的物理空间，还暗示了艺术家的内心世界。这种通过工作室场景来揭示艺术家内在世界的表现手法，可以说是从那时开始流传下来，影响了后世对工作室的描绘。
foreignization: 描绘艺术家工作场所的传统有着古老的起源，可以在埃及墓葬艺术、希腊花瓶绘画、手稿和浮雕中找到例子。然而，现代关于工作室作为主题的概念——一种揭示工作室物理内部元素同时暗示艺术家心理内部的体裁——其根源可以追溯到意大利文艺复兴时期，当时我们所了解的工作室开始存在。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The tradition of depicting the artist 's workplace has ancient beginnings . Examples can be found in Egyptian tomb art , Greek vase paintings , medieval manuscripts , and bas-relief . However , the modem conception of the studio as subject -- a genre that reveals elements of the physical interior of the studio while suggesting the psychological interior of the artist -- traces its roots to the Italian Renaissance , when the studio as we know it came into existence .
艺术家工作室的描绘传统可以追溯到古代，有很多例子可以在埃及的墓葬艺术、希腊的陶器画、 сред世纪的手稿和浮雕中找到。但是，对工作室这一主题的现代观念，却要从意大利文艺复兴时期开始讲起，那时候我们今天所理解的工作室才真正成型。当时，这一题材不仅展现了工作室的物理空间，还暗示了艺术家的内心世界。这种通过工作室场景来揭示艺术家内在世界的表现手法，可以说是从那时开始流传下来，影响了后世对工作室的描绘。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

However , the modem conception of the studio as subject -- a genre that reveals elements of the physical interior of the studio while suggesting the psychological interior of the artist -- traces its roots to the Italian Renaissance , when the studio as we know it came into existence .

source: Thankfully , no one was injured in the latter incident , and most outlets aggregating the story covered it as little more than a bizarre news item highlighting the extreme lengths gluttonous Americans will go to to get their fix of deep-fried shit . Yet that story , combined with reports of Popeyes ' employees being subject to grueling working conditions as a result of the incredible demand for the sandwich , draws into sharp relief the actual potential consequences of a fast food item going viral , which may go far beyond the momentary spike in cholesterol levels .
domestication: 幸好，在后一事件中没有人受伤，大多数报道此事的媒体只是把它当作一个奇怪的新闻小品，嘲笑那些美国人的贪吃心理。但是，这个故事和有关Popeyes员工因对该三明治的需求而受到残酷工作条件的影响的报道，却揭示了快餐食品走红的潜在后果，其影响可能远远超过短暂的胆固醇激增。这种现象暴露出人们为了赶时髦而不顾后果的疯狂追求，以及企业在追求利润时对员工权益的漠视。
foreignization: 幸运的是，没有人在后一事件中受伤，大多数报道此事的媒体只把它当作一个奇怪的新闻，强调贪食的美国人为了吃到炸薯条会走多远。但是，该故事与有关Popeyes员工由于三明治的惊人需求而受到残酷工作条件的报道相结合，鲜明地揭示了快餐食品走红的实际潜在后果，这可能远远超出了胆固醇水平的暂时激增。

source: The industry started building women 's bikes in an attempt to fit the average woman , and it works well for many , but not all , says Lori Hoefer , manager and advanced bike-fit specialist at Signature Cycles in Greenwich , Connecticut . " Stock companies are paying more attention to putting the right components on the bikes , the right-size bar , nice saddles , " she says . But because no two bodies are exactly alike , " not everyone fits their ' size . ' "
domestication: 自行车行业开始生产女性版的自行车，试图迎合平均身材的女性，效果还不错，但不是所有女性都能找到合适的尺寸。这是美国康涅狄格州格林威治Signature Cycles公司的经理和高级自行车定制专家洛瑞·霍伊弗说的。她说，现在很多品牌开始注意到为自行车选择合适的零件，例如合适大小的把手和舒适的座椅。但是，由于每个人的身体都不一样，所以并不是所有女性都能找到尺寸合适的自行车。
foreignization: 该行业开始制造女性自行车，试图适应平均女性体型，对于很多人来说效果良好，但并非全部如此，康涅狄格州格林威治的Signature Cycles店长及高级骑行装配专家Lori Hoefer如此表示。"批量生产公司正越来越注意在自行车上安装合适的部件、合适尺寸的车把、舒适的车座，”她说。但由于没有两个人体完全一样，“并不是每个人都能找到适合自己的‘标准尺寸’”。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The industry started building women 's bikes in an attempt to fit the average woman , and it works well for many , but not all , says Lori Hoefer , manager and advanced bike-fit specialist at Signature Cycles in Greenwich , Connecticut . " Stock companies are paying more attention to putting the right components on the bikes , the right-size bar , nice saddles , " she says . But because no two bodies are exactly alike , " not everyone fits their ' size . ' "
自行车行业开始生产女性版的自行车，试图迎合平均身材的女性，效果还不错，但不是所有女性都能找到合适的尺寸。这是美国康涅狄格州格林威治Signature Cycles公司的经理和高级自行车定制专家洛瑞·霍伊弗说的。她说，现在很多品牌开始注意到为自行车选择合适的零件，例如合适大小的把手和舒适的座椅。但是，由于每个人的身体都不一样，所以并不是所有女性都能找到尺寸合适的自行车。

But because no two bodies are exactly alike , " not everyone fits their ' size . ' "

source: The autopsy also recommended the formation of a new Growth & Opportunity Inclusion Council that would work " to develop statewide initiatives designed to expand and diversify the base " of state parties . But the RNC moved instead toward a more siloed approach , creating national Hispanic , African-American and Asian-Pacific advisory councils , along with various state advisory councils .

source: Donald Trump 's deeply unsettling press conference with his Russian counterpart , Vladimir Putin , managed to be even worse than feared . When asked whether he trusted his own intelligence agencies or Putin on the question of meddling in the 2016 election , the president attacked Hillary Clinton , savaged the FBI , and said that he did n't see any reason why Russia would do such a thing . It was surreal and grotesque , another awful spectacle in a presidency that delights in awful spectacles . But the event in Helsinki can also be analyzed through another prism : the very strange , bizarrely accommodating personal behavior of Trump toward Putin .
domestication: 特朗普与俄罗斯总统普京的记者招待会真是令人深感不安，甚至比我们预料的还要糟糕。当被问及他是否相信自己国家的情报机构还是相信普京关于2016年大选干预事件的问题时，特朗普攻击了希拉里·克林顿，撕碎了FBI，并且表示他看不出为什么俄罗斯要干涉此事。这一切都很诡异，令人厌恶，这又是在一系列可怕场面中再添新的一笔。但是，我们也可以从另一个角度来分析赫尔辛基事件：那就是特朗普对普京的个人行为非常奇怪，令人费解地容忍。
foreignization: 唐纳德·特朗普与其俄罗斯对应者弗拉基米尔·普京举行的令人深感不安的新闻发布会比人们担心的还要糟糕。当被问及他是否相信自己的情报机构还是相信普京关于2016年大选干预的问题时，总统攻击了希拉里·克林顿，撕碎了FBI，并说他没有理由看到俄罗斯为什么要这样做。这是超现实和令人厌恶的，是一个以可怕的景象为乐的总统任期中的另一个可怕的场景。但在赫尔辛基的活动也可以通过另一个棱镜来分析：特朗普对普京的非常奇怪，极其友好的个人行为。

source: Jeremy Davey 's career as a **26;5264;TOOLONG builder began , ironically enough , with a piece of real real estate : that seven-story building , at 701 Sutter Street , in San Francisco 's fashionable Nob Hill district . It was September 1997 , and Davey was pounding the pavement in search of office space that could serve as Pabulum 's new base of operations . As soon as he laid eyes on the Sutter Street site , he was smitten -- so much so that he not only began to formulate a plan for leasing all five floors of its available commercial space but also vowed to base the design of Pabulum 's new logo on the wrought-iron grating around the balcony . " The building was pretty much vacant , " he says , " and the whole idea of bringing in companies that could assist Pabulum in realizing its new business model formed in my head . "
domestication: 杰里米·戴维作为一名房地产开发商的职业生涯，颇具讽刺意味的是，从旧金山高档社区诺布山的一栋七层楼的写字楼开始。这是1997年9月，当时戴维正在寻找办公空间来作为Pabulum公司的新总部。一旦他看到了萨特街的这个地方，他就深深地爱上了它——以至于他不仅开始制定租用这栋楼所有五层可用商业空间的计划，而且还发誓要以阳台周围的铸铁栏杆为灵感设计Pabulum公司的新标志。“这栋楼基本上是空置的，”他说，“而且整个想法就是引入能够帮助Pabulum实现其新商业模式的公司，在我的脑海中形成了。”
foreignization: 杰里米·戴维作为一个建筑商的职业生涯，讽刺的是，从一块真正的房地产开始：那座七层楼的建筑，在旧金山时尚的诺布山区的701萨特街。已经是1997年九月，戴维正在寻找办公空间来作为Pabulum新经营基地。只要他一看到萨特街的地点，他就爱上了它——如此之深，以至于他不仅开始制定计划，租下其五个楼层的所有可用商业空间，还发誓要以阳台周围的锻铁格栅为基础设计Pabulum新标志。“大楼几乎是空置的，”他说，“而整个想法是在我的脑海中形成，把能够帮助Pabulum实现其新业务模式的公司带进来。”

source: At this point , you should mount the motherboard inside the case and connect the power and speaker to it . If you turn the PC on , you should get a series of beeps from the speaker . ( The speaker connection is easy to find , as you can usually follow the wires back to the speaker . Speaker connections are usually keyed so that they attach only one way , but actually , there is no single right way for PC speaker connections . ) You can now test the reset switch by attaching it to the motherboard : Turn on the PC , and when the beeps begin , hit the reset switch . If the beeps stop exactly when you hit the reset switch , you 'll know you correctly wired the reset switch .
domestication: 现在，你应该把主板装进机箱里，然后把电源和喇叭连接上。如果你开机，应该会从喇叭里听到一系列的蜂鸣声。喇叭的连接很容易找到，因为你可以顺着线找过去。喇叭的连接通常是卡位设计，只能一种方式连接，但是，其实并没有唯一的正确方式来连接PC喇叭。你现在可以测试复位开关了：先把它连接到主板，然后开机，当开始发出蜂鸣声时按下复位开关。如果蜂鸣声恰好在你按下复位开关时停止，你就知道自己已经正确地连接了复位开关。
foreignization: 在这一点上，你应该把主板安装到机箱内，并将电源和扬声器连接到它。如果你打开电脑，你应该从扬声器中听到一系列的蜂鸣声。（扬声器的连接很容易找到，因为你通常可以沿着线回到扬声器。扬声器的连接通常是有钥匙的，这样它们只能以一种方式连接，但实际上，电脑扬声器的连接没有单一的正确方式。）现在你可以通过将复位开关连接到主板来测试它：打开电脑，当蜂鸣声开始时，按下复位开关。如果蜂鸣声在你按下复位开关的那一刻停止，你就会知道你正确地连接了复位开关。

source: Lee , whose father is Samsung 's chairman , was previously sentenced to five years after being found guilty of bribery , embezzlement , capital flight and perjury charges . source: Wall Street was happy about the cuts , but they did little to lower Kodak 's expenses -- at least in the short term -- since the company gave many employees generous buyout packages . There was another unforeseen consequence : The company was losing its most promising technicians , engineers and executives . " We downsized first , " says former Kodak executive Lawrence Matteson , now a business professor at the University of Rochester . " We thought about how to reorganize second . "
domestication: 华尔街对公司的裁员行动感到很满意，但这并没有有效地减少柯达公司的开支，至少在短期内是这样的，因为公司给了许多员工丰厚的补偿。还有一个意想不到的后果：公司正在失去最有前途的技术人员、工程师和高管。罗切斯特大学商学院教授、前柯达高管劳伦斯·马特森说，“我们先进行了裁员，然后才考虑如何重组。”
foreignization: 华尔街对这些削减感到高兴，但它们几乎没有降低柯达的开支——至少在短期内是如此，因为该公司向许多员工提供了慷慨的买断包。这还有一个意想不到的后果：公司正在失去其最有前途的技术人员、工程师和高管。罗切斯特大学的商业教授，前柯达高管劳伦斯·马特森说：“我们首先进行了裁员，之后才考虑如何重组。”

source: When prompted to speak , I picked up a paperback novel from the table . I read out loud the publication date ( 1947 ) , then threw it up almost to the ceiling before it fell back to the floor . I reached down , picked it up . opened it scanned a page or two , muttered " Yes , good story , " then looked down at the ebook fanciers ' gadgets with a " go on . I dare you " Look .
domestication: 说到做到，我从桌子上抓起一本平装书，看了看出版日期（1947年），随后将它向天花板扔去，书在空中划出一道弧线，然后重重地落在地板上。我弯腰捡起书，打开它，扫视了一页两页，自言自语地说：“是啊，真好看，”然后看着电子书爱好者们的玩意儿，脸上带着“来吧，我不怕你”的表情。

source: But on June 28th , 2005 , Luckic was killed in a car accident in Pennsylvania while riding in the Chrysler Jay had bought him as a graduation present . Jay was in L.A. for the BET Awards when he heard . " I know he had a couple good cries , " Def Jam marketing exec Tracy Waples says . " It was mind-blowing for him . " Jay says , " It was the toughest shit . Nothing close to it . Numbingly . Like I 'm numb . I 'm numb . " Months later he 's still dealing with the pain . " Shit comes time-released . " He pauses . " Beautiful kid . "
domestication: 但在2005年6月28日，Luckic却不幸在宾夕法尼亚的一场车祸中丧生，当时他正乘坐Jay送给他的毕业礼物——一辆克莱斯勒汽车。Jay当时正在洛杉矶参加BET颁奖典礼时接到了这个消息。“我知道他为此哭过几次，”Def Jam市场部高管Tracy Waples说，“对他来说这是一个震惊的事。”Jay说：“这是我经历过的最艰难的事情，没有任何事情能与之相比。就像我麻木了一样，我感到麻木。”几个月过去了，他仍然在处理着这份痛苦。“痛苦会随着时间的推移而逐渐袭来，”他停顿了一下，“那个孩子太美好了。”
foreignization: 但是在2005年6月28日，Luckic在賓夕法尼亞州的一場車禍中喪生，當時他正在一輛Jay送給他作為畢業禮物的克萊斯勒汽車上。當Jay在洛杉磯參加BET Awards得知這個消息時，他說：「我知道他哭了好幾次。」Def Jam市場部主管Tracy Waples說道：「對於他來說這是令人震驚的。」Jay說：「這是我遇到過最艱難的事情，沒有什麼能夠相比。它令我麻木，令我感到自己像被剝奪了感覺，一點也不夸張。我仍然很麻木。」數個月過後，他仍在努力面對這份痛苦。他說：「這種痛苦會在某些時候突然襲來。」他停頓了一下，然後繼續說道：「他是一個很好的孩子。」

source: At midnight we 're under weigh to the off shore point where we hope to see the sun go out , and Joe Rao is pacing the deck . We 're already a long way from Hilo , but the clouds have followed us . The best he can count is three stars , and those only for minutes at a time . It 's worry time on the Independence . He spent an hour at the weather station at Lyman Field in Hilo , and the best the maps and the forecasters could offer was a fingers-crossed " maybe . "
domestication: 到了半夜，我们启程前往离岸点，希望在那里看到日落的壮丽景象，而乔·拉奥正在甲板上来回踱步。我们已经距离希洛镇很远，但云层还是一直跟随着我们。他能看到的最多只有三颗星星，而且每次也就只有几分钟的时间。这让"独立号"上的大家都有些焦虑。之前他在希洛镇的莱曼机场天气台花了一个小时，地图和预报员们只能给出一个“希望如此”的答案。
foreignization: 午夜时分，我们启航前往海岸外的观测点，希望在那里看到日全食的壮观景象，而乔·拉奥正在甲板上踱步。我们已经远离了希洛，但云层却跟随着我们。 乔能看到的星星最多只有三颗，而且每次也只有几分钟的时间。现在是独立号上的人们担心的时候了。他曾在希洛的莱曼机场气象站花费了一个小时，在那里地图和预报员所能提供的最好的答案只是交叉手指的“也许”。

At midnight we 're under weigh to the off shore point where we hope to see the sun go out , and Joe Rao is pacing the deck . We 're already a long way from Hilo , but the clouds have followed us . The best he can count is three stars , and those only for minutes at a time . It 's worry time on the Independence . He spent an hour at the weather station at Lyman Field in Hilo , and the best the maps and the forecasters could offer was a fingers-crossed " maybe . "

source: Nonetheless , some computer scientists have suggested " chains " of emulators as a temporary solution to the problem of digital obsolescence : as each generation of hardware grows obsolete , it will be replaced by a layer of emulation software . But it 's an idea that has others shaking their heads . " It 's extremely dangerous to talk about emulation as a solution , " says David Bearman , president of Archives and Museum Infor-matics , a consulting group that works with business and government entities , helping them preserve digital files . " It gives an excuse to managers and governments around the world to put off doing things that really need to be done right now . "
domestication: 尽管如此，一些电脑科学家提出“模拟器链”作为解决数字过时问题的暂时性方案：随着每一代电脑硬件变得过时，它将会被一层模拟软件所取代。但是，这个想法却让其他人摇头不赞同。档案和博物馆信息咨询集团的总裁大卫·伯曼说：“谈论模拟作为解决方案是非常危险的。”他的咨询集团与企业和政府机构合作，帮助他们保存数字文件。他说：“这给世界各地的经理和政府一个借口，拖延那些真正需要现在就完成的事情。”他认为，这种想法会让人们产生一种“虚假的安全感”，导致人们忽视真正的解决方案。
foreignization: 尽管如此， 一些计算机科学家建议以“连续的模拟器链条”作为解决数字过时问题的临时解决方案：随着每一代硬件变得过时，它将会被一层模拟软件所取代。 但是，这个想法让其他人摇了摇头。 档案和博物馆信息学（Archives and Museum Infor-matics）的总裁大卫·伯曼说：“把模拟当作一种解决方案来讨论是极其危险的。” 档案和博物馆信息学是一家咨询公司，为企业和政府提供服务，帮助他们保存数字文件。 “这给世界各地的管理者和政府提供了拖延时间的借口，使得真正需要现在就完成的事情被搁置。 ”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nonetheless , some computer scientists have suggested " chains " of emulators as a temporary solution to the problem of digital obsolescence : as each generation of hardware grows obsolete , it will be replaced by a layer of emulation software . But it 's an idea that has others shaking their heads . " It 's extremely dangerous to talk about emulation as a solution , " says David Bearman , president of Archives and Museum Infor-matics , a consulting group that works with business and government entities , helping them preserve digital files . " It gives an excuse to managers and governments around the world to put off doing things that really need to be done right now . "

尽管如此，一些电脑科学家提出“模拟器链”作为解决数字过时问题的暂时性方案：随着每一代电脑硬件变得过时，它将会被一层模拟软件所取代。但是，这个想法却让其他人摇头不赞同。档案和博物馆信息咨询集团的总裁大卫·伯曼说：“谈论模拟作为解决方案是非常危险的。”他的咨询集团与企业和政府机构合作，帮助他们保存数字文件。他说：“这给世界各地的经理和政府一个借口，拖延那些真正需要现在就完成的事情。”他认为，这种想法会让人们产生一种“虚假的安全感”，导致人们忽视真正的解决方案。

source: Certain kinds of sedimentary rocks , called Burgess Shale-type ( BST ) deposits , have the right characteristics to preserve soft-bodied organisms as thin carbon films . During the Cambrian Period , BST deposits are more common , and they preserve fossils of increasingly complex animals . But only a handful of Ediacaran BST deposits are known globally .
domestication: 有一种沉积岩，叫做伯吉斯页岩型沉积物，是专门用来保存体软的生物的化石，只需要很薄的一层碳膜就能完成。寒武纪时期，这种沉积物特别丰富，而它们所保存下来的化石，也是越来越复杂的动物化石。但是，意外的是，在前寒武纪的时代，这样的沉积物却只有少数几处发现。
foreignization: 某些类型的沉积岩，称为伯吉斯页岩型（BST）沉积物，具有保存软体生物为薄碳膜的适当特性。在寒武纪期间，BST沉积物更为常见，它们保存了越来越复杂的动物化石。但是，全球仅知晓少数埃迪卡拉期的BST沉积物。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Certain kinds of sedimentary rocks , called Burgess Shale-type ( BST ) deposits , have the right characteristics to preserve soft-bodied organisms as thin carbon films . During the Cambrian Period , BST deposits are more common , and they preserve fossils of increasingly complex animals . But only a handful of Ediacaran BST deposits are known globally .
有一种沉积岩，叫做伯吉斯页岩型沉积物，是专门用来保存体软的生物的化石，只需要很薄的一层碳膜就能完成。寒武纪时期，这种沉积物特别丰富，而它们所保存下来的化石，也是越来越复杂的动物化石。但是，意外的是，在前寒武纪的时代，这样的沉积物却只有少数几处发现。

During the Cambrian Period , BST deposits are more common , and they preserve fossils of increasingly complex animals . But only a handful of Ediacaran BST deposits are known globally .
某些类型的沉积岩，称为伯吉斯页岩型（BST）沉积物，具有保存软体生物为薄碳膜的适当特性。在寒武纪期间，BST沉积物更为常见，它们保存了越来越复杂的动物化石。但是，全球仅知晓少数埃迪卡拉期的BST沉积物。

source: Winning , sometimes , can inhibit the urgency to act as well . And win the GOP did in the 2014 congressional midterms , posting a gain of nine Senate seats to wrest chamber control from the Democrats and adding 13 seats to its already robust House majority . That year , the RNC notes , the GOP captured 50 percent of the Asian vote .

source: New Horizons is moving faster than 30,000 miles an hour , meaning that its zip past the strange object really needed to be pulled off without even the slightest interference . After a slight course correction in mid-December , the spacecraft has done just that . New Horizons is now set to beam back some pretty important data , with some updates expected in the coming hours .

source: The team consists of Can Sar , who previously started Apture ( multimedia integration for news publishers ) , which was sold to Google in 2011 . At Google he worked on Inbox . Previously he was a Stanford CS PhD student . After graduating from Stanford , Vaughan worked in Congress , noticed complete gridlock and left for the private sector in Peru . There , he took a hotel to number one on TripAdvisor , and founded a real-estate investment company .
domestication: 这个团队的成员之一是Can Sar，他曾经创立了Apture，这是一家为新闻媒体提供多媒体集成服务的公司，后来被谷歌收购了。他在谷歌工作期间主要负责开发Inbox项目。在加入谷歌之前，他是斯坦福大学计算机科学博士生。另一位成员Vaughan毕业于斯坦福大学，之后在国会工作过一段时间，但他发现政坛完全陷入僵局，所以离开去往秘鲁发展。在秘鲁，他成功地将一家酒店打造成为TripAdvisor上排名第一的酒店，并创办了一家房地产投资公司。

source: Though the results are exciting , Weng says a larger and more diverse sample of people should be involved in a repeated study . source: Otatea acuminata subsp. aztecorum ( Zones.9-10 ; 8 ft . ) . One of the most gore of bamboos with tall , arching canes . Narrow , 3- to 6-inch medium green leaves carried in airy , pendulous clusters all along the stems . Keep foliage thinned for an elegant , fountainlike habit . Spreads rather slowly but like other bamboos , is probably best grown in a large container sunk in the ground . Likes light shade or dappled sun . Not fussy about soil , but will suffer from drought . Does best with regular watering .
domestication: 说到竹子，有一种叫做 Otatea acuminata subsp. aztecorum 的品种非常引人注目。这玩意儿在9到10号hardtiness区的环境中能长到8英尺高，真是令人咋舌。它的特点是竹竿又高又弯，像是一道美丽的风景线。而且叶子又细又绿，长3到6英寸不等，整齐地垂挂在竹竿上，看起来就像一簇簇的小瀑布。如果你想让它看起来更优雅一些，就把叶子稍微剪剪，保持一个美观的形状。这种竹子生长速度较慢，但是跟其他竹子一样，最好还是放在一个大花盆里，然后把花盆埋在地下，这样可以防止它泛滥成灾。至于日照，它喜欢半阴或者斑驳的阳光，而土壤方面它不是很挑剔，但是如果缺水的话还是会受影响的，所以还是要定期浇水，才能让它更好地生长。
foreignization: Otatea acuminata subsp. aztecorum (耐热带9-10区；8英尺）。这是一种最具血腥特征的竹子，具有高大、拱形的竹竿。狭窄的、3-到6英寸的中绿色叶子成簇悬挂在整个茎秆上。保持叶子的疏朗以呈现出优雅的喷泉般的外观。这株植物蔓延得相对较慢，但与其他竹子一样，最好在埋入地面的大型花盆中种植。喜欢半阴或斑驳的阳光。土壤不太讲究，但会因干旱而受影响。定期浇水会让它生长得更好。

source: Even in a beginner 's class , you 'll be doing enough small hops and jumps to strengthen bones . And , according to a study in the Journal of Dance Medicine &; Science , tap dancing has less impact than running , making it a joint-friendly activity . Tap also increases the foot 's range of motion and strengthens fast-twitch muscles ( the ones required for actions such as jumping ) . Off the dance floor , these improvements help you to be surer on your feet and protect you from injuries like ankle sprains .
domestication: 即使是初学者的课程，也能让你通过小跳跃来增强骨骼健康。根据《舞蹈医学与科学杂志》的研究，踢踏舞对关节的冲击比跑步小，因此是一项友好的活动。此外，踢踏舞还能增加脚部的活动范围和加强快速收缩肌肉（例如，跳跃所需的肌肉），这些对于我们的日常生活很有帮助。离开舞池之后，这些改善能帮助你走路更稳健，并且预防像踝关节扭伤等意外事故。
foreignization: 即使在初学者的课程中，您也会进行足够的小跳跃来加强骨骼。并且，根据舞蹈医学与科学杂志的研究，踢踏舞对关节的冲击比跑步小，使其成为一种对关节友好的活动。踢踏舞还增加了脚的活动范围，并加强了快速收缩肌肉（如跳跃等动作所需的肌肉）。离开舞池，这些改进有助于您站稳脚跟，并保护您免受踝关节扭伤等伤害。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even in a beginner 's class , you 'll be doing enough small hops and jumps to strengthen bones . And , according to a study in the Journal of Dance Medicine &; Science , tap dancing has less impact than running , making it a joint-friendly activity . Tap also increases the foot 's range of motion and strengthens fast-twitch muscles ( the ones required for actions such as jumping ) . Off the dance floor , these improvements help you to be surer on your feet and protect you from injuries like ankle sprains .

Tap also increases the foot 's range of motion and strengthens fast-twitch muscles ( the ones required for actions such as jumping ) . Off the dance floor , these improvements help you to be surer on your feet and protect you from injuries like ankle sprains .
即使在初学者的课程中，您也会进行足够的小跳跃来加强骨骼。并且，根据舞蹈医学与科学杂志的研究，踢踏舞对关节的冲击比跑步小，使其成为一种对关节友好的活动。踢踏舞还增加了脚的活动范围，并加强了快速收缩肌肉（如跳跃等动作所需的肌肉）。离开舞池，这些改进有助于您站稳脚跟，并保护您免受踝关节扭伤等伤害。

source: While some scientists develop new tools to visualize for the first time the fuzzy essence of electrons , others are coercing these inherently quantum entities into clearly definable locations and behaviors that resemble those of tiny billiard balls . The reshaped atoms call to mind an antiquated version of atomic structure that dates to the early 20th century . In this classical view , atoms resemble miniature solar systems in which electrons orbit the nucleus as discrete planets circle a star . With the new research , scientists are exploring how matter crosses the line between quantum and classical forms .
domestication: 有些科学家正在开发新工具，第一次让我们看到电子模糊的本质，而其他人则试图把这些天生具有量子特性的东西纳入明确定义的位置和行为中，使它们看起来像小弹珠。 这些重新塑造的原子让人联想到一种过时的原子结构，这种结构可以追溯到20世纪初。在这种古典观点中，原子看起来像微型太阳系，其中电子围绕着原子核轨道运行，就像离散的行星围绕着恒星运行一样。有了这项新研究，科学家们正在探索物质如何在量子和经典形式之间转换。

source: Three Cond ? Nast titles , the New Yorker , Vanity Fair and Wired , already are behind metered paywalls that require consumers to subscribe in order to access more than four articles each month . Now , the company plans to build digital subscription businesses around its other titles , including Vogue , GQ , Bon App ? tit and Glamour .
domestication: 康泰纳仕旗下有三个杂志——《纽约客》、《名利场》和《连线》杂志，已经实行了限量付费模式，每个月仅允许未订阅者浏览四篇文章。现在，该公司计划将其他杂志也纳入数字订阅业务，包括《Vogue》、《智族》、《美食家》和《格莱美》等。这些杂志的读者也将面临限量付费模式，这意味着未来的阅读体验可能会变得更加“收费”。

source: " The establishment is not prepared , they do n't have a sense of urgency , and they do n't understand the working class people in Pennsylvania , in Wisconsin , in Michigan , in Minnesota and in Iowa and Ohio . What we did we can replicate . We can replicate it , though , with hard work , and wisdom . And if we blow this , we are never going to get it back . You have to understand , it is never coming back . We have the ability to change this country . "
domestication: 那些当权者根本没准备好，他们没有紧迫感，也不懂得宾夕法尼亚州、威斯康星州、密歇根州、明尼苏达州、爱荷华州和俄亥俄州的工人阶级。我们曾经做到的事情，可以在别处复制，只要我们努力工作，运用智慧。假如我们搞砸了，这个机会就永远不会再来。你必须明白，这是千载难逢的机遇，是千秋大业。我们有改变这个国家的能力。

source: he seems to have been speaking true to character . In the Asian arena he could safely express his expansionist inclinations ; and in China 's north-eastern provinces in particular he easily rationalised the aggression of his armed forces . But when dealing with the West he preferred caution because he lacked confidence in Japan 's ability to win a war against the United States and Britain , and was far more aware than his military commanders of Japan 's vulnerability to economic blockade . Essentially , he believed in force but wanted to combine it with its opposite , diplomacy , so that Japan might retain the fruits of its aggression against weaker Asian neighbours .
domestication: 看来，他的表现还是比较符合他的性格的。在亚洲，他可以肆无忌惮地表达自己的扩张野心，尤其是在中国的东北地区，他轻松地为自己的军队侵略行为辩护。但是，当他处理西方事务时，他却变得非常谨慎，因为他对日本能否赢得对抗美国和英国的战争没有信心，而且比他的军事指挥官更清楚日本在经济封锁方面的脆弱性。归根到底，他相信力量，但是又想将其与外交相结合，这样日本就可以保住对较弱的亚洲邻国的侵略成果。
foreignization: 他似乎一直如实地表达了自己的性格。在亚洲，他可以安全地表达自己的扩张倾向；尤其是在中国东北地区，他轻松地为其武装部队的侵略行为辩护。但是，当与西方打交道时，他更喜欢谨慎，因为他不相信日本能赢得对抗美国和英国的战争，而且他比他的军事指挥官更清楚日本容易受到经济封锁的影响。从本质上讲，他相信力量，但他想将其与相反的东西，即外交结合起来，这样日本就能保留对较弱的亚洲邻国的侵略成果。

source: Within the first few miles on our usual test route , the Composite felt as familiar as favorite jeans . We 've been fortunate enough to log many hours on Giant 's TCR Advanced SL , the high-end cousin of the Composite , and both bikes produced strikingly similar sensations . Geometry on the entire TCR line is identical , right down to the head-tube height-Giant did n't compromise the fit or handling one iota from its race-bred steeds . In addition , the Composite is stiff-not quite as efficient as its costlier cousins , but the bike is clearly intended to perform and stand up to even the strongest cyclists .
domestication: 在我们平常的测试路线上，刚开始的几英里里，我们感觉到这辆Composite就跟自己最喜欢的牛仔裤一样熟悉。我们很幸运能够花费很多时间骑Giant的TCR Advanced SL，这是Composite的高端亲戚，两辆自行车产生了惊人的相似感觉。整个TCR系列的几何设计完全相同，包括头管高度——Giant没有损害其竞速特性的马匹的一丝一毫。在此之外，Composite还很僵硬——虽然没有它更贵的亲戚那么高效，但是这辆自行车显然是为了表现和承受住即使是最强壮的骑手而设计的。
foreignization: 在我们通常的测试路线上，仅仅几英里之内，复合材料自行车就感觉像最喜欢的牛仔裤一样熟悉。我们有足够的幸运去记录了巨人公司的TCR高级SL的很多小时，这是复合材料的高端表亲，两辆自行车产生了惊人的相似感觉。整个TCR产品线的几何形状都是一样的，直到头管高度-巨人公司没有损害从其赛车中培养的马匹的适应性或处理能力一丝一毫。此外，复合材料是僵硬的 - 并不像其更昂贵的表亲那样高效，但这辆自行车显然打算表现出色并承受甚至最强壮的骑行者。

source: In order to effectively address the problems presented by prenatal substance exposure , an adequate system of medical , social , and related health care services to the substance exposed infant and its mother must exist . Without an increased focus on prevention and early intervention , the problem of substance exposed infants will continue to grow , and the nation will continue to reap the tragic harvest of this problem . With adequate services and a coordinated system of care , intrusive intervention might be avoided. 1
domestication: 要有效地解决胎儿在子宫里接触毒素带来的问题，必须建立一个完善的医疗体系，为接触毒素的婴儿及其母亲提供全面社会和医疗服务。 如果不采取预防和早期干预措施，毒素影响婴儿的问题将会持续恶化，我们将继续为此付出惨重的代价。只要我们能够提供充分的服务并建立起协调的医疗体系，就有可能避免过度的干预措施，切断这颗定时炸弹。
foreignization: 为了有效地解决胎儿接触物质暴露所带来的问题，必须有一个适当的医疗、社会和相关健康服务体系来照顾接触到物质的婴儿及其母亲。如果不加强预防和早期干预的重点，接触物质的婴儿的问题将继续增加，国家将继续承受这个问题带来的悲惨后果。有了充分的服务和协调的护理系统，可能可以避免侵入性的干预。1

Without an increased focus on prevention and early intervention , the problem of substance exposed infants will continue to grow , and the nation will continue to reap the tragic harvest of this problem . With adequate services and a coordinated system of care , intrusive intervention might be avoided. 1

source: The agreement , which calls to " empower civilians online and to improve the security , stability and resilience of cyberspace , " promises that each company will avoid aiding governments in bolstering their offensive cyber-capabilities , as well as protect against government " tampering or exploitation " of products and services , from the development stage to distribution .

source: Be sure to stop off at the nearest Starbucks before you head to the gym for an intense physical workout . Caffeine can boost physical endurance by inhibiting perception of pain in muscles and by diminishing a sense of muscle fatigue . It works by blocking the adenosine receptors located on sensory nerve endings .

source: Frankincense is an oleo gum resin ( a mixture of volatile oil , water-soluble gum , and alcohol-soluble resins ) that oozes from the trunk of Boswellia sacra and related species . These shrubby desert trees are native to Yemen , Oman , and Somalia . The resin has a pleasant , fresh balsamic odor and has been prized since biblical times as an incense and perfume ingredient .
domestication: 乳香是从多种乳香树（如白木通）树干中渗出的混合物，其成分包括挥发油、水溶性树胶和醇溶性树脂。这种灌木状的沙漠树主要生长在也门、阿曼和索马里等地。其树脂散发出一种清新宜人的气味，自古以来就被视为上等的熏香和香水材料。
foreignization: 乳香是从乳香树（Boswellia sacra）及其相关种类树干上流出的油胶树脂（由挥发性油、水溶性胶和酒精溶性树脂混合而成）。这种灌木状的沙漠树原产于也门、阿曼和索马里。树脂具有令人愉悦的新鲜松节油味道，自圣经时代以来就因其作为熏香和香水的成分而备受珍视。

source: Minimizing the disruption to the national economy may warrant a significant role for conventional fuels during the limited period that new energy sources are being developed and the means for their distribution put in place . Over the years , the less-polluting new energy sources would become far more important and the role of high-polluting , traditional energy sources would be reduced or ultimately eliminated .
domestication: 为了减少对整个国家经济的影响，在新能源尚在开发和配套设施建设期间，传统燃料可能会发挥重要作用。随着时间的推移，污染较少的新能源将变得更加重要，而高污染的传统能源来源的作用将会减少，甚至最终被淘汰。这就像“缓急有序、马上办”——新能源发展需要一个过程，而传统能源则能帮助度过这个难关。最终，新能源会成为主力军，传统能源就会逐渐退出历史舞台。

source: " I want the viewer to question what is in front , " she says , describing her intentions to completely integrate the subject and its setting . In Porcelain Figures and Tulips , for example , a pale blue and brown flowered vase holding pale tulips has been placed against a deep blue cloth covered with a pattern of pink blossoms . The tulips merge with the flowers on the fabric behind them , creating an illusion of flatness in the painting . The figurines and vase sit on a flowered , light-yellow tablecloth , furthering the sense of two-dimensionality by extending the " bouquet " in all directions .
domestication: 她说：“我希望观者能对眼前的东西产生疑问。”这是在描述她如何将主体和环境完全融合在一起的初衷。在《瓷器人偶和郁金香》中，例如，一只浅蓝色和棕色的花卉瓶子里插着浅色的郁金香，瓶子放在一块深蓝色的布料上，布料上印着粉红色的花朵图案。郁金香与后面布料上的花融合在一起，在画中营造出一种平面的幻觉。人偶和花瓶放在一块有花纹的淡黄色桌布上，进一步加强了二维的感觉，向四周延伸出“花束”。她就是这样让人看不清，究竟什么是真的，什么是假的。

source: I ca n't think of anyone else who could have created that little man , let alone made him work . Willeford kept coming up with quirky characters and put them in wonderfully quirky books . A career soldier in the horse cavalry and a highly decorated tank commander in World War II , he wrote a variety of books over the years , all of them providing a skewed vision of the universe .
domestication: 别人也许有这个脑子想出那个奇怪的小人物，但让他“活”起来恐怕就没那本事了。威勒福德总是能想出这些古怪的人物，然后把他们放在同样古怪的书里。威勒福德曾经是骑兵上的职业军人，也是二战中功勋卓著的坦克指挥官，他这些年写的书五花八门，但无一例外地都带有一丝怪诞，展现出他对宇宙的独特视角。

source: Planetary scientists think there 's a good Europa 's hidden ocean might be habitable to alien life . Nutrients sprayed onto the ice by the nearby volcanic moon Io , the thinking goes , may sink down to the ocean floor and serve as food . Meanwhile , hydrothermal vents that blast out hot water could make environments cozy enough to support deep-ocean life ( as they did and still do on Earth ) .
domestication: 据说，行星科学家认为，欧罗巴星的隐秘海洋可能适宜外星生命居住。他们这么想的理由是，附近的火山卫星 Io 喷出的营养物质会落在冰面，然后沉到海底，为生物提供食物。此外，海底热泉喷出的热水也能创造出足够温暖的环境，以支撑深海生物的生存，就像在地球上曾经和现在仍然存在的一样。

source: This strategy ignores the fact that the Hispanic voters who lean to the GOP are the very ones who respond to an assimilationist message . Though they may be a minority of all Latinos , they are nonetheless the Latino Republican base . Embracing a multiculturalist message leaves them feeling abandoned , resentful , and finally apathetic . And since that policy also depresses GOP support among whites , the net effect is to drive down the overall GOP vote .
domestication: 这种策略忽略了一个事实，那就是那些倾向于支持共和党的西班牙裔选民正是那些对同化主义信息有反应的人。尽管他们可能是所有拉丁裔人中的一小部分，但他们毕竟是拉丁裔中的共和党基础。接受多元文化主义信息会让他们感到被抛弃、怨恨，最终变得冷漠。由于这项政策还会降低白人对共和党的支持，因此最终的效果就是降低了共和党整体的得票率。这就好比“丢了西瓜又捡不着芝麻”，白白损失了既有的支持者，又无法吸引新的群体。
foreignization: 这种策略忽略了这样一个事实：倾向于共和党的西班牙裔选民正是那些对同化主义信息有反应的人。尽管他们可能是所有拉丁裔中的一小部分，但他们无疑是拉丁裔中的共和党支持基础。接受多元文化主义信息会让他们感到被抛弃、怨恨，最终变得冷漠。而由于这种政策也降低了白人对共和党的支持，因此其净效应就是降低整体上共和党的投票率。

Embracing a multiculturalist message leaves them feeling abandoned , resentful , and finally apathetic . And since that policy also depresses GOP support among whites , the net effect is to drive down the overall GOP vote .

And since that policy also depresses GOP support among whites , the net effect is to drive down the overall GOP vote .

source: " Safe space " is a similarly slippery term . It could refer to an environment in which just physical safety is guaranteed ; or to a support group for rape survivors that is closed to people who have never been raped to increase emotional comfort ; or to classrooms where robust exchanges are protected but interpersonal harassment is forbidden ; or to students reacting to a speaker with whom they disagree with counter-programming , as at Brown , where students surrounded themselves with " cookies , coloring books , bubbles , Play-Doh , calming music , pillows , blankets and a video of frolicking puppies , as well as students and staff members trained to deal with trauma , " as if Wendy McElroy 's presence on campus made them " unsafe . "
domestication: “安全空间”这个词也很难定义。它可能指的是一个只保证身体安全的环境；或者是一个专为性侵幸存者开设的互助小组，只有经历过性侵的人才能参加，以增强情感上的安慰感；或者是课堂上的辩论被保护起来，个人攻击是不允许的；又或者学生们对某个演讲者产生了不同的意见，他们通过举办自己的活动来反驳，就像在布朗大学发生的事情一样，学生们用“饼干、涂色书、泡泡、橡皮泥、舒缓音乐、枕头、毯子和小狗嬉戏的视频”包围自己，还有受过创伤处理培训的学生和工作人员，就好像温迪·麦克罗伊（Wendy McElroy）的校园出现让他们感到“不安全”。
foreignization: “安全空间”是一个同样含糊的术语。它可以指的是一个仅保证身体安全的环境；或者是针对强奸幸存者的闭合支持小组，禁止那些从未被强奸过的人加入，以增进情感舒适度；或者是课堂上保护着充满活力的交流，但禁止人际骚扰；或者是学生对他们不同意的演讲者作出反应，例如在布朗大学举行反编程，学生们用“饼干，涂色书，泡泡，橡皮泥，镇静音乐，枕头，毯子以及一段嬉戏的小狗视频”，以及受过创伤处理培训的学生和工作人员包围自己，以此来对抗温迪·麦克罗伊（Wendy McElroy）在校园内的存在使得他们感到“不安全”。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" Safe space " is a similarly slippery term . It could refer to an environment in which just physical safety is guaranteed ; or to a support group for rape survivors that is closed to people who have never been raped to increase emotional comfort ; or to classrooms where robust exchanges are protected but interpersonal harassment is forbidden ; or to students reacting to a speaker with whom they disagree with counter-programming , as at Brown , where students surrounded themselves with " cookies , coloring books , bubbles , Play-Doh , calming music , pillows , blankets and a video of frolicking puppies , as well as students and staff members trained to deal with trauma , " as if Wendy McElroy 's presence on campus made them " unsafe . "

source: Findings were reported today at the 28th annual Transcatheter Cardiovascular Therapeutics ( TCT ) scientific symposium . Sponsored by the Cardiovascular Research Foundation ( CRF ) , TCT is the world 's premier educational meeting specializing in interventional cardiovascular medicine . The study was also published simultaneously in The Lancet .
domestication: 今天，在第28届心血管介入治疗国际会议（TCT）上公布了研究结果。这次会议由心血管研究基金会（CRF）主办，是全球顶级的心血管介入医学教育会议。此外，这项研究同时在著名的《柳叶刀》杂志上发表。会议上专家们对这项成果给予了高度评价，认为它将为心血管疾病的治疗带来新的希望。
foreignization: 今天，在第28届Transcatheter Cardiovascular Therapeutics（TCT）科学研讨会上发表了这些发现。由Cardiovascular Research Foundation（CRF）赞助的TCT是世界上专注于介入性心血管医学的首屈一指的教育会议。该研究也同时在The Lancet杂志上发表。

messages_domestication.content:

Findings were reported today at the 28th annual Transcatheter Cardiovascular Therapeutics ( TCT ) scientific symposium . Sponsored by the Cardiovascular Research Foundation ( CRF ) , TCT is the world 's premier educational meeting specializing in interventional cardiovascular medicine . The study was also published simultaneously in The Lancet .
今天，在第28届心血管介入治疗国际会议（TCT）上公布了研究结果。这次会议由心血管研究基金会（CRF）主办，是全球顶级的心血管介入医学教育会议。此外，这项研究同时在著名的《柳叶刀》杂志上发表。会议上专家们对这项成果给予了高度评价，认为它将为心血管疾病的治疗带来新的希望。

source: In the earlier bottega ( " workshop " ) , a bustling , semipublic commercial space , the master was simultaneously engaged in creating , teaching , and trading . The Renaissance changed this by redefining the artist 's role . His most valued products were no longer merely beautiful objects , but symbolic representations of ideas : thoughts made visible .

source: Mix a 2-inch layer of rich compost into the planting site , along with a light application of an organic fertilizer . Thoroughly water the soil before planting seeds half an inch deep and 6 inches apart . When tiie seedlings have three leaves , thin them to 12 inches apart , which is the spacing you should use if transplanting seedlings .
domestication: 先在种植的地方铺上两英寸厚的腐熟肥料，再撒点有机肥，然后彻底浇一次水。等土壤湿润后，在土里种下种子，深度约半英寸，种子之间的间距大约六英寸。等种子长出三片叶子时，再把它们移植到十二英寸远的地方。如果是移植幼苗，也要保持这种间距。这样子可以让它们有足够的生长空间。
foreignization: 将2英寸厚的肥沃堆肥混合到种植地点，同时施加少量有机肥。 在种子播种前要彻底浇灌土壤，然后在土壤中播种深度为半英寸、相距6英寸的种子。当幼苗长出三片叶子时，将它们间隔调整到12英寸，这也是移植幼苗时应使用的间距。

source: But that increase is in total outlays , not average prices . The primary reasons the former increased , points out Laura Dummit of the General Accounting Office , are growth in pharmaceutical coverage by private insurance plans , the number of new drugs entering the market , and overall consumption . Drug prices have increased less swiftly , and even those estimates are flawed ; they reflect sampling problems , fail to account for the increased role of generics , and ignore falling prices for newer medicines and improved drug quality .
domestication: 话虽如此，这种增长指的是总支出，而不是平均价格。美国政府总会计办公室的劳拉·杜米特指出，医疗费用上涨的主要原因有三个：私人保险计划的药品保障范围扩大了，新药不断涌现，而且人们使用药物的总量也增加了。然而，药价的涨幅其实并没有那么快。即使那些预测药价上涨的估计也是有误导性的，因为它们没有考虑到样本选取的问题，没有考虑到普通药物在市场中的地位日渐重要，也忽视了新药降价和药物质量提高的事实。
foreignization: 但这种增长是在总支出中，而不是平均价格中。美国国会预算办公室的劳拉·杜米特指出，其主要原因是私人保险计划的药品覆盖范围扩大，新药进入市场的数量以及整体消费量的增加。与此同时，药品价格上涨得相对较慢，即使这些估计也是有缺陷的；它们反映了抽样问题，没有考虑到普通名牌药物的作用，也忽视了新药和改进药物质量的价格下降。

source: Hudson 's focus these days is beefing up morning business , which accounts for a mere 3% of revenues , against the 11% industry average . The new breakfast menu , which includes typically off-the-wall Sonic savories like a pancake-wrapped sausage and Fruit Taquitos , is already rolled out in 47% of the chain . Some stores are already seeing a 7% bounce in sales .
domestication: 这家店现在正集中精力提升早餐业务，因为早餐收入只占总收入的3%，远低于行业平均水平11%。新的早餐菜单已经在47%的门店推出，包括一些非常规的早餐食品，如煎饼包裹的香肠和水果墨西哥卷。有些门店早餐销量已经增加了7%。

source: Some colors made primarily from titanium dioxide have unique names . One of these is Holbein 's Ceramic White , formulated with a strontium pigment to give it qualities not found in standard titanium white . The manufacturer claims Ceramic White has more tinting strength and covering power than lead or zinc white , is more transparent and faster drying , and offers better handling than titanium white . Chroma Archival Oils ' Pearl White is a transparent , iridescent white made from titanium-coat-ed mica and , according to the company , can be combined with colors -- especially transparent ones -- to obtain a metallic effect .
domestication: 有些色料主要由二氧化钛制成，它们有着独特的名字。其中一个叫做 Holbein 的陶瓷白，它里面加入了锶色素，使得它比普通的钛白有更好的性能。制造商声称，这种陶瓷白不仅比铅白或者锌白有更强的着色力和遮盖力，而且更透明、干燥速度更快，还比钛白更好用。Chroma 档案油画颜料中的珍珠白是一种透明、彩虹色的白色，里面含有钛镀层的云母。根据公司的说法，可以将这种珍珠白与其他颜色（尤其是透明颜色）混合，来获得金属般的效果。
foreignization: 主要由二氧化钛制成的一些颜料有独特的名称。其中之一是Holbein的陶瓷白色，采用锶色素配方，使其具有标准钛白所没有的特性。制造商声称陶瓷白色比铅白或锌白具有更强的着色力和覆盖力，更透明且干燥速度更快，并且比钛白提供更好的处理效果。 Chroma档案油的珍珠白是一种透明的，虹彩白色的钛涂层云母，根据公司的说法，可以与颜色（尤其是透明色）结合使用以获得金属效果。

Chroma Archival Oils ' Pearl White is a transparent , iridescent white made from titanium-coat-ed mica and , according to the company , can be combined with colors -- especially transparent ones -- to obtain a metallic effect .

source: In fact , the only students who are n't vulnerable to assumptions of underqualification are Asian . The heartless assumption about Asian Americans at highly selective colleges is that they are , if anything , overqualified -- academic beasts of burden , whose strange willingness to work endlessly makes them a vast group of curve-busters , who disappear into the hard sciences and are never heard from again until you need a knee replacement or a shunt in your brain .
domestication: 实际上，只有亚裔学生不会被人怀疑学历不够。在那些竞争激烈的大学里，对亚裔美国人的无情假设是，他们其实有点过度合格——他们是学术上的劳碌命，奇怪的是他们愿意无休止地工作，这使得他们成为一大群成绩超出曲线的人，他们消失在理科的世界里，直到你需要换个膝盖或者给大脑动手术才会再次听到他们的消息。
foreignization: 事实上，唯一不易受到低资格假设影响的学生是亚洲人。在高度选择性的学院中，对亚裔美国人的无情假设是，他们如果有什么特点的话，就是过度合格——学业上的负担，他们奇怪的愿意无休止地工作使他们成为一大群曲线破坏者，他们消失在艰难的科学中，直到你需要膝盖置换或脑部分流时才会再次听到他们。

source: Further , AIDS research funding is already 10 times that of cancer on a per death basis , 20 times on a per patient basis . Ironically , the same day the Los Angeles Times carried a front-page story about a Johnson AIDS fundraiser , it carried several stories describing promising advances in cancer therapy that are held up for lack of funds . It reported that in real terms , cancer spending in 1991 was well below the level it had been in 1980 . Activist tense
domestication: 更何况，艾滋病的研究资金已经是癌症研究资金的10倍，按照每个患者计算的话，则是癌症研究资金的20倍。讽刺的是，就在洛杉矶时报头版报道约翰逊艾滋病慈善晚会的同一天，它也刊登了几篇关于癌症治疗的进展文章，这些治疗方法因为缺乏资金而停滞不前。根据文章的内容，1991年的癌症研究资金实际上比1980年的时候还少。这些活动家们的情绪很激动，因为他们知道只要再多一点资金，就可以让这些新疗法早日问世，让更多的人从癌症的痛苦中解脱出来。
foreignization: 此外，在每死亡人数和每位患者的基础上，艾滋病的研究资金已经分别是癌症的10倍和20倍。讽刺的是，就在洛杉矶时报头版刊登了一篇关于约翰逊艾滋病筹款活动的报道的同一天，该报还刊登了几篇关于癌症治疗取得的有前景进展，但由于缺乏资金而被搁置的报道。它报道称，实际上，1991年的癌症支出远低于1980年的水平。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Further , AIDS research funding is already 10 times that of cancer on a per death basis , 20 times on a per patient basis . Ironically , the same day the Los Angeles Times carried a front-page story about a Johnson AIDS fundraiser , it carried several stories describing promising advances in cancer therapy that are held up for lack of funds . It reported that in real terms , cancer spending in 1991 was well below the level it had been in 1980 . Activist tense

更何况，艾滋病的研究资金已经是癌症研究资金的10倍，按照每个患者计算的话，则是癌症研究资金的20倍。讽刺的是，就在洛杉矶时报头版报道约翰逊艾滋病慈善晚会的同一天，它也刊登了几篇关于癌症治疗的进展文章，这些治疗方法因为缺乏资金而停滞不前。根据文章的内容，1991年的癌症研究资金实际上比1980年的时候还少。这些活动家们的情绪很激动，因为他们知道只要再多一点资金，就可以让这些新疗法早日问世，让更多的人从癌症的痛苦中解脱出来。

source: No kidding . In a follow-up investigation to " Relief for the Rx Blues " ( October 1999 ) , we found that despite claims of increased scrutiny by government regulators and medical and pharmacy-industry trade groups , suspect web sites that sell prescription drugs are flourishing . Ordering medications online without benefit of a proper diagnosis remains about as easy as clicking your way through cyberspace for books or clothes . Unfortunately , an ill-prescribed drug can carry far more serious consequences than a bad ending or a bad fit .
domestication: 一点也不假。在对《治疗处方药蓝调》（十月，1999年）的一次后续调查中，我们发现尽管政府监管机构和医疗及药店行业的贸易团体声称加强了监管，但可疑的网上售药网站却仍然欣欣向荣。在线订购药物时，如果没有得到适当的诊断，就像在网络空间里点击购买书籍或衣服一样容易。不幸的是，一种误开的药可能带来的后果比坏结局或不合身的衣服要严重得多。

source: As she wrote those words , and without knowing it , my mother was dying . It began with a single , healthy breast cell that mutated into cancer . That cell split into two . No one will ever know why or when , but it could have happened as long as a decade before she discovered the disease . For years , as she worked , slept , made love , mothered her children , the malignant cells were slowly doubling within her breasts until , unstoppable , they became billions .
domestication: 她写下那些文字时，却不知道，她已经开始走向生命的终点。 一切源于一个健康的乳房细胞变异成癌细胞，这个细胞分裂成了两个。没有人知道为什么和什么时候会这样，但可能是在十年前就已经发生了，只不过她直到后来才发现。 多年来，在她工作、睡觉、做爱、抚育孩子的时候，那些恶性的细胞在她的乳房里缓慢地增加着，直到不可阻挡地成为亿万个。就像一场沉默的暴风雨，悄悄地袭来，又无声无息地蔓延开来。

No one will ever know why or when , but it could have happened as long as a decade before she discovered the disease . source: With no cure or discovery yet of a drug or medical treatment to slow its progress , Alzheimer 's disease is a terrible tragedy for any family to face . But when the emotional strain of dealing with the disease and feelings of physical exhaustion are shared with a support group , caregivers seem to find more strength to cope . Not only do they gain emotional and even spiritual support , they gain practical help as well by learning from the support group about community services .
domestication: 阿尔茨海默病是一种不治之症，目前尚无有效的药物或治疗方法来减缓其进展，对于任何家庭来说，这都是一场悲剧。但是，当面对这场灾难时，如果有一个互助团体来分担情感上的压力和身体的疲劳，照顾者们似乎就能找到更多的力量来应对。他们不仅从中获得了情感上的支持，甚至还获得了精神上的慰藉，而且通过学习互助团体关于社区服务的知识，他们还能获得实际的帮助。
foreignization: 目前尚未找到治愈或减缓的方法，也没有药物或医学治疗方法来减缓阿尔茨海默病的进展，因此这对任何家庭来说都是一个可怕的悲剧。但是，当处理这种疾病的情感负担和身体疲劳感与支持小组共享时，照顾者似乎会找到更多的力量来应对。不仅他们获得了情感上的支持，甚至是精神上的支持，他们还通过从支持小组中学习社区服务而获得了实际的帮助。

Not only do they gain emotional and even spiritual support , they gain practical help as well by learning from the support group about community services .

source: With the new repeal bill , Republicans have constructed legislation that would accomplish many of their most cherished goals , like reducing taxes on the wealthy and reducing the regulation of insurers . And their proposal would surely benefit some people , including some for whom the Affordable Care Act has meant higher premiums and weaker coverage .
domestication: 新版废除法案出炉后，共和党人制定了一项立法，旨在实现他们长期以来的诸多心愿，譬如减轻富人的税负，放松对保险公司的监管等。这项提议确实能让某些人受益，包括那些因《平价医疗法案》导致保费上涨、保障水平下降的人群。但是，这项提议也会使得许多低收入家庭失去医疗保障，对于这些人来说，这简直就是釜底抽薪。

source: While plenty of people , including plenty of Trump fans , certainly have concerns about the economy , it 's racial resentment that drives who does and does n't support Trump .... Adding an economic anxiety factor to your account does n't actually help to explain anything . Trump 's supporters , for example , are considerably whiter and considerably older than the American population at large . If the economic problems of the past decade had been unusually hard on the white and the old , then an economics-focused explanation could be valuable . In reality , things have been rougher on nonwhites and rougher on younger cohorts .
domestication: 有很多人，包括特朗普的粉丝，都对经济问题感到担忧，但归根结底，种族怨恨才是决定人们是否支持特朗普的关键因素。将经济焦虑纳入考虑范围，并不能真正帮助我们理解这一现象。以特朗普的支持者为例，他们的族群构成和年龄分布与美国整体人口相比，有着明显的差异，他们更白、更老。如果过去十年里的经济问题对白人和老年人造成了不成比例的影响，那么从经济角度解释可能还有一定的道理。但事实上，经济问题对非白人和年轻一代的影响更为严重。
foreignization: 尽管很多人，包括许多特朗普的粉丝，当然对经济有所担忧，但正是种族怨恨驱使人们决定是否支持特朗普……在你的论述中添加经济焦虑因素实际上并不能解释任何事情。例如，特朗普的支持者与美国总人口相比显著地更白、更老。如果过去十年中的经济问题对白人和老年人特别残酷，那么注重经济的解释可能会很有价值。在现实中，对非白人来说事情更加艰难，对年轻一代来说也更加艰难。

source: So the lesson of Barnes 's article , rightly interpreted , is not that California is no longer significant because it no longer foretells America 's political future , but quite the opposite : namely , that because California foretells a future of Democratic political hegemony for America , the state has to be dismissed as insignificant . And this latter lesson is so manifestly nonsensical that Barnes can be advancing it only to draw attention to perils that he prudently forbears to name .
domestication: 巴恩斯文章的真正含义是，美国加州之所以不再重要，不是因为它不能再预测美国政治的未来，而恰恰相反：由于加州预示着民主党在美国将占据主导地位的未来，所以人们才要淡化这座州的重要性。而这个结论如此荒谬，巴恩斯提出来绝不是他的真实想法，他只是想引起大家对他不便明说危险的关注罢了。
foreignization: 因此，巴恩斯文章的教训，正确解读，是不是因为加利福尼亚州不再预示美国的政治未来所以它就不再重要，而是恰恰相反：也就是说，因为加利福尼亚州预示了美国民主党在政治上占据主导地位的未来，因此该州不得不被视为无关紧要。这种后一种教训显然是毫无意义的，所以巴恩斯只能是在试图引起人们对他谨慎避免提及的危险的注意。

So the lesson of Barnes 's article , rightly interpreted , is not that California is no longer significant because it no longer foretells America 's political future , but quite the opposite : namely , that because California foretells a future of Democratic political hegemony for America , the state has to be dismissed as insignificant . And this latter lesson is so manifestly nonsensical that Barnes can be advancing it only to draw attention to perils that he prudently forbears to name .

source: William Morris railed against the Victorian fondness for reproducing furnishings from past eras , yet here we are , more than 100 years later , eating up reproductions of the English designer 's wallpapers and fabrics . But it figures : his richly colored patterns are nature-based . The man and his work are detailed in William Morris , Decor and Design by Elizabeth Wilhide ( Abram. $45 ) , and Arts and Crafts Carpets by Malcolm Haslam ( Rizzoli. $65 ) celebrates the lush carpets of the international design movement Morris inspired . Vibrant replicas of the rugs are now in some major carpet stores ( $2 , 000 to $10 , 000 ) .
domestication: 说来也怪，维多利亚时代的人们对复制古代家具有着特殊的喜爱，而威廉·莫里斯却对此持反对态度。然而，时至今日，人们仍然对这位英国设计师的壁纸和织物复制品趋之若鹜。其实也不难理解，莫里斯的设计色彩丰富，图案大多以自然为基础。关于莫里斯及其作品的详细介绍，可以参考伊丽莎白·威尔海德（Elizabeth Wilhide）所著的《威廉·莫里斯：装饰与设计》（William Morris, Decor and Design，艾布拉姆出版社，45美元），以及马尔科姆·哈斯拉姆（Malcolm Haslam）所著的《工艺美术地毯》（Arts and Crafts Carpets，里佐利出版社，65美元）。后者主要介绍了莫里斯所启发的国际设计运动中的豪华地毯。如今，这些地毯的复制品已在一些大型地毯商店有售，价格从2000美元到1万美元不等。
foreignization: 威廉·莫里斯（William Morris）抨击了维多利亚时代人们喜欢复制过去时代的家具，但是超过100年过去了，我们现在大量生产英国设计师的壁纸和织物的复制品。但是这也在情理之中：他的色彩丰富的图案都是以自然为基础的。这位男人和他的工作在威廉·莫里斯：装饰与设计（William Morris, Decor and Design）一书中有详细的描述，该书作者是伊丽莎白·威尔海德（Elizabeth Wilhide）（阿布拉姆出版社，45美元），而马尔科姆·哈斯拉姆（Malcolm Haslam）的工艺美术地毯（Arts and Crafts Carpets）（里佐利出版社，65美元）则赞颂了莫里斯启发的国际设计运动中豪华的地毯。地毯的生动复制品现在已经出现在一些主要的地毯商店里（2000美元到10000美元）。

source: Even when Fox and its allies in the powerful conservative media establishment get traction on a supposed scandal , it does n't grip the nation like scandals of old because of its origins in partisan reporting . The stories are combated by fierce blogging on the liberal side . For instance , when Van Jones was wrongly accused on Fox of believing 9/11 was a U.S. plot , a counterassault by liberals kept the mainstream press from taking up the story in a big way . It was seen in a partisan context , which had the effect of protecting the president from a feeding frenzy .
domestication: 即使福克斯新闻及其在有影响力的保守派媒体阵营中的盟友对某个所谓的丑闻大肆炒作，也不会像过去一样让整个国家陷入疯狂。这是因为这些丑闻往往源自党派报道，而不是事实真相。自由派通过博客等方式进行了激烈反击，例如，当范·琼斯被福克斯新闻错误指控认为9/11是美国自导自演的阴谋时，自由派的反击使得主流媒体没有进一步追究此事。由于这种党派背景，总统也因此避免了被媒体围攻的命运。
foreignization: 即使福克斯新闻及其在强大的保守派媒体集团中的盟友对某一假设的丑闻事件取得了一定的进展，由于该事件起源于党派性的报道，也不会像往年那样使整个国家陷入疯狂。由于这些故事遭到了自由派强烈的博客反击，例如，当范·琼斯被福克斯错误指控认为 9/11 是美国阴谋时，自由派发动的反击使主流媒体没有大幅度地跟进报道。它被视为党派化的背景，这样的效果是保护总统免受媒体的围攻。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Even when Fox and its allies in the powerful conservative media establishment get traction on a supposed scandal , it does n't grip the nation like scandals of old because of its origins in partisan reporting . For instance , when Van Jones was wrongly accused on Fox of believing 9/11 was a U.S. plot , a counterassault by liberals kept the mainstream press from taking up the story in a big way . It was seen in a partisan context , which had the effect of protecting the president from a feeding frenzy .

source: I 'm still losing money now when you include homeowner dues . That 's only after 10 years and refinancing and putting in $65,000 ( to the principal ) to get out from underwater and refinance it as an investment property . We 've had to replace carpet a couple of times , paint a couple times , and over time have replaced all the appliances . At least there 's a tax write-off on my " income property " that 's been losing money .
domestication: 老实说，我现在还在亏钱呢，还没算上物业费呢。十年了，我已经重新贷款并且往里面贴了六万五千美元（才终于不再负资产），然后将它改成出租房重新贷款。这些年，我们更换过几次地毯，粉刷过几次墙，渐渐的也都把家电换了一遍。唯一的安慰是，这“赔钱生意”还能在税单上抵扣一点儿。
foreignization: 我现在仍然在亏钱，当你包括业主费用时。那是在经过10年之后，重新贷款，并且投入了6.5万美元（到本金中），以摆脱不堪重负和将其作为投资房产进行再融资。我们不得不更换几次地毯，油漆几次，随着时间的推移，我们已经更换了所有电器。至少在我的“收入房产”上有税收扣除，这一直在亏钱。

source: Scientists from the University of Bonn and the Sirindhorn Museum in Thailand have identified two new dinosaur species . They analyzed fossil finds that were already discovered 30 years ago in Thailand . Both species are distant relatives of T. rex , but with a somewhat more primitive structure . They were efficient predators . The results have now been published in the journal Acta Palaeontologica Polonica .
domestication: 德国波恩大学和泰国西里拉猜博物馆的科学家们发现了两种新的恐龙物种。他们分析了三十年前在泰国就已被发现的化石。两种新物种都是霸王龙的远亲，但体型略微原始些。它们是高效的掠食者。相关的研究成果已经发表在《波兰古生物学报》上。
foreignization: 来自波恩大学和泰国希琳通博物馆的科学家已经确定了两种新的恐龙物种。他们分析了在泰国已经被发现30年化石发现。两种物种是T. rex的远亲，但具有较原始的结构。它们是高效的掠食者。结果现在已发表在《波兰古生物学杂志》上。

source: This has proved an influential account , although corroboration is thin . Whatever the truth of it , James and Holmes ( and , for that matter , Wright and Green , the other figures whose work is associated with pragmatism ) had already formulated what is distinctively pragmatic in their views before 1872 . Peirce may have given James the name , but he could not have given him the idea .
domestication: 这段描述很有影响力，虽然证据有点单薄。不管真相如何，詹姆斯和霍姆斯（当然还有与实用主义相关的另一批人马，如赖特和格林）在1872年之前早已形成了自己独特的实用主义观点。裴尔茨可能给詹姆斯起了个名字，但是想法肯定不是他传授的。这就好像是“授之以鱼”还是“授之以渔”，裴尔茨可能提供了一个名称，但是思想的火花肯定是詹姆斯自己点燃的。
foreignization: 这已经证明是一个有影响力的记载，尽管证实的证据很少。无论其真相如何，詹姆斯和霍姆斯（以及同样地，赖特和格林，这些与实用主义相关的工作的其他人物）在1872年之前已经阐述了他们观点中具有实用主义特色的东西。皮尔斯可能给了詹姆斯“实用主义”的名称，但他不可能给他这个想法。

source: Now researchers led by microbiologist Rosemary Redfield of the University of British Columbia in Vancouver have tried to replicate the original growth experiments . Redfield , colleague Marshall Reaves of Princeton University and others grew GFAJ-I in a test tube . After confirming with a genetic test that they had the right microbe , the researchers could n't get GFAJ-I to be fruitful and multiply until they added a dash of glutamate , an amino acid that Wolfe-Simon did not use in her experiments .
domestication: 现在，英属哥伦比亚大学温哥华分校的微生物学家罗丝玛丽·雷德菲尔德带领的研究人员试图重现最初的生长实验。雷德菲尔德和普林斯顿大学的同事马歇尔·里夫斯等人在试管中培养GFAJ-1。经过基因检测确认他们得到的是正确的微生物后，研究人员发现，只有在添加了谷氨酸（一种沃尔夫-西蒙没有在实验中使用的氨基酸）后，GFAJ-1才能够大量繁殖起来。

source: " The girl tried to come to Lauren and Dinah 's doors and the security we hired were with us speaking to us and making sure we were safe . We saw this girl lie to them about where she was staying and where her actual room was , tell them to ' shut the f -- k up and stop talking ' and then proceed to try and lunge towards Lauren 's room so she could get a note to her . The security guards who ushered her away and made sure she did n't follow through were doing their jobs of protecting us . Especially in light of recent events like the shooting of Christine Grimmie , we ca n't ever be too safe with our personal space and protection .

source: Among those students was Roald Hoffmann , a young immigrant from Poland . When Hoffmann was 6 , his father smuggled him and his mother out of a Nazi labor camp . Mother and child hid in the attic of a Polish schoolhouse ; the Nazis killed Hoffmann 's father . After the war , Hoffmann and his mother lived in refugee camps , where he read biographies of Marie Curie and George Washington Carver .

source: In any case , it 's rarely the goal of the new program to simulate the old one exactly ; it 's far more common for programmers to want to improve upon the past . That 's a goal that keeps computer science advancing at an exponential rate , and it probably also explains why the technical problem of preserving the past has received so little attention from those who helped create the problem in the first place .
domestication: 无论如何，新开发的程序很少会以完美模拟旧程序为目标，更多的是改进过去的东西。这种精神推动着计算机科学迅速发展，也可以解释为什么那些一开始制造了这个问题的人却对过去的技术难题不屑一顾。他们可能认为这没什么意义，只是浪费精力。

source: " It is reassuring that these results indicate no increased risk of a second malignancy in RA patients with a past cancer who used biologic therapy , and that were was no major indication of an increased mortality rate among users of these medications , " said Dr. Dreyer . " However , the number of patients who suffered a second malignancy was small , so our statistical analyses must be interpreted with caution . Further studies are required to confirm our findings . In the meantime , our data does provide some reassurance that biologics do n't pose an immediate danger in patients with a history of cancer . "  Related Stories
domestication: 德雷尔博士说，“这些结果显示，患有类风湿关节炎的病人，即使曾经患过癌症，如果使用生物制剂治疗，也不增加再次患癌症的风险，而且没有迹象表明使用这种药物会增加死亡率”，“但是，我们的研究样本中，再次患癌症的病人数量太少，所以我们的统计分析需要谨慎对待。我们还需要进一步的研究来证实我们的发现。但是，就目前而言，我们的数据至少让人放心，生物制剂对有癌症史的患者不会带来立即的危害。”
foreignization: “这些结果表明，风湿性关节炎患者曾经有癌症病史，现在使用生物制剂治疗，没有增加第二次患恶性肿瘤的风险，而且在使用这些药物的人群中没有明显增加死亡率的迹象，这让人感到安慰，”德雷尔博士说。“但是，出现第二次恶性肿瘤的患者数量很小，所以我们的统计分析必须谨慎解读。需要进一步研究来证实我们的发现。在此期间，我们的数据确实为那些有癌症病史的患者使用生物制剂提供了一些安慰，证明生物制剂不会带来立即的危险。” 相关报道

" It is reassuring that these results indicate no increased risk of a second malignancy in RA patients with a past cancer who used biologic therapy , and that were was no major indication of an increased mortality rate among users of these medications , " said Dr. Dreyer . " However , the number of patients who suffered a second malignancy was small , so our statistical analyses must be interpreted with caution . Further studies are required to confirm our findings . In the meantime , our data does provide some reassurance that biologics do n't pose an immediate danger in patients with a history of cancer . "  Related Stories
德雷尔博士说，“这些结果显示，患有类风湿关节炎的病人，即使曾经患过癌症，如果使用生物制剂治疗，也不增加再次患癌症的风险，而且没有迹象表明使用这种药物会增加死亡率”，“但是，我们的研究样本中，再次患癌症的病人数量太少，所以我们的统计分析需要谨慎对待。我们还需要进一步的研究来证实我们的发现。但是，就目前而言，我们的数据至少让人放心，生物制剂对有癌症史的患者不会带来立即的危害。”

Alfonso Soriano is the only other player to hit two home runs in the Futures Game , doing so in 1999 , the first year the game was played . On the season , Diaz is hitting .314 with a .905 OPS and has tallied 6 home runs , 30 RBIs and 36 runs scored .

source: And so I wrote-poems , sketches , stories , the usual juvenilia . Artistically , my childhood had been one of deprivation , in that I was not the product of a dysfunctional family . Accordingly , the things I wrote derived less from experience and inner turmoil than from other writings that I admired .
domestication: 我也就写了些诗，画了些速写，讲述了一些故事，都是平常的少儿不离家，长儿不成器的玩意儿。我那时的童年在艺术上来说可是很缺乏滋养，因为我没有在一个不正常的家庭长大，所以我的作品也就不像其他人那样充满着生活的体验和内心的动荡，而是更多地受到了我所喜爱的文字的影响。
foreignization: 因此我写了——诗歌、草图、故事，一般的早期作品。从艺术角度来说，我的童年是一个缺失的东西，因为我不是一个功能失调家庭的产物。因此，我写的东西更多地来自我所钦佩的其他作品，而不是来自经验和内心的动荡。

source: While many of the benefits of real smart homes are a matter of convenience , they can also make a big difference in people 's lives . Connected smoke and carbon monoxide detectors can alert residents to potential dangers even when they 're not at home . Certain connected technologies can allow the elderly to stay in their own homes longer or empower those with disabilities with greater accessibility and independence .
domestication: 智能家居带来的好处很多，虽然有一些只是让生活更便捷，但也能对人们的生活产生深远影响。比如说，联网的烟雾和一氧化碳探测器，即使你不在家，也能及时提醒你注意潜在的危险。某些联网技术可以让老年人在自己的家中多住一段时间，或者赋予残障人士更大的出行便利和自主权，这样他们就能过上更加独立自主的生活。这些看似普通的技术，其实对一些人的生活有着不平凡的意义。
foreignization: 虽然许多真正智能家居的好处是便利的问题，但它们也可以在人们的生活中产生巨大的影响。 连接烟雾和一氧化碳探测器即使居民不在家时也能提醒他们注意潜在的危险。 某些连接技术可以让老年人更长时间地呆在自己的家中，或者赋予残疾人更大的便利性和独立性。

source: The USOC has no policy to accommodate Olympic mothers , but many federations have their own initiatives . USA Basketball , for example , covers travel expenses for a child and a caregiver , which is why forward Tina Thompson 's mother , Lady , was in Beijing looking after Tina 's preternaturally happy three-year-old , Dyllan . In 2004 USA Softball established a Child Care Fund . The mothers-catcher Stacey Nuveman , pitcher Jennie Finch and alternate pitcher Lisa Fernandez-spent part of the U.S. pre-Olympic tour in a motor home dubbed the Baby Mobile , a rolling day-care center with cartoons in the back and naps in the front .
domestication: 美国奥林匹克委员会没有具体的政策来照顾奥运运动员的母亲，但是很多运动协会都有自己的举措。例如，美国篮球协会会为一名儿童和一名看护人员报销旅行费用，所以，前锋蒂娜·汤普森的母亲莱迪能够去北京照顾蒂娜三岁的孩子戴伦。2004年，美国垒球队成立了儿童保育基金。队里的几个妈妈，包括捕手斯泰西·努维曼、投手詹妮·芬奇和替补投手丽莎·费尔南德斯，在美国奥运会前的巡回比赛中的一部分时间里，都住在一辆叫做“宝宝巴士”的房车里。这个移动日托中心后面放着卡通片，前面则是睡觉的地方。
foreignization: 美国奥林匹克委员会没有安置奥运母亲的政策，但很多联合会都有自己的举措，例如美国篮球协会报销一个孩子及其照顾者的差旅费，这就是前锋蒂娜·汤普森的母亲莱迪（Lady）可以在北京照顾蒂娜的三个半岁的儿子戴伦（Dyllan）的原因。在2004年，美国垒球协会成立了一个儿童保育基金。接球手斯泰西·努维曼（Stacey Nuveman），投球手詹妮·芬奇（Jennie Finch）和替补投球手丽莎·费尔南德斯（Lisa Fernandez）在奥运会之前的美国巡回演出中的一部分时间住在一个叫做“宝贝移动”（Baby Mobile）的房车里，这是一个带有卡通片的活动巴士，后面是儿童区，前面则是午休区。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The USOC has no policy to accommodate Olympic mothers , but many federations have their own initiatives . USA Basketball , for example , covers travel expenses for a child and a caregiver , which is why forward Tina Thompson 's mother , Lady , was in Beijing looking after Tina 's preternaturally happy three-year-old , Dyllan . In 2004 USA Softball established a Child Care Fund . The mothers-catcher Stacey Nuveman , pitcher Jennie Finch and alternate pitcher Lisa Fernandez-spent part of the U.S. pre-Olympic tour in a motor home dubbed the Baby Mobile , a rolling day-care center with cartoons in the back and naps in the front .

source: Diagnosed your own scalp as dry ? Be careful . " Sometimes what people self-diagnose as dryness is really seborrhea , a condition of overactive oil production , which creates flaking of the scalp as well as scaling around the nose and/or eyebrows , " says Dr. Brandt . " They see this flakiness and think they have a dry scalp , then they compound their problem by using heavy conditioners . " If you 're unsure , check with your dermatologist . MANE-TAINING ' YOUR STYLE
domestication: 你自我诊断自己的头皮是干燥的？要小心！有时候人们自己诊断的“干燥”其实是头皮屑，这是一种油脂分泌过多的状况，会导致头皮和鼻子或眉毛周围出现白色屑状物。人们看到这些白屑就以为自己头皮干燥，然后他们使用厚重的护发素，这样反而加剧了问题。如果你不确定，可以去咨询一下皮肤科医生。这样才能真正“保持”你的发型。
foreignization: 自我诊断自己的头皮是干燥的？要小心。有时候人们自己诊断出来的干燥，其实真正的是脂溢性皮炎，一种油脂过度分泌的状况，这会导致头皮和鼻子周围以及/或者眉毛周围出现鳞屑，布兰特博士说，他们看到这种皮屑状物质，于是认为自己有干燥的头皮，然后他们通过使用厚重的护发素使得问题更加严重。如果你不确定，去请教你的皮肤科医生。维持你的发型

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Diagnosed your own scalp as dry ? Be careful . " Sometimes what people self-diagnose as dryness is really seborrhea , a condition of overactive oil production , which creates flaking of the scalp as well as scaling around the nose and/or eyebrows , " says Dr. Brandt . " They see this flakiness and think they have a dry scalp , then they compound their problem by using heavy conditioners . " If you 're unsure , check with your dermatologist . MANE-TAINING ' YOUR STYLE
你自我诊断自己的头皮是干燥的？要小心！有时候人们自己诊断的“干燥”其实是头皮屑，这是一种油脂分泌过多的状况，会导致头皮和鼻子或眉毛周围出现白色屑状物。人们看到这些白屑就以为自己头皮干燥，然后他们使用厚重的护发素，这样反而加剧了问题。如果你不确定，可以去咨询一下皮肤科医生。这样才能真正“保持”你的发型。

( Not listed : the compounded bitterness of the proletariat . )

source: Drives in XT-class systems are generally held in place with screws that bolt the drives right into the chassis . AT-class systems typically have rails fastened to the sides of the hard drives ; the drives slide right into the AT chassis like drawers into desks . Metal tabs hold the drives in place .
domestication: XT类系统中的硬盘通常是通过螺丝固定在机箱上的，而AT类系统则一般在硬盘的两侧装有导轨，硬盘可以像抽屉滑入桌子一样轻松地滑入机箱。同时，金属卡槽可以将硬盘牢固地固定在原位。这样不仅可以方便硬盘的安装和拆卸，还能有效保护硬盘免受碰撞的损害。
foreignization: 在XT类系统中，驱动器通常使用螺丝固定到机箱中。在AT类系统中，硬盘两侧通常有滑轨；驱动器可以像抽屉滑入桌子一样滑入AT机箱。金属卡片将驱动器固定在原位。
