source: Heavin credits Curves ' rapid growth to the low-overhead business model , which allows the company to open profitably in towns too small for other gyms . " We created an efficient business model that could go where no one else could , " he says . Indeed , the average Curves club today has only 400 members -- which , according to a formula the company has developed , is what a town with a population of about 10,000 can sustain .
domestication: 哈维恩认为，Curves能够快速发展的原因是他们的低成本商业模式，这使得公司可以在其他健身房不敢涉足的小镇上盈利地开设分店。他说：“我们创造了一个高效的商业模式，可以进入其他人无法进入的地方。”事实上，如今的Curves健身俱乐部平均只有400名会员——根据公司开发的公式，这正是人口约为1万人的小镇所能支撑的规模。这种模式让Curves能够在其他健身房难以生存的小镇上找到立足之地。
foreignization: Heavin 将 Curves 快速增长归功于低成本的商业模式，这使得公司可以在其他健身房无法盈利的小镇上开设。"我们创建了一个高效的商业模式，可以去其他人无法去的地方，"他说。的确，今天的Curves俱乐部平均只有400名会员--根据公司开发的一个公式，这正是人口约10,000人的城镇所能维持的数量。

source: To understand the impact of demography on the House , The Atlantic examined congressional district-level data from the Census Bureau 's 2015 American Community Survey . ( The ACS data for 2015 does not take into account the recent court-ordered redistricting in North Carolina , Florida , and Virginia , so there may be some variation from the numbers reported here in the revised districts in those states . )
domestication: 要搞清楚人口统计对众议院的影响，《大西洋月刊》仔细研究了美国人口普查局2015年美国社区调查中关于国会选区层面的数据。顺便说一下，2015年的ACS数据并没有考虑到最近法院命令在北卡罗来纳州、佛罗里达州和弗吉尼亚州进行的重划选区工作，所以这些州最新的数据可能会有所不同。不过话又说回来，这些数字至少可以让我们大致了解一下情况。
foreignization: 为了了解人口统计数据对众议院的影响，《大西洋月刊》研究了美国人口普查局2015年美国社区调查中的国会选区层面的数据。（2015年的ACS数据不考虑最近法院命令在北卡罗来纳州、佛罗里达州和弗吉尼亚州进行的重划选区，因此这些州修订后的选区的数字可能与这里报告的数字有所不同。）

source: For another thing , people who want a drug are likely to stretch the truth . And when they do that , a lot can go wrong . A 90-pound anorexic who claims to weigh 290 can get a diet drug , a 12-year-old kid can get a muscle-building drug . The truth is , there 's little to stop anyone , through ignorance of their own health or through mischief , from buying almost any prescription drug . ( For his part , Marks usually told the truth . He fibbed about that physical exam and about his weight , to get the diet drug Meridia . )
domestication: 再者，那些想得到药物的人很可能会说话不老实。一旦他们这样做了，很多事情就会出错。一个体重90磅的厌食症患者可能会声称自己体重290磅来获得减肥药，一名12岁的孩子也可能会获得增肌药。事实上，几乎没有什么能阻止任何人因为自身健康知识不足或者是故意胡闹而购买几乎任何处方药。（就马克斯来说，他通常说的是真话。他在体检和体重问题上撒谎，以获得减肥药米力汀。）
foreignization: 另一方面，想要药物的人可能会歪曲事实。当他们这样做时，很多事情可能会出错。一个90磅的厌食症患者声称自己体重290磅可以得到减肥药，一名12岁的孩子可以得到增肌药。事实是，几乎没有什么能阻止任何人通过对自己健康的无知或通过恶作剧来购买几乎任何处方药。（在他的情况下，马克斯通常说真话。他对那次体检和自己的体重撒谎，以获得减肥药美利亚。）

source: Ease of Use : The 35P has the additional benefit of being simple to use . It does n't even have an on/off button . The unit powers up when you plug in the cords from the sky screens . Just stick the cords into the correct sockets in the main unit , and the chronograph is up and running . Even the most addle-brained shooter can figure it out .
domestication: 使用方便：35P还有一个好处，就是非常容易使用。它甚至没有开关按钮。一旦你将天线插入主机，设备就会自动启动。只需将电缆插入主机的正确插槽，计时器就可以正常工作。即使是最笨拙的射手也能轻松掌握。说白了，就是傻瓜都能用。

source: American holly ( Ilex opaca ) , with its dark green leaves and bright red berries , contains bitter elements and was once thought to be useful in treating malaria . Now it 's mainly used ornamentally as a handsome thorny Christmas decor . However , the leaves of its close relative , Ilex paraguariensis , commonly called mate , are rich in caffeine . They are used to prepare a stimulating beverage known as Paraguay tea that is very popular in South America .
domestication: 说到圣诞节，美国冬青树（Ilex opaca）就是其中一个不可或缺的元素，它的深绿叶子和鲜红的浆果别提有多好看了。以前，人们认为它含有一些苦味成分，可以用来治疟疾，但现在基本上只用于装饰，因为它长得很好看，枝干上满是刺，非常适合做圣诞节的装饰品。不过，它的近亲巴拉圭冬青（Ilex paraguariensis）的叶子就不同了，里面富含咖啡因，人们常用它来泡一种叫做巴拉圭茶的饮料，在南美洲非常受欢迎。这种茶有很强的刺激性，喜欢的人都说它提神醒脑，令人神清气爽。

source: Cornell Woolrich ( 1903-68 ) . A couple of years ago I read a Woolrich short story in which a pulp writer locks himself in a hotel room and works all night to meet a deadline . When he 's done , he falls asleep , exhausted ; when he wakes up , he 's horrified to discover that the pages are blank . There was no ribbon in the typewriter . Presumably the hero took each page in turn from the typewriter without noting the absence of words on it .
domestication: 康奈尔·伍利奇（1903-1968），几年前我读过他的一篇短篇小说，大致讲的是一位通俗小说作家为了赶截止日期而把自己关在酒店房间里，通宵工作。写完后，他筋疲力尽地睡着了，但醒来后却发现那些纸页上一个字也没有。原来打字机里根本就没有色带。看来，这个可怜的家伙当时打完每一页后都没注意到上面没有一个字，就直接从打字机里抽出来了。
foreignization: 康奈尔·伍利奇 (1903-68) 。几年前我读过伍利奇的一篇短篇小说，讲的是一名通俗小说作家把自己锁在酒店房间里，通宵工作以赶上截止日期。当他完成后，他筋疲力尽地睡着了；当他醒来时，他发现那些页面是空白的，结果令他感到恐惧。打字机里没有色带。假设英雄从打字机上一页一页地取出纸张，却没有注意到纸张上没有文字。

source: Of course , Pat was a more bespoke form of A.I. when compared with the contemporary mass-market counterpart on your smart device , though one wonders whether her inventor would have made her ubiquitous in the 20 years after the movie . Would she have become a feature incorporated into other products by today 's tech giants like Amazon Echo 's Alexa ? Or would she have remained an independent form of A.I. residing in the Cooper household and other homes ?
domestication: 当然，帕特与现在智能设备上的通用人工智能相比，更像是量身定制的高级AI，不过人们会纳闷，如果电影中她的创造者在过去二十年里是否会让她变得无处不在。也许她已经成为像亚马逊Echo的Alexa一样的功能，集成到其他科技巨头的产品中了？或者她还是会保持独立，成为库珀家和其他家庭中的一个专属AI？
foreignization: 当然，帕特与智能设备上的当代大众市场版本相比，是一种更为定制化的人工智能形式，尽管人们很好奇她的发明者在电影上映后的20年里是否会让她无处不在。她是否会成为亚马逊回声的Alexa等今天的科技巨头生产的其他产品中所整合的功能？或者她是否会保持一种独立的人工智能形式，居住在库珀家和其他家庭中？

source: He 's been building the brand called Jay-Z since the beginning of his career . Jay stepped into the hip-hop limelight in 1996 with the perfect back story : He grew up in Brooklyn , a drug dealer who was never jailed but was able to walk into the hip-hop game with big money . There was no need to exaggerate . But more than that , he came into the game with big talent . " He 's a figure hip-hop purists can respect , " says ? uestlove . " If you bring his name up with KRS-One , Rakim , Nas and Biggie , most people would agree with you . "
domestication: 杰斯一直致力于打造自己的品牌，从他的事业开始就是如此。他在1996年带着完美的背景故事步入嘻哈乐坛：他在布鲁克林长大，曾经是个贩毒者，但从未进过监狱，却能够带着大量资金进入嘻哈音乐圈。没有必要夸大其词，但是更重要的是，他带来了超乎寻常的才华。“他是一个嘻哈音乐爱好者会尊敬的人物”，?uestlove说：“如果你跟KRS-One、Rakim、Nas和Biggie一起提到他的名字，大多数人都会同意你的看法。”
foreignization: 他从事业伊始就开始建立Jay-Z这个品牌。Jay在1996年带着完美的背景故事走进了嘻哈聚光灯下：他在布鲁克林长大，曾是一名毒贩子，但他从未被关进监狱，却能带着一大笔钱进入嘻哈界，没有必要夸大其词。但是，更重要的是，他带来了很高的天赋。“他是一个嘻哈纯粹主义者可以尊敬的人，” Questlove说。“如果你在KRS-One，Rakim，Nas和Biggie面前提起他的名字，大多数人会同意你。”

source: Never Mind The Bullocks : As much as I 'd love to transcribe Bullock 's whole improvised media scrum because it 's just so much fun watching him try to be a by-the-books Captain , I 'll stick to a shorter sample . His response to being asked if he can confirm Azrael was Galavan : " Well seeing as how the suspect is now meat dust , a positive identification would be difficult . "

source: Sonic Corp . is but one-fifth the size of McDonald 's domestic burger business . But , unlike its larger rival , it does n't have to worry about pretending to be health-conscious or luring kids with plastic toys from the latest aniflick . A determinedly retro fast-food organization , the Oklahoma City-based chain of drive-ins still has a stubbornly high-calorie menu delivered by 1950s-style carhops on roller blades . How hard is it to screw up that formula ?

source: You can conduct an elaborate vegetable breeding project with ridiculously little land . For example , Tim Peters recommends the following procedure for tomatoes : Plant about 50 seeds of your first generation in a half-gallon pot of soil . When they come up , select for early emergence and seedling vigor , and eliminate all but about 10 . As the plants grow , remove all suckers and branches , and limit each plant to just one vine . In addition , you may need to leaf-prune -- that is , remove all the older , bigger leaves to keep the plants from shading each other out . When the plants start flowering and have set a few fruits , remove the tops . Then continue to remove all suckers and branches . And pay careful attention to soil fertility . Use good soil initially and fertilize as necessary .
domestication: 要进行蔬菜育种项目，你不需要太多的土地。举个例子，Tim Peters就推荐了一种简易的方法来培育番茄。首先在一个半加仑大小的花盆里种下大约50颗第一代的种子。当它们发芽后，就选择那些长得快、最健壮的幼苗，並且只保留大约10棵，其余的全部淘汰掉。在这些幼苗长大过程中，要把所有的徒长和分支都剪掉，每株植物只允许留一根藤。另外，你可能还需要对叶子进行修剪，也就是移除较老、较大的叶子，以免它们遮挡住彼此的光线。当植物开始开花并结出几颗果实后，就要将它们的顶端剪掉。之后，继续移除所有的徒长和分支，并且要密切注意土壤的肥力。起初要使用好的土壤，並且根据需要进行施肥。这样你就可以成功地进行蔬菜育种了。
foreignization: 您可以在极少的土地上进行精心的蔬菜育种项目。例如，蒂姆·皮特斯（Tim Peters）建议，对于西红柿，按照以下程序进行：将第一代的50颗种子种植在一个半加仑的土壤盆中。当它们长出来后，选择早期萌发和幼苗活力强的种子，并消除除了大约10个以外的所有种子。当植物生长时，去掉所有的徒长枝和树枝，并限制每株植物只有一条藤。在此基础上，您可能还需要进行叶子修剪，即去掉所有较老、较大的叶子，以防止它们之间相互遮荫。当植物开始开花并结出几个果实时，移除顶部的部分。然后继续去掉所有的徒长枝和树枝。此外，还要密切关注土壤肥力，最初使用好的土壤，并根据需要进行施肥。

In addition , you may need to leaf-prune -- that is , remove all the older , bigger leaves to keep the plants from shading each other out . When the plants start flowering and have set a few fruits , remove the tops . Then continue to remove all suckers and branches . And pay careful attention to soil fertility . Use good soil initially and fertilize as necessary .

source: In 1958 Edward Teller , a creator of the hydrogen bomb , suggested using nuclear explosions to dig a harbor near Cape Thompson , Alaska . On a tour of the region , where he stumped for " Project Chariot , " Teller told residents that the explosions would be so precise that they could dig the harbor into the shape of a polar bear .
domestication: 1958年，氢弹的创造者爱德华·泰勒提议使用核爆炸在阿拉斯加州的汤普森角附近挖掘一个港口。在巡视该地区时，泰勒为“查里奥特计划”摇旗呐喊，他告诉居民，核爆炸将如此精确，可以把港口挖成北极熊的形状。虽然听起来有些异想天开，但泰勒的话并不是随口胡说，他真的相信核技术可以改变世界。然而，这个计划最终还是因为种种原因被搁置了。

source: A bicyclist discovered Payton Leutner , 12 , on the side of the road covered in blood . It was May 31 , 2014 , and the young girl had crawled for dear life out of the nearby woods , where she 'd been viciously stabbed 19 times in her arms , her legs , and her torso . She managed to survive , despite suffering major injuries to her vital organs . And she remembered who tried to kill her , leaving her alone amid the trees to bleed to death .
domestication: 一位骑自行车的人发现了12岁的佩顿·洛特纳，倒在路边，浑身是血。这是2014年5月31日，年轻的女孩从附近的树林里爬出来，拼命地想要逃脱，她在手臂、腿和躯干上被残忍地刺了19刀，尽管她遭受了重大的伤害，损伤了重要器官，但还是活下来了。而且她还记得是谁试图杀死她，把她丢在树林中任其出血而死。

source: The Independence is going to spend most of the day in the port of Hilo on the Big Island of Hawaii . The newest island , it still has the active volcanoes of Mauna Loa and Kilauea . I urge all the science chasers in the audience to take the 40-minute drive up to spectacular Volcanoes National Park so they can see the craters .
domestication: 夏威夷号将在夏威夷大岛的希洛港度过大部分时间。大岛是夏威夷最年轻的岛屿，拥有活跃的火山——莫纳洛亚和基拉韦厄。建议所有对科学感兴趣的朋友花40分钟驱车前往壮观的火山国家公园，亲眼目睹火山口的壮丽景色。那里不仅可以看到马纳洛阿火山和基拉韦厄火山，还有许多令人叹为观止的火山地貌。

source: Lorie , however , believes in keeping things simple-so simple , in fact , that he wants to fit the specifications for his universal computer into only 10 to 20 pages of text , which could be distributed via the Web and copied out on paper everywhere , assuring their survival . " Saving one single paper document allows us to save millions of documents around the world , " he says .
domestication: 洛里倒是主张一切从简，他希望将自己那台万能电脑的规格说明书浓缩到仅仅十到二十页的篇幅，以便通过网络传播，并且可以随处打印，这样才能确保它的流传不被中断。他说：“只要保存了一份纸质文件，我们就可以让全世界数以百万计的文件得以流传下去。”
foreignization: 然而，洛里却相信保持简单——事实上如此简单，以至于他想将他的万能计算机的规格塞进仅10到20页的文字，这些文字可以通过网络分发，并在任何地方用纸复制，确保它们的保存。“保存单一份纸质文件使我们能够在世界各地保存数百万份文件，”他说。

source: Gal Pearl , a product manager at the Israeli-based company Better Place , disconnects his electric Renault Fluence from a charge point at his company 's parking lot in Rosh Ha'Ayin . He enters his next destination into the car 's computer- which quickly calculates that the 70 -mile journey is longer than his battery 's charge level will allow . The computer maps out a route that passes a battery switching station operated by Better Place . There , an industrial robot will quickly change the car 's battery for a fully charged one that will last the rest of the trip .
domestication: 以色列公司Better Place的一名产品经理加尔·珀尔正在公司位于Rosh Ha'Ayin的停车场里，他从充电站拔掉了电动雷诺Fluence的插头，然后他在车里的电脑上输入了下一个目的地，电脑很快就计算出了这段70英里的路程超过了电池的容量，于是电脑规划了一条路线，经过Better Place运营的电池换站。在那里，一台工业机器人会快速地更换车辆的电池，换成一个满电的电池，以便完成剩下的行程。这样，加尔·珀尔就能放心地开着车去他的下一个目的地了。
foreignization: Better Place 公司的一名产品经理 Gal Pearl ，将他的电动雷诺Fluence与公司位于Rosh Ha'Ayin的停车场上的充电站断开连接。他在汽车的电脑中输入了下一个目的地——电脑迅速计算出70英里的行程比汽车的电池电量更长。 电脑规划了一条经过由Better Place运营的电池交换站的路线。在那里，一个工业机器人将迅速更换汽车的电池为一个可以持续完成剩余行程的全电量电池。

source: Evolutionary plant biologist David Baum of the University of Wisconsin-Madison suspects that Hsp90 does n't stand alone in this surprising story . He says the Hsp90 findings are " profoundly important " because they show that hidden genetic diversity exists within species and can erupt when conditions change .
domestication: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校的进化植物学家大卫·鲍姆（David Baum）认为，在这个令人惊讶的故事中，Hsp90并不是孤军奋战。他表示，Hsp90的发现“极其重要”，因为它们表明物种内部存在隐藏的基因多样性，并且在环境变化时会突然爆发。这就像那句老话说的，“有备无患”，这些隐藏的基因多样性就像是生态系统的“保险箱”，在关键时刻可以派上用场。

source: Commented Yutani : " My approach as a programmer has always been driven by an empathetic inquisitiveness , a desire to see the world from as many points of view as possible -- and I 'm so excited to collaborate with Cooper and our team , with their myriad strengths and backgrounds , to surface new artists and voices . "
domestication: 如雨后春笋般，随着技术的进步，我们这个行业也变得日新月异。裕谷这样说：“我做程序员这些年，有一件事总是伴随在我身边，那就是以同理心来探究问题，力求从多角度去看待事物。现在能和库珀还有其他团队成员合作，真是如鱼得水，因为我们每个人都有各自的专长和背景，这样才能更好地发现新秀和新声音。”

source: In most areas they found only a hard matrix of mud bricks that had been mortared in place as the pyramid was constructed . In one area near the summit , however , they found a place where the bricks had been removed and subsequently replaced with soil centuries ago . As they began removing the soil , they found eight decomposed wood beams that roofed a small room approximately thirteen feet square . In the center of this room was a large coffin made of wood planks that had been tied together with copper straps .
domestication: 他们在大多数地方只发现了泥砖构成的坚硬基质，这些砖块是在金字塔建造过程中就已经摆放好的。在顶峰附近的一个区域，然而，他们发现了一个地方，那里的砖块曾经被拆除并几个世纪前被土壤取代。当他们开始清除土壤时，他们发现了八根腐烂的木梁，这些木梁覆盖着一个大约十三英尺见方的小房间。在这个房间的中心，有一口木板棺材，用铜带捆绑在一起。总之，他们在这金字塔里发现了一具古尸。
foreignization: 在大多数地区，他们只发现了一种硬质泥砖的混合物，当金字塔建成时，这些砖块就被固定在原位。在顶峰附近的一个区域，然而，他们发现了一个地方，几个世纪前砖块被移除，然后用土壤取代。随着他们开始清除土壤，他们发现八根腐烂的木梁，覆盖在一个大约十三英尺见方的小房间上。在这个房间的中心，有一口由木板制成的大棺材，用铜带绑在一起。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In most areas they found only a hard matrix of mud bricks that had been mortared in place as the pyramid was constructed . In one area near the summit , however , they found a place where the bricks had been removed and subsequently replaced with soil centuries ago . As they began removing the soil , they found eight decomposed wood beams that roofed a small room approximately thirteen feet square . In the center of this room was a large coffin made of wood planks that had been tied together with copper straps .
他们在大多数地方只发现了泥砖构成的坚硬基质，这些砖块是在金字塔建造过程中就已经摆放好的。在顶峰附近的一个区域，然而，他们发现了一个地方，那里的砖块曾经被拆除并几个世纪前被土壤取代。当他们开始清除土壤时，他们发现了八根腐烂的木梁，这些木梁覆盖着一个大约十三英尺见方的小房间。在这个房间的中心，有一口木板棺材，用铜带捆绑在一起。总之，他们在这金字塔里发现了一具古尸。

In most areas they found only a hard matrix of mud bricks that had been mortared in place as the pyramid was constructed . In one area near the summit , however , they found a place where the bricks had been removed and subsequently replaced with soil centuries ago . As they began removing the soil , they found eight decomposed wood beams that roofed a small room approximately thirteen feet square . In the center of this room was a large coffin made of wood planks that had been tied together with copper straps .
在大多数地区，他们只发现了一种硬质泥砖的混合物，当金字塔建成时，这些砖块就被固定在原位。在顶峰附近的一个区域，然而，他们发现了一个地方，几个世纪前砖块被移除，然后用土壤取代。随着他们开始清除土壤，他们发现八根腐烂的木梁，覆盖在一个大约十三英尺见方的小房间上。在这个房间的中心，有一口由木板制成的大棺材，用铜带绑在一起。

source: All this came up recently when I was talking with some serious boat owners at the first Cruisers University in Baltimore 's Inner Harbor , co-sponsored by Motor Boating and our sister publication Cruising World . Time , they universally agreed , is the enemy of safe and comfortable cruising - time , that is , in the sense of timetables , deadlines and hard-and-fast schedules .
domestication: 这件事刚好在巴尔的摩港口举办的第一届巡航大学上被提起，我和一些船主聊天时，他们都同意时间是安全舒适巡航的敌人，所谓的时间，是指那些严格的时间表、最后期限和紧迫的日程安排。说白了，大家都觉得赶时间的时候出了事儿最容易。
foreignization: 所有这些最近在我与一些严肃的船主在巴尔的摩的Inner Harbor举办的第一个Cruisers University上进行的交谈中被提及，这是由Motor Boating和我们的姊妹出版物Cruising World共同赞助的。时间，他们一致同意，是安全和舒适航行的敌人——即时间，在时间表、最后期限和严格的时间表的意义上。

source: But Trump made clear on Monday that his brutishness is a choice . Trump spent the past week explicitly exhibiting his dislike of NATO , the European Union , Angela Merkel , and Theresa May ( the gender of the these last two probably not being a coincidence ) . After the Department of Justice indicted 12 Russians for their meddling in the 2016 election on Friday , Trump has been tweeting constantly about the " witch hunt " and Barack Obama -- all the while praising the Russian president .
domestication: 但川普在星期一表明，他的粗鲁行为是他自己选择的。在过去的一周里，他公开表现出他对北约、欧盟、默克尔和特蕾莎·梅不满，最后两位女性的性别可能不是巧合。在司法部周五起诉12名俄罗斯人干预2016年大选之后，川普一直在不断地在推特上谈论“巫术猎杀”和巴拉克·奥巴马，同时却在赞扬俄罗斯总统。他的行为让人看得很清楚，这一切都是他自己的选择。
foreignization: 但特朗普在星期一表明，他的蛮横是一种选择。在过去的一周里，特朗普明确地表现出他对北约、欧盟、默克尔和特蕾莎·梅不满（最后两位的性别可能并非巧合）。在司法部于周五指控12名俄罗斯人干预2016年大选后，特朗普一直在不断地发推文关于“猎巫行动”和巴拉克·奥巴马——与此同时赞扬俄罗斯总统。

source: Some critics of the letter , who focused on a passage declaring , " we do not support so-called trigger warnings , we do not cancel invited speakers because their topics might prove controversial , and we do not condone the creation of intellectual safe spaces where individuals can retreat from ideas and perspectives at odds with their own , " imagined a different sort of incoming college student as the recipient -- one victimized in some way that causes them to want " safe spaces " and sensitivity .

source: In the July " Hardware Clinic , " Mark Minasi writes , " The white wire connects the hot side of the wall outlet to the power switch ... The black wire connects the return side of the wall outlet to the power switch . " In fact , these connections are the other way around . The black wire is always the hot lead , and the white wire is always the common or return lead . "

source: But tasks that are simple for human hands can be daunting for a robot . When a person grabs an egg from a carton , for instance , tactile information from the hands feeds back to motor-control centers in the brain , which orchestrate the finger muscles to hold the egg without breaking it . Most industrial robots lack such precise feedback and control .
domestication: 但是，对于机器人来说，一些人类做起来很简单的任务可能会变得非常困难。例如，当一个人从纸箱里拿出一个鸡蛋时，手部接收到的触觉信息会反馈给大脑中的运动控制中心，大脑然后指挥手指的肌肉准确地握住鸡蛋而不至于把它弄破。大多数工业机器人缺乏这样的精确反馈和控制，这也使得它们无法像人类那样灵活地完成某些任务。

Most industrial robots lack such precise feedback and control .

source: Westen and Shedler presented their alternative classification system in the February American Journal of Psychiatry . Over the past 7 years , they have refined it for use as a clinical tool to describe patients ' personalities in a quantifiable form . Although the two clinicians probe personality from a psychodynamic , or Freudian-inspired , perspective , psychotherapists of any theoretical persuasion can use the new technique , they add .
domestication: 韦斯滕和谢德勒在2月份的《美国精神病学杂志》上发表了他们的另一种分类系统。在过去的7年里，他们对其进行了改进，以便作为一个临床工具来描述患者的人格以一种可量化的形式。尽管这两位临床医生从一个精神动力学的，也就是受弗洛伊德的理论启发的角度来研究人格，但他们表示任何理论观点的心理治疗师都可以使用这种新技术。他们强调，这种方法不受任何特定心理学流派的限制，所有的心理治疗师都可以根据自己的理论框架来使用。
foreignization: Westen和Shedler在二月份的美国精神病学杂志上提出了他们的替代分类系统。在过去的7年里，他们将其完善为一种临床工具，以可量化的形式描述患者的个性。尽管这两位临床医生从心理动力学或弗洛伊德启发的角度探索个性，但任何理论说服的精神治疗师都可以使用这种新技术，他们补充说。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Westen and Shedler presented their alternative classification system in the February American Journal of Psychiatry . Over the past 7 years , they have refined it for use as a clinical tool to describe patients ' personalities in a quantifiable form . Although the two clinicians probe personality from a psychodynamic , or Freudian-inspired , perspective , psychotherapists of any theoretical persuasion can use the new technique , they add .

Westen and Shedler presented their alternative classification system in the February American Journal of Psychiatry . Over the past 7 years , they have refined it for use as a clinical tool to describe patients ' personalities in a quantifiable form . Although the two clinicians probe personality from a psychodynamic , or Freudian-inspired , perspective , psychotherapists of any theoretical persuasion can use the new technique , they add .
Westen和Shedler在二月份的美国精神病学杂志上提出了他们的替代分类系统。在过去的7年里，他们将其完善为一种临床工具，以可量化的形式描述患者的个性。尽管这两位临床医生从心理动力学或弗洛伊德启发的角度探索个性，但任何理论说服的精神治疗师都可以使用这种新技术，他们补充说。

source: Banks have tightened their lending practices . The Fed 's bank survey found that lenders have upped their standards for credit-card and jumbo mortgages -- they do this by charging premiums above the standard interest rate , reducing how much credit they offer or by forcing borrowers to meet more stringent requirements during underwriting .
domestication: 银行最近加紧了放贷标准。美联储的一项调查发现，贷款机构提高了信用卡和巨额按揭贷款的门槛，比如他们会加收额外利息，减少贷款金额或者要求借款人在审批过程中满足更加严格的条件。这种做法，等于是让借款人为此“多付钱”，并且面临更大的压力。
foreignization: 银行收紧了贷款实践。美联储的银行调查发现，贷款机构提高了信用卡和巨额抵押贷款的标准--它们通过以上标准利率收取溢价、减少提供的信用额度或在承保过程中强迫借款人满足更严格的要求来做到这一点。

source: Whereas Vermeer subtly questioned aesthetic hierarchies , 200 years later , French artist Gustave Courbet aggressively challenged them in L'Atelier . Conceived on the scale of monumental public art -- 12 ' x 20 ' -Courbet 's self-aggrandizing depiction of his Paris atelier makes the modern artist ( Courbet himself ) the hero in the sort of drama previously reserved for religious and historical subjects . Crowded with more than 30 figures of humans and animals , L'Atelier resembles a scene from grand opera , its theatricality emphasized by the symmetrical arrangement of figures on either side of the central group .
domestication: 维米尔在作品中微妙地对审美等级制度提出质疑，而两百年后，法国艺术家古斯塔夫·库尔贝在《画室》中更是大胆挑战了这一体制。《画室》的构思宏伟，尺寸高达12英尺×20英尺，库尔贝在其中将自己描绘成现代艺术英雄，他的画室里有三十多个人和动物，宛如一幕大型歌剧场景。人物们在画中左右对称排列，营造出一种戏剧化的氛围，这更进一步凸显了库尔贝对艺术创作的独特视角。
foreignization: 虽然维米尔微妙地质疑了审美等级制度，但200年后，法国艺术家古斯塔夫·库尔贝在《工作室》中激进地挑战了它们。在巨大的公共艺术尺度上构思的——12英尺×20英尺——库尔贝对他巴黎工作室的自我吹嘘描绘使现代艺术家（库尔贝自己）成为英雄，在此之前，这种戏剧只为宗教和历史主题所保留。《工作室》里挤满了30多个人和动物，类似于一幕大型歌剧场景，其戏剧性由人物在中心群体两侧的对称排列强调。

Crowded with more than 30 figures of humans and animals , L'Atelier resembles a scene from grand opera , its theatricality emphasized by the symmetrical arrangement of figures on either side of the central group .

source: On July 13 , 1946 , Stieglitz died of heart failure , and Dove 's own death occurred just over four months later , on November 22 . Both men left a legacy to American art . For Dove , it was getting at the essence of inner consciousness and external experience -- less a matter of abstraction , he said , than " extraction , gravitation toward a certain direction , and minding your own business . " Against heavy odds he did all these things , and with a fortitude that can only be called heroic .
domestication: 1946年7月13日，史泰格利茨因心力衰竭去世，而杜夫自己的死期也就在四个月后到来，时间是11月22日。两位艺术家都给美国艺术留下了深远的影响。就杜夫而言，他的贡献在于捕捉内在意识和外部体验的本质——他自己这么说，这不仅仅是抽象的问题，而是“提取、向某个方向引导以及做好自己的事情。”尽管面临重重困难，他却坚持了下来，以一种只能被称为英雄般的毅力。杜夫的艺术之路并不平坦，但他始终坚持自己的创作理念，最终成就了一番伟大的事业。他的遗产继续激励着后辈艺术家。
foreignization: 1946年7月13日，史迪格利茨因心脏病去世，而杜夫自己的死亡也仅仅是在四个月后，即11月22日发生的。这两个人都给美国艺术留下了遗产。对于杜夫来说，这是关于内在意识和外部经历的本质——他说，这与其说是一种抽象，不如说是“提取、向某个方向引力以及只管好自己的事”。尽管面临着巨大的困难，但他还是做到了所有这些事情，而且以一种只能被称为英勇的毅力。

For Dove , it was getting at the essence of inner consciousness and external experience -- less a matter of abstraction , he said , than " extraction , gravitation toward a certain direction , and minding your own business . " Against heavy odds he did all these things , and with a fortitude that can only be called heroic .

source: In additional experiments involving human tissue samples , pharmaceutical databases and laboratory animals , the investigators identified a compound , CSRM617 , that counteracted Onecut2 . They showed CSRM617 significantly reduced the size of prostate cancer metastases in mice . " Our research suggested that Onecut2 is a master regulator of lethal prostate cancer that may be a useful therapeutic target in up to a third of patients whose cancer spreads and evades hormone therapy , " Freeman said .
domestication: 在一些额外的实验中，研究人员使用了人类组织样本、药物数据库和实验动物，找到了一个叫做CSRM617的化合物，这个化合物可以对抗Onecut2。在实验中，他们发现CSRM617能够显著减少小鼠前列腺癌转移的大小。研究人员说：“我们的研究表明，Onecut2是致命性前列腺癌的主要调节因子，对于那些癌症扩散并躲避激素治疗的患者来说，这可能是一个有用的治疗靶点，大约占患者总数的三分之一。”

source: Sipan is a small village , located in the central part of the Reque River valley . Near Sipan is an impressive cluster of mud-brick pyramids that rise dramatically out of the intensively cultivated valley floor . In February 1987 local grave robbers digging at the pyramids in search of ancient objects to sell , broke into one of the richest funerary chambers ever found -- the royal tomb of an ancient Moche ruler .
domestication: 西班是位于雷克河谷中心地带的一个小村庄。就在西班附近，有一组令人惊叹的土砖金字塔，它们从这片精耕细作的谷底崛起，如同一座座巨大的自然奇观。1987年二月，一群当地的盗墓贼在这些金字塔中寻找可以出售的古物时，挖出了有史以来最豪华的墓室之一——一位古代莫切统治者的皇家陵墓。这简直就像是在村庄的后院里发现了一个宝藏，这一发现令整个考古界都为之震惊。
foreignization: 西潘是位于雷克河谷中部的一个小村庄。在西潘附近，有一个令人印象深刻的泥砖金字塔群，它们从密集种植的山谷地面上戏剧性地升起。 1987年2月，當地的盗墓贼在金字塔挖掘古物出售時，闖入了有史以来发现的最富有的殡葬室之一——一位古代莫切统治者的皇家陵墓。

source: But in the unforgiving isolation of the field , Willenbring said she experienced a very different reality than the one painted by Marchant 's acolytes . Her first Antarctic expedition on his team took place in December of 1999 , when she was a 22-year-old master 's student . source: Financial Tax-Free Income . Financial 's William Veronda , 44 , the $185 million no-load 's manager since 1984 , has made money betting on interest rates . By lengthening the maturities in his high-grade portfolio to 24 years and loading up on highly rate-sensitive discount bonds ( those selling for less than their face value ) , Veronda capitalized on falling interest rates over the past five years to rack up a market-beating total return of 70% . The drawback : a volatility among the highest in its class .
domestication: “金融”杂志的威廉·维隆达（William Veronda），今年44岁，从1984年开始管理着一只规模达到1.85亿美元的不收费用（no-load）的基金，他在打赌利率上赚了不少钱。通过将其高级投资组合的期限延长到24年，并大量购买了极度依赖利率的折价债券（面值折扣的债券），维隆达在过去五年里抓住了利率下降的机会，取得了超过市场平均水平的总收益——70%。当然，这笔交易是有风险的：这种基金的波动性在同类基金中是最高的。
foreignization: 金融无税收入。金融的威廉·维隆达，44岁，是自1984年以来1850万美元无负载基金的经理，他通过押注利率赚了钱。通过将其高级投资组合的到期时间延长至24年，并大量购买高敏感性折扣债券（以低于面值出售的债券），维隆达在过去五年中利用下降的利率获得了比市场高70％的总回报。缺点：同类产品中波动性最高。

source: On OctOber 3 , 2008 , President George W. Bush signed the Troubled Asset Relief Program bill into law , delivering $450 billion to failing banks on the premise that it would prevent their collapse and stimulate a faltering economy . Like millions of Americans , Dmitri Williams , an associate professor of communications at the University of Southern California , found TARP troubling- not because the bill provided too much or ( as many economists argued ) too little , but because it was unscientific . " We did a half-a-trillion-dollar experiment with the economy and had no control group , " he says . Setting up a test bed for a program as complex as TARP might be difficult , but it was n't impossible . Williams had found just such a petri dish in videogames .
domestication: 2008年10月3日，美国总统乔治·W·布什签署了问题资产救助计划（TARP），向陷入困境的银行提供4500亿美元，理由是这将防止他们破产并刺激疲弱的经济。像数百万美国人一样，南加州大学传播学副教授德米特里·威廉姆斯发现TARP很令人担忧——这不是因为该法案提供了太多或（正如许多经济学家所认为的）太少，而是因为它不科学。他说：“我们对经济进行了价值5000亿美元的实验，却没有对照组。”为像TARP这样复杂的计划建立一个测试环境可能很困难，但并非不可能。威廉姆斯在电子游戏中找到了这样一个实验室。
foreignization: 2008 年 10 月 3 日，总统乔治 · 布什（George W. Bush）签署了问题资产救济计划法案，将 4500 亿美元交付给濒临破产的银行，以防止它们倒闭并刺激停滞的经济。与美国数百万人一样，南加州大学传播学副教授德米特里 · 威廉姆斯（Dmitri Williams）认为 TARP 让人担忧 —— 不是因为该法案提供的资金太多或（正如许多经济学家认为的那样）太少，而是它不科学。“我们用经济进行了一场价值半万亿美元的实验，却没有控制组”，他说。设置像 TARP 这样复杂的程序的测试平台可能很困难，但这并非不可能。威廉姆斯在电子游戏中发现了这样一个培养皿。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On OctOber 3 , 2008 , President George W. Bush signed the Troubled Asset Relief Program bill into law , delivering $450 billion to failing banks on the premise that it would prevent their collapse and stimulate a faltering economy . Like millions of Americans , Dmitri Williams , an associate professor of communications at the University of Southern California , found TARP troubling- not because the bill provided too much or ( as many economists argued ) too little , but because it was unscientific . " We did a half-a-trillion-dollar experiment with the economy and had no control group , " he says . Setting up a test bed for a program as complex as TARP might be difficult , but it was n't impossible . Williams had found just such a petri dish in videogames .

On OctOber 3 , 2008 , President George W. Bush signed the Troubled Asset Relief Program bill into law , delivering $450 billion to failing banks on the premise that it would prevent their collapse and stimulate a faltering economy . Like millions of Americans , Dmitri Williams , an associate professor of communications at the University of Southern California , found TARP troubling- not because the bill provided too much or ( as many economists argued ) too little , but because it was unscientific . " We did a half-a-trillion-dollar experiment with the economy and had no control group , " he says . Setting up a test bed for a program as complex as TARP might be difficult , but it was n't impossible . Williams had found just such a petri dish in videogames .

2008 年 10 月 3 日，总统乔治 · 布什（George W. Bush）签署了问题资产救济计划法案，将 4500 亿美元交付给濒临破产的银行，以防止它们倒闭并刺激停滞的经济。与美国数百万人一样，南加州大学传播学副教授德米特里 · 威廉姆斯（Dmitri Williams）认为 TARP 让人担忧 —— 不是因为该法案提供的资金太多或（正如许多经济学家认为的那样）太少，而是它不科学。“我们用经济进行了一场价值半万亿美元的实验，却没有控制组”，他说。设置像 TARP 这样复杂的程序的测试平台可能很困难，但这并非不可能。威廉姆斯在电子游戏中发现了这样一个培养皿。

source: If you look at the front-panel switch , you 'll see four spade lugs where you can connect or disconnect the white , black , brown , and blue wires . You 'll notice a very low ridge on the connector and two spade lugs on either side of the ridge . Before disconnecting the wires from the switch , notice that the black and the blue are on one side of the ridge and the white and the brown are on the other side . The ridge is just a reminder about which wires go with which other wires . Just keep the white and the brown on one side and the black and the blue on the other side , and all will be well . The way I remember it is that one side is black and blue .
domestication: 如果你仔细看看面板上的开关，你会看到四个可以连接或断开白色、黑色、棕色和蓝色电线的插孔。在插座上你会发现一个非常低的边缘和两个位于边缘两侧的插孔。在断开电线与开关的连接之前，请注意黑色和蓝色电线位于边缘的一侧，而白色和棕色电线则位于另一侧。这个边缘只是一个提示，提醒你哪些电线应该与哪些其他电线配对。只要记得将白色和棕色电线放在一侧，将黑色和蓝色电线放在另一侧，一切都会没问题。我的记忆方法是，一侧是黑色和蓝色。这样可以轻松记住电线的对应关系，避免连接错误。

source: But the rhyme processor in his mind has n't stopped working . He has songs in his head . " I got six or seven good ones and a bunch of other silly ideas , " he says , " but six or seven that could go tomorrow . " He builds on and remembers these songs by rhyming when he showers : " Every day , every shower . "
domestication: 不过，他脑子里的韵律处理器仍然在不停地运转。他脑海中总是有歌曲在播放。“我有六七首还不错的歌，以及一堆其他傻乎乎的点子，”他说，“但至少六七首歌可以马上用。”他喜欢在洗澡的时候用押韵来编写和记忆这些歌：“每天，每次洗澡。”

source: When pending changes to Montana 's stream-access laws led to a debate over fishing access , Crawford made it clear which side of the fence he was on . The rancher , who lives on the East Gallatin River , installed a gate on his property and put up a sign : WELCOME ANGLERS . Crawford continued in his championing of public access in 2009 after a 2.5-acre parcel in Logan came on the market . He bought the property and then donated it , part to Montana Fish , Wildlife and Parks and part to the American Legion . Besides adding a takeout halfway between two existing access points , the site will serve as a wheelchair-friendly " fishing park " for disabled veterans .
domestication: 蒙大拿州关于河流使用权的法律修改引发了围绕钓鱼许可权的争论，克劳福德明确表明了自己的立场。他在自己位于伊斯特加拉廷河畔的牧场入口处安装了一道门，还挂出了一个牌子，上面欢迎垂钓者。2009年，在洛根有一块2.5英亩的土地待售时，克劳福德继续推动公共使用权的事业。他买下这块地，然后捐赠给蒙大拿州渔业、野生动物和公园管理局和美国军人协会的一部分。不仅增加了两个现有通道之间的中点，还将建立一个供残疾退伍军人使用的轮椅友好型"钓鱼公园"。
foreignization: 当蒙大拿州的溪流通行法的变动引发了关于钓鱼通行权的争论时，克劳福德明确表明了他所站的立场。这位住在伊斯特盖拉廷河畔（East Gallatin River）的牧场主，在他的土地上安装了一道门，并挂上了一个牌子：欢迎垂钓者（WELCOME ANGLERS）。2009年，在洛根（Logan）有一块2.5英亩的土地要出售时，克劳福德继续支持公共通行权。他买下了这块土地，然后将其捐出，一部分给蒙大拿鱼类、野生动物和公园管理局（Montana Fish, Wildlife and Parks），另一部分给美国军团（American Legion）。除了在两个现有通行点之间增加一个下车点外，这个地点还将作为一座供残障退伍军人使用的轮椅友好型“钓鱼公园”。

When pending changes to Montana 's stream-access laws led to a debate over fishing access , Crawford made it clear which side of the fence he was on . The rancher , who lives on the East Gallatin River , installed a gate on his property and put up a sign : WELCOME ANGLERS . Crawford continued in his championing of public access in 2009 after a 2.5-acre parcel in Logan came on the market . He bought the property and then donated it , part to Montana Fish , Wildlife and Parks and part to the American Legion . Besides adding a takeout halfway between two existing access points , the site will serve as a wheelchair-friendly " fishing park " for disabled veterans .

source: LITTLE PATIENTS In a medical CT scan , X rays pass through tissue at a series of different angles , and a computer analyzes the X rays ' subsequent locations and intensities to generate images of thin slices of the body . The computer then combines the data on a multitude of slices to produce a 3-dimensional view of inner anatomy .
domestication: 小患者们在进行医疗CT扫描时，X光线会从不同的角度穿过身体组织，然后电脑分析这些X光线的位置和强度，生成身体薄片的图像。电脑接着把这些薄片的数据结合起来，产生出一个三维的内脏结构图。这样一来，医生就能清清楚楚地看到人体内部的情况了，不是很神奇吗？
foreignization: 小患者 在医疗CT扫描中，X射线从不同角度穿过组织，然后计算机分析X射线的随后位置和强度以生成身体薄切片的图像。 然后计算机将多个切片的数据结合起来，产生内部解剖结构的三维视图。

source: Robert Sobel loved police work , too . Sobel , now 49 , was a member of an elite narcotics unit in the L.A. Sheriff 's Department from 1987 to 1989 , when federal prosecutors nabbed him and some of his fellow detectives in a $30,000 sting . Since then , 27 former deputies have been convicted on various charges and dozens of others have been forced to retire . Sobel says his unit contained 124 people , and this case knocked down about 45 . If there 's two or three guys , that 's corruption . But when a third of the unit goes down . . . we 're talking about institutional corruption . '
domestication: 罗伯特·索贝尔也热爱警察工作。在他49岁那年，他曾是洛杉矶警长部门的一个精英缉毒队的成员，从1987年到1989年，直到联邦检察官抓获了他和一些他的同事侦探，并揭露了一个价值3万美元的贿赂案。从那时起，已经有27名前警员被判定犯有各种罪行，几十名其他人被迫退休。索贝尔说，他所在的单位有124个人，这个案件导致其中大约45人受到牵连。如果只有两三个家伙涉案，那就是腐败。但是，当单位的三分之一的人都受到牵连时...我们说的就不仅仅是个人腐败，而是整个体制的腐败了。
foreignization: 罗伯特·索贝尔（Robert Sobel）也热爱警务工作。现年49岁的索贝尔，从1987年到1989年，曾是洛杉矶警长部门精锐的缉毒小组成员，当时联邦检察官用30000美元的诱捕行动抓获了他和其他一些侦探。从那以后，已有27名前警员被判定犯有各种罪行，并且几十名警员被迫退休。索贝尔说，他所在的单位共有124人，这次事件导致其中约45人受到牵连。如果仅仅是两三个家伙（涉案），那是腐败。但是当单位的三分之一的人都被牵连进来......我们要讨论的是体制性的腐败。

But when a third of the unit goes down . . . we 're talking about institutional corruption . '

source: In the old days the Inns provided all the legal instruction necessary , not in formal classes but by continual contact between students and their learned elders , mostly in the great communal dining rooms , listening and talking about cases and precedents while the claret and the port went round . A student who was judged to have soaked up enough learning after a few years was summoned to step up to the Bar , which was originally a wooden barrier marking off the part of the hall reserved for the exclusive use of " the benchers , " or senior members of the Inn . From that moment on , the candidate was authorized to practice before the higher courts of England and Wales .
domestication: 过去，职业学院为学生提供了所有必要的法律培训，但并非通过正式的课堂授课，而是通过学生与他们的前辈之间持续的接触，主要是在大型公共餐厅里，边喝着红葡萄酒和波特酒，边倾听和讨论案件和先例。经过几年后，被认为已经学得足够多的学生会被召唤到“律师资格考试”，这最初是一个木制的屏障，用来标记大会堂中专门为学院资深成员（称为“benchers”）保留的部分。从那一刻起，候选人获得了在英格兰和威尔士的高等法院出庭辩护的资格。

source: In tap , you wear shoes that have metal plates attached to the heel and forefoot ; these make a percussive sound when you rhythmically touch or stomp on the floor . Compared with other dance styles , there 's less coordination between your arms and legs and only a little hip action , so tap dancing is actually easier than it looks .
domestication: 在踢踏舞中，你会穿着带有金属板的鞋子，这些金属板被附着在脚跟和脚尖。当你用节奏感地拍打或跺地时，金属板会发出清脆的声音。与其他舞蹈风格相比，踢踏舞对手臂和腿部的协调性要求较低，仅需稍微动动臀部，所以实际上比看起来容易得多。关键是找到节奏，感受音乐的律动，一旦掌握了基本的拍子和步法，你就能轻松地“出招”了。
foreignization: 在踢踏舞中，你穿着在鞋跟和脚前部附有金属板的鞋子；当你按节奏地敲击或跺地板时，它们会发出有节奏的敲击声。与其他舞蹈风格相比，手臂和腿之间的协调性较差，只有很少的髋部动作，所以踢踏舞实际上比看起来容易。

source: The best regimen of hair care , even if you exercise vigorously , is to shampoo once a day using a pH-balanced shampoo . " Especially if your hair is fine or damaged from too many chemical processes , cleansing too frequently can be damaging . Your natural oils offer important protection to your hair shaft , " says Dr. Caserio . " If you strip too many of them out by shampooing , you create excessive dryness , which , in turn , eventually causes breakage . "
domestication: 保养头发最好的方法，即使你每天都运动得很辛苦，也是每天用一次平衡的洗发水洗头。特别是如果你的头发很细或者因为做了太多化妆而受损，每天洗头可能会伤害到头发。凯西里奥博士说：“你的自然油脂能保护你的头发，如果你洗掉太多的油脂，就会导致头发干燥，久而久之就会造成断发。”所以，还是少洗头为好，保持头发的自然油脂，这样才能让头发保持健康和强壮。
foreignization: 即使您剧烈运动，护发的最佳方法也是每天使用平衡pH值的洗发水洗一次头发。“尤其是如果您的头发很细或由于化学处理过多而受损，过于频繁的清洁可能会造成伤害，”卡塞里奥博士说：“您头发中的天然油脂能为您的头发提供重要的保护。如果您通过洗发水洗掉太多，您会产生过度干燥，这反过来，最终会引起断发。”

The best regimen of hair care , even if you exercise vigorously , is to shampoo once a day using a pH-balanced shampoo . " Especially if your hair is fine or damaged from too many chemical processes , cleansing too frequently can be damaging . Your natural oils offer important protection to your hair shaft , " says Dr. Caserio . " If you strip too many of them out by shampooing , you create excessive dryness , which , in turn , eventually causes breakage . "

source: Tesla highlighted preventative measures it takes to counter racial discrimination in the workplace , such as compulsory anti-discrimination courses , regular in-person spot training sessions upon the submission of an allegation or complaint , as well as a dedicated team that is focused on " investigating workplace concerns , recommending corrective actions and assisting managers with implementing those actions . "
domestication: 特斯拉强调了公司为防止职场种族歧视而采取的预防措施，比如强制性的反歧视课程，以及针对任何投诉或举报进行的定期面对面培训。此外，特斯拉还有专门的团队负责“调查职场问题，提出改正措施，并协助管理人员实施这些措施”，这一系列举措都是为了营造一个公平和包容的工作环境。

source: " There is no way to adequately express the immense sense of loss that we all feel with this news , " PGA Tour commissioner Tim Finchem said in a statement to tour members . " It is not an exaggeration to say there would be no modern-day PGA Tour without Arnold Palmer . There would be no PGA Tour Champions without Arnold Palmer . There would be no Golf Channel without Arnold Palmer . ... The fact that his popularity never waned more than a quarter-century after his last competitive victory speaks volumes to the man , the icon and the legendary figure he was . "

“我们无法用语言来充分表达我们在听到这个消息时所感受到的巨大失落感，”PGA巡回赛专员蒂姆·芬奇姆在致巡回赛成员的声明中说。“没有阿诺德·帕尔默就不会有现代PGA巡回赛，没有阿诺德·帕尔默就不会有PGA巡回赛冠军，没有阿诺德·帕尔默就不会有高尔夫频道……他在最后一次比赛胜利超过四分之一世纪后依然保持着人气，这充分说明了他是一个什么样的人，他是一个偶像和一个传奇人物。”

source: The art movement 's 2009 centennial brought a rash of retrospectives to Italy and elsewhere . The biggest-ever American exhibition is scheduled to open at the Guggenheim in 2014 . source: In the late 1970s , a television series based on the popular comic book The Incredible Hulk became a surprise hit . The comic related the adventures of a scientist who studied the effect of radiation on physical strength . After a freak accident in a nuclear reactor , the researcher would temporarily transform into a gigantic , green monster with incredible strength-the Hulk-whenever he experienced stress . The clothes-ripping , skin-coloring transformation of the scrawny scientist into the Hulk was an amusing staple of every episode of the television show .
domestication: 在20世纪70年代末，一部基于流行漫画《不可思议的绿巨人》的电视剧突然走红。这部漫画讲述了一个科学家研究辐射对体力影响的冒险故事。在核反应堆中发生的一起意外事故后，每当这位科学家感到压力时，他就会暂时变成一个体型巨大、皮肤绿色的怪物—— 绿巨人。 这位瘦小的科学家衣衫尽裂、皮肤变绿的变化是电视剧每一集都令人捧腹的桥段。

source: The flimsy and transparently specious argument Republicans offered was : " Let the people decide . " Of course , the people decided when they elected Obama to a second four-year term . And about 3 million more Americans decided they preferred Obama have a Democratic successor rather than Trump make this appointment . Those who value an independent judiciary , and a Senate committed to democracy , can fix this constitutional problem by insisting on Merrick Garland 's appointment to the seat he already should be occupying . The pick after that can belong to President Trump .
domestication: 共和党拿出一个十分牵强的借口，认为应该“让人民决定”。当然，人民已经在选举奥巴马连任时做出了决定。另外还有大约300万美国人选择了希望民主党继承人而不是特朗普来做这个任命。那些珍视独立司法和参议院致力于民主的人，可以通过坚持梅里克·加兰应占据的席位来解决这个宪法问题。之后的任命可以交给特朗普总统。
foreignization: 共和党人提出的薄弱和明显的借口是：“让人民决定。”当然，人民在选举奥巴马第二个四年任期时已经做出了决定。而大约300万美国人决定他们更希望奥巴马有一个民主党继任者，而不是特朗普来做出这个任命。那些重视独立司法机构和致力于民主的参议院的人，可以通过坚持梅里克·加兰德任命该职位（他本应该担任该职位）来解决这个宪法问题。之后的选择可以归于特朗普总统。

The flimsy and transparently specious argument Republicans offered was : " Let the people decide . " Of course , the people decided when they elected Obama to a second four-year term . And about 3 million more Americans decided they preferred Obama have a Democratic successor rather than Trump make this appointment . Those who value an independent judiciary , and a Senate committed to democracy , can fix this constitutional problem by insisting on Merrick Garland 's appointment to the seat he already should be occupying . The pick after that can belong to President Trump .

source: Walker 's parents had not heard a word from their son after he left the madrasa at Bannu in May 2001 . Marilyn had written her son , " I really need to hear your voice , " but she got no answer . Frank came up with an elaborate rationale for his son 's silence : under Islamic custom , John would have to obey his father , so he never asked for permission before joining up with the Taliban . After September 11 , Frank and Marilyn were worried sick ; Frank began visiting mosques in the San Francisco area , showing a photo of his son in full Islamic dress . Lindh says he dreaded the worst . " I would look at the moon and just wonder if John was somewhere seeing it , too , " he says . " I did n't have the sense that he was . "
domestication: 约翰离开巴努的伊斯兰学校后，他的父母就再也没有收到过他的消息。他的母亲玛丽莲给他写信说：“我真的需要听到你的声音”，但她没有得到任何回应。他的父亲弗兰克找了个理由来解释儿子的沉默：按照伊斯兰习俗，约翰必须听从父亲的话，所以他没有经过同意就加入塔利班是理所当然的。在911事件之后，弗兰克和玛丽莲都非常担心；弗兰克开始在旧金山地区的清真寺拜访，拿着约翰穿着伊斯兰服装的照片。林德说他担心得要命。“我抬头看月亮，就想知道约翰是否也在某个地方看到它，”他说。“我感觉不到他的存在。”
foreignization: 沃克的父母在2001年5月他离开班努的伊斯兰学校后就再也没有收到儿子任何消息。 玛丽莲给她的儿子写信说，“我真的需要听到你的声音”，但她没有得到任何回应。 弗兰克想出了一个复杂的理由来解释儿子的沉默：根据伊斯兰习俗，约翰将不得不服从他的父亲，所以他在加入塔利班之前从未询问过许可。 9月11日之后，弗兰克和玛丽莲非常担心；弗兰克开始访问旧金山地区的清真寺，并展示他穿着伊斯兰全套服装的儿子的照片。 林德说，他害怕最坏的情况。 “我会看着月亮，只是想知道约翰是否在某个地方看到它，”他说。“我感觉他没有。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Walker 's parents had not heard a word from their son after he left the madrasa at Bannu in May 2001 . Marilyn had written her son , " I really need to hear your voice , " but she got no answer . Frank came up with an elaborate rationale for his son 's silence : under Islamic custom , John would have to obey his father , so he never asked for permission before joining up with the Taliban . After September 11 , Frank and Marilyn were worried sick ; Frank began visiting mosques in the San Francisco area , showing a photo of his son in full Islamic dress . Lindh says he dreaded the worst . " I would look at the moon and just wonder if John was somewhere seeing it , too , " he says . " I did n't have the sense that he was . "

source: The first show was in the Annenberg Theatre at the University of Pennsylvania . And while I was live onstage , the information went back and forth over high-speed fiber lines to the two Onyx computers in Los Angeles . source: Consistent with most of the other approaches is to reduce regulatory obstacles to the exploration and production of energy . If ANWR continues to be off-limits , then the government could open up areas in the lower 48 states that , at present , are not accessible . Likewise , if exploration and production on the outer Continental Shelf off the coasts of Florida and California continue to be prohibited , then production could be expanded from existing platforms in the Gulf of Mexico and elsewhere .
domestication: 为了增加能源的勘探和生产，大家有一个共同的想法，就是减少监管障碍。如果阿拉斯加北部荒野地区继续被禁止开采，那么政府可以开放美国其他地区现在还没开采的区域。同样，如果佛罗里达州和加利福尼亚州沿海的外大陆架仍然禁止勘探和生产，那么可以通过扩建墨西哥湾和其他地方现有的平台来增加产量。这都是为了找到替代方案，以满足能源需求。
foreignization: 与大多数其他方法一致的是，减少对能源勘探和生产的监管障碍。如果ANWR继续被限制， 那么政府可以开放现在无法进入的下48个州的区域。同样，如果佛罗里达州和加利福尼亚州海岸外大陆架的勘探和生产继续被禁止，那么墨西哥湾和其他地区现有平台的生产可以扩大。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Consistent with most of the other approaches is to reduce regulatory obstacles to the exploration and production of energy . If ANWR continues to be off-limits , then the government could open up areas in the lower 48 states that , at present , are not accessible . Likewise , if exploration and production on the outer Continental Shelf off the coasts of Florida and California continue to be prohibited , then production could be expanded from existing platforms in the Gulf of Mexico and elsewhere .
为了增加能源的勘探和生产，大家有一个共同的想法，就是减少监管障碍。如果阿拉斯加北部荒野地区继续被禁止开采，那么政府可以开放美国其他地区现在还没开采的区域。同样，如果佛罗里达州和加利福尼亚州沿海的外大陆架仍然禁止勘探和生产，那么可以通过扩建墨西哥湾和其他地方现有的平台来增加产量。这都是为了找到替代方案，以满足能源需求。

messages_foreignization.content:

Likewise , if exploration and production on the outer Continental Shelf off the coasts of Florida and California continue to be prohibited , then production could be expanded from existing platforms in the Gulf of Mexico and elsewhere .
与大多数其他方法一致的是，减少对能源勘探和生产的监管障碍。如果ANWR继续被限制， 那么政府可以开放现在无法进入的下48个州的区域。同样，如果佛罗里达州和加利福尼亚州海岸外大陆架的勘探和生产继续被禁止，那么墨西哥湾和其他地区现有平台的生产可以扩大。

source: " We know how to run the present U. S. economy on one-fifth the oil we are now using , " says energy expert and Rocky Mountain Institute founder Amory Lovins . The efficiency improvements Lovins is talking about would cut demand at a cost of about $5 per barrel of oil saved . The oil that Bush would wrest from Alaska would run three to seven times more per barrel , not even considering the devastation of the Arctic Wildlife Refuge .

source: Columbus met only a small number of them after he had successfully navigated the Ocean Sea , as the Atlantic was then known . His disclosure of their existence baffled Renaissance Europe but eventually led to knowledge of an entire new hemisphere . The Genoese mariner made the announcement of his triumphant crossing in a letter addressed to his Spanish patrons , King Ferdinand and Queen Isabella . He declared that he had " found very many islands filled with people without number , and of them all I have taken possession for their Highnesses , by proclamation and with the royal standard displayed , and nobody objected . " This arrogant usurpation was wholly in line with Europe 's determination to expand its ordained and Christian world .
domestication: 哥伦布横渡大西洋后，就遇到了少数几个美洲原住民，当时人们称大西洋为“海洋”。他向欧洲人揭露了美洲原住民的存在，这让当时的欧洲人百思不得其解，但最终却让欧洲人了解到一个全新的半球。热那亚水手向他的西班牙赞助人——国王斐迪南和伊莎贝拉女王——写了一封信，宣布了他横渡大西洋的胜利。他声称自己“发现了许多充满无数人的岛屿，我已经以他们的名义宣称拥有这些岛屿，并在皇家旗帜的飘扬下宣告，没有人表示异议。”这种傲慢的夺取完全符合欧洲扩张其既定和基督教世界的决心。欧洲人认为自己有权利去占领和统治新发现的土地和人民，而美洲原住民则被视为需要被“文明化”和“基督教化”的“异教徒”。

source: Renewed growth . Rochester 's turnaround has been less dramatic , but it is happening . A new Blue Cross Blue Shield tower is on the drawing board , and a new addition to Rochester 's grand old library is currently underway . Gannett , which publishes the city 's two papers , is building a new printing plant . There 's a new minor-league baseball stadium , and Tops Friendly Markets , a grocery chain based in Buffalo , recently agreed to build stores in some run-down neighborhoods . The most dramatic growth seems to be in the better-off suburbs , however , with an abundance of new development and construction . " There 's a lot of purchasing power in this community , a lot of wealth on the southeast side , " says Kent Gardner . " I see the community as very stable . "
domestication: 罗彻斯特这座城市转型的步伐虽然不如其他城市那么夸张，但毕竟是在前进。蓝十字蓝盾保险公司的新大楼已经在规划中，而市立图书馆也正在进行扩建。出版城市两份报纸的甘尼特公司正在兴建一家新的印刷厂。这里还有一座新的小联盟棒球场，来自布法罗的友好超市连锁店托普斯也刚刚同意在一些破旧社区建造新店面。但是，最蓬勃发展的区域似乎还是那些富裕的郊区，到处都在修建新的建筑和基础设施。肯·加德纳说：“这个社区拥有很强的购买力，东南部地区非常富裕，我认为这个社区非常稳定。”
foreignization: 复苏的增长。罗切斯特的转变则不那么戏剧化，但确实正在发生。一座新的蓝十字蓝盾公司大楼正在规划中，而对罗切斯特这座宏伟的老图书馆的扩建目前正在进行中。出版该市两份报纸的甘尼特公司正在建设一个新的印刷厂。有一座新的小联盟棒球场，位于布法罗的杂货连锁店Tops Friendly Markets最近同意在一些破旧社区建造商店。然而，最显著的增长似乎出现在较富裕的郊区，有大量的新开发和建筑。“这个社区有很强的购买力，东南部有很多财富，”肯特·加德纳说。“我认为这个社区非常稳定。”

source: " The first thing that struck me about this animal is the incredible robustness of the limb bones , " said lead author Dr. Blair McPhee in a statement . " It was of similar size to the gigantic sauropod dinosaurs , but whereas the arms and legs of those animals are typically quite slender , Ledumahadi 's are incredibly thick . "
domestication: 一开始，研究团队就注意到了这只动物的四肢骨骼异常粗壮。跟巨型蜥脚类恐龙相比，Ledumahadi身材差不多，但它的四肢骨头却出奇地粗壮，而那些蜥脚类恐龙的四肢骨头通常都很细长。这可真是个大块头！
foreignization: “这种动物给我留下的第一印象就是其肢体骨骼的不可思议的强壮性，”论文第一作者布莱尔·麦克菲博士在一份声明中表示。“它与巨型龙的大小相似，但这些动物的臂和腿通常相当细长，而 Ledumahadi 的却非常粗壮。”

source: Making the most of that chance , however , is a complicated business , requiring both manual labor and advanced research and analytical techniques . Crabtree and his team of volunteers and paid workers will spend hours tracking coyotes with radio transmitters , watching them through binoculars , collecting coyote scats to determine the animals ' population density and diet , and mapping the creatures ' sovereign territories .
domestication: 不过，要好好利用这个机会却是件麻烦事，一方面需要体力劳动，另一方面还得依靠先进的研究和分析技术。克拉布特里和他的团队，包括志愿者和雇佣工人，将会花费大量时间跟踪带有无线电发射器的郊狼，通过双筒望远镜观察它们，收集郊狼的粪便以确定动物的种群密度和饮食，并绘制这些生物的势力范围地图。这样才能更多地了解这些郊狼的习性。
foreignization: 然而，要充分利用这一机会却是一件复杂的事，需要手工劳动和先进的研究以及分析技术。Crabtree 和他的志愿者和雇佣工人团队将花费数小时跟踪带有无线电发射器的郊狼，通过双筒望远镜观察它们，收集郊狼粪便以确定动物的种群密度和饮食，并绘制生物的主权领地。

source: WHEN Lonnie Alfred ( Bo ) Pilgrim was a young boy and wanted a Coke , his father , who ran the general store in the northeast Texas hamlet of Pine , would first make him sell six Cokes for a nickel apiece to the men working the nearby cotton gin . In 1939 , when Bo was 11 , his father died suddenly of a heart attack , leaving a widow , seven children and a deeply indebted store . Bo went to work as a farmhand . He later peddled newspapers , raised chickens and hogs , hauled gravel , picked peas and cotton and sacked groceries -- all before he turned 18 .
domestication: 年轻时的 Lonnie Alfred ( Bo ) Pilgrim 想喝可乐， 他爹就让他先给附近纺织厂的工人卖六罐可乐，每罐五分钱。1939年，Bo才11岁，他爹就猝死了，留下了他妈和七个孩子，还有一个负债累累的杂货店。Bo就去农场打工，后来又卖报纸、养鸡养猪、运沙子、摘豌豆和棉花，还给杂货店装袋——这一切都是在他18岁之前完成的。可以说，Bo从小就很能拼命。

source: I read all the time , and one of the many things I read , the summer after my first year at college , was The Jungle Kids , a paperback collection of short stories by Evan Hunter . A couple of years previously Hunter had hit the best-seller list with The Blackboard Jungle , and the stories were all about what were then called juvenile delinquents . ( I do n't know what you 'd call them now . Kids , I guess . )

source: To insulate his company from those cycles , Pilgrim decided in 1986 to plow his surging earnings into the prepared chicken market . Prepared chicken is closer to a finished , ready-to-eat product . It is sold to supermarkets and to food service customers -- wholesale distributors like Sysco and Kraft General Foods ( which resell it to restaurants , hospitals and the like ) and fast-food chains . Unlike commodity chicken , prepared chicken sells mostly on a cost-plus basis .
domestication: 为了避免公司受周期波动的影响，1986年皮尔格林决定将公司利润投入到熟食鸡市场。熟食鸡更接近成品，几乎可以直接食用，主要卖给超市和食品服务商，比如Sysco和Kraft General Foods，它们再转卖给餐厅、医院等单位以及快餐连锁店。与散养鸡不同，熟食鸡的销售更多是按照加价销售，也就是说卖家在成本基础上加上一部分费用就可以了。这样一来，公司的利润就能得到保障。
foreignization: 为了使他的公司不受这些周期的影响，Pilgrim于1986年决定将他的利润投入到预制鸡肉市场中。预制鸡肉更接近成品，可以直接食用的产品。它被卖给超市和食品服务客户--批发分销商，如Sysco和Kraft General Foods（他们将其转卖给餐厅、医院等）和快餐连锁店。与大宗鸡肉不同，预制鸡肉主要是按照加价方式销售。

Unlike commodity chicken , prepared chicken sells mostly on a cost-plus basis .

source: FOUR YEARS ON , I FIND IT IMPOSSIBLE TO DESCRIBE WHAT IT 'S like . I could say it 's like being water-boarded , or listening to nails on a chalkboard . I could say it 's like any number of things people use to describe something unbearable . Except it is n't really like that . It is n't really like anything except what it is . It 's a thing that 's impossible to recall with anything like the discomfort one experiences when it 's happening .
domestication: 四年过去了，我还是无法用语言描述那种感觉。有人说就像被水刑一样，有人说就像听指甲划黑板的声音。也有人说就像其他种种难以忍受的事情。但是，它跟这些都不一样。它只是它自己，独一无二的痛苦。这种痛苦很难回忆，因为当它发生时，你会感到极度不适，这种不适感很难在事后重现。可以说，那是一种刻骨铭心的痛苦，让人永远难忘。
foreignization: 四年过去了，我发现我无法描述它是什么样的。我可以说这就像遭受水刑，或是听着指甲划黑板的声音。我可以说这就像人们用来描述某些无法忍受的事情的任何其他东西。除了它实际上并不是那样。它实际上与任何事物都不一样，除了它本身。它是一件当它发生时不可能用类似于所经历的不适感来回忆起来的事情。

I could say it 's like any number of things people use to describe something unbearable . Except it is n't really like that . It is n't really like anything except what it is . It 's a thing that 's impossible to recall with anything like the discomfort one experiences when it 's happening .
四年过去了，我还是无法用语言描述那种感觉。有人说就像被水刑一样，有人说就像听指甲划黑板的声音。也有人说就像其他种种难以忍受的事情。但是，它跟这些都不一样。它只是它自己，独一无二的痛苦。这种痛苦很难回忆，因为当它发生时，你会感到极度不适，这种不适感很难在事后重现。可以说，那是一种刻骨铭心的痛苦，让人永远难忘。

source: The shirts , which he began selling in his store in 1961 , quickly caught on with local customers . Not the least of their appeal was their toned-down colors . To achieve that effect he simply turned the brightly colored floral and calico prints inside out .

source: Cleganebowl is a prediction that has stayed with the Game of Thrones fandom since the days of yore , in 2013 . Essentially , it 's fueled by the dream of watching the two most feared fighters in all of Westeros , the Hound and the Mountain ( who are also brothers ) , face off in a fight to the death .
domestication: 从很久以前开始，“凯林堡之战”就一直是《权力的游戏》粉丝们的梦想，早在2013年就已经有了。其实质上，这个预测源于粉丝们希望看到维斯特洛最令人恐惧的两名战士——哈운드和山姆（他们也是兄弟），来一场生死决斗的愿望。多年来，这个预测一直被粉丝们津津乐道。哈운드和山姆之间的恩怨由来已久，他们之间的矛盾一直是整个剧情中的一个重要线索。因此，如果有一天他们能够在剧中对决，定会是一场精彩绝伦的好戏，让人大饱眼福。
foreignization: Cleganebowl 是一个从2013年开始就伴随着《权力的游戏》粉丝群的预测，粉丝们一直在期待着，这基本上是由观看维斯特洛中最令人恐惧的两名战士，哈운드和山怪（他们也是兄弟）进行一场至死方休的战斗的梦想所激发的。

从很久以前开始，“凯林堡之战”就一直是《权力的游戏》粉丝们的梦想，早在2013年就已经有了。其实质上，这个预测源于粉丝们希望看到维斯特洛最令人恐惧的两名战士——哈운드和山姆（他们也是兄弟），来一场生死决斗的愿望。多年来，这个预测一直被粉丝们津津乐道。哈운드和山姆之间的恩怨由来已久，他们之间的矛盾一直是整个剧情中的一个重要线索。因此，如果有一天他们能够在剧中对决，定会是一场精彩绝伦的好戏，让人大饱眼福。

source: The dynamisms involved in bacterial drug resistance , emergence and spread of multiple antibiotic resistant Enterobacteriaceae in Ghana are poorly understood . source: Located in the center of the casbah , Taralon 's riad has been his refuge for the past 20 years . The house unfolds over many floors and levels -- there 's one for living , one for dining , one for sleeping , and one for working . On the bottom level , which is separate from the main house , a Taj Mahal-style arched door reveals a little bedroom intended for afternoon siestas . Full of secret passageways and hidden loggias , this is the kind of fantasy house that reveals itself over time .
domestication: 这座房子位于老城中心，已经成为Talaron二十年来的庇护所。 这座房子分为多层，每层都有各自的功能，有生活区、餐厅、卧室和工作室。 在最底层，与主楼分开的是一扇泰姬陵风格的拱形门，里面是一个小卧室，专门用于午休。 整个房子充满了秘密通道和隐蔽的休息处，这是那种需要时间慢慢揭开的梦幻般的房子。 有空再来慢慢探索吧，这样的房子总会让人有新的发现。

source: Jay 's success at getting deals done has earned him a new nick-name : the Closer . " If I really want you , I 'll close it like Mariano Rivera , the Yankees relief pitcher . " Of course , being an artist-businessman is a double-edged sword . Jay still retains the too-cool posture he had as an artist . " I 'm not gon na chase anyone , " he says . " I 'll convince you that this is the best place for you . I 'll give you a million reasons why you should be here , but I 'm not chasing . I 'm not gon na call a hundred times . " He laughs . " I 'm not messin ' up my best suit . "
domestication: 杰的谈判技巧非常厉害，于是大家给他起了个新绰号叫“终结者”。他说：“如果我真的想要你，我就会像洋基队的终结者马里安诺·李维拉一样把事情办成。”当然，做一个艺术家同时也是商人，有利有弊。杰依然保持着当年做艺术家的酷酷态度，他说：“我不会去追求任何人，我会说服你这里是最适合你的地方，我会告诉你一百万个理由为什么你应该在这里，但我不会去追求，我不会打一百个电话。”他笑着说：“我不会为了这些事情弄坏我最好的西装。”

source: Swing dancing functions both as a stress reliever and a fitness booster . In an hour-long session , you can expect to burn about 375 calories ( based on a 150-lb person ) . And there 's an added bonus , Catherine reports : " At weddings , dinners , and especially holiday parties-anywhere there 's music with the right beat-we get to show our stuff ! " Sari Reaches for Herbs

source: In addition to contending with swelling retirement among the population as a whole , the Social Security Administration has launched an effort to deal with its own retirement wave over the next 10 years , when up to 38,000 of its current employees will be eligible to retire . Eye-catching recruitment posters and brochures now sport a new slogan : " Make a difference in people 's lives and your own . " Monetary incentives such as an above-minimum starting salary , reimbursement for travel to a first post , and payment for interview expenses may also be used to nab a good prospect .
domestication: 社会保障局不仅要应对整个人口老龄化带来的问题，还要面对自身的退休潮。未来十年内，高达38000名现任员工将有资格退休。为了应对这个挑战，社会保障局推出了新招募计划，包括吸引眼球的海报和宣传册，新口号是“让生活有所不同，也让自己不同”。同时，他们还提供了一些物质激励，例如高于最低工资的起薪、报销前往第一岗位的差旅费、支付面试费用等，以吸引优秀人才。这些举措旨在确保社会保障局在未来十年中拥有足够的人手，继续为公众提供良好的服务。
foreignization: 除了应对整个人口中日益增长的退休潮外，社会保障局还启动了一项努力，以应对未来10年内自己的退休潮，当时其目前的多达38,000名员工都将有资格退休。醒目的招聘海报和宣传册现在采用了一句新口号：“改变人们的生活和你自己的生活。” 金融激励措施，如超出最低的起薪、报销前往第一个职位的差旅费以及支付面试费用，也可能被用来吸引一个好的候选人。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

In addition to contending with swelling retirement among the population as a whole , the Social Security Administration has launched an effort to deal with its own retirement wave over the next 10 years , when up to 38,000 of its current employees will be eligible to retire . Eye-catching recruitment posters and brochures now sport a new slogan : " Make a difference in people 's lives and your own . " Monetary incentives such as an above-minimum starting salary , reimbursement for travel to a first post , and payment for interview expenses may also be used to nab a good prospect .

source: Chitwood 's ultimate goal is to reconstruct the leaf ' morphospace ' : the full catalogue of possible leaf shapes . " If you could measure all the leaves that currently existed and all the leaves that ever existed , would it be completely random ? " he asks . " Or would there be some leaves that never showed up ? Was it because the plants ca n't make them ? "
domestication: 奇特伍德的最终目标是重建“叶形图谱”，即所有可能的叶子形状的完整目录。他问道：“如果你能测量出现在存在和曾经存在过的所有叶子，那么它们的形状会完全随机分布吗？”或者说，“有些叶子永远不会出现，这是因为植物无法制造出来吗？”

source: Sonic hired Kansas City-based Barkley Evergreen &; Partners , responsible for successful campaigns for Cellular One and Western Auto . The company bought time on cable channels , where ads focused on a fresh , albeit odd , menu that featured cherry limeades , onion rings and sandwiches served on thick toaster bread -- all delivered to the car in under four minutes . Frankie Avalon was shown the door , in favor of young skating carhops . Last year the company spent $80 million on marketing , triple what it had spent five years earlier .
domestication: 索尼克公司请来了总部位于堪萨斯城的广告公司Barkley Evergreen & Partners，这家公司曾为Cellular One和Western Auto做过非常成功的广告宣传。索尼克公司在有线电视台上买了广告时间，广告集中展示了新鲜、虽然有点儿奇怪的菜单，包括樱桃青柠水、洋葱圈和三明治，三明治是放在厚厚的烤面包上做的，而且所有食物都能在四分钟内送到车边。索尼克公司放弃了Frankie Avalon那种老一套的风格，而采用年轻时髦的滑板车服务生。去年，公司在营销方面花费了八千万美元，是五年前支出的三倍。

source: This " go-to gym shoe " has ample cushioning that runs the length of the midsole to prevent foot fatigue on cardio machines , plus deep grooves in the outsole to improve flexibility . " I could shimmy like a pro in my dance class , " said one tester . Thanks to a breezy upper , your foot " stays cool no matter how much you sweat , " and the roomy toe box lets your little piggies spread out .
domestication: 这款“常去健身房穿的鞋子”具有足够的缓冲层，沿着中底延伸到底部，可以有效防止使用有氧运动机时产生的脚部疲劳。外底的凹槽还可以提高鞋子的柔韧性。 一位测试者说：“我在舞蹈课上像专业人士一样扭动臀部。”得益于轻便的鞋面设计，你的脚在运动中“无论出多少汗都能保持凉爽”，宽敞的鞋头空间让你的脚趾可以自由舒展。

source: A few relatives said they would accept Saddam 's offer ; others defiantly rejected it . " I do n't think he 'll win the humanitarian of the year award for that , " Bush said . The president planned some gestures of his own . He sent Secretary of State James Baker off to the Middle East and Europe to explore the possibilities for a negotiated settlement and to brace the allies for possible military action . The president planned his own trip for later this month ; he will spend Thanksgiving Day with the troops in Saudi Arabia .
domestication: 萨达姆提出要释放那些人，但并不是所有美国人都愿意接受他的条件，有几位亲属表示可以接受，而其他人则坚决拒绝。布什听说后调侃道：“我想他这个年度最不可能得到的奖项就是‘人道主义奖’了。”与此同时，总统也有自己的安排，他派国务卿詹姆斯·贝克前往中东和欧洲，探索和平解决冲突的可能性，并让盟友们做好可能的军事行动的准备。总统还计划稍后自己出访，他将在这个月晚些时候去沙特阿拉伯，与驻扎当地的美军一起度过感恩节。
foreignization: 少数亲戚说他们会接受萨达姆的提议；其他人则拒绝了它。 " 我不认为他会因为这件事而获得年度人道主义奖，" 布什说。 总统计划了一些自己的姿态。他派国务卿詹姆斯·贝克前往中东和欧洲探索谈判解决的可能性，并为可能的军事行动做好盟友的准备。总统计划本月晚些时候出行；他将在沙特阿拉伯度过感恩节，与士兵们一起度过。

The president planned his own trip for later this month ; he will spend Thanksgiving Day with the troops in Saudi Arabia .

source: Two . Though Hispanic immigrants come usually from Catholic cultures , that may not be the best predictor of how they will behave in the liberal climate of the U.S. Thus , the illegitimacy rate among Hispanics in California is 40.5 percent-compared with 32.8 percent for all races there . As for abortion , Hispanics are approximately 11 percent of the U.S. population but account for 22 percent of all abortions . And , as we have seen with other Americans , moral opinion tends to follow moral behavior rather than the other way round . So the likelihood is that Hispanics will become less conservative morally the longer they live in the U.S.
domestication: 二则，尽管西班牙裔移民大多来自天主教文化，但这并不一定能准确预测他们在美国自由宽松的环境下会如何行事。事实上，加州西班牙裔的非婚生子比例高达40.5%，而整个加州所有族裔的平均非婚生子比例为32.8%。至于堕胎问题，西班牙裔占美国人口的11%，但却占所有堕胎案例的22%。就像其他美国人一样，我们观察到人们的道德观念往往随着行为的变化而转变，而不是相反。因此，西班牙裔移民在美国居住时间越长，他们的道德观念可能就会变得越不保守。

As for abortion , Hispanics are approximately 11 percent of the U.S. population but account for 22 percent of all abortions . And , as we have seen with other Americans , moral opinion tends to follow moral behavior rather than the other way round . So the likelihood is that Hispanics will become less conservative morally the longer they live in the U.S.

source: We bring good snacks to school . " We 're the go-to parents whenever there 's a school party , " Debi says . " We bring healthy things -- a macedonia , which is strawberries with orange juice and mint , or a schiacciata alla fiorentina , which is like an angel food cake . At the last party they went to , the girls ate cupcakes with icing that was three inches high . They were bouncing off the walls . We let them have sugar , but in small doses . "
domestication: 我们给孩子带上好吃的零食去学校。" 每当学校有聚会时，我们都是其他家长的靠山，" Debi 说。" 我们带的都是健康食品——一份水果沙拉，里面有草莓、橙汁和薄荷，或者是一块佛罗伦萨式的奶油蛋糕。在他们上次参加的派对上，女孩们吃了涂着高高三英寸厚奶油糖霜的纸杯蛋糕。吃完后她们简直像打了兴奋剂一样，蹦蹦跳跳的。我们允许她们吃点儿甜食，但要适量。

source: Stephen MillerSessions brought with him into the Trump fold his former aide , Miller , now a senior adviser to the president . Miller , who helped Sessions form his anti-immigrant positions in the Senate , became known as one of the architects of Trump 's Muslim ban . Lesser known is his history with the most famous neo-Nazi of our time , Richard Spencer . " It 's funny no one 's picked up on the Stephen Miller connection , " Spencer told Mother Jones in October . " I knew him very well when I was at Duke . " Miller denied any connection to Spencer at the time , but emails obtained by the Electronic Intifada confirmed that Miller worked with Spencer to put on a debate on immigration sponsored by the Duke Conservative Union .

source: A. If a perfume is colored , it likely contains dyes that can stain white or light clothing , says perfumer Steve Demercado . Plus , its high alcohol and oil levels can cause delicate fabrics such as silk to look spotty . It 's best to scent skin before dressing ( bonus : When you get naked , you 'll still smell sexy ) .

source: Radishes make great pickles , and you can use any radish in this recipe . Green watermelon radishes , with their stunning rainbow interiors , make a most attractive pickled condiment . You can also substitute a number of different vinegars here , but the sweet complexity of Champagne vinegar is a refreshing contrast to the strong mustard oil found in radishes .
domestication: 胡萝卜可以泡成美味的泡菜，而且你可以用任何种类的胡萝卜来做这个食谱。绿色的西瓜胡萝卜由于里面有漂亮的彩虹颜色，所以做成泡菜很有卖相。此外，你也可以在食谱中换用不同类型的醋，但是香槟醋的甜美和复杂口感可以与胡萝卜里强烈的芥末油形成清新的对比。这样不仅增加了菜肴的层次感，也让人吃起来回味无穷。
foreignization: 萝卜可以制作出很好的腌菜，你可以在这个食谱中使用任意种类的萝卜。绿色的西瓜萝卜，拥有令人惊艳的彩虹内部，可以制作出最具吸引力的腌制调味品。你也可以在这里用不同的醋代替，但香槟醋的甜美复杂性是与萝卜中强烈的芥末油形成鲜明对比的清爽对比。

source: In the case of the sink , it was this : when she thought about the beat-up piece of stainless steel , Lin remembered something about the Chinook tribe that lived in the area . The tribe 's creation story was about how a fish or a whale was cut wrong , and the badly cut fish turned into a thunderbird and laid eggs that became Indians .
domestication: 说到水池，林突然想起了一件有趣的事。有一天，她在想那块破旧不堪的不锈钢片的时候，忽然记起了关于奇努克部落的一个故事。这个部落就在附近居住，他们有一个创世神话：讲的是一条鱼或鲸鱼被错误地杀死，结果这条被杀死的鱼变成了雷鸟，然后生下蛋，蛋孵化后变成了印第安人。
foreignization: 在水槽的例子中，事情是这样的：当她想到那件破旧的不锈钢制品时，林记起了生活在该地区的奇努克部落的一些事情。 该部落的创世故事讲述的是一条鱼或一头鲸鱼被错误地切割，切割错误的鱼变成了雷鸟，并产下了蛋成为印第安人。

source: Wind power has been championed for years--with limited success--as an environmentally-friendly alternative to fossil fuels . A promising project in the Cape Cod region of Massachusetts has been stymied by ostensibly fervent environmentalists because it may reduce the natural beauty of the area . Elsewhere , Wind projects have been opposed because spinning blades may kill some birds .
domestication: 风能多年来一直被吹捧为比化石燃料更环保的替代能源，可是效果却有限。马萨诸塞州的科德角有一个很有前景的项目，但被一些环境保护主义者强烈反对，因为可能会破坏当地的自然美景。在别的地方，风能项目也遭到了反对，因为旋转的叶片可能会伤害一些鸟类。这下可真是“此人挖井给你喝水，你却说他打扰了你的景观”，让人哭笑不得。
foreignization: 风能多年来一直被倡导为化石燃料的环保替代品，但收效甚微。马萨诸塞州科德角地区的一个有前景的项目因可能会减少该地区的自然美丽而被明显热情的环保主义者阻碍。在其他地方，风力发电项目因为旋转的叶片可能会杀死一些鸟类而遭到反对。

source: MarketWatch collected the personal narratives of four such accidental landlords , all of them millennials or on the cusp of that age group . It 's a demographic often said to be allergic to ownership . In fact , our subjects believed in the so-called American Dream of homeownership , and then had to make painful decisions about how to navigate a system that had turned nightmarish .
domestication: MarketWatch 采访了四位意外成为房东的年轻人，他们都是千禧一代或者正处于这个年龄段的人。大家都说，这个年龄段的人对拥有东西过敏，但是事实上，他们都曾经相信所谓的“美国梦”，就是拥有自己的房子。结果，他们不得不做出一些痛苦的决定来应对一个变得噩梦般的系统。

source: grill get your barbecue hot . if cooking indoors , place a ridged grill pan on the stovetop on high heat until really hot . assemble the fruit on the skewers ( 8 to 10 pieces per skewer ) , then drizzle the honey over the fruit . cook for about 8 minutes , turning every minute or so , until golden and slightly charred . source: One of the most important insights gained from these tombs is that the pinnacle of Moche society soared much higher than we had imagined . No Moche burials previously excavated were as large and complex as these tombs , with room-sized burial chambers containing multiple individuals in separate coffins , surrounded by hundreds of ceramic vessels . Nor had any Moche tombs contained anywhere near the quantity and quality of jewelry and ornaments that were found in these royal tombs .

source: If you use mistletoe for holiday decor and have crawling babies in the house , beware . Mistletoe , particularly the berries from the American variety , is considered highly toxic , especially to infants ; seizures and deaths have been reported . Because the tiny berries can easily shake loose and fall onto your floor or carpet , you might want to smooch under fake mistletoe . Quick Tip
domestication: 如果你家有爬来爬去的宝宝，千万别在家里装饰圣诞槲寄生，尤其是美洲圣诞槲寄生的果实有剧毒，特别对婴儿，轻则抽搐，重则致命。因为那些小果实容易掉落在地板或地毯上，所以还是用假的圣诞槲寄生吧，这样你可以放心地在下面接吻。
foreignization: 如果你在假期装饰中使用槲寄生，并且家中有爬行的婴儿，请小心。槲寄生，尤其是美国品种的果实，被认为是高度有毒的，特别是对婴儿；曾经有癫痫和死亡的报告。由于这些小果实很容易松动并掉落到你的地板或地毯上，你可能想在假的槲寄生下亲吻。快速提示

source: The youth efforts were distilled into a new entity headed by Echols and called the Republican Leadership Initiative . The party says the program paves the way for young Republicans to engage with local GOP groups in their communities , instead of their having to take time off from school to work with operatives in Washington . More than 4,500 fellows have completed a six-week training program as part of the initiative and are now an integral part of localized get-out-the-vote efforts , the RNC says .
domestication: 年轻人努力的结晶是一个由Echols领导的新组织，叫做共和党领导力倡议。该党说，这个项目为年轻的共和党人提供了一个机会，让他们可以在自己的社区与当地的共和党团体接触，而不需要请假去华盛顿和操作员一起工作。超过4500名研究员已经完成了为期六周的培训计划，现已成为各地拉票工作的重要组成部分，共和党全国委员会说。

source: The researchers found that geldanamycin-exposed plants sometimes grew leaves with an altered shape or color , for example . In other cases , plants had hairier roots than normal , which could improve their uptake of nutrients and water maintenance within the plants . " Having a lot of root hair could be advantageous under some circumstances and not under others , " says Lindquist .
domestication: 研究人员发现，接触到金纳霉素的植物有时会长出形状或颜色改变的叶子。有时候，植物的根比正常情况下要毛茸茸的，这样可以提高它们吸收营养和保持水分的能力。林德奎斯特说：“根上长很多细毛，在某些情况下可能是有益的，但在另一些情况下就不然了。”

source: Now Chelsea , their daughter , who is , as I say in this book " The Clintons ' War on Women " , actually the daughter of Webb Hubbell and Hillary Clinton -- you can see this based on a series of photographs . Hillary admits in her own book that a large football player-sized man taught her the proper way to hold a baby . Who could that be ? And if you look at her , she does n't look anything like Bill . She looks just like her daddy , despite four plastic surgeries , the youngest one when she 's only 18 . What 18-year-old gets plastic surgery unless you 're trying to , I do n't know , thin out the lips and make you look less like your daddy .
domestication: 现在，让我们来说说切尔西，她是克林顿夫妇的女儿，就像我在《克林顿夫妇对女性的战争》这本书中所说的，实际上她是韦伯·哈贝尔和希拉里·克林顿的私生女。你可以从一系列照片中看出来，希拉里在自己的书中承认，有一个像橄榄球运动员一样的大个子男人教她怎么抱婴儿。会是谁呢？如果你看看切尔西，你就会发现她根本不像比尔，反而非常像她的亲生父亲。尽管她已经做过四次整容手术，包括十八岁时的那一次，但是她仍然遗传了父亲的长相。十八岁的女孩，除非想改变自己的外貌，否则谁会去做整容手术呢？

source: Private Medigap coverage , too , could better meet this need if the federal government did not require policies to reimburse routine expenditures . For the same amount of money , existing policies could be reconfigured to provide the benefits that Medicare recipients most need . Finally , as the Institute for Policy Innovation points out , the federal government could help everyone by loosening FDA control of pharmaceutical development , thereby reducing costs .
domestication: 私人医疗补充保险（Medigap）也有同样的问题，如果联邦政府不要求保险政策报销日常开支，它也许会更好地满足患者的需求。以相同的费用，现有的保险政策可以被改造，以提供给予Medicare受益人最需要的福利。最后，如政策创新研究所所指出的，联邦政府也可以通过放松FDA对药品开发的控制，减少成本，从而帮助每个人。

source: Microsoft released the first version of its quantum development kit and a new quantum computing programming language Q# last December . Today , the company has released an update that adds support for quantum development on macOS and Linux . Both the Q# language , and the company 's quantum simulator , will run on these platforms in addition to Windows .
domestication: 微软在去年12月份发布了其量子开发工具包的首个版本，以及一种新的量子计算编程语言Q#。今天，这家公司又发布了一次更新，增加了对macOS和Linux平台上进行量子开发的支持。这种Q#语言以及公司的量子模拟器，将不仅能运行在Windows系统上，还能运行在这些平台上。

source: What House Republicans have done is to take a process of political decline that began three decades ago under the Democrats and accelerate it . The older system , which prevailed after World War II , was far from perfect , but it contained mechanisms by which Congress could , in Armey 's words , " listen to the concerns of the American people . " These involved interest groups , but the groups had a far different relationship to citizens outside of Washington and to each other , and they represented a much broader range of Americans . The election of 1994 did not revive this older system but furthered the hold of a new one dominated by Washington insiders .
domestication: 美国众议院的共和党人所做的事情，就是在三十年前由民主党开始的政治衰退过程上又加速了。二战后盛行的老制度虽然不完美，但它包含了机制，可以让国会在阿姆斯特朗的话来说，“倾听美国人民的关切”。这种制度涉及到利益集团，但是这些集团与华盛顿以外的公民和它们之间的关系是完全不同的，它们代表着更广泛的美国人。1994年的选举并没有使得老制度复活，而是进一步巩固了一个由华盛顿内部人士主导的新制度。这种新制度让人感到十分失望，因为它已经变成了政客们争夺权力的工具，而不是真正为民众服务的平台。
foreignization: 众议院共和党人所做的就是在三十年前由民主党开始的政治衰落过程中加速了它的速度。二战后占主导地位的旧体制远非完美，但它包含了机制，使国会能够以阿姆伊的话来说，"倾听美国人民的关切"。这些涉及利益集团，但这些集团与华盛顿以外的公民和相互之间的关系完全不同，它们代表了更广泛的美国人。1994年的选举并没有恢复这一旧体制，而是进一步巩固了华盛顿内部人士主导的新体制。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

What House Republicans have done is to take a process of political decline that began three decades ago under the Democrats and accelerate it . The older system , which prevailed after World War II , was far from perfect , but it contained mechanisms by which Congress could , in Armey 's words , " listen to the concerns of the American people . " These involved interest groups , but the groups had a far different relationship to citizens outside of Washington and to each other , and they represented a much broader range of Americans . The election of 1994 did not revive this older system but furthered the hold of a new one dominated by Washington insiders .

source: Maharidge lays blame at the gated walls of the " white " communities of Dana Point , as if tension and misunderstanding were caused by their physical exclusivity . However , in Venice , South Central , Watts , and dozens of Southern California communities , longtime residents , including African-Americans , have come up against immigrants from Mexico who came to this country with profound cultural , linguistic , educational , and attitudinal walls .
domestication: 马哈里奇认为，达纳波因特这些“白人”社区的围墙是紧张和误解的根源，好像只是因为他们的物理隔离就能导致这些问题。但事实上，在威尼斯、南中央、瓦茨以及数十个南加州社区，长期居住的居民，包括非裔美国人，都面临着来自墨西哥的移民带来的深刻文化、语言、教育和态度差异的问题。这些移民带来了自己的壁垒，才是问题的真正原因。
foreignization: Maharidge 将责任归咎于 Dana Point 的 " 白人 " 社区的围墙，就好像紧张和误解是由他们的身体上的排他性引起的一样。然而，在 Venice ， South Central ， Watts 和几十个南加州社区，长期居住在这里的居民，包括非裔美国人，与来自墨西哥的移民发生冲突，这些移民带来了深刻的文化、语言、教育和态度上的壁垒来到这个国家。

source: Trump needs to know that we have many great charter schools and many lousy ones . source: Now , an atlas that traces the shapes of 182,000 leaves from 141 plant families and 75 locations around the world shows promise for refining scientists ' ability to read that story . Using that atlas , researchers found that leaf shape alone accurately predicted where a leaf was collected 14.5% of the time , and plant family correctly 27.3% of the time . That is far better than predictions made using conventional methods to describe a leaf 's shape .
domestication: 现在，有一份地图册对来自世界各地75个地点、141个植物家族的18.2万片叶子的形状进行了记录，这让科学家们看到了希望，认为有可能进一步破解叶子蕴含的故事。利用这份地图册，研究人员发现，只凭借叶子的形状就能准确判断出它来自哪里，这样的情况占比约为14.5%，而利用传统方法来描述叶子的形状则完全无法做到这一点。同样，如果我们知道叶子的种类，那么就能够正确判断出它的家族背景，准确率高达27.3%。这远远超过了使用传统方法来描述叶子形状的准确度。

Now , an atlas that traces the shapes of 182,000 leaves from 141 plant families and 75 locations around the world shows promise for refining scientists ' ability to read that story . Using that atlas , researchers found that leaf shape alone accurately predicted where a leaf was collected 14.5% of the time , and plant family correctly 27.3% of the time . That is far better than predictions made using conventional methods to describe a leaf 's shape .

source: Recent improvements at private medical labs clearly illustrate the kind of cleanup that disclosure can prompt in an industry where the public release of regulators ' documents , SEC filings , nonprofit agency tax forms , or other records allow the public to make sure regulators are protecting consumers . The Wall Street Journal 's Walt Bogdanich used an array of documents from federal and state health regulators and court records to prove in 1987 that inaccurate and unreliable testing of body fluids and tissues at clinical labs was a serious health hazard as well as a waste of millions of dollars .
domestication: 私人医疗实验室近来的改进很明显地说明了公开信息可以促进一个行业的整顿。在这个行业中，监管机构文件、证券交易委员会文件、非营利机构税务表格等记录的公开发布使得公众能够确保监管机构是否在保护消费者。1987年，《华尔街日报》的沃尔特·博格达尼奇利用来自联邦和州卫生监管机构以及法院记录的各种文件，证明临床实验室对人体液体和组织的不准确和不可靠的检测既是一种严重的健康隐患，也是浪费了数百万美元。这种事实足以说明，公开信息可以让一些原本蒙在鼓里的行业现出原形。
foreignization: 最近私人医疗实验室的改进清楚地阐明了，在一个行业中，监管机构文件、SEC 文件、非营利机构税务表格或其他记录的公开发布使公众能够确保监管机构保护消费者的权益时，披露可以促成什么样的整顿。 华尔街日报的沃尔特·博格达尼奇（Walt Bogdanich）利用联邦和州健康监管机构以及法庭记录的文件证明，在1987年，临床实验室中对体液和组织的不准确和不可靠的测试是一个严重的健康隐患，以及浪费数百万美元。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Recent improvements at private medical labs clearly illustrate the kind of cleanup that disclosure can prompt in an industry where the public release of regulators ' documents , SEC filings , nonprofit agency tax forms , or other records allow the public to make sure regulators are protecting consumers . The Wall Street Journal 's Walt Bogdanich used an array of documents from federal and state health regulators and court records to prove in 1987 that inaccurate and unreliable testing of body fluids and tissues at clinical labs was a serious health hazard as well as a waste of millions of dollars .

source: But the message is n't the only thing that counts in the communications field . Ratings and viewership numbers , sponsors , financing , legal and political factors also have to be taken into consideration . After 27 years of largely Mexican control , SIN 's successes attracted the attention of major investors , and in 1987-88 the network was purchased for $630 million . The buyer was a U.S. consortium composed of Hallmark -- the greeting-card company -- and First Chicago Venture Capital . With the takeover , SIN became Univision . Programming a Balancing Act
domestication: 但在傳播界，並不只有內容才是最重要的，收視率、觀眾數、贊助商、資金、法律和政治因素也都是需要考慮的。在經過二十七年的墨西哥人主導後，SIN 的成功吸引了大投資者的目光，於一九八七年到八十八年間，以六億三千萬美金的天價被收購。買主是一個由賀卡公司Hallmark 和第一芝加哥風險投資公司First Chicago Venture Capital 組成的美國財團。收購後，SIN 改名為Univision 。節目編排是一項平衡藝術
foreignization: 但在传播领域中，信息并不是唯一重要的东西。收视率、观众数量、赞助商、资金、法律和政治因素也必须被考虑。在经历了27年的墨西哥人的控制后，SIN的成功吸引了大投资者的注意力，在1987年至1988年期间，该网络被以630万美元的价格购买。买家是一个美国财团，由贺卡公司Hallmark和First Chicago Venture Capital组成。在被收购后，SIN变成了Univision。节目安排是一种平衡的行为

source: On Monday afternoon , June 4 , Apple handed out its annual Apple Design Awards onstage at its Worldwide Developer Conference in San Jose . The awards , now in their 21st year , are meant to highlight those apps that set a benchmark for high-quality design , taking into consideration things like the user interface and user experience , originality and other factors that represent those types of applications that Apple would like to see more of in its App Store .
domestication: 六月四号星期一的下午，苹果公司在圣何塞举办的全球开发者大会上颁发了年度苹果设计奖。这已经是第21年了，主要目的是表彰那些设计质量超高的应用程序，这些程序的用户界面和使用体验非常好，创新性强，代表了苹果希望在应用商店中看到的应用类型。这些获奖应用为其他开发者树立了榜样，值得学习和参考。
foreignization: 在6月4日星期一的下午，苹果公司在其位于圣何塞的全球开发者大会上颁发了年度苹果设计奖。 这些奖项已经举办了21年，旨在突出那些设定了高质量设计标杆的应用程序，考虑到诸如用户界面和用户体验、原创性以及其他代表苹果希望在其应用商店中看到更多的应用类型的因素。

source: In his first two years in office , he 's made the work of modern-day Mary Harris Joneses a little bit easier with several union-friendly appointments to the National Labor Relations Board . This , however , is no substitute for seeking long-overdue changes in the National Labor Relations Act that would enable more workers to organize unions and negotiate contracts without employer interference .
domestication: 他上台两年来，为现代版“母狮”玛丽·哈里斯·琼斯们的工作稍微减轻了一些负担，任命了一些亲工会的人进入国家劳工关系委员会。然而，这并不等同于寻求长期以来劳工们呼吁的修改《国家劳工关系法》，使更多的工人能够在没有雇主干预的情况下组织工会和谈判合同。这就像那句老话说的，“山重水复疑无路，柳暗花明又一村”，前路漫漫，但总要一步步向前推进。
foreignization: 在他的前两年任期内，他通过几项友好的工会任命使现代玛丽·哈里斯·琼斯的工作变得稍微轻松了一些，任命他们进入国家劳工关系委员会（National Labor Relations Board）。然而，这并不能取代寻求对国家劳工关系法案进行长期拖延的变化的做法，这将使更多的工人能够在没有雇主干预的情况下组织工会和谈判合同。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

In his first two years in office , he 's made the work of modern-day Mary Harris Joneses a little bit easier with several union-friendly appointments to the National Labor Relations Board . This , however , is no substitute for seeking long-overdue changes in the National Labor Relations Act that would enable more workers to organize unions and negotiate contracts without employer interference .
