source: After years spent in a frustrating search , renowned astronomer Giovanni Domenico Cassini must have wondered if he would die before seeing a legendary sunspot grace the heavens again . These dark blemishes on the surfs face , so common during the days of Cassini 's youth , had virtually disappeared by the time he started observing the sky in the mid-17th century So rare were sunspots , in fact , that any reported sighting caused a celebration among European astronomers of the day . When Cassini finally spied one in 1671 , the editor of the PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON felt obliged to describe the last recorded sighting in 1660 , in case some readers had forgotten what a sunspot was during the intervening years .
domestication: 天文学家焦万尼·多梅尼科·卡西尼花了多年时间进行了一次令人沮丧的搜索，他也许会想知道自己是否会在看到传说中的太阳黑子再次出现在天空之前去世。在卡西尼年轻时，这些黑斑在太阳表面上很常见，但到了17世纪中叶他开始观测天空时，它们几乎已经消失了。事实上，太阳黑子如此罕见，以至于任何报告的发现都会引起当时欧洲天文学家的庆祝。当卡西尼终于在1671年发现一个太阳黑子时，《伦敦皇家学会哲学汇刊》的编辑感到有必要描述1660年最后一次记录的发现，以防一些读者在此期间忘记了什么是太阳黑子。这段时间太阳黑子如此稀少，以至于人们几乎都忘记了它的模样。卡西尼终于等到了这一刻，他的发现无疑让天文学界兴奋不已。
foreignization: 在经过多年的令人沮丧的搜索后，著名天文学家乔瓦尼·多梅尼科·卡西尼可能会想知道，他是否会在看到传说中的太阳黑子再次出现在天空之前去世。在卡西尼年轻时，太阳黑子很常见，但到17世纪中叶他开始观察天空时，它们基本上已经消失了。事实上，太阳黑子如此罕见，以至于任何报告的发现都会引起当时欧洲天文学家的庆祝。当卡西尼终于在1671年发现一个太阳黑子时，《伦敦皇家学会哲学交易》(PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON)的编辑觉得有必要描述1660年最后一次记录的发现，以防有些读者在此期间忘记了什么是太阳黑子。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

After years spent in a frustrating search , renowned astronomer Giovanni Domenico Cassini must have wondered if he would die before seeing a legendary sunspot grace the heavens again . These dark blemishes on the surfs face , so common during the days of Cassini 's youth , had virtually disappeared by the time he started observing the sky in the mid-17th century So rare were sunspots , in fact , that any reported sighting caused a celebration among European astronomers of the day . When Cassini finally spied one in 1671 , the editor of the PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON felt obliged to describe the last recorded sighting in 1660 , in case some readers had forgotten what a sunspot was during the intervening years .

天文学家焦万尼·多梅尼科·卡西尼花了多年时间进行了一次令人沮丧的搜索，他也许会想知道自己是否会在看到传说中的太阳黑子再次出现在天空之前去世。在卡西尼年轻时，这些黑斑在太阳表面上很常见，但到了17世纪中叶他开始观测天空时，它们几乎已经消失了。事实上，太阳黑子如此罕见，以至于任何报告的发现都会引起当时欧洲天文学家的庆祝。当卡西尼终于在1671年发现一个太阳黑子时，《伦敦皇家学会哲学汇刊》的编辑感到有必要描述1660年最后一次记录的发现，以防一些读者在此期间忘记了什么是太阳黑子。这段时间太阳黑子如此稀少，以至于人们几乎都忘记了它的模样。卡西尼终于等到了这一刻，他的发现无疑让天文学界兴奋不已。

After years spent in a frustrating search , renowned astronomer Giovanni Domenico Cassini must have wondered if he would die before seeing a legendary sunspot grace the heavens again . These dark blemishes on the surfs face , so common during the days of Cassini 's youth , had virtually disappeared by the time he started observing the sky in the mid-17th century So rare were sunspots , in fact , that any reported sighting caused a celebration among European astronomers of the day . When Cassini finally spied one in 1671 , the editor of the PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON felt obliged to describe the last recorded sighting in 1660 , in case some readers had forgotten what a sunspot was during the intervening years .

在经过多年的令人沮丧的搜索后，著名天文学家乔瓦尼·多梅尼科·卡西尼可能会想知道，他是否会在看到传说中的太阳黑子再次出现在天空之前去世。在卡西尼年轻时，太阳黑子很常见，但到17世纪中叶他开始观察天空时，它们基本上已经消失了。事实上，太阳黑子如此罕见，以至于任何报告的发现都会引起当时欧洲天文学家的庆祝。当卡西尼终于在1671年发现一个太阳黑子时，《伦敦皇家学会哲学交易》(PHILOSOPHICAL TRANSACTIONS OF THE ROYAL SOCIETY OF LONDON)的编辑觉得有必要描述1660年最后一次记录的发现，以防有些读者在此期间忘记了什么是太阳黑子。

source: When the popular literary magazine Bungei Shunju conveniently published the dokuhakuroku in December 1990 , it created a sensation by enabling readers to get a new and deeper insight into the emperor 's character . For the first time since the war , many saw the forgotten fighting generalissimo side to Hirohito - a side that Yamada Akira and other Japanese historians had already documented on the basis of the emperor 's ' questions ' to his military commanders , and their reports to him on the unfolding war situation .
domestication: 当时，备受欢迎的文学杂志《文艺春秋》在1990年12月方便地刊登了《独白录》，它让读者对天皇的性格有了新的、更深入的了解，从而引起了一阵轰动。战争结束后，很多人第一次看到了被遗忘已久的最高统帅的一面——这一点，山田晶等日本历史学家早已根据天皇向其军事指挥官提出的“问题”，以及他们关于战局发展的报告加以记载。
foreignization: 当流行的文学杂志《文艺春秋》（Bungei Shunju）方便地在1990年12月出版了《独白录》时，它通过让读者能够对天皇的性格有新的更深入的了解而引起了轰动。自战争以来，很多人第一次看到了裕仁被遗忘的武将的一面——这一面是山田（Akira Yamada）和其他日本历史学家已经根据天皇向他的军事指挥官提出的“问题”，以及他们关于战争形势发展的报告所记录下来的。

source: Late in the 14th century , a French gentleman in his 5Os married a 15-year-old orphan and ( in response to her pleading , he claims ) wrote for her edification a volume of instructions on how to care for home and husband . A Medieval Home Companion ( HarperCollins. $20 ) has lovely period woodcuts , and is full of thought-provoking tips : walk with your head down , speak as little as possible , emulate faithful dogs who think only of their masters , and if you are planning to carry around a live carp all day , wrap it in wet hay .
domestication: 十四世纪快结束的时候，有一位五十多岁的法国绅士娶了一位十五岁的孤女，据说是受了新娘的央求，他就写了一本关于如何管理家务和侍奉丈夫的指南。《中世纪家庭伴侣》（哈珀柯林斯出版社，20美元）这本书里有很漂亮的木刻插图，内容也非常值得深思，有些建议还挺有意思：走路时低着头，少说话，学学忠诚的狗，只想着主人，如果你整天要带着活鲤鱼，最好用湿的干草包起来。
foreignization: 14世纪后期，一位法国50岁的绅士与一名15岁的孤儿结婚，并（他声称是为了响应她的哀求）为她写了一本关于如何照顾家务和丈夫的说明书。这本中世纪家庭伴侣（哈珀柯林斯出版社，20美元）包含漂亮的时期木刻，并充满了发人深省的建议：低着头走路，尽量少说话，效仿只为主人着想的忠诚的狗，如果你计划整天携带活鲤鱼，把它用湿草包起来。

source: THESE WERE MY MOTHER 'S PARTICULARS AT THE TIME SHE WAS diagnosed with breast cancer : age sixty-one ; white ; history of benign breast lumps ; Jewish ; affluent ; postmenopausal ; first menstruation at age eleven ; sister of a woman who had cancer in both breasts before menopause ; resident of the urban , northeastern United States . Any woman over thirty is considered at risk of contracting breast cancer . But my mother 's characteristics together placed her , statistically , at far higher risk for contracting the disease .

source: This applies particularly to the " safe space " discussion . The letter 's critics correctly tout the value of domestic-violence shelters , gay nightclubs , gatherings where pregnant women discuss their bodily experiences , and undocumented immigrants grappling with the unique challenges of their circumstances with people who share it . But those hardly run afoul of the dean 's qualified denunciation of " intellectual " safe spaces where individuals retreat " from ideas and perspectives . "
domestication: 这点在“安全空间”讨论中尤其明显。信件的批评者正确地提到了家庭暴力庇护所、同性恋夜店，以及孕妇们分享身体经验的聚会等场所的价值，这些地方让无证移民与面临类似处境的人一起应对他们独特的困境。但这些并没有违背院长对“知识”安全空间的谴责，在那里个人从“思想和观点”中退缩。说白了，这些支持弱势群体的场所并不等同于知识上的避难所，那些避难所只会让人逃避不同的思想和观点。

source: AMD 's amd new Polaris line of chips will allow gamers and others desiring to add VR capability to their computers to purchase the required graphics for under $200 , about half what such cards cost today . source: Sow seeds direcdy into prepared rows or hills one to two weeks after your last spring frost , and make a second planting a month later . Where summers are short and cool , start seeds indoors under bright fluorescent lights two weeks before your last spring frost . If kept moist and warm ( above 70 degrees Fahrenheit ) , cucumber seeds should sprout within five days . Set out 3- to 4-week-old seedlings after your last frost has passed .
domestication: 在春天最后一次霜冻过后的一到两周，直接在预先准备好的土壤上种下黄瓜的种子，并且在一个月后再种一批。夏天较短和凉爽的地方，可以在春天最后一次霜冻前两周，在室内明亮的荧光灯下开始播种。如果保持土壤湿润和温暖（高于70华氏度），那么黄瓜种子应该在五天之内就能发芽。在最后一次霜冻过后，把三到四周大的幼苗移植出去。

source: My mother complained of becoming a " cancer cripple , " of being " bored out of her gourd , " as my sister put it . Her body had turned on her . It had taken control of her life , and that , even more than the illness , depressed her most . " She was starting to get really resentful , " my sister recalls .
domestication: 我妈妈开始抱怨自己变成“癌症残废”，在我妹妹看来，她就是“无聊得发慌”。她的身体已经变成了她的敌人，控制了她的生活，这让她更加沮丧，而不是疾病本身。“她开始真的很怨恨，”我姐姐回忆道。她的身体状况让她失去了自主权，整天无所事事，这种感觉真的让她难以忍受。我姐姐说，她有时会跟我们发牢骚，说自己好像成了自己的身体的奴隶，什么都不能像以前一样做了。这让我妈妈感到特别沮丧，也让我们很担心她。

source: At this point , the attentive reader may wonder how on earth this happened . How did the ethnic composition of California change so dramatically in the space of a dozen years that it turned the Golden State from a solid link in the " Republican lock " on the electoral college into a safe house for recidivist liberal Democrats ? Barnes offers no assistance on this question . One is left to imagine that , in a scene reminiscent of the movie Watermelon Man , a lot of Anglo suburbanites woke up one morning to discover that they could read Don Quixote in the original .
domestication: 这时，注意力集中读者可能会纳闷，这到底是怎么回事。 加州的族群构成到底是如何在短短十几年内发生如此剧烈变化的，竟然把加州从共和党选举人团的“锁链”中拯救出来，而成为重犯自由派民主党人的安全之地？巴恩斯对这个问题没有提供任何帮助。人们只能想象，在一个类似《西瓜人》的场景中，很多英裔郊区居民有一天早上醒来，发现他们可以阅读原版的《堂吉诃德》。

source: Indeed , the FDIC once even sued the comptroller 's office for information and still did n't get everything it wanted . Courts have also declined to require regulators to release information on competing bids to take over a failed thrift and have refused to help the Consumers Union get information on banks that are miscalculating interest rates . Former regulator James Barth said that when he was with the Bank Board , people would sometimes ask for information about an S &L; that , unbeknownst to them , was in the thrift 's own annual report and on file with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission , but the Bank Board still would n't give it out .
domestication: 话说回头，联邦存款保险公司（FDIC）甚至曾经起诉审计长办公室以获取信息，但仍然没有得到他们想要的一切。法院也拒绝要求监管机构公开有关接管失败储蓄机构的竞争性投标的信息，并拒绝帮助消费者联盟获取有关错误计算利率的银行的信息。前监管官员詹姆斯·巴斯说，在他在银行委员会任职期间，人们有时会询问有关某个储蓄和贷款机构的信息，而他们不知道，这些信息实际上已经在该机构自己的年度报告中公开，并已提交给美国证券交易委员会（SEC），但银行委员会仍然不予提供。这种情况让人感叹“明知故闭”，也就是说，有些信息虽然已经公开，但如果你不知道它存在，你就无法获取。这说明，即使信息是透明的，如果你不知道它的存在，也就等于没有。

source: That 's about the same time that Keel and his colleagues began studying a cluster of galaxies called Abell 2125 , located some 1 billion light-years from Earth . Observations with the Very Large Array radio telescopes near Socorro , N.M. , showed that the cluster contains an unusually large number of galaxies that are high-intensity radio emitters . C153 is among them . The radio emissions indicated that the galaxies either contain supermassive black holes or have recently undergone a burst of star formation .
domestication: 大概在那时，基尔和他的同事开始研究一个叫做Abell 2125的星系团，它离地球大约有10亿光年远。在新墨西哥州索科罗附近的甚大阵列无线电望远镜进行的观测显示，该星系团含有异常多数量的高强度射电星系，而C153就是其中之一。这些射电信号表明这些星系或者包含了超大质量黑洞，或者最近经历了一次恒星形成的爆发。
foreignization: 大约在那时，基尔和他的同事开始研究一个被称为阿贝尔2125的星系团，这个星系团距离地球大约10亿光年。在新墨西哥州索科罗附近的甚大阵射电望远镜的观察表明，该星系团包含有一个异常大量的高强度射电源星系。C153就在其中。射电信号表明这些星系要么包含超大质量黑洞，要么最近经历了一次恒星形成的爆发。

source: Will it work ? Last September Lorie demonstrated his approach at the National Library of the Netherlands , successfully translating a PDF version of a scientific paper on drug research into his universal format . The reconstruction not only kept the look of the original 's fonts and formatting , it also created " metadata " to clue in future users about its content .
domestication: 这招管用吗？去年九月，Lorie在荷兰国家图书馆做了演示，他成功地将一篇关于药物研究的科学论文的PDF版本转换成了他的通用格式。重构不仅保留了原文的字体和格式，还创建了“元数据”，让未来的用户了解其内容。这一下子就解决了格式兼容性问题，真是一箭双雕！不过，我们也得看看长期效果如何，毕竟，万事开头难嘛。

source: The second lesson we learned was to test out the intervention models espoused in the literature about minorities before acting . My review of the community health literature on African Americans , for example , found ample support for the dictum that any change or introduction of services in the community requires the sanction of African American churches . I took this lesson to heart and sought help from an African American pastor , who accompanied me to several churches where I delivered what I thought was a scintillating presentation on the benefits of the support group and how this fit into the scope of the " missionary societies " that each church operated . At the end of each presentation , I announced the time and location of the support group meetings-at the pastor 's own church .
domestication: 我们学到的第二个教训是在采取行动之前，要先试验文献中关于少数群体的干预模式。我对社区健康文献的审查发现了大量证据，证明任何在社区实施的变革或引入服务都需要得到非裔美国人教堂的批准。因此，我采纳了这个教训，并寻求一位非裔美国牧师的帮助，他陪我去了几家教堂，我在那里做了一个精彩的演讲，介绍了支持小组的益处以及它如何融入每个教堂运营的“传教士协会”的范围内。在每次演讲结束时，我都会宣布支持小组会议的时间和地点——就在牧师自己的教堂里。这真是“有心没肺”，谁料到……
foreignization: 我们学到的第二个教训是，在行动之前要先测试文献中关于少数群体的干预模型。例如，我对非裔美国人社区健康文献的回顾发现，足够有力的证据支持这样一条原则：社区中任何的改变或服务的引入都需要得到非裔美国教堂的认可。我深刻地记住了这一教训，并向一位非裔美国牧师寻求帮助，他陪我去了几所教堂，我在那里发表了关于支持小组的益处以及这如何符合每个教堂运营的“传教士协会”范围的精彩演讲。在每次演讲结束时，我宣布了支持小组会议的时间和地点——就在牧师自己的教堂里。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The second lesson we learned was to test out the intervention models espoused in the literature about minorities before acting . My review of the community health literature on African Americans , for example , found ample support for the dictum that any change or introduction of services in the community requires the sanction of African American churches . I took this lesson to heart and sought help from an African American pastor , who accompanied me to several churches where I delivered what I thought was a scintillating presentation on the benefits of the support group and how this fit into the scope of the " missionary societies " that each church operated . At the end of each presentation , I announced the time and location of the support group meetings-at the pastor 's own church .

source: Webb has equally strong words of caution about backgrounds : " Putting them in last can cause a disaster , " he warns . " You must work on the background from the beginning . And when you 're painting it , imagine that it 's a wall of subdued colors , not just some puffy clouds . Use the background to accentuate various parts of the figure by creating contrast . For instance , make the lightest area of a figure the focal point by setting it up against a dark background . "
domestication: 韦伯对背景也有话要说，他特别提醒人们注意背景的重要性。他说：“如果把背景留到最后来画，那就可能会弄巧成拙。”他强调：“你必须从一开始就对背景下功夫。在画背景的时候，要想象它是一面有层次的墙，而不是什么蓬松的云朵。你需要利用背景来衬托人物的各个部位，通过对比来凸显焦点。比如说，你可以让人物中最亮的部分成为焦点，让它与深色的背景形成对比。”
foreignization: 韦伯关于背景也有同样强烈的警告：“把它们放在最后可能会造成灾难，”他警告说。“你必须从开始就处理背景。当你画它时，想象它是一个柔和颜色的墙，而不仅仅是一些蓬松的云。使用背景来通过形成对比来强调人物的各个部分。例如，通过将最亮的区域设置在深色背景下，使其成为焦点。

source: Amazon Prime 's video-on-demand service just unlocked a musical milestone : it will be airing the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame 's induction ceremony for the first time ever . HBO has been the Hall of Fame 's conventional broadcasting home , but from July 1st , devotees will be able to watch the event in over 30 countries and eight languages on any device supported by Amazon 's streaming service .
domestication: 亚马逊Prime 的视频点播服务刚刚创下了一个音乐里程碑：它将首次播出摇滚名人堂的入选仪式。以前，HBO一直是摇滚名人堂的常规播出平台，但从7月1日开始，粉丝们就可以在三十多个国家，八种语言的环境下，通过亚马逊的流媒体服务在任何设备上观看这场盛事。
foreignization: 亚马逊 Prime 的点播服务刚刚解锁了一个音乐里程碑：它将首次播出摇滚名人堂的入选典礼。HBO一直是名人堂的传统广播平台，但从7月1日开始，粉丝们将能够在支持亚马逊流媒体服务的任何设备上以8种语言在30多个国家观看该活动。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Amazon Prime 's video-on-demand service just unlocked a musical milestone : it will be airing the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame 's induction ceremony for the first time ever . HBO has been the Hall of Fame 's conventional broadcasting home , but from July 1st , devotees will be able to watch the event in over 30 countries and eight languages on any device supported by Amazon 's streaming service .
亚马逊Prime 的视频点播服务刚刚创下了一个音乐里程碑：它将首次播出摇滚名人堂的入选仪式。以前，HBO一直是摇滚名人堂的常规播出平台，但从7月1日开始，粉丝们就可以在三十多个国家，八种语言的环境下，通过亚马逊的流媒体服务在任何设备上观看这场盛事。

source: In their talks Keene and Rao are covering the skies and the weather , so when I do my first lecture I talk about the geology of the Hawaiian islands . They 're definitely volcanic , but they 're also situated a long way from the " ring of fire " around the Pacific Ocean , where colliding tectonic plates produce Mexico 's Paricutin and Washington State 's Mount St. Helens and all the others , up through Alaska and down through Kamchatka and Japan . Hawaii sits right in the middle of the biggest tectonic plate of all , where you do n't expect volcanoes to be . Yet the islands are nothing but a long string of volcanoes , the newest one , the Big Island , to the south and east of the island arc ; the others growing older as they stretch off to the north and west , past Kauai , as far as the eroded surface atolis and underwater seamounts that end the chain .
domestication: 基恩和饶在他们的演讲中聊到了天空和天气，所以当我开始我的第一场讲座时，我就来说说夏威夷群岛的地质情况吧。这些岛屿绝对是火山岛，但它们也位于太平洋的“火环”之外，那里是碰撞的板块造就了墨西哥的帕里库廷火山和美国华盛顿州的圣海伦斯火山，以及阿拉斯加和堪察加半岛、日本等地的众多火山。而夏威夷却恰好坐落在所有板块中最大的一个板块的正中央，你不太会料到这里会有火山。然而，这些岛屿却是一个又一个火山组成的长链，最年轻的一个就是大岛，位于岛弧的南部和东部；其他岛屿随着向北和西伸展而逐渐老化，直到考艾岛，甚至延伸到被侵蚀的表面和水下海山，形成了一条绵延的火山链。
foreignization: 在他们的演讲中，基恩和拉奥正在讨论天空和天气，因此当我做我的第一场讲座时，我谈论了夏威夷群岛的地质。它们绝对是火山，但它们也位于太平洋周围的“火环”很远处，在那里碰撞的板块产生了墨西哥的Paricutin和华盛顿州的圣海伦斯山以及所有其他山脉，向上延伸到阿拉斯加，向下延伸到堪察加半岛和日本。夏威夷恰好位于所有最大的板块中间，是你不期望会有火山的地方。然而，这些岛屿除了一个长长的火山链外什么都没有，最新的火山，即大岛，位于岛弧的南部和东部；其他火山随着向北和西部延伸而变得越来越老，越过考艾岛，直到被侵蚀的表面 atol 和结束该链的水下海山。

In their talks Keene and Rao are covering the skies and the weather , so when I do my first lecture I talk about the geology of the Hawaiian islands . They 're definitely volcanic , but they 're also situated a long way from the " ring of fire " around the Pacific Ocean , where colliding tectonic plates produce Mexico 's Paricutin and Washington State 's Mount St. Helens and all the others , up through Alaska and down through Kamchatka and Japan . Hawaii sits right in the middle of the biggest tectonic plate of all , where you do n't expect volcanoes to be . Yet the islands are nothing but a long string of volcanoes , the newest one , the Big Island , to the south and east of the island arc ; the others growing older as they stretch off to the north and west , past Kauai , as far as the eroded surface atolis and underwater seamounts that end the chain .

source: If this all seems rather quaint , then Susan Minot 's 2002 novella , Rapture -- about a single blowjob -- was perhaps a last , jaw-aching hurrah . A genuinely twenty-first-century spokesman can be found in Jonathan Franzen 's Freedom , in the form of young Joey Berglund , whose sexual maturity -- compared with the guys he 's at college with -- is conveyed simply and vehemently . Their yearnings center on the blowjob , which Joey considers " little more than a glorified jerkoff . "
domestication: 如果这一切都显得有些过时，那么苏珊·米诺特（Susan Minot）2002年出版的小说《狂喜》（Rapture），也许是对这种古板的最后一次大张旗鼓的告别。这部小说讲述了一个口交的故事。一个真正的21世纪发言人可以在乔纳森·弗兰岑（Jonathan Franzen）的《自由》（Freedom）中找到，他的名字叫乔伊·伯格伦德（Joey Berglund），他是大学里的年轻人。他的性成熟度与大学里的伙伴们相比，简单却强烈地表达出来。他们的渴望都集中在口交上，乔伊认为口交“不过是一种高尚的撸管而已”。

source: Her recollections are confirmed by Ron Haskins , a Republican child-welfare advocate who was the staff director of the Ways and Means Human Resources Subcommittee at the time the ASFA passed . He says Hillary Clinton was n't engaged with the Republicans generally . " I never heard from Hillary or anybody on her staff , " says Haskins , who now works at the Brookings Institution think tank . " I do n't have an ax to grind against her . Just never talked to her . "
domestication: 希拉里回忆的这些细节得到了罗恩·哈斯金斯的证实，他是一位共和党儿童福利倡导者，当ASFA法案通过时，他是众议院筹款委员会人力资源小组委员会的工作人员主任。他说，希拉里·克林顿当时基本不与共和党人接触。“我从来没有收到过希拉里的来信或者她工作人员的拜访”，如今在布鲁金斯学会智库工作的哈斯金斯如是说，“我对她没有什么怨恨，只是我们根本没怎么联系过。”
foreignization: 她 的 回忆 得到了 罗恩·哈斯金斯 的 确认 ， 哈斯金斯 是 一位 共和党 儿童 福利 倡导者 ， 他 在 《 收养 与 安全 家庭 法案 》 通过 时 是 方式 和 手段 人力 资源 小组委员会 的 工作 人员 主任 。 他 说 希拉里 · 克林顿 没有 与 共和党人 一般 接触 。 “ 我 从来 没有 听说 过 希拉里 或者 她 的 工作人员 ， ” 哈斯金斯 说 ， 现在 在 布鲁金斯 学会 智库 工作 。 “ 我 没有 什么 私人恩怨 可以 对付 她 ， 只是 从来 没有 跟 她 谈过话 。 ”

"

source: At a bit over 18 pounds , the Composite 's weight is its most prominent weakness . Yet , calling it a weakness is n't really fair : The weight is average for the price point , but we noticed the difference on group rides , when we struggled to keep up with riders on lighter bikes . If every sub-$2,000 bike was stiff , rode great and hit the scales at the UCI limit , we 'd all be riding one . Barring that , hitting two out of those three attributes is still amazing. -R.K .
domestication: 这辆自行车的重量在18磅上下，这是它最明显的弱点。不过，说它是弱点也不太公平：它的重量在这个价位上算是平均水平，但是当我们和骑着轻便自行车的骑手一起骑行时，我们还是能感觉出差异，追不上他们的速度。如果每一辆价格低于2000美元的自行车都很坚固，骑起来很棒，重量也达到国际自行车联合会（UCI）的极限，那么我们都应该骑这样的自行车吧。虽然不能达到全部三个条件，但是能达到其中两个已经很厉害了。-R.K.
foreignization: 在略高于18磅的重量下，复合材料的重量是它最突出的弱点。然而，将其称为弱点并不完全公平：对于该价格点来说，这个重量是平均的，但我们在团体骑行时注意到了这种差异，当时我们很难跟上骑着轻便自行车的骑手。如果每辆低于2000美元的自行车都很刚性，骑乘体验很好，并且达到UCI极限，我们都会骑这样的自行车。除此之外，在这三个属性中占据两项仍然令人惊讶。-R.K.

If every sub-$2,000 bike was stiff , rode great and hit the scales at the UCI limit , we 'd all be riding one . Barring that , hitting two out of those three attributes is still amazing. -R.K .

source: 8 . Two more veteran names I know teams are monitoring as potential trade targets ( and this is not saying they 're on the block ... yet ) : Jaguars LB Telvin Smith and Broncos CB Chris Harris . The former was absent from the start of Jacksonville 's offseason program , and subsequently called out by EVP Tom Coughlin . The latter is n't happy with his contract . He 's on the books for $7.9 million for the 2019-20 season , his walk year , a significantly lower rate than what his new teammate Kareem Jackson ( 3 years , $33 million ) just got , something he 's said to have taken note of .
domestication: 另外两个老将可能会被交易，他们分别是杰克逊维尔美洲虎队的线卫泰尔文·史密斯和丹佛野马队的角卫克里斯·哈里斯。泰尔文·史密斯错过了杰克逊维尔队的季前训练，并被球队高层汤姆·考夫林批评。至于克里斯·哈里斯，他对自己的合同不满，因为明年就是他的最后一年，薪水只有790万美元，而他的新队友卡里姆·杰克逊刚刚以3年3300万美元的价格续约，这让他觉得自己被低估了。
foreignization: 8 . 我知道还有两位老将，球队正在监视他们作为潜在的交易目标（这并不是说他们会被交易……暂时还不会）：杰克逊维尔美洲虎队的线卫特尔温·史密斯和丹佛野马队的角卫克里斯·哈里斯。前者缺席了杰克逊维尔的离季前训练计划的开始，并且随后被执行副总裁汤姆·考夫林批评。后者对他的合同不满。他在2019-20赛季的薪水为790万美元，是他的最后一个赛季，远远低于他新队友卡里姆·杰克逊（3年3300万美元）刚刚获得的薪水，这也让他产生了一些想法。

8 . Two more veteran names I know teams are monitoring as potential trade targets ( and this is not saying they 're on the block ... yet ) : Jaguars LB Telvin Smith and Broncos CB Chris Harris . The former was absent from the start of Jacksonville 's offseason program , and subsequently called out by EVP Tom Coughlin . The latter is n't happy with his contract . He 's on the books for $7.9 million for the 2019-20 season , his walk year , a significantly lower rate than what his new teammate Kareem Jackson ( 3 years , $33 million ) just got , something he 's said to have taken note of .

8 . 我知道还有两位老将，球队正在监视他们作为潜在的交易目标（这并不是说他们会被交易……暂时还不会）：杰克逊维尔美洲虎队的线卫特尔温·史密斯和丹佛野马队的角卫克里斯·哈里斯。前者缺席了杰克逊维尔的离季前训练计划的开始，并且随后被执行副总裁汤姆·考夫林批评。后者对他的合同不满。他在2019-20赛季的薪水为790万美元，是他的最后一个赛季，远远低于他新队友卡里姆·杰克逊（3年3300万美元）刚刚获得的薪水，这也让他产生了一些想法。

source: The biologists raised eyebrows even more by suggesting that this Hsp90-based evolution mechanism could help explain the rapid bursts of body-plan changes that occasionally punctuate the fossil record . Most evolutionary theory predicts small , gradual changes in a species over long periods and is hard-pressed to explain such morphological explosions .
domestication: 生物学家提出了更让人费解的理论：这种基于Hsp90的进化机制可以帮助解释为什么化石记录中会偶尔出现快速的身体结构变化。 大多数进化理论都预测物种会在漫长的时间内逐渐发生微小的变化，但很难解释为什么会突然发生如此巨大的形态爆发。 这就好像大自然在玩“瞬间变身”游戏一样，让我们既困惑又着迷。

source: Lack of accountability . Because they 're not licensed to dispense drugs or because they do so in a way that violates the law , operators of rogue sites do n't usually divulge critical information about their operation : their owners ' names ; their location ; and the names , qualifications , and specialties of their consulting doctors . In fact , you 'd be hard pressed to contact a prescribing doctor . When Marks called the phone number on his bottle of Meridia and asked to speak to the doctor named on the bottle , his request was denied . PAYING THE PRICE

source: So , after a year 's search , I am left with nothing . During my research , I have realized that I never tried to imagine my mother 's suffering at her own mutilation , or to experience her fear and frustration with her unrelenting decline . She did not encourage me to do so either . Her approach , always , was to protect those she loved . After all , she had seen me off to Paris , forbidding anyone to tell me what was about to happen to her . I never opened myself to her pain .
domestication: 就这样，我找了整整一年，却一无所获。在寻找的过程中，我才意识到自己从来没有尝试去想象母亲遭受残害时的感受，也没有去体验她面对病情恶化时的恐惧和沮丧。她也不曾鼓励我这么做。她的做法一直是保护她爱的人。毕竟，她在我离开去巴黎之前，曾告诫所有人不要告诉我将要发生在她身上的事情。我从来没有真正理解她的痛苦。
foreignization: 那么，在经过一年的寻找之后，我还是一无所获。在我的研究过程中，我意识到我从来没有尝试去想象我母亲在被阉割时的痛苦，或者体验她在她的健康状况不可逆转地下滑时的恐惧和沮丧。她也没有鼓励我这样做。她的方法一直是保护她爱的人。毕竟，她曾让我一个人去巴黎，并不允许任何人告诉我她将要发生的事情。我从未向她的痛苦敞开心扉。

So , after a year 's search , I am left with nothing . During my research , I have realized that I never tried to imagine my mother 's suffering at her own mutilation , or to experience her fear and frustration with her unrelenting decline . She did not encourage me to do so either . Her approach , always , was to protect those she loved . After all , she had seen me off to Paris , forbidding anyone to tell me what was about to happen to her . I never opened myself to her pain .
就这样，我找了整整一年，却一无所获。在寻找的过程中，我才意识到自己从来没有尝试去想象母亲遭受残害时的感受，也没有去体验她面对病情恶化时的恐惧和沮丧。她也不曾鼓励我这么做。她的做法一直是保护她爱的人。毕竟，她在我离开去巴黎之前，曾告诫所有人不要告诉我将要发生在她身上的事情。我从来没有真正理解她的痛苦。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

So , after a year 's search , I am left with nothing . During my research , I have realized that I never tried to imagine my mother 's suffering at her own mutilation , or to experience her fear and frustration with her unrelenting decline . She did not encourage me to do so either . Her approach , always , was to protect those she loved . After all , she had seen me off to Paris , forbidding anyone to tell me what was about to happen to her . I never opened myself to her pain .
那么，在经过一年的寻找之后，我还是一无所获。在我的研究过程中，我意识到我从来没有尝试去想象我母亲在被阉割时的痛苦，或者体验她在她的健康状况不可逆转地下滑时的恐惧和沮丧。她也没有鼓励我这样做。她的方法一直是保护她爱的人。毕竟，她曾让我一个人去巴黎，并不允许任何人告诉我她将要发生的事情。我从未向她的痛苦敞开心扉。

source: He was 20 years old and knew nothing about business , and the first year of running the gym was often terrifying . Heavin struggled to find money to pay the gym 's electricity bill and often spent his nights on the floor of the facility 's daycare center . But in the process , he learned a few things about himself . First , he loved the fitness business . Plus , he was a good salesperson , particularly when it came to dealing with women . He soon limited the gym 's membership to women only and named it Women 's World of Fitness .
domestication: 二十岁的他对商业一窍不通，第一年经营健身房的经历常常令他心惊胆战。他为了支付健身房的电费而四处筹钱，有时甚至要在健身房的托儿所地板上度过夜晚。但是在这个过程中，他还是学到了些关于自己的东西。首先，他发现自己热爱健身行业。另外，他还是一个擅长销售的人，尤其是在与女性打交道时。于是，他很快将健身房的会员限定为女性，并将其命名为“女性健身世界”。

source: It is not clear how Walker wound up in Afghanistan . A friend from a San Francisco mosque told NEWSWEEK that he received an e-mail from Walker a month before he left Bannu for the " cooler mountains " in May of this year . " He was intrigued by Afghanistan , " said the friend . " He said he was interested in getting a bird's-eye view of how Sharia was being applied . " ( In Bannu , Walker turned down the offer of an air conditioner as decadent , but he took an additional $1,200 from his father . ) In his search for purity , Walker gravitated to the most extreme expression of Islam , the Taliban .
domestication: 沃克是怎么跑到阿富汗去的就不得而知了。旧金山一座清真寺的朋友跟新闻周刊说，他在今年五月份收到了沃克从班努发来的电子邮件，沃克当时正准备离开班努前往“凉爽的山区”。这位朋友说：“他对阿富汗很感兴趣，他想近距离观察一下伊斯兰教法是怎么执行的。” （在班努的时候，沃克拒绝了别人提供的空调，说这是腐朽的享受，但是他从父亲那里再要了一千两百美元。） 在寻求纯洁的过程中，沃克逐渐被塔利班这种最极端的伊斯兰教表达形式所吸引。

source: First introduced in comic books in 1941 ( not long after Marvel Comics debuted a similar hero , the Sub-Mariner ) , the Atlantean adventurer Aquaman has had a choppy journey to the big screen . Never the most popular of the DC superheroes , the character has been rebooted and retconned multiple times over the past 70-plus years , although the basic elements of his origin story have remained fairly constant . Arthur " Aquaman " Curry is the mixed-race son of a human lighthouse keeper and a refugee from the underwater city of Atlantis . He has the power to communicate with aquatic creatures , and to perform superhuman feats of strength and speed underwater . As a founding member of the original Justice League back in 1960 , he 's part of DC 's core .
domestication: 水行侠这个角色是1941年在漫画书中首次亮相的，那时候漫威漫画公司也推出了一个类似的英雄，海底王。 这个亚特兰蒂斯冒险家到大银幕上的路很坎坷。水行侠从来都不是DC最受欢迎的超级英雄，他在过去的七十多年里被重启和重新改写了很多次，尽管他起源故事的基本元素一直保持得比较稳定。亚瑟·“水行侠”·柯里是个混血儿，他的母亲是一个来自水下城市亚特兰蒂斯的难民，父亲是一个人类的灯塔看守。他拥有与水生生物交流的能力，并且能在水下完成超人的强壮和速度。作为1960年最初的正义联盟的创始成员，他是DC核心的一部分。

First introduced in comic books in 1941 ( not long after Marvel Comics debuted a similar hero , the Sub-Mariner ) , the Atlantean adventurer Aquaman has had a choppy journey to the big screen . Never the most popular of the DC superheroes , the character has been rebooted and retconned multiple times over the past 70-plus years , although the basic elements of his origin story have remained fairly constant . Arthur " Aquaman " Curry is the mixed-race son of a human lighthouse keeper and a refugee from the underwater city of Atlantis . He has the power to communicate with aquatic creatures , and to perform superhuman feats of strength and speed underwater . As a founding member of the original Justice League back in 1960 , he 's part of DC 's core .

source: Janus Venture . You might expect this $245 million Denver no-load to be our riskiest entry , since it specializes in small-company stocks , a notoriously flighty corner of the market . But under manager James Craig , 34 , who has run the fund since 1985 , Venture has been only 80% as volatile as the S &P; 500 , even while beating the market by an average of 4.5 percentage points over each of the past three years . Craig 's secret , in large part , is his willingness to shed stocks when he considers the market shaky . In early August , the fund was a cautious 25% in cash , and in light of the Mideast crisis , Craig is in no hurry to put that money to work : " Rising oil prices could keep interest rates high , which is not good for my kind of stocks . "
domestication: Janus Venture基金看起来似乎是个危险的选择，因为它专门投资小公司股票，这一块在市场上一直很难预测。但是，在詹姆斯·克雷格（James Craig）的管理下，这只价值2.45亿美元的丹佛无载基金却表现得相当稳健。自1985年开始管理该基金以来，34岁的克雷格带领Venture基金仅以S&P 500的80%的波动性运行，同时在过去三年里平均每年比市场高出4.5个百分点。克雷格的秘密在于，他愿意在认为市场不稳定时抛售股票。八月初，这只基金持有25%的现金，考虑到中东危机的影响，克雷格并不急于投资这些资金。他表示：“随着油价上涨，利率可能会保持高位，对我的投资来说并不是好消息。”
foreignization: 雅努斯创业基金。你可能会认为，这只24.5亿美元的丹佛无销售费基金是我们最具风险的投资，因为它专注于小型公司股票，这是一个臭名昭著的市场动荡角落。但是在詹姆斯·克雷格（James Craig）的管理下，他从1985年开始管理该基金，创业基金仅仅比标准普尔500指数波动了80%，即使在过去三年中，每年平均都超越了市场4.5个百分点。克雷格的秘密，在很大程度上，是他愿意在他认为市场不稳定时抛售股票。在八月初，该基金谨慎地持有25%的现金，鉴于中东危机，克雷格毫无迫切感去运用这笔资金：“不断上涨的油价可能会使利率维持高位，对于我这种类型的股票来说并不是好事。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Janus Venture . You might expect this $245 million Denver no-load to be our riskiest entry , since it specializes in small-company stocks , a notoriously flighty corner of the market . But under manager James Craig , 34 , who has run the fund since 1985 , Venture has been only 80% as volatile as the S &P; 500 , even while beating the market by an average of 4.5 percentage points over each of the past three years . Craig 's secret , in large part , is his willingness to shed stocks when he considers the market shaky . In early August , the fund was a cautious 25% in cash , and in light of the Mideast crisis , Craig is in no hurry to put that money to work : " Rising oil prices could keep interest rates high , which is not good for my kind of stocks . "

source: Kerwin , along with a couple who built a home near the gun club in 2007 , filed a federal lawsuit in December 2011 , alleging that the club is violating numerous environmental laws and is a noise nuisance , and that stray projectiles from the club are striking his property , according to published reports in the Mail Tribune . The ultimate goal ? To disseminate her teachings throughout the country .
作为今年的获奖者，科恩将获得一笔1.5万美元的津贴，在基金会度过一个夏天，在那里她将有机会“调整、改进、完善并进一步发展她的教学创新”，沃德说。最终目标是什么？就是在全国范围内推广她的教学方法。

source: SoGen International . Despite its name and French sponsor ( the megabank Societe Generale ) , this uniquely flexible 3.75%-load fund defies categorization as a conventional international fund -- or , for that matter , as a conventional anything . Recently , Jean-Marie Eveillard , 50 , SoGen 's helmsman since 1979 , had 26% of the $203 million portfolio in U.S. stocks , 14% in foreign equities , 28% in U.S. and foreign bonds , 8% in gold and a liberal 24% in cash . Such broad diversification has helped make SoGen not only the least volatile of our four growth choices , but also less risky than 194 of the 196 growth funds we follow . At the same time , the five-year average annual gain has been superb : 17% compared with 13.8% for the typical growth fund .
domestication: 苏根国际基金（SoGen International）尽管名字中带有法文，背后又有法国跨国银行（东方汇理银行）撑腰，但这个奇特的、手续费仅为3.75%的基金却不按常规出牌，根本无法被归类为传统的国际基金，或者说，它与其他传统基金完全不同。最近，这只基金的掌舵人让-玛丽·埃维亚德（Jean-Marie Eveillard），在1979年就已经开始掌控这只基金，他大胆地将2030万美元的资产配置中，26%投资于美国股票，14%投资于外国股票，28%投资于美国和外国债券，8%投资于黄金，甚至还有一大笔24%的现金储备。这样的广泛多元化配置，使得苏根国际基金不仅成为我们四个增势选项中波动性最小的，也比我们关注的196只增势基金中的194只都要低风险。与此同时，过去五年的平均年回报也非常出色，高达17%，而普通增势基金的年回报只有13.8%。
foreignization: SoGen International ，尽管其名称及赞助商（大型银行 Societe Generale ）具有法式风格，但这只独特的、管理费率为 3.75% 的基金打破了传统国际基金的范畴，事实上也打破了任何传统基金的模式。最近，自 1979 年以来担任 SoGen 舵手的 50 岁的 Jean-Marie Eveillard 将 2.03 亿美元投资组合中的 26% 投资于美国股票、14% 投资于外国股票、28% 投资于美国及外国债券、8% 投资于黄金以及充裕的 24% 投资于现金。这种广泛的多元化使得 SoGen 不仅成为我们四个成长选项中波动性最小的，而且比我们跟踪的 196 个成长基金中的 194 个风险更低。同时，过去五年的平均年回报也非常出色：17% 相比典型成长基金的 13.8% 。

source: What information is released is not only difficult for lay people to interpret but also may be based on wildly misleading figures . The nation 's banks and thrifts produce their own quarterly reports , which are in turn analyzed for the investment community by financial rating firms . But the firms ' analyses rely on figures supplied by the financial institutions themselves . ( And occasionally the ratings outfits reaped big bucks for their glowing reports at the very same time regulators were privately noting serious problems . )
domestication: 现在公布的信息不但让外行人难以理解，而且可能是基于极度误导性的数据。全国的银行和储蓄机构会发布自己的季度报告，这些报告会被金融评级机构分析，以便投资者使用。但这些机构的分析依赖于金融机构自己提供的数据。（有时候，评级机构会因为发布光鲜的报告而赚取大笔钱，而在同一时间，监管机构私下却已经发现了严重的问题。）这样一来，信息的可靠性就值得怀疑了。
foreignization: 被公开的信息不仅让非专业人士难以解读，而且可能是基于极具误导性的数据。该国的银行和储蓄机构会产生自己的季度报告，然后这些报告会被金融评级公司分析，供投资界使用。但是，这些公司的分析依赖于金融机构自己提供的数据。（有时候，评级机构在监管机构私下里注意到严重问题的同时，为其制定出光鲜的报告而获得了大量资金。）

( And occasionally the ratings outfits reaped big bucks for their glowing reports at the very same time regulators were privately noting serious problems . )

source: This , almost more than any other aspect of my mother 's disease , has haunted me since the night I awoke and began asking questions . How could she have done this to herself ? How could she , with her personal and family medical history , have neglected to have a mammogram for so long ? In the mountain of material I have amassed over the past year , I stumbled across the only explanation that seems to make any sense . It was buried in an editorial in the Journal of the National Cancer Institute .
domestication: 我一直被一个问题困扰着，它几乎比我母亲疾病的其他任何方面都更让我难以释怀，那就是从我醒来并开始追问真相的那一刻起，我就忍不住地想：她怎么能这样对自己？凭借她个人的和家庭的医学史，她怎么能这么久都不做乳腺X光检查呢？在过去一年里我搜集到的大量材料中，我偶然发现了唯一一个看起来有道理的解释。这是在国家癌症研究所杂志的一篇社论中被淹没的内容。
foreignization: 这件事，几乎比我母亲疾病的其他任何方面都更让我感到困扰，从我醒来并开始提问的那晚开始。 她怎么能这样对自己？凭借她个人和家庭的病史，她怎么能这么长时间不进行乳腺X光检查？在过去一年里，我积累了大量的材料，但我偶然发现了唯一一个看起来有道理的解释。在国家癌症研究所杂志的一篇社论中。

source: That does not include the sanctuary of Yellowstone , but it once did . When the world 's first national park was established in 1872 , it was a haven for big-game hunters who reasoned that coyotes , wolves , mountain lions , and other predators unfairly cut into their take . So hunters and park managers began lacing carcasses with strychnine and broken glass and dynamiting dens to kill any scavenging " flesh-eaters . "
domestication: 黄石公园的避难所不在其列，不过曾经如此。1872年，当世界上第一个国家公园成立时，这里成为了大型猎物猎人的天堂，他们认为郊狼、狼、山狮等掠食者会让他们损失利益。于是，猎人和公园管理员开始在动物尸体中下毒，甚至使用碎玻璃和炸药炸毁洞穴来杀死任何靠吃腐肉为生的“食肉动物”。
foreignization: 那并不包括黄石公园的避难所，但它曾经包括。 当世界上第一个国家公园在 1872 年建立时，那是一个大型猎人游戏场所，他们认为郊狼，狼，美洲狮和其他捕食者不公平地夺取了他们的猎物。所以猎人和公园管理员开始在尸体中添加氰化物和破碎的玻璃，并用炸药炸毁巢穴，以杀死任何“食肉”的生物。

source: Some have speculated that one of the captured Wasp Network spies provided federal agents with the information that led them to Montes . This seems unlikely . " The Cuban intelligence service is one of the best in the world , " says a former CIA official . They almost certainly would have built firewalls between Montes and the Wasp Network . Yet it 's difficult to keep all their efforts completely compartmentalized .
domestication: 有人推测被抓的黄蜂网络间谍之一向联邦特工提供了线索，导致他们找到蒙特斯。但是这种说法不太可能成立。前中央情报局官员说：“古巴的情报机构是世界上最好的之一。”他们绝对会在蒙特斯和黄蜂网络之间筑起隔离墙。但是，要把所有的事情完全分开并不容易，这就像要把水装进篮子里一样，难免会有漏洞。
foreignization: 一些人推测，击落黄蜂网络间谍之一为联邦特工提供了有关蒙特斯的信息。这似乎是不太可能的。“古巴情报机构是世界上最好的之一，”一名前中央情报局官员说。他们几乎肯定会在蒙特斯和黄蜂网络之间建立防火墙。然而，要完全隔离他们的所有努力是很困难的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Some have speculated that one of the captured Wasp Network spies provided federal agents with the information that led them to Montes . This seems unlikely . " The Cuban intelligence service is one of the best in the world , " says a former CIA official . They almost certainly would have built firewalls between Montes and the Wasp Network . Yet it 's difficult to keep all their efforts completely compartmentalized .
有人推测被抓的黄蜂网络间谍之一向联邦特工提供了线索，导致他们找到蒙特斯。但是这种说法不太可能成立。前中央情报局官员说：“古巴的情报机构是世界上最好的之一。”他们绝对会在蒙特斯和黄蜂网络之间筑起隔离墙。但是，要把所有的事情完全分开并不容易，这就像要把水装进篮子里一样，难免会有漏洞。

messages_foreignization.content:

Some have speculated that one of the captured Wasp Network spies provided federal agents with the information that led them to Montes . This seems unlikely . " The Cuban intelligence service is one of the best in the world , " says a former CIA official . They almost certainly would have built firewalls between Montes and the Wasp Network . Yet it 's difficult to keep all their efforts completely compartmentalized .
一些人推测，击落黄蜂网络间谍之一为联邦特工提供了有关蒙特斯的信息。这似乎是不太可能的。“古巴情报机构是世界上最好的之一，”一名前中央情报局官员说。他们几乎肯定会在蒙特斯和黄蜂网络之间建立防火墙。然而，要完全隔离他们的所有努力是很困难的。

source: Qutb later returned to Egypt , quit the civ service , and joined the Muslim Brotherhood . He welcomed Gamal Abdel Nasser 's coup against the corrupt monarchy of King Farouk in 1952 , but then became dislusioned with Nasser for failing to institute Sharia law . He opposed Nasser , and was subsequently arrested and tortured . However , he continued to write and agitate for Islam and against Western civilization , particularly against Jews , whom he blamed for atheistic materiaHsm and considered the worst enemies of Muslims . He was released for a time , but eventually was re-arrested , convicted of conspHacy against the government and hanged in 1 966 .
domestication: 后来，库特布回到埃及，辞去公职，加入了穆斯林兄弟会。他欢迎1952年贾马尔·阿卜杜勒·纳赛尔对腐败的法鲁克国王实施的政变，但是之后他对纳赛尔失望，因为纳赛尔没有实施伊斯兰教法。他反对纳赛尔，结果被捕并遭受酷刑。然而，他继续写作并鼓动人们支持伊斯兰教，反对西方文明，尤其是反对犹太人，他认为犹太人是无神论的物质主义者，并且是穆斯林最大的敌人。他被释放了一段时间，但最终又被重新逮捕，被判定阴谋反对政府，并在1966年被处以绞刑。

source: In 1984 , Harper 's magazine Index , a page of pointedly selected stats . What Counts : The Complete Harper 's Index ( Henry Holt . $12.95 ) tells us that 26 brand-name products appear in " Back to the Future , Part II " and that 30,000 Americans hold Pan Am reservations for a trip to the moon-or did , before other airlines took over many of its routes . Is Delta ready for this ?
domestication: 1984年，《哈珀斯》杂志的索引页上有一些耐人寻味的统计数据。《什么才是重要的：完整的哈珀斯索引》（Henry Holt出版社出版，售价12.95美元）告诉我们，在电影《回到未来2》中出现了26个品牌产品，同时也有3万名美国人持有泛美航空公司去月球旅行的预订——当然，这是在其他航空公司接管其很多航线之前。德尔塔航空公司是否准备好了迎接这样的挑战呢？

source: " It 's a mistake for conservationists or the Tanzanian government to make this a matter of wildebeest versus economic development . Rather , the wildebeest are part of the economic development of the region , " says Richard Leakey , whose parents discovered some of the oldest human ancestors at Olduvai Gorge next to the Serengeti and who himself once served as director of the Kenya Wildlife Service , responsible for protecting the northern part of the migration . " The issue is whether this highway , as it is now planned , will kill the goose that lays the golden egg . I believe it will . But with a different design , the migration and the highway can both easily exist in a win-win solution . "
domestication: 保护主义者和坦桑尼亚政府不应该把这件事当成是角马和经济发展的对立问题。理查德·利基说，角马实际上是该地区经济发展的一部分。他自己的父母曾在塞伦盖蒂旁边的奥杜瓦伊峡谷发现了一些人类最早的祖先，他自己也曾担任肯尼亚野生动物服务机构的主任，负责保护迁徙路线的北部。问题在于：按照现在的规划修建这条公路，会不会杀死那只下金蛋的鹅？我相信，会的。但如果设计得当，迁徙和公路完全可以共存，实现双赢。
foreignization: ”保护主义者或坦桑尼亚政府把这件事看作是角马和经济发展的对立，是一个错误。“相反，角马是该地区经济发展的一部分，”理查德·李奇说，他的父母在塞伦盖蒂旁边的奥杜瓦伊峡谷发现了一些人类最早的祖先，他自己曾担任肯尼亚野生动物服务机构的主任，负责保护迁徙的北部地区。“问题是，如果这条公路按照现在的计划修建，会不会杀死下金蛋的鹅。我相信会的。但是，如果设计得不同，迁徙和公路可以轻松地共存，达到双赢的解决方案。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" It 's a mistake for conservationists or the Tanzanian government to make this a matter of wildebeest versus economic development . Rather , the wildebeest are part of the economic development of the region , " says Richard Leakey , whose parents discovered some of the oldest human ancestors at Olduvai Gorge next to the Serengeti and who himself once served as director of the Kenya Wildlife Service , responsible for protecting the northern part of the migration . " The issue is whether this highway , as it is now planned , will kill the goose that lays the golden egg . I believe it will . But with a different design , the migration and the highway can both easily exist in a win-win solution . "

source: Facebook is facing backlash after a Cleveland man uploaded a video of himself shooting someone to the social network , and followed it with a Live video confessing to the murder . The slaying and its subsequent distribution across Facebook has raised questions about how the company moderates violent content .
domestication: 脸书近日遭遇了一场声誉危机。克利夫兰一名男子上传了一段自己枪杀他人的视频到该社交平台，并紧接着直播了自己承认谋杀的过程。整个事件让网民对脸书处理暴力内容的能力产生了疑问。
foreignization: Facebook面临强烈反对，因为克利夫兰一名男子上传了一段自己枪杀某人到社交网络的视频，并随后跟着发布了一个承认谋杀的直播视频。该谋杀案及其随后的在Facebook上的传播引发了人们对公司如何审查暴力内容的质疑。

source: As Sunday-afternoon children 's parties go , the Nov. 30 birthday celebration in a quiet neighborhood of Pueblo , Colo. , was a standard free-for-all . " My son Dezmond was just learning how to throw rocks , " says Brian Huckabay , 24 , the father of 20-month-old twins Dezmond and Diego . " He would pick up a rock and throw it , then pick it up again and throw it farther . Before you know it , he was zinging the rocks . source: Nonetheless , several authorities on American cultural trends agree that ingrained animosity towards Spanish persists in pockets throughout this society : from the Europhiles in the upper echelons who find the language dclass to the middle-classic Hispanic-Americans who want to shed their hyphenated backgrounds ( or want their children to ) , to the struggling laborers in the lower strata who resent the growing Hispanic presence in the American workforce and see the Spanish language as the embodiment of their competition .
domestication: 尽管如此，很多专家都认为，在美国社会的各个角落，尤其是在一些特定群体中，仍然存在对西班牙语的深层次反感。比如说，一些精英阶层的人可能因为自己更喜欢欧洲文化而瞧不起西班牙语；有些中产阶级的拉美裔美国人可能希望抛弃自己的复合身份（或者希望自己的孩子这么做）；另外，还有一些底层劳动者可能会因为西班牙语使用者的不断涌入美国职场而感到怨恨，并把西班牙语看作是他们竞争的象征。这些现象都说明了，在美国社会的不同层面上，仍然存在着对西班牙语和西班牙文化的偏见和排斥。
foreignization: 尽管如此，几位美国文化趋势的权威人士均同意，在这个社会的某些角落中，根深蒂固的对西班牙语的敌意仍然存在：从上层的亲欧派人士认为这种语言低俗到中产阶级的西班牙裔美国人想要摆脱他们带连接线的背景（或者想要他们的孩子这样做），再到下层苦苦挣扎的劳动者，他们怨恨日益增长的西班牙裔在美国劳动力队伍中的存在，并且认为西班牙语是他们竞争对手的体现。

source: The Canadian health system already imposes limits on premiums and budget spending . Under Canada 's government-funded health system , established nationwide in 1971 , patients shoulder little or none of the cost of their care . This predictably has escalated demands for services and thus prompted a steady tightening of government regulations to control costs . The results : physician fees are rigidly controlled and the introduction of new technology and certain services are limited . ( See " Should We Adopt Canada 's Health Care System ? " CR , May 1990 . ) To see how the Clinton plan might affect patients , therefore , it is instructive to look at what global budgets and price controls have meant for Canada .
domestication: 加拿大现有的医疗体系已经对保费和预算支出设定了限制。在加拿大政府资助的医疗体系中，成立于1971年的全国性医疗保障制度，让患者几乎不需要承担任何医疗费用。结果可想而知，人们对医疗服务的需求就大幅增加，这促使政府不断加强控制成本的规定。因此，医生的收费被严格控制，新技术和某些服务的推出受到限制。（参见“我们应该采用加拿大的医疗体系吗？”CR，1990年5月）。所以，要了解克林顿计划可能如何影响患者，我们可以看看全球预算和价格管控对加拿大产生的影响。
foreignization: 加拿大的医疗体系已经对保费和预算支出实施了限制。在加拿大于1971年在全国范围内建立的政府资助的医疗体系中，患者几乎不承担或不承担任何医疗费用。这可预测地导致了对服务的需求增加，并因此引发了一系列控制成本的政府法规的不断收紧。结果是：医生的费用受到严格控制，新技术和某些服务的引入受到限制。（参见“我们应该采纳加拿大的医疗保健制度吗？”，CR，1990年5月。）因此，要了解克林顿计划可能如何影响患者，看看全球预算和价格管制对加拿大意味着什么是很有启发性的。

source: At Courier Happy Hour you meet people like Scrooge , a quiet , imposing figure in Olympian good shape with ocher skin , matted dreadlocks , and missing front teeth . At 41 , Scrooge is the dean of the Washington bike messengers . He works with Action Couriers ( Dispatcher #135 ) and makes about $500 a week . " We do real work , " Scrooge boasts . " And we 're good at it . We 're like the Pony Express , man -- heroes , thirty times a day . "
domestication: 在快递员的聚会上，你会遇到一些很有特点的人，比如守财奴。他是一个四十岁出头的壮汉，皮肤黝黑，头发打结成了一团乱糟糟的一片，前面几颗牙齿不见了。他是华盛顿快递公司的老大，工作很努力，能赚到五百美元一周。“我们是真正在干活儿，”他夸耀道：“而且我们还挺擅长的。就像当年的‘马背快邮’一样，每天都有三十次机会当英雄。”
foreignization: 在快递员的高兴时光中，你会遇到像Scrooge这样的人，一个安静、令人敬畏的人物，以奥林匹克运动员般的好身体、赭色的皮肤、纠结的恐怖头发和缺失的前牙。41岁的Scrooge是华盛顿自行车快递员的代表人物。他与Action Couriers合作（调度员#135），每周收入约500美元。"我们做着真正的工作，"Scrooge夸耀道。"而且我们擅长这项工作。我们就像Pony Express一样，伙计——英雄，每天三十次。"

source: It 's been five days since the bodies of seven adults and a 16-year-old boy were found shot in their homes in the hills near Piketon , a poor Appalachian Mountain town roughly 80 miles east of Cincinnati . Authorities say they 've interviewed more than 50 people but have n't made arrests or confirmed a motive for the slayings .
domestication: 就在五天前，在辛辛那提市东边大约八十英里的一个叫皮克顿的小镇附近的山丘里，七名成年人和一个十六岁的男孩惨死在家中，凶手将他们全部枪杀。警察声称他们已经采访了五十多个人，但还没有逮捕任何嫌疑人，也没有确认作案动机。这起惨案发生在一个位于阿巴拉契亚山脉的贫困小镇，至今仍然没有任何进展。
foreignization: 自从在匹克顿附近的山区发现七名成年人和一名16岁男孩被枪杀的尸体，已经过去了五天。匹克顿是一个大约在辛辛那提东边80英里处的贫穷的阿巴拉契亚山镇。 当局称，他们已经采访了超过50人，但是没有逮捕任何人，也没有证实这些杀戮的动机。

source: In the afternoon Taralon and I wander the streets in search of the blue-and-white patterns that inspired the intricate designs of Bleus d'Ailleurs . At the Galerie Tindouf , a boutique selling ceramics and art on the Rue de la Libert , we find 19th-century Moroccan butter jars that resemble enormous lidded vases with the same pattern as his salad plates . Taralon winks at me . In Tangier the color combination is everywhere : on the wall of a riad , the two colors splitting apart in dense stripes as if magnetized , effectively cutting the building in half ; in the ever-changing hues of the sea , a glimpse of which always seems to be right around the corner of the next building .
domestication: 下午，我和Talaron在街头漫步，寻找那些蓝白相间的图案，它们曾经启发了Bleus d'Ailleurs的精美设计。在Rue de la Libert的大街上有一家叫做Galerie Tindouf的精品店，里面出售陶瓷和艺术品，我们在那里发现了一些19世纪的摩洛哥黄油罐，形状像巨大的带盖的花瓶，图案与Talaron的沙拉盘一模一样。他对我眨了眨眼。在丹吉尔，这种蓝白色的组合随处可见：在一座里亚德的墙壁上，两种颜色以密集的条纹分开，就像磁铁吸引一般，将整栋建筑切成了两半；在海洋不断变化的色彩中，似乎每次转过一个街角都会瞥见大海的一丝影子。

At the Galerie Tindouf , a boutique selling ceramics and art on the Rue de la Libert , we find 19th-century Moroccan butter jars that resemble enormous lidded vases with the same pattern as his salad plates . Taralon winks at me . In Tangier the color combination is everywhere : on the wall of a riad , the two colors splitting apart in dense stripes as if magnetized , effectively cutting the building in half ; in the ever-changing hues of the sea , a glimpse of which always seems to be right around the corner of the next building .

source: Using the Play Store for the prompt would require an Android device to have Google 's app store pre-loaded -- and licensing tweaks made to the OS in Europe last year were supposedly intended to enable OEMs to choose to unbundle Google apps from Android forks . Ergo making only the Play Store the route for enabling choice would be rather contradictory . ( As well as spotlighting Google 's continued grip on Android . )
domestication: 为了满足这个要求，安卓设备需要预装谷歌的应用商店。但是去年在欧洲进行的操作系统授权调整，原本是为了让设备制造商能够自行决定是否将谷歌应用与安卓系统捆绑销售。因此，如果只允许通过应用商店来实现这一选择，似乎有些矛盾。同时，这也凸显了谷歌对安卓系统的控制力依然很强。

source: But it 's not their hypocrisy that most amazes me . It 's their ignorance . Many are under the impression that people who hang their clothes on a line , fix their own cars , and are door-to-door vendors are exhibiting cultural ( specifically Latino ) traits . However , these are not cultural traits , but traits poor people , regardless of ethnic background , exhibit .
domestication: 他们的虚伪并不是让我最感到惊讶的，反而是他们的无知。很多人认为挂衣服在绳子上、自己修车、挨家挨户卖东西都是某些文化（尤其是拉丁裔）的特征。但事实上，这些行为并非什么文化的特征，而是穷人，所有种族的穷人，共同的特点。换句话说，穷人不论是什么国籍，都会一样的为节省钱而省吃俭用，靠自己动手来维持生活。
foreignization: 但令我惊讶的并不是他们的虚伪，而是他们的无知。很多人认为那些把衣服挂在绳子上、自己修车、挨家挨户叫卖的人是在表现出一种文化（尤其是拉丁美洲人的）特征。然而，这些并不是文化特征，而是穷人不论种族背景如何都会表现出的特征。

source: The feud burst into the open earlier this month when Dustin Nemos , a prolific conspiracy theorist and one of the book 's co-authors , tweeted that fans should stop asking him when the QAnon book would come out as an audiobook . Nemos blamed " JoeM , " another co-author , as the reason for the hold-up , saying JoeM was afraid of making too much money from the book and being called a " grifter " -- the ultimate insult for QAnon boosters .
domestication: 这场纷争在这个月初爆发，当时阴谋论者Dustin Nemos在推特上说，粉丝们应该停止问他QAnon的书什么时候会以有声读物的形式出版，Nemos归咎于另外一位作者"JoeM"，说JoeM害怕从这本书中赚太多钱，然后被称为"骗子"，对于QAnon的支持者来说，这是终极侮辱。

source: Maintaining that balance between feminism and femininity is especially tricky in the pop mainstream ; it has taken Crow a while to be accepted on her own terms . Aside from the obvious classic-rock influences that inform the textures on Music Club , there are lyrics that convey brutal candor and celebrate independence , two virtues that -- before Madonna , at least -- were n't traditionally associated with light female pop .
domestication: 在大众音乐中，保持女权主义和女性气质之间的平衡尤其困难，克劳以自己的方式被接受花了很长时间。在《音乐俱乐部》中，除了明显的经典摇滚影响外，还有一些歌词带有残酷的坦率，庆祝独立，这两种美德在麦当娜之前至少并不是轻松的女性流行音乐的传统特征。直白地说，在流行音乐界，要既能展现女性气质，又能坚持女权主义价值观，确实是个难得的平衡。
foreignization: 在流行音乐主流中保持女权主义和女性气质之间的平衡尤其棘手；克罗一直以来都很难被人们按照她的本来面目接受。除了那些明显的经典摇滚影响，这些影响为《音乐俱乐部》的大气音色提供了信息之外，还有一些歌词传达着残酷的坦率，并且赞美独立，至少在麦当娜之前，这两种美德并没有与轻松的女性流行音乐联系在一起。

这些日子里，网站几乎出售从Allegra到Zyban的所有东西，包括经常被滥开的抗生素。在“按规则行事的好处”中，对我们自己的购物之旅进行了详细介绍，可以在对页找到。我们不能购买的东西 - 麻醉品、兴奋剂、镇静剂和甾体激素 - 是由美国缉毒局（DEA）监管的受控物质。DEA官员审查那些经常被滥用的药物的处方，以追踪和起诉非法出售或购买它们的人。这里是伤害

source: In a sense the plot of every book is much the same . A character did something reprehensible twenty or thirty or forty years ago-in the war , perhaps , or in Canada . Now things begin to fall apart , and , even as Archer rushes around trying to forestall disaster , the guilty and innocent alike are sucked down into the primordial Freudian ooze .
domestication: 看起来每个故事的剧情都差不多：某个人二十年、三十年或四十年前曾经干过什么见不得人的事，比如在战争中或者加拿大发生的事。现在一切开始变得混乱，而阿切尔四处奔忙试图避免灾难的发生时，无论是有罪还是无罪的人，都被拉进了原始的精神分析泥潭中，似乎无法自拔。

source: Recently , twenty art instructors from around the country were invited to the school for a seminar called The Power of Art -- Educating Students With Learning Disabilities , the school 's first such program . Some of the instructors were accredited teachers , some were professional artist-teachers , and one was adocent-turned-teacher . They displayed their students ' quilts , self-portrait masks , ethnic puppets , sculptured animals , totempoles , and hieroglyphics created for history , writing , and science projects .
domestication: 近日，来自全国各地的二十位艺术教师受邀来到学校参加了一场题为“艺术的力量——教育有特殊需要的学生”的研讨会，这是学校第一次举办这样的活动。其中一些教师具有认证教师资格，有些是专业的艺术家教师，还有一位是从医生转行成为教师的。他们展示了学生们的作品，如拼布画、自画像面具、民族木偶、雕刻动物、图腾柱和象形文字，这些都是为历史、写作和科学项目创作的。这些作品展示了艺术在教育中的力量，也让我们看到这些有特殊需要的学生的潜力。

source: Any legislation that would increase accountability and oversight would be welcome . However , rogue sites wo n't go away without a curb on two enablers in the process : the doctors who review questionnaires and the customers . Doctors who participate can face criminal prosecution for prescribing across state lines without an appropriate license . They can also have their medical license suspended or revoked because writing prescriptions to unseen patients falls far below the acceptable standard of patient care .
domestication: 其实，这种现象最好是能通过立法来加强监管和监督。然而，即使这样，也不一定能根治，因为始终有一些不法网站在作祟，这些网站的运营离不开两大帮凶：一是那些审核问卷的医生，二是那些购买药物的顾客。那些参与这种勾当的医生可能会面临刑事起诉，因为他们在没有获得适当许可的情况下跨州开处方。这还不算，他们的医师执照可能还会被吊销或取消，因为给看不见的病人开处方的行为实在有违常规。
foreignization: 任何能够提高问责制和监督的法律都将受到欢迎。然而，违规网站不会在限制两个过程中的两个推动者之后消失：审查问卷的医生和顾客。参与其中的医生可能会因没有适当许可证而跨州开处方而面临刑事起诉。他们还可能因为给看不到的患者开处方而被吊销或撤销行医执照，这远远低于可接受的患者护理标准。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Any legislation that would increase accountability and oversight would be welcome . However , rogue sites wo n't go away without a curb on two enablers in the process : the doctors who review questionnaires and the customers . Doctors who participate can face criminal prosecution for prescribing across state lines without an appropriate license . They can also have their medical license suspended or revoked because writing prescriptions to unseen patients falls far below the acceptable standard of patient care .
其实，这种现象最好是能通过立法来加强监管和监督。然而，即使这样，也不一定能根治，因为始终有一些不法网站在作祟，这些网站的运营离不开两大帮凶：一是那些审核问卷的医生，二是那些购买药物的顾客。那些参与这种勾当的医生可能会面临刑事起诉，因为他们在没有获得适当许可的情况下跨州开处方。这还不算，他们的医师执照可能还会被吊销或取消，因为给看不见的病人开处方的行为实在有违常规。

source: Creating large-scale pastel paintings is one of my greatest pleasures . The medium offers a fantastic intensity of color as well as the potential for developing a wide range of textures . When working on supports that are larger than the standard-size papers available at local art-supply stores , I take special consideration in choosing the right paper , handling and applying the pastel , and framing the finished piece . CHOOSING THE RIGHT PAPER
domestication: 我最大的乐趣之一，就是创作大规模的粉彩画。这种媒介不仅可以呈现出惊艳的色彩强度，还能让人在质地上尽情发挥。 当我在标准的本地艺术用品商店里找不到合适的大尺寸纸张时，我会特别注意选择合适的纸张，处理和施加粉彩，以及完成后如何装裱作品。首先来说说选择纸张这件事儿。

source: Tim Peters had been an amateur vegetable breeder for more than a decade when he read that Territorial Seed Company was looking for a vegetable breeder . He could not imagine anything more wonderful than being paid to breed vegetables . But he had only a high-school diploma . Nevertheless , he screwed up his courage and went to talk with the people at Territorial -- and ended up losing his amateur status . He now handles the seed company 's trial and breeding program .
domestication: 提姆·皮特斯（Tim Peters）当时已是业余蔬菜育种者超过十年了。这一年，他无意中看到一则Territorial 种子公司正在招聘蔬菜育种者的广告。他感觉这简直是天上掉下来的馅饼，对于能靠培育蔬菜赚钱，他简直无法想象更美好的事情了。但是，他只有高中学历。尽管如此，他还是鼓起勇气，前往Territorial 种子公司与他们洽谈。结果，他不再是业余的了，现在他已经成为Territorial 种子公司试验和育种计划的负责人。

source: The roughly 9,700-square-mile Serengeti ecosystem straddles two countries and two parks - Tanzania 's Serengeti and Kenya 's Masai Mara . The parks protect not only the wildebeest but also some 300,000 gazelles and 200,000 zebras . The migration sustains such predators as lions , leopards , cheetahs , and hyenas , along with a host of smaller species from vultures to dung beetles . As they have for millennia , all depend on the wildebeest returning year after year .
domestication: 塞伦盖蒂生态系统大约有九千七百平方英里，横跨两个国家和两个公园——坦桑尼亚的塞伦盖蒂和肯尼亚的马赛马拉。这些公园不仅保护了大迁徙的角马，还有大约三十万只羚羊和二十万只斑马。这个大迁徙支撑着各种掠食者，比如狮子、豹子、猎豹和斑鬣狗，以及从秃鹫到粪甲虫等一堆小动物。就像过去几千年一样，它们都依赖于角马每年一次的归来，这让整个生态系统保持着生机勃勃的景象。
foreignization: 大约9700平方英里的塞伦盖蒂生态系统横跨两个国家和两个公园-坦桑尼亚的塞伦盖蒂和肯尼亚的马赛马拉。这些公园不仅保护角马，还有大约30万只瞪羚和20万只斑马。迁徙维持着狮子、豹、猎豹和斑鬣狗等掠食者，以及从秃鹫到粪甲虫等一系列较小的物种。就像过去几千年一样，它们都依赖于角马每年返回。

The roughly 9,700-square-mile Serengeti ecosystem straddles two countries and two parks - Tanzania 's Serengeti and Kenya 's Masai Mara . The parks protect not only the wildebeest but also some 300,000 gazelles and 200,000 zebras . The migration sustains such predators as lions , leopards , cheetahs , and hyenas , along with a host of smaller species from vultures to dung beetles . As they have for millennia , all depend on the wildebeest returning year after year .

source: Promoting science and technology education to the exclusion of the humanities may seem like a good idea , but it is deeply misguided . Scientific American has always been an ardent supporter of teaching STEM : science , technology , engineering and mathematics . But studying the interaction of genes or engaging in a graduate-level project to develop software for self-driving cars should not edge out majoring in the classics or art history .
domestication: 只鼓励学生学理工科，忽视人文教育似乎是个好主意，但实际上这是个误区。《科学美国人》一直大力支持STEM教育，也就是说，理学、技术、工程和数学这些学科很重要。但是，研究基因相互作用或者搞自动驾驶汽车软件的研究生项目不应该把学习古典文学或艺术史这样的人文科学给挤出来。这些学科虽然不如理工科那样“实用”，但是对一个人的全面发展、对社会的进步同样重要。
foreignization: 推崇科学和技术教育而排斥人文科学似乎是一个好主意，但这种想法是极其错误的。美国科学家一直是热衷于支持STEM教育：科学、技术、工程和数学的坚定拥护者。但是，研究基因的相互作用或者从事一个开发自动驾驶汽车软件的研究生级别项目不应该抹杀主修古典学或者艺术史。

Promoting science and technology education to the exclusion of the humanities may seem like a good idea , but it is deeply misguided . But studying the interaction of genes or engaging in a graduate-level project to develop software for self-driving cars should not edge out majoring in the classics or art history .

source: Hudson was willing to meet them halfway -- even though an agreement took 13 grueling months . Franchisees could have 20-year contracts , with options to renew for another decade . They could join a revamped advisory council . Master franchisees could have first crack at new markets and protection from company encroachment .
domestication: 哈德森愿意与特许经营者半途相遇，尽管达成协议花了13个月的时间。特许经营者可以签订20年的合同，并且有续约十年的选项。他们还可以加入一个重新组建的咨询委员会。总加盟商可以抢先进入新市场，并且免受公司侵占。总之，只要双方都愿意妥协，问题就能迎刃而解。

source: MY MOTHER HAD LIED TO ME ABOUT HER BIOPSY . THE RESULTS actually showed that she had cancer of the right breast . But even worse news was ahead . When Dr. Citrone first examined her , he immediately noticed a dimple in the skin just below the nipple of her left breast and felt a firm mass beneath it . He also detected swelling in her lymph nodes . All of these findings were potential signals of cancer .
domestication: 我妈一直对我隐瞒了她活检的结果，原来她右边的乳房已经长了癌症。更糟糕的是，还有更坏的消息等着我们。当西特隆博士第一次给她检查时，他马上就发现左边乳房乳头下方的皮肤有一道坑，摸起来底下还有一团硬东西。他还发现她的淋巴结肿胀了，这些迹象都说明可能是癌症。
foreignization: 我母亲在她的活检结果问题上对我撒了谎。实际的结果显示，她患有右乳癌。但更糟糕的消息还在后面。当Citrone医生第一次检查她时，他立刻注意到她左乳头下方皮肤处有一个凹陷，并且感觉到在它下面有一块坚硬的肿块。他还发现她淋巴结肿胀。所有这些发现都是潜在的癌症信号。

source: Gretchen Daily 's timely interview on the subject of optimal population " Visions , " Nov. /Dec. recalls my first visit to Haiti some 15 years ago . Once the richest prize in the Caribbean , Haiti had already been almost completely denuded of its centuries-old tropical hardwoods , and the daily wash-off of topsoil had just about killed offshore fishing .
domestication: 格蕾琴·戴莉（Gretchen Daily）对“最优人口”这一话题的及时采访，让我想起了15年前我第一次访问海地的情景。当时，海地曾是加勒比地区最富有的国家，但已经基本上失去了它几个世纪以来的热带硬木，而每天的土壤冲刷几乎已经杀死了海上的捕鱼业。
foreignization: 格蕾琴·黛莉（Gretchen Daily）关于最佳人口“愿景”（Visions）的及时采访，（发表在11月/12月刊上），令我想起了大约15年前我第一次访问海地。当时，曾是加勒比地区最富有的国家的海地，已经几乎完全失去了它几个世纪以来的热带硬木树，而每日的表土流失差不多已经杀死了近海捕鱼。

source: Then came the questions . After a reporter said Trump had called Putin a " rival , " the American president responded , " Actually , I called him a competitor , and a good competitor he is . And the word competitor is a compliment . " Trump was then asked directly whether he held Russia responsible for anything ; he responded by saying everyone was responsible , before once again criticizing the United States . Over time , things degenerated in the ways that they tend to do when Trump is speaking . He kept ranting -- but again , in a more subdued fashion -- about his election win and kept making the point that the Mueller investigation was really about denying him a fair victory .
domestication: 然后，提问环节开始了。有记者说特朗普曾称普京是对手，特朗普马上纠正道：“我说他是个竞争对手，而且是一个很强的竞争对手，‘竞争对手’这词可是赞美呢。” 接下来，记者直接问特朗普是否认为俄罗斯该为某些事情承担责任，特朗普却回答说每个人都有责任，然后，又一次批评了美国。时间一长，这事就变成了特朗普说话时常见的情景：他不断发牢骚——虽然语气稍微收敛了一点——但还是一直在唠叨自己大选获胜的事，还一直在强调穆勒调查其实就是想抹黑他，否认他大选胜利的合理性。

source: Stanley Ellin ( 1916-86 ) . Stanley Ellin was a perfectionist , working slowly and deliberately , producing a page of typescript on a good day . He admitted to having rewritten the opening paragraph of a short story as many as forty times before going on to the next paragraph and polishing each subsequent page in similar fashion before proceeding further .
domestication: 斯坦利·埃林（1916-86）是个十足的完美主义者，工作起来慢条斯理，有一天好日子才写出一页打字稿。他自己也承认，曾经把短篇小说的开头段重写了四十遍才肯往下写，每一页都要这样反复修改，方能继续写下去。这样一来，他的写作速度自然不快，但写出来的文章自是十分精致。
foreignization: 斯坦利·埃林（1916-86）。 斯坦利·埃林是个完美主义者，工作缓慢而有条不紊，好的日子可以生产一页打字稿。他承认在继续下一段话之前，他曾将短篇小说的开头段落重写了多达四十次，并以类似的方式润色每个后续页面，然后再继续下去。

source: Lillemeier 's lab studied ZAP70 , a protein that associates with T cell receptors and becomes activated when the receptors recognize a foreign molecule . To track the activity and location of ZAP70 molecules , the team tagged them with a fluorescent marker while anchoring each T cell receptor in place . To the group 's surprise , ZAP70 molecules were being activated by the T cell receptors and then moving away , spreading throughout the cell .
domestication: 里尔梅耶的实验室研究了一种叫做ZAP70的蛋白质，这种蛋白质可以与T细胞受体结合，当受体识别到外来分子时就会被激活。为了跟踪ZAP70分子的活动和位置，研究团队在每个T细胞受体上标记了荧光标签。令他们惊讶的是，ZAP70分子被T细胞受体激活后并没有就地待着，而是四处游走，遍布整个细胞。
foreignization: Lillemeier实验室研究了ZAP70，一种与T细胞受体相关并在这些受体识别外来分子时激活的蛋白质。为了跟踪ZAP70分子的活动和位置，该团队在固定每个T细胞受体的地方用荧光标记标记它们。令该小组惊讶的是，ZAP70分子被T细胞受体激活，然后离开，扩散到整个细胞中。

source: All the food she and Ryan , her husband , buy is organic or natural , including the herbal tea she 's sipping . She uses cloth bags for purchases . Their German shepherd , Makana , eats natural dog food . Their bath towels , bed sheets , and bathrobes are made from organic cotton . She points out pieces of secondhand furniture--a small table , decorative tubs made of recycled tires .
domestication: 她和丈夫瑞恩买的东西全都是有机或天然的，比如她正在品尝的草药茶。她购物的时候都用布袋装。而他们家养的德国牧羊犬马卡纳吃的也是天然狗粮。他们家的浴巾、床单、浴袍全部都是由有机棉制成的。她指给我看一些二手家具：一张小桌子，还有一些由废旧轮胎改造的装饰性大盆。这些都体现了她对环保生活的热爱。

source: Describing the sensation of first seeing the biological children he 'd never known , Raul told me , " It released a lot of brain chemicals . It felt bigger than me . It was not a benign feeling . " I asked Raul if he 'd donate again , knowing how he feels now . He shrugged . " I probably would , " he said . " But then , I 'm open to chaos . " AuthorAffiliation
domestication: 当拉乌尔描述他第一次见到自己从未谋面的亲生孩子时，他告诉我：“那感觉像是释放了大量的脑内化学物质，让我觉得这一切都超出了我的控制范围。那绝对不是一种温和的感觉。”我问拉乌尔，如果让他重新选择一次，他是否还会捐献精子，考虑到他现在的感受。他耸了耸肩，说：“我可能还是会这么做，但这就是我，我总是乐于接受混乱。”

source: " We crushed the Caliphate of ISIS ... in 2014 , the ISIS Caliphate was eight million people . It had oil fields , it had wheat fields , it had taxation , and was recruiting actively in Europe and recruiting actively in the United States . He has physically destroyed the Caliphate . If you listen to the morning talk shows , you would think that all President Trump is doing is just following Obama 's plan . It could n't be farther from the truth . He told General Mattis , not a war of attrition , I want a war of annihilation . I want to physically destroy the Caliphate in Mosul , in Raqqa and other cities . He 's done that , and I do n't think he 's gotten the credit . "
domestication: 2014年时，ISIS的哈里发国有八百万人，他们拥有油田、麦田，甚至有税收制度，并且在欧洲和美国积极招募新成员。但是特朗普总统已经彻底摧毁了这个哈里发国。如果你听早间脱口秀，你可能会以为特朗普只是在执行奥巴马制定的计划。但事实根本不是这样，他告诉马蒂斯将军，“我不想要消耗战，我要的是毁灭战。我要彻底摧毁ISIS在摩苏尔、拉卡等城市的势力。”他做到了这一点，但我认为他并没有得到应有的肯定。

source: Largely through the efforts of this postwar establishment , Americans came to support the Marshall Plan , the liberalization of trade and a neo-Keynesian fiscal strategy . Establishment organizations were also critical in winning national acceptance of the early civil rights movement . They served as orchestral conductors that transformed the cacophony of interests and associations into acceptable initiatives on behalf of the national interest .
domestication: 在战后重建中，美国人主要通过这种体制的努力，逐渐支持了马歇尔计划、贸易自由化和新凯恩斯主义财政策略。这类组织在早期民权运动的推动中也发挥了关键作用。他们就像指挥家一样，将各种各样的利益和团体声音整合成了代表国家利益的和谐乐曲。在这个过程中，他们扮演了桥梁和润滑剂的角色，使得不同的声音和力量能够凝聚成推动社会进步的强大势头。
foreignization: 在很大程度上是由于战后这一体制的努力，美国人开始支持马歇尔计划、贸易的自由化和新凯恩斯主义的财政策略。体制组织在赢得全国对早期民权运动的接受方面也发挥了至关重要的作用。他们起到了乐队指挥家的作用，将各种利益和协会的不和谐转变为代表国家利益的可接受的倡议。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Largely through the efforts of this postwar establishment , Americans came to support the Marshall Plan , the liberalization of trade and a neo-Keynesian fiscal strategy . Establishment organizations were also critical in winning national acceptance of the early civil rights movement . They served as orchestral conductors that transformed the cacophony of interests and associations into acceptable initiatives on behalf of the national interest .

在很大程度上是由于战后这一体制的努力，美国人开始支持马歇尔计划、贸易的自由化和新凯恩斯主义的财政策略。体制组织在赢得全国对早期民权运动的接受方面也发挥了至关重要的作用。他们起到了乐队指挥家的作用，将各种利益和协会的不和谐转变为代表国家利益的可接受的倡议。

source: It seems these days we 're living in the midst of a true crime renaissance , particularly when those awful crimes seem to happen in the state of Wisconsin . Like Making a Murderer , the SXSW premiere documentary Beware the Slenderman probes beyond the headlines into the human side of a horrific act -- in this case , a murder attempt five months in the making by Anissa Weier and Morgan Geyser on their unsuspecting classmate , whom they lured into the woods to kill one Saturday morning following Geyser 's sleepover birthday party .
domestication: 最近好像是真实犯罪纪录片的复兴时期，尤其是那些惨绝人寰的案件居然频繁发生在威斯康星州。就像《谋杀入门课》一样，《提防细长人》这部在SXSW首映的纪录片，也深入探讨了悲剧背后的故事，这个案件涉及到安妮莎·维尔和摩根·吉泽两名少女对一名同学的预谋杀人，他们花了五个月的时间策划，最终在一个星期六的早晨，在摩根的睡衣派对过后，将受害者骗进树林实施杀戮。
foreignization: 最近，似乎我们正处于一场真正犯罪的复兴之中，尤其是当那些可怕的罪行发生在威斯康星州时。像《制作谋杀者》一样，SXSW首映的纪录片《小心修长人》深入报道了一个骇人听闻的行为背后的故事 -- 在这种情况下，这是一起安妮萨·维尔（Anissa Weier）和摩根·盖瑟（Morgan Geyser）在五个月的酝酿后，对毫无防备的同学企图谋杀的案件，他们将这个同学诱骗到树林里在星期六早上谋杀，之前的一个晚上，摩根的生日聚会刚刚结束。

source: His death has great symbolic significance , because of the status he had attained during the 10 years since Sept 11 , but it is impossible to gauge the significance of bin Laden 's death unless - and until - we recognize the simple fact that our encounter with what he stood for began much earUer than Sept 1 1 , 2001 .
domestication: 他的死有着极高的象征意义，因为他在九一一事件发生后的十年里已经成为一个举足轻重的人物，但如果不去承认我们与他所代表的意识形态的初次接触远早于2001年9月11日这一事实，那么就不可能真正理解他之死的意义。
foreignization: 他死亡具有非常重大的象征意义， 因为他在九月十一日恐怖袭击事件发生十年以來所取得的地位， 但是除非——而且直到——我们承认一个简单的事实：与他代表的东西的遭遇早于2001年9月11日，否则就不可能衡量本拉登死亡的重要性。

source: The staff of life may be exactly that , scientists from the National Cancer Institute say . Their study of 388,122 men and women found that those who ate the most fiber from grains -- an average of 9 grams a day for women -- were 19% less likely to die over the nine-year research period than those who ate the least . They were also 28% less likely to die from cardiovascular disease . Although the high-fiber eaters took in a lot from fruits , veggies , and beans , whole grains were the key , say the researchers , probably because of the foods ' anti-inflammatory prowess . To fill up on whole-grain fiber , try these carb superstars .
domestication: 米饭可是真的是生命的粮食啊，美国国家癌症研究所的科学家说。他们对38.8万男女的研究发现，那些吃谷物纤维最多的人——女性平均每天9克——在九年的研究期间死亡率比吃得最少的人低了19%。同时，他们死于心血管疾病的几率也降低了28%。尽管高纤维食客从水果、蔬菜和豆类中摄入了很多纤维，但研究人员表示，整粒谷物才是关键，可能是因为这些食物具有抗炎作用。要想吃足整粒谷物纤维，可以尝试以下主食超级明星。
foreignization: 国家癌症研究所的科学家说，面包可能确实是维持生命的东西。他们对 388,122 名男性和女性的研究发现，那些从谷物中食用最多纤维的人——女性平均每天食用 9 克 ——在九年的研究期间死亡的可能性比食用最少的人低 19%。他们死于心血管疾病的可能性也低了 28%。尽管高纤维食用者从水果、蔬菜和豆类中摄入了很多，但研究人员说，全谷物是关键，可能是由于这些食物的抗炎作用。要充分补充全谷物纤维，可以尝试这些碳水化合物超级食品。

source: Yes , but it was catastrophic . The tiny settlement was called La Navidad because the plan to set it up was made on Christmas Day of 1492 . Located in a shallow bay off the northeast coast of the large island that Columbus called Hispaniola , the site was not the most advantageous , but then Columbus had not exactly chosen it . Nor had it been his intention to establish a colony . The heady step of planting Europeans in the New World came about as the result of the shipwreck of the Santa Maria . While Columbus slept on Christmas Eve , his helmsman ran the flagship aground on the reefs of a Haitian bay .
domestication: 是的，不过结果却是一场灾难。这个小殖民地被称为纳维达德，是因为1492年圣诞节那天制定了建立它的计划。位于大岛伊斯帕尼奥拉岛东北海岸外的一个浅湾，这个地方并不是最理想的，但当时哥伦布也没有精心选择过。况且，他也从来没打算建立一个殖民地。将欧洲人安置在新大陆的这个大胆步骤，是由圣玛丽亚号的船难导致的。在圣诞节前夜，哥伦布睡着了，他的舵手让旗舰搁浅在海地一个海湾的礁石上。
foreignization: 是的，但这是一场灾难。这个小定居点叫做拉纳维达，因为建立它的计划是在1492年圣诞节那天制定的。位于哥伦布称之为伊斯帕尼奥拉的大岛东北海岸的一个浅湾中，这个地点并不是最有利的，但当时哥伦布并没有精心选择它。他也没有打算建立一个殖民地。在新大陆上安置欧洲人的这一大胆步骤，是因为圣玛丽亚号的沉没所致。当哥伦布在圣诞节前夜睡觉时，他的舵手把旗舰开到了一個海地湾的礁石上。

messages_domestication.content:

Yes , but it was catastrophic . The tiny settlement was called La Navidad because the plan to set it up was made on Christmas Day of 1492 . Located in a shallow bay off the northeast coast of the large island that Columbus called Hispaniola , the site was not the most advantageous , but then Columbus had not exactly chosen it . Nor had it been his intention to establish a colony . The heady step of planting Europeans in the New World came about as the result of the shipwreck of the Santa Maria . While Columbus slept on Christmas Eve , his helmsman ran the flagship aground on the reefs of a Haitian bay .
是的，不过结果却是一场灾难。这个小殖民地被称为纳维达德，是因为1492年圣诞节那天制定了建立它的计划。位于大岛伊斯帕尼奥拉岛东北海岸外的一个浅湾，这个地方并不是最理想的，但当时哥伦布也没有精心选择过。况且，他也从来没打算建立一个殖民地。将欧洲人安置在新大陆的这个大胆步骤，是由圣玛丽亚号的船难导致的。在圣诞节前夜，哥伦布睡着了，他的舵手让旗舰搁浅在海地一个海湾的礁石上。

source: It 's getting harder and harder to decide whether to laugh or worry about the Russian military Gotterdammerung in the Baltic States . In places like Paplaka , once-haughty military units appear to have collapsed into barely disciplined bands of uniformed scavengers , vandals , and drunks . But that is only half the picture .
domestication: 俄罗斯在波罗的海国家所展开的军事行动，让人越来越难以决定是该笑还是该担心了。在像帕普拉卡这样的地方，曾经骄傲的军队似乎已经分崩离析，变成了一群只穿着军装的扒手、破坏公物的人和酒鬼。但这只是事情的一个方面。
foreignization: 越来越难以决定是嘲笑还是担心俄罗斯军队在波罗的海国家的厄运。在像帕普拉卡这样的地方，曾经高傲的军事单位似乎已经崩溃成了几乎没有纪律的穿着制服的拾荒者、破坏者和酒鬼。但这只是情况的一半。

In places like Paplaka , once-haughty military units appear to have collapsed into barely disciplined bands of uniformed scavengers , vandals , and drunks . But that is only half the picture .
越来越难以决定是嘲笑还是担心俄罗斯军队在波罗的海国家的厄运。在像帕普拉卡这样的地方，曾经高傲的军事单位似乎已经崩溃成了几乎没有纪律的穿着制服的拾荒者、破坏者和酒鬼。但这只是情况的一半。

source: While in Stewart , I heard stories about the wild hermit who lived in the Bob Quinn Lake area near the fire tower . His bare feet would inevitably beat a path to my door , people said . His reputation as an unpredictable barbarian left such an impression in my mind that when I bought a buck knife it was n't with the bears in mind .
domestication: 我在斯图尔特的时候，听说过关于一个住在鲍勃奎恩湖附近的火塔区域的野人，他是个隐士。人们都说，这个人脚上从不穿鞋，总是赤脚，他迟早会来敲我的门。他的名声太大了，大家都觉得他是个不可预测的野蛮人。所以，当我买了一把鹿牌刀的时候，我第一反应不是为了防备熊，而是为了防备这个人。

source: The predictable result of all this special-interest cash and legislative career-mindedness is lawmakers who can not be dislodged . During the 1960s , one third of all state legislative seats turned over every electoral season . In 1988 , only 16 percent changed hands . Incumbents win by bigger margins today , too .
domestication: 这些特殊利益集团的钱和立法者们的唯恐天下不乱的想法必然导致了这样一个后果：议员变成了铁打的米缸。上世纪60年代，每届选举都会有三分之一的州议会席位易主。到1988年，换手率只有16%了。现在连当选差距都越来越大了。
foreignization: 所有特殊利益集团的资金和立法职业思想的可预测结果是，无法撼动立法者。在20世纪60年代，每个选举季度，都有三分之一的州立法席位更换。到1988年，只有16%的席位易手。如今，现任者以更大的优势获胜。

source: But as with many of the recommendations , there was n't a centralized strategy for deploying party reps to such events . Mahoney says teams were never formally organized and dedicated to the goal as the report suggested . Instead , who attended and how often was up to local parties , local RNC staffers and their availability -- an approach that still netted 40,000 new voters over the past year at hundreds of naturalization ceremonies . The return on voter registrationswas small , the RNC concedes -- yet it 's a result that could have been bolstered by a more concerted effort .
domestication: 这就像很多建议一样，没有一个集中策略来部署党代表参加这些活动。马霍尼说，团队从未正式组织起来并致力于目标，就像报告所建议的那样。相反，谁参加以及参加频率取决于地方党派、地方共和党工作人员和他们的可用性——这种方法在过去一年中仍然为数百场归化典礼带来了4万名新选民。虽然共和党全国委员会承认注册选民的回报很小，但这可能是通过更集中的努力得出的结果。

But as with many of the recommendations , there was n't a centralized strategy for deploying party reps to such events . Mahoney says teams were never formally organized and dedicated to the goal as the report suggested . Instead , who attended and how often was up to local parties , local RNC staffers and their availability -- an approach that still netted 40,000 new voters over the past year at hundreds of naturalization ceremonies . The return on voter registrationswas small , the RNC concedes -- yet it 's a result that could have been bolstered by a more concerted effort .

source: Speaking of Disney , the good news is that Fantasia , the beloved animated celebration of classical music , will finally be available for holiday gift giving this year ( Walt Disney Home Video . $24.99 for video alone , $99.99 for Deluxe Collector 's package ; also on laser disc ) . The bad news is that this will be the first and last time the original will be offered for home viewing . Furthermore , the next time the landmark feature is released theatrically , in 1996 or 1997 , it will appear under the title " Fantasia Continued , " with some of the eight original sequences replaced by new selections . NEWSWEEK to Disney : in our opinion , the apprentice sorcerer with the big ears has an ironclad no-cut contract .
domestication: 说到迪士尼，有一件好消息，那就是深受人们喜爱的动画音乐片《幻想曲》终于在今年可以作为假日礼物（华特迪士尼家庭录像带公司出品，仅录像带24.99美元，豪华收藏版99.99美元，也有激光唱片版）。坏消息是，这将是原版《幻想曲》唯一一次面向家庭影视的发行。况且，1996年或1997年，这部开创性的影片再次在电影院上映时，将会以“幻想曲续篇”的名义发行，一些原来的八个片段将被新的选段所取代。新闻周刊对迪士尼的看法是：我们认为那个大耳朵的学徒巫师有一个铁板钉钉的不能剪辑的合同。

source: Five . As a consequence , the GOP 's share of the Latino vote has indeed been on a declining path . But how responsible is Pete Wilson or Proposition 187 for this ? Wilson himself received 23 percent of the Hispanic vote in 1994-a better performance than that of Dan Lungren , who received only 17 percent of Latinos in 1998 after running a campaign that stressed his support for immigration and his Catholic sympathy for Hispanic values . It is highly implausible that Latino voters would punish Lungren more harshly than Wilson for Wilson 's sins .
domestication: 五、结果，共和党在拉丁裔选民中的支持率确实一直在下滑。但是，这到底是彼得·威尔逊还是187号提案的责任呢？威尔逊自己在1994年获得了23%的拉丁裔选票，这个成绩比丹·朗格伦在1998年要好，后者尽管强调他对移民的支持和对拉丁裔价值观的天主教同情，但只获得了17%的拉丁裔选票。很难让人相信拉丁裔选民会因为威尔逊的过错而惩罚朗格伦。

Five . As a consequence , the GOP 's share of the Latino vote has indeed been on a declining path . But how responsible is Pete Wilson or Proposition 187 for this ? Wilson himself received 23 percent of the Hispanic vote in 1994-a better performance than that of Dan Lungren , who received only 17 percent of Latinos in 1998 after running a campaign that stressed his support for immigration and his Catholic sympathy for Hispanic values . It is highly implausible that Latino voters would punish Lungren more harshly than Wilson for Wilson 's sins .

Five . As a consequence , the GOP 's share of the Latino vote has indeed been on a declining path . But how responsible is Pete Wilson or Proposition 187 for this ? Wilson himself received 23 percent of the Hispanic vote in 1994-a better performance than that of Dan Lungren , who received only 17 percent of Latinos in 1998 after running a campaign that stressed his support for immigration and his Catholic sympathy for Hispanic values . It is highly implausible that Latino voters would punish Lungren more harshly than Wilson for Wilson 's sins .
五、其结果，共和党在拉丁裔选民中的份额确实在下降。但皮特·威尔逊或第187号提案对此究竟有多大的责任？威尔逊自己在1994年获得了23%的西班牙裔选票，这个表现优于丹·朗格伦，在1998年，他只获得了17%的拉丁裔选民的选票，而他曾在竞选期间强调他支持移民，并表示同情拉丁裔价值观的天主教情怀。令人难以置信的是，拉丁裔选民会比惩罚威尔逊更严厉地惩罚朗格伦，因为威尔逊的过错。

source: The new steps may still not be enough to reverse the impending personnel crisis in the federal government . But to many , they are an important and long overdue change in direction that may once again make a career in public service attractive to a broader segment of the workforce . " Government workers have often been the punching bag of politicians , comedians , and the news media , " says Max Stier , president of the Partnership for Public Service . " But for people whose top priority is to make a difference rather than a dollar , the federal government is a great place to be . " PUBLIC-SERVICE CHALLENGE

The new steps may still not be enough to reverse the impending personnel crisis in the federal government . source: James : The conversation between Jon and Sansa when she asks if he did it for love for the North is incredibly telling about who Sansa has become in being forged by her experiences over the show . That vibe of not just practical reality of the dire situation , but at the same time , an almost cold veneer -- like you said , she 's needling Jon for compromising himself instead of negotiating a better deal with Dany .
domestication: 詹姆斯：琼恩和珊莎之间的对话很有意思，当她问他是否是为了北方的爱才这么做的时候，反映出珊莎通过这部剧的经历变成了怎样的人。她不仅仅关注眼前的危险现实，还有一种几乎冷漠的外表——就像你说的，她在批评琼恩妥协自己，而不是和丹妮莉丝谈判一个更好的协议。这其实透露了珊莎现在的性格，她变得很成熟，也很冷静，能够看到事情的真相，不再是以前那个天真的女孩了。

source: The role of the energy policy decisionmaker is quite frustrating . The public can be convinced to support high-minded actions--whether they be conserving energy or cleaning up environmental pollution--but a great many citizens want the costs to be borne by someone else , preferably a large and impersonal institution .
domestication: 制定能源政策的决策者真是很痛苦。大家都可能被说服去支持高尚的事情——无论是节约能源还是清除环境污染——但是很多人希望由别人来承担费用，最好是一个庞大而又没有具体形象的机构。这种想法真的让人感到很无奈：人人都想享受好处，却不愿意付出代价，这种“过河拆桥”的心态实在让人费解。
foreignization: 制定能源政策的决策者的角色相当令人沮丧。公众可以被说服支持高尚的行为，无论是节约能源还是清除环境污染，但很多公民都希望由别人承担成本，最好是一个庞大且没有个人色彩的机构。

source: We ca n't live with cars and we ca n't live without them . Automobiles consume almost half the petroleum used in the United States . They are responsible for more than 40,000 deaths each year , 3 million injuries , and billions of dollars in property damage . They are the largest source of air pollution in cities and send millions of Americans into speechless rage every day in traffic jams .
domestication: 没有汽车我们难以生活，但又被汽车搞得无所适从。汽车几乎耗尽了美国一半的石油资源，每年要了四万条命，造成三百万人受伤，经济损失也高达几十亿美元。汽车是城市空气污染的最大元凶，每天都要让数百万美国人被堵在路上，气得话都说不出来。
foreignization: 我们无法与汽车共存，我们也无法没有它们。汽车消耗了美国近一半的石油。它们每年导致超过40,000人死亡、300万人受伤和数十亿美元的财产损失。它们是城市中最大的空气污染源，并且每天都让数百万美国人因交通堵塞而愤怒得无言以对。

source: Lead character Kusuo Saiki has a bevy of psionic abilities that would put Jean Grey and Franklin Richards to shame , not just because of their sheer magnitude , but also because of his ( mostly ) fine-tuned control over them . After Saiki begins manifesting his powers as a baby , his regular human parents settle into a lifetime of raising a child who regularly reads their minds , teleports at will , and bends reality with the slightest of his thoughts .

foreignization: 主角齋藤千 Consort 拥有一系列的超能力，这些能力甚至可以让Jean Grey和Franklin Richards感到惭愧，不仅仅是因为这些能力的纯粹规模，还有因为他（大部分时候）对这些能力的精细控制。在Saiki还是婴儿的时候就开始展现出他的力量之后，他的普通人父母开始了一生中抚养一个孩子的生活，这个孩子可以轻松地读懂他们的想法，随心所欲地瞬间转移，并且可以通过稍微思考来改变现实。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Lead character Kusuo Saiki has a bevy of psionic abilities that would put Jean Grey and Franklin Richards to shame , not just because of their sheer magnitude , but also because of his ( mostly ) fine-tuned control over them . After Saiki begins manifesting his powers as a baby , his regular human parents settle into a lifetime of raising a child who regularly reads their minds , teleports at will , and bends reality with the slightest of his thoughts .
